name: HellaSwag
intro: HellaSwag是一个常识推理挑战数据集。人类在该数据集上的准确率超过95%，但先进的语言模型得分却很低。该数据集通过对抗性过滤（Adversarial Filtering）方法构建，旨在生成对机器而言极具挑战性、但对人类来说却很简单的句子补全问题。
org: University of Washington, Allen Institute for AI
intro_en: HellaSwag is a commonsense reasoning challenge dataset. Humans achieve over 95% accuracy on it, while advanced language models score much lower. The dataset is constructed using Adversarial Filtering to create sentence completion tasks that are very challenging for machines but easy for humans.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph "Phase 1: Initial Data Sourcing"
        A([Start: HellaSwag Construction])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        A --> B[/"Source: ActivityNet Captions & WikiHow Articles"/]
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "Phase 2: Context & Ending Generation"
        B --> C(Extract text passages as initial contexts)
        style C fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        C --> D(Generate a correct ending using the next sentence from the source)
        style D fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        D --> E[/Ground Truth Ending/]
        style E fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C --> F(Generate multiple wrong endings using a large language model)
        style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        F --> G[/Machine-Generated Wrong Endings/]
        style G fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "Phase 3: Adversarial Filtering (AF) Iteration"
        H(["Start AF Loop"])
        style H fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        G --> I(Combine ground truth and machine-generated endings)
        style I fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E --> I
        I --> J(Train a BERT-large discriminator to distinguish correct vs. wrong endings)
        style J fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        J --> K{Evaluate discriminator on a held-out set}
        style K fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        K --> L(Select the machine-generated endings that the discriminator incorrectly classifies as correct)
        style L fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        L --> M[/Adversarially Filtered Endings/]
        style M fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        M --> N{Repeat filtering process?}
        style N fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        N -->|Yes, for multiple iterations| J
        N -->|No, after several iterations| O(Collect all adversarially filtered endings)
        style O fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "Phase 4: Final Dataset Assembly & Validation"
        O --> P(Create multiple-choice questions: 1 context, 1 correct ending, 3 adversarial endings)
        style P fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        E --> P
        P --> Q(Perform human validation on the generated questions)
        style Q fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        Q --> R{Is the question trivial for humans? (e.g., >95% accuracy)}
        style R fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        R -->|Yes| S(Keep the question for the final dataset)
        style S fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        R -->|No| T(Discard the question)
        style T fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        S --> U[/Final HellaSwag Dataset (70k examples)/]
        style U fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        U --> V([End: HellaSwag Benchmark])
        style V fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    subgraph "阶段 1: 初始数据来源"
        A([开始: HellaSwag 构建])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        A --> B[/"来源: ActivityNet 字幕 & WikiHow 文章"/]
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "阶段 2: 上下文与结尾生成"
        B --> C(提取文本段落作为初始上下文)
        style C fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        C --> D(使用来源中的下一句话生成正确结尾)
        style D fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        D --> E[/真实结尾/]
        style E fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C --> F(使用大型语言模型生成多个错误结尾)
        style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        F --> G[/机器生成的错误结尾/]
        style G fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "阶段 3: 对抗性过滤 (AF) 迭代"
        H(["开始 AF 循环"])
        style H fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        G --> I(结合真实结尾和机器生成结尾)
        style I fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E --> I
        I --> J(训练 BERT-large 判别器以区分正确与错误结尾)
        style J fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        J --> K{在保留集上评估判别器}
        style K fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        K --> L(选择判别器错误分类为正确的机器生成结尾)
        style L fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        L --> M[/对抗性过滤后的结尾/]
        style M fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        M --> N{重复过滤过程?}
        style N fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        N -->|是, 进行多次迭代| J
        N -->|否, 经过几次迭代后| O(收集所有对抗性过滤后的结尾)
        style O fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "阶段 4: 最终数据集组装与验证"
        O --> P(创建多项选择题: 1 个上下文, 1 个正确结尾, 3 个对抗性结尾)
        style P fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        E --> P
        P --> Q(对生成的问题进行人工验证)
        style Q fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        Q --> R{问题对人类来说是否微不足道? (例如, >95% 准确率)}
        style R fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        R -->|是| S(保留问题用于最终数据集)
        style S fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        R -->|否| T(丢弃问题)
        style T fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        S --> U[/最终 HellaSwag 数据集 (70k 示例)/]
        style U fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        U --> V([结束: HellaSwag 基准测试])
        style V fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

name: HELMET
intro: HELMET是一个全面的基准测试，旨在有效且彻底地评估长上下文语言模型（LCLMs）。它涵盖了七个多样化的、以应用为中心的类别，解决了现有基准测试中存在的覆盖范围有限、上下文长度不足和评估指标不可靠等问题。HELMET通过增加可控的上下文长度（高达128K tokens）、基于模型的评估和少样本提示，提供了更可靠和一致的LCLM排名。研究发现，合成任务不能可靠预测下游性能，且HELMET中不同类别之间趋势各异、相关性低。
metric: Accuracy, Pass@k, F1, BLEU, Win Rate, Success Rate
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题, 摘要, 信息检索, 文本生成
eval_feature: 思维链, 零样本, 过程评估
task_type_en: Open-ended QA, Multiple Choice, Summarization, information retrieval, text generation
intro_en: HELMET is a comprehensive benchmark designed to effectively and thoroughly evaluate long-context language models (LCLMs). It covers seven diverse, application-focused categories, addressing limitations in existing benchmarks such as limited coverage, insufficient context length, and unreliable evaluation metrics. HELMET offers more reliable and consistent LCLM rankings by incorporating controllable context lengths (up to 128K tokens), model-based evaluation, and few-shot prompting. Studies show that synthetic tasks do not reliably predict downstream performance, and trends vary with low correlation across different categories within HELMET.
metric_en: Accuracy, Pass@k, F1, BLEU, Win Rate, Success Rate
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])

    subgraph Problem Identification["Problem Identification"]
        A(Identify Limitations of Existing LCLM Benchmarks) --> B{Noisy Signals?}
        B -- Yes --> C(Limited Coverage, Insufficient Context, Unreliable Metrics)
        C --> D(Incompatibility with Base Models)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Design["Benchmark Design"]
        D --> E(Introduce HELMET Benchmark)
        E --> F(Define Seven Diverse Application-Centric Categories)
        F --> G(Address Issues: Controllable Lengths up to 128K Tokens)
        G --> H(Address Issues: Model-Based Evaluation for Reliable Metrics)
        H --> I(Address Issues: Few-Shot Prompting for Robust Evaluation)
    end

    subgraph Data Preparation["Data Preparation"]
        I --> J[/Raw Datasets/]
        J --> K(Process Datasets for Controllable Lengths) --> L(Format Data for Few-Shot Prompting)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction["Benchmark Construction"]
        L --> M(Construct Benchmark Categories with Processed Data)
        M --> N(Integrate Controllable Lengths into Tasks)
        N --> O(Incorporate Few-Shot Prompting into Tasks)
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Setup["Evaluation Setup"]
        O --> P(Set Up Model-Based Evaluation Framework)
        P --> Q(Select 59 Long-Context Language Models for Study)
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Execution & Analysis["Evaluation Execution & Analysis"]
        Q --> R(Run Evaluations on 59 LCLMs)
        R --> S(Collect Performance Data)
        S --> T(Analyze Evaluation Results)
        T --> U{Synthetic Tasks Predict Performance?}
        U -- No --> V(Synthetic tasks (NIAH) do not reliably predict downstream performance)
        T --> W{Categories Exhibit Distinct Trends?}
        W -- Yes --> X(Diverse categories in HELMET exhibit distinct trends and low correlations)
        T --> Y{Open-Source vs. Closed Models Gap?}
        Y -- Yes --> Z(Open-source models lag closed ones in full-context reasoning, gap widens with length)
    end

    subgraph Recommendations["Recommendations"]
        V & X & Z --> AA(Recommend RAG Tasks for Fast Model Development)
        AA --> BB(Advocate Holistic Evaluation Across Diverse Tasks)
    end

    BB --> End([End])

    style A fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style B fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style C fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style D fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style G fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style H fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style I fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style J fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始])

    subgraph 问题识别["问题识别"]
        A(识别现有长上下文语言模型基准的局限性) --> B{存在噪声信号?}
        B -- 是 --> C(覆盖范围有限、上下文不足、指标不可靠)
        C --> D(与基础模型不兼容)
    end

    subgraph 基准设计["基准设计"]
        D --> E(引入HELMET基准)
        E --> F(定义七个多样化的以应用为中心的类别)
        F --> G(解决问题：高达128K令牌的可控长度)
        G --> H(解决问题：基于模型的评估以获得可靠的指标)
        H --> I(解决问题：少样本提示以进行稳健的评估)
    end

    subgraph 数据准备["数据准备"]
        I --> J[/原始数据集/]
        J --> K(处理数据集以获得可控长度) --> L(格式化数据以进行少样本提示)
    end

    subgraph 基准构建["基准构建"]
        L --> M(使用处理过的数据构建基准类别)
        M --> N(将可控长度集成到任务中)
        N --> O(将少样本提示整合到任务中)
    end

    subgraph 评估设置["评估设置"]
        O --> P(建立基于模型的评估框架)
        P --> Q(选择59个长上下文语言模型进行研究)
    end

    subgraph 评估执行与分析["评估执行与分析"]
        Q --> R(对59个长上下文语言模型进行评估)
        R --> S(收集性能数据)
        S --> T(分析评估结果)
        T --> U{综合任务能否预测性能?}
        U -- 否 --> V(综合任务（如NIAH）不能可靠地预测下游性能)
        T --> W{类别是否呈现不同趋势?}
        W -- 是 --> X(HELMET中的不同类别呈现出不同的趋势和低相关性)
        T --> Y{开源模型与闭源模型之间是否存在差距?}
        Y -- 是 --> Z(在全上下文推理方面，开源模型落后于闭源模型，差距随长度增加而扩大)
    end

    subgraph 建议["建议"]
        V & X & Z --> AA(推荐使用RAG任务进行快速模型开发)
        AA --> BB(倡导跨多样化任务进行整体评估)
    end

    BB --> End([结束])

name: HiPhO
intro: HiPhO基准测试通过高中物理奥林匹克竞赛题目评估(M)LLM的物理能力。它包含13套最新的奥林匹克竞赛试题，涵盖从纯文本到图表题的混合模态。该基准测试采用官方评分方案进行答案和步骤级别的细粒度评分，并根据官方奖牌阈值向模型授予金、银、铜牌，以便与人类参赛者进行直接比较。
org: Shanghai AI Lab, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen
build_method: 考试题改编, 人工标注
metric: Exam score, Gold, Silver, Bronze medals
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
eval_feature: 过程评估, 人机对比, 多模态
intro_en: The HiPhO benchmark evaluates (M)LLMs' physics abilities using high school physics Olympiad problems. It includes 13 sets of the latest Olympiad questions, covering mixed modalities from pure text to graphical problems. The benchmark applies the official scoring scheme for fine-grained evaluation at both answer and solution step levels, awarding gold, silver, and bronze medals to models based on official medal thresholds for direct comparison with human participants.
metric_en: Exam score, Gold, Silver, Bronze medals
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        A([Start]) --> B[/High School Physics Olympiad Problems/]
        B --> C(Identify Problem Sources)
        C --> D{Are problems suitable for LLMs?}
        D -- Yes --> E(Collect Problem Statements & Solutions)
        D -- No --> C
        E --> F(Standardize Problem Format)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Filtering & Preprocessing"]
        F --> G{Are there duplicate problems?}
        G -- Yes --> H(Remove Duplicates)
        G -- No --> I(Filter by Difficulty & Scope)
        H --> I
        I --> J{Meet benchmark criteria?}
        J -- Yes --> K(Preprocess Text & Equations)
        J -- No --> I
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Annotation & Quality Control"]
        K --> L(Expert Review for Accuracy)
        L --> M{Are solutions correct and clear?}
        M -- Yes --> N(Annotate with Step-by-Step Solutions)
        M -- No --> L
        N --> O(Cross-verify Annotations)
        O --> P{Annotation quality sufficient?}
        P -- Yes --> Q(Generate Metadata: Topics, Concepts)
        P -- No --> N
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Validation & Finalization"]
        Q --> R(Pilot Testing with LLMs)
        R --> S{LLM performance as expected?}
        S -- Yes --> T(Refine Problem Set & Annotations)
        S -- No --> R
        T --> U(Define Evaluation Metrics)
        U --> V(Final Benchmark Packaging)
        V --> W([End])
    end

    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

flowchart TD

        A([开始]) --> B[/高中物理奥林匹克竞赛题/]
        B --> C(识别问题来源)
        C --> D{问题是否适合LLMs？}
        D -- 是 --> E(收集问题陈述与解决方案)
        D -- 否 --> C
        E --> F(标准化问题格式)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["筛选与预处理"]
        F --> G{是否存在重复问题？}
        G -- 是 --> H(移除重复项)
        G -- 否 --> I(按难度与范围筛选)
        H --> I
        I --> J{符合基准测试标准？}
        J -- 是 --> K(预处理文本与方程)
        J -- 否 --> I
    end

    subgraph Phase3["标注与质量控制"]
        K --> L(专家审查准确性)
        L --> M{解决方案是否正确清晰？}
        M -- 是 --> N(标注分步解决方案)
        M -- 否 --> L
        N --> O(交叉验证标注)
        O --> P{标注质量是否足够？}
        P -- 是 --> Q(生成元数据：主题、概念)
        P -- 否 --> N
    end

    subgraph Phase4["验证与最终确定"]
        Q --> R(使用LLMs进行初步测试)
        R --> S{LLM性能是否符合预期？}
        S -- 是 --> T(完善问题集与标注)
        S -- 否 --> R
        T --> U(定义评估指标)
        U --> V(最终基准测试打包)
        V --> W([结束])
    end

name: HLE
intro: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) 是一个前沿的多模态基准，旨在评估高级AI系统在人类知识前沿的表现。该基准包含2500个由全球主题专家创建的选择题和简答题，覆盖数学、人文学科和自然科学等多个领域。HLE的设计目标是成为同类中最后一个封闭式学术基准，其问题无法通过简单的网络搜索快速解答，从而对当前最先进的LLM构成重大挑战。
org: Center for AI Safety and collaborating institutions
build_method: 由全球各领域的专家构建
eval_feature: 防污染, 零样本, 少样本, 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple choice and short answer questions
build_method_en: Constructed by experts from various global fields
intro_en: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) is a cutting-edge multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate advanced AI systems' performance at the forefront of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 multiple-choice and short-answer questions created by global subject experts, covering fields such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences. HLE aims to be the last closed-book academic benchmark of its kind, with questions that cannot be quickly answered through simple web searches, posing a significant challenge to state-of-the-art LLMs.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> InitialConcept(HLE Benchmark Concept) 

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        InitialConcept --> ExpertRecruitment(Recruit Subject-Matter Experts) 
        ExpertRecruitment --> QuestionSubmission(Experts Submit Questions) 
        QuestionSubmission --> SubmissionCriteria[/Strict Submission Criteria/]
        SubmissionCriteria --> QuestionFormat(Define Question Formats) 
        QuestionFormat --> QuestionComponents(Specify Required Components) 
        QuestionComponents --> DataCollection(Collect 2,500 Questions) 
        DataCollection --> QuestionTypes(Multi-modal, MCQs, Exact-match) 
    end

    subgraph Pre-screening & Filtering
        QuestionTypes --> LLMCheck(LLM Difficulty Check) 
        LLMCheck --> DecisionLLMFail{LLMs Fail Question?} 
        DecisionLLMFail -- Yes --> ExpertReviewRound1(Expert Review Round 1) 
        DecisionLLMFail -- No --> RejectQuestion(Reject Question) 
    end

    subgraph Expert Review & Refinement
        ExpertReviewRound1 --> Feedback(Provide Iterative Feedback) 
        Feedback --> QuestionRefinement(Refine Questions) 
        QuestionRefinement --> ExpertReviewRound2(Expert Review Round 2) 
        ExpertReviewRound2 --> OrganizerApproval(Organizer & Expert Approval) 
        OrganizerApproval --> DecisionApproved{Question Approved?} 
        DecisionApproved -- Yes --> FinalDataset(Add to Final Dataset) 
        DecisionApproved -- No --> RejectQuestion 
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation
        FinalDataset --> PrivateTestSet(Maintain Private Test Set) 
        FinalDataset --> PublicRelease(Public Release of HLE) 
        PublicRelease --> CommunityFeedback(Collect Community Feedback) 
        CommunityFeedback --> BugFixes(Address Concerns & Bug Fixes) 
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Metrics
        PublicRelease --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate Frontier LLMs on HLE) 
        LLMEvaluation --> AccuracyMetrics(Measure Accuracy) 
        LLMEvaluation --> CalibrationMetrics(Measure Calibration Error) 
        AccuracyMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis(Analyze Results) 
        CalibrationMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis 
    end

    ResultsAnalysis --> End([End])

    Start([开始]) --> InitialConcept(HLE基准概念) 

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection[数据来源与收集]
        InitialConcept --> ExpertRecruitment(招募领域专家) 
        ExpertRecruitment --> QuestionSubmission(专家提交问题) 
        QuestionSubmission --> SubmissionCriteria[/严格提交标准/]
        SubmissionCriteria --> QuestionFormat(定义问题格式) 
        QuestionFormat --> QuestionComponents(指定所需组件) 
        QuestionComponents --> DataCollection(收集2,500个问题) 
        DataCollection --> QuestionTypes(多模态、选择题、精确匹配) 
    end

    subgraph Pre-screening & Filtering[预筛选与过滤]
        QuestionTypes --> LLMCheck(LLM难度检查) 
        LLMCheck --> DecisionLLMFail{LLM未能回答问题?} 
        DecisionLLMFail -- 是 --> ExpertReviewRound1(专家评审第一轮) 
        DecisionLLMFail -- 否 --> RejectQuestion(拒绝问题) 
    end

    subgraph Expert Review & Refinement[专家评审与完善]
        ExpertReviewRound1 --> Feedback(提供迭代反馈) 
        Feedback --> QuestionRefinement(完善问题) 
        QuestionRefinement --> ExpertReviewRound2(专家评审第二轮) 
        ExpertReviewRound2 --> OrganizerApproval(组织者与专家批准) 
        OrganizerApproval --> DecisionApproved{问题已批准?} 
        DecisionApproved -- 是 --> FinalDataset(添加到最终数据集) 
        DecisionApproved -- 否 --> RejectQuestion 
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation[质量控制与验证]
        FinalDataset --> PrivateTestSet(维护私有测试集) 
        FinalDataset --> PublicRelease(HLE公开发布) 
        PublicRelease --> CommunityFeedback(收集社区反馈) 
        CommunityFeedback --> BugFixes(处理问题与错误修复) 
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Metrics[评估与指标]
        PublicRelease --> LLMEvaluation(评估前沿LLM在HLE上的表现) 
        LLMEvaluation --> AccuracyMetrics(测量准确率) 
        LLMEvaluation --> CalibrationMetrics(测量校准误差) 
        AccuracyMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis(分析结果) 
        CalibrationMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis 
    end

    ResultsAnalysis --> End([结束])

name: HLE-Verified
intro: HLE-Verified是“人类最后考试”（HLE）基准的修订和验证版本。它通过实施透明的验证协议，解决了原始HLE中存在噪声项目的问题。该过程涉及专家审查和基于模型的交叉检查，以验证并在必要时修复有缺陷的问题和答案，最终提高基准在评估大型语言模型方面的可靠性。
build_method: 专家审查, 模型交叉检查和独立专家修复
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
build_method_en: Expert review, model cross-checking, and independent expert correction
intro_en: HLE-Verified is a revised and validated version of the "Human Last Exam" (HLE) benchmark. It addresses the noisy items in the original HLE by implementing a transparent verification protocol. This process involves expert review and model-based cross-checking to validate and, when necessary, correct flawed questions and answers, ultimately enhancing the benchmark's reliability in evaluating large language models.

name: HR-Bench
intro: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在处理高分辨率（HR）图像的复杂细节方面仍面临挑战。HR-Bench是首个专门设计用于严格评估MLLM在4K和8K图像上性能的基准。该研究提出了一种名为Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC^2)的无训练框架，旨在增强MLLM对HR图像的感知能力。实验表明，DC^2显著提升了MLLM在HR图像基准上的表现。
org: Wuhan University, The University of Sydney, Jiangsu University, Sun Yat-Sen University, Nanyang Tech
intro_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still face challenges in handling complex details of high-resolution (HR) images. HR-Bench is the first benchmark specifically designed to rigorously evaluate MLLM performance on 4K and 8K images. This study proposes a training-free framework called Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC²) to enhance MLLM perception of HR images. Experiments show that DC² significantly improves MLLM performance on the HR image benchmark.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Input fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Process_Filter fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> A(Introduce HR-Bench: Evaluate MLLMs on 4K&8K Images)
    A --> B[/High-Resolution Images (4K&8K)/]

    subgraph DC2_Framework["DC^2 Framework: Training-Free Enhancement"]
        B --> C(Divide: Recursively Partition HR Image)
        C --> D{Similar Patches?}
        D -- Yes --> E(Merge Similar Patches)
        D -- No --> F(Keep Patches Separate)
        E --> G(Minimize Computational Overhead)
        F --> G
        G --> H(Conquer: MLLM Generates Textual Descriptions for Each Patch)
        H --> I(Combine: Utilize Text Descriptions)
        I --> J(Enhance MLLM Understanding of Overall HR Image)
    end

    J --> K(Conduct Extensive Experiments)
    K --> L(Evaluate SOTA MLLM Accuracy)
    L --> M{SOTA MLLM Accuracy < 87% (Human)?}
    M -- Yes --> N(SOTA MLLM: 63% Accuracy on HR-Bench)
    M -- No --> O(SOTA MLLM: High Accuracy)
    N --> P(Evaluate DC^2 Performance)
    O --> P
    P --> Q(DC^2: +6% on HR-Bench, +8% on General Benchmarks)
    Q --> R(Benchmark and Code Release)
    R --> End([End])

    subgraph DC2_Framework["DC^2 框架：免训练增强"]

        C --> D{是否存在相似补丁？}
        D -- 是 --> E(合并相似补丁)

    L --> M{SOTA多模态大语言模型准确性 < 87% (人类)？}

    M -- 否 --> O(SOTA多模态大语言模型：高准确性)
    N --> P(评估DC^2性能)
    O --> P
    P --> Q(DC^2：在HR-Bench上提升6%，在通用多模态基准上提升8%)
    Q --> R(基准和代码发布)
    R --> End([结束])

name: HumanEval
intro: HumanEval 是由OpenAI开发的一个评测基准，旨在衡量大型语言模型（LLM）在代码生成方面的能力。该基准包含了164个手写的编程问题，每个问题都提供了函数签名、文档字符串和单元测试，用以检验生成代码的函数正确性。
intro_en: HumanEval, developed by OpenAI, is a benchmark designed to evaluate the code generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It consists of 164 handcrafted programming problems, each providing a function signature, docstring, and unit tests to verify the correctness of the generated code.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing["Data Sourcing"]
        A([Start]) --> B(Identify need for code generation benchmark)
        B --> C(Define problem scope: Python function synthesis from docstrings)
        C --> D{Are existing benchmarks sufficient?}
        D -- No --> E(Handcraft 164 original programming problems)
        E --> F(Ensure problems assess language comprehension, algorithms, simple math)
        F --> G(Verify problems are comparable to simple software interview questions)
        G --> H(Avoid programmatic copying from existing sources)
    end

    subgraph Problem & Test Creation["Problem & Test Creation"]
        H --> I(Formulate problems as docstrings for standalone Python functions)
        I --> J(Develop comprehensive unit tests for each problem)
        J --> K(Ensure unit tests automatically check functional correctness)
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Framework["Evaluation Framework"]
        K --> L(Define pass@k metric for functional correctness)
        L --> M{Generate n >= k code samples per problem?}
        M -- Yes, e.g., n=200, k<=100 --> N(Count correct samples 'c' passing unit tests)
        N --> O(Calculate unbiased estimator for pass@k)
        O --> P(Use numerically stable numpy implementation for pass@k calculation)
        P --> Q(Employ sandbox environment for safe code execution)
    end

    subgraph Quality Control["Quality Control"]
        Q --> R{Do samples pass unit tests?}
        R -- No --> S(Iterate on problem/test refinement or model generation strategy)
        R -- Yes --> T(Report total fraction of problems solved)
    end

    T --> U([End])

name: Humanity’s Last Code Exam
intro: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) 是一个极具挑战性的代码生成基准，收录了2010年至2024年间ICPC世界总决赛和IOI的235道最难题。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型的高级推理和代码生成能力，并提供了一个可复现的沙箱环境用于评测。此外，它还引入了“自我认知”任务来衡量模型对其自身能力的认知水平。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Huawei Noah's Ark Lab
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) is a highly challenging code generation benchmark featuring 235 of the toughest problems from the ICPC World Finals and IOI between 2010 and 2024. It aims to evaluate large language models' advanced reasoning and code generation abilities and provides a reproducible sandbox environment for testing. Additionally, it introduces a "self-awareness" task to measure models' understanding of their own capabilities.

name: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE)
intro: 人类的终极考试 (HLE) 是一个多模态基准测试，旨在衡量大型语言模型 (LLM) 在人类知识前沿的能力。该基准包含2500道跨数学、人文和自然科学等数十个科目的问题，由全球主题专家开发。HLE的问题设计独特，具有明确且易于验证的已知答案，但无法通过互联网快速检索。目前最先进的LLM在该基准上表现出较低的准确性和校准度，这突显了当前LLM能力与人类专家水平之间的显著差距。
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE) is a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate large language models’ (LLM) capabilities at the frontier of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 questions across dozens of subjects such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences, developed by global domain experts. HLE’s questions are uniquely designed with clear, verifiable known answers that cannot be quickly retrieved from the internet. State-of-the-art LLMs currently show low accuracy and calibration on this benchmark, highlighting a significant gap between their abilities and human expert levels.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> InitialConcept(HLE Benchmark Concept) 

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        InitialConcept --> ExpertRecruitment(Recruit Subject-Matter Experts) 
        ExpertRecruitment --> QuestionSubmission(Experts Submit Questions) 
        QuestionSubmission --> SubmissionCriteria[/Strict Submission Criteria/]
        SubmissionCriteria --> QuestionFormat(Define Question Formats) 
        QuestionFormat --> QuestionComponents(Specify Required Components) 
        QuestionComponents --> DataCollection(Collect 2,500 Questions) 
        DataCollection --> QuestionTypes(Multi-modal, MCQs, Exact-match) 
    end

    subgraph Pre-screening & Filtering
        QuestionTypes --> LLMCheck(LLM Difficulty Check) 
        LLMCheck --> DecisionLLMFail{LLMs Fail Question?} 
        DecisionLLMFail -- Yes --> ExpertReviewRound1(Expert Review Round 1) 
        DecisionLLMFail -- No --> RejectQuestion(Reject Question) 
    end

    subgraph Expert Review & Refinement
        ExpertReviewRound1 --> Feedback(Provide Iterative Feedback) 
        Feedback --> QuestionRefinement(Refine Questions) 
        QuestionRefinement --> ExpertReviewRound2(Expert Review Round 2) 
        ExpertReviewRound2 --> OrganizerApproval(Organizer & Expert Approval) 
        OrganizerApproval --> DecisionApproved{Question Approved?} 
        DecisionApproved -- Yes --> FinalDataset(Add to Final Dataset) 
        DecisionApproved -- No --> RejectQuestion 
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation
        FinalDataset --> PrivateTestSet(Maintain Private Test Set) 
        FinalDataset --> PublicRelease(Public Release of HLE) 
        PublicRelease --> CommunityFeedback(Collect Community Feedback) 
        CommunityFeedback --> BugFixes(Address Concerns & Bug Fixes) 
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Metrics
        PublicRelease --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate Frontier LLMs on HLE) 
        LLMEvaluation --> AccuracyMetrics(Measure Accuracy) 
        LLMEvaluation --> CalibrationMetrics(Measure Calibration Error) 
        AccuracyMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis(Analyze Results) 
        CalibrationMetrics --> ResultsAnalysis 
    end

    ResultsAnalysis --> End([End])

name: IFBench
intro: IFBench评估语言模型遵循精确指令的泛化能力，特别是面对陌生输出约束。包含58个新颖且难度较高的可验证域外约束，并提出基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法提升指令执行。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
scale: 58个约束，约300个单轮提示，约1300个多轮样本
intro_en: IFBench evaluates language models' ability to generalize in following precise instructions, especially when facing unfamiliar output constraints. It includes 58 novel and challenging verifiable out-of-domain constraints and proposes a reinforcement learning method based on verifiable rewards to improve instruction execution.
scale_en: 58 items constraints, about 300 items single-turn prompts, about 1300 items multi-turn samples

name: IFEval
intro: IFEval是一个评估大型语言模型遵循自然语言指令能力的基准，解决了人工评测成本高和自动评测偏差问题。包含约500个带有可验证指令（如字数或关键词要求）的提示，实现客观评估。
intro_en: IFEval is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to follow natural language instructions, addressing high costs of human evaluation and biases in automatic evaluation. It includes about 500 prompts with verifiable instructions (e.g., word count or keyword requirements) to enable objective assessment.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style data_collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style processing_filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style annotation_labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style quality_control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style evaluation_metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style output_result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    start_node([Start])

    subgraph Instruction Definition
        A[Identify Verifiable Instruction Types]:::data_collection
        B(Define 25 Instruction Types):::processing_filtering
        C{Are instructions objectively verifiable?}:::quality_control
        D(Refine Instruction Definitions):::processing_filtering
        E[Verifiable Instruction List]:::output_result
        A --> B
        B --> C
        C -- No --> D
        C -- Yes --> E
    end

    subgraph Prompt Generation
        F[Generate ~500 Prompts]:::data_collection
        G(Include 1+ Verifiable Instructions per Prompt):::processing_filtering
        H(Create Multiple Variants per Instruction):::processing_filtering
        I[Prompt Dataset]:::output_result
        E --> F
        F --> G
        G --> H
        H --> I
    end

    subgraph Model Response Collection
        J[/LLM Models (GPT-4, PaLM 2)/]:::data_collection
        K(Scrap Responses via API Calls):::data_collection
        L[Raw Model Responses]:::output_result
        I --> K
        J --> K
        K --> L
    end

    subgraph Instruction Verification
        M(Apply Response Transformation Functions):::processing_filtering

    subgraph Evaluation & Analysis

name: IMO-AnswerBench
intro: IMO-AnswerBench是一个高级数学推理基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在国际数学奥林匹克竞赛级别问题上的表现。它包含400个多样化的奥林匹克问题，这些问题具有可验证的简短答案。该基准测试在推动模型数学推理能力方面发挥了关键作用。
intro_en: IMO-AnswerBench is an advanced mathematical reasoning benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on International Mathematical Olympiad-level problems. It contains 400 diverse Olympiad questions with verifiable short answers. This benchmark plays a key role in advancing models' mathematical reasoning abilities.

        C2 -->|Generate Solutions| C3

    subgraph DataPreparation["Data Preparation & Annotation"]

        style D2 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        D2 -->|Add Metadata| D3

    subgraph QualityControl["Quality Control & Validation"]
        E1{Check Problem & Solution Consistency}

name: INCLUDE
intro: Include是一个综合性的、以知识和推理为中心的基准测试，旨在评估多语言大型语言模型在不同区域和文化背景下的表现。该基准测试包含197,243个问答对，来源于44种书面语言的本地考试资源，以解决现有评估资源不足和翻译偏差的问题。它通过收集特定国家的教育、专业和职业执照考试，确保了对区域知识和文化细微差别的准确反映，从而促进了多语言LLM在实际语言环境中的有效部署。
org: EPFL, Cohere For AI, Cohere For AI Community, ETH Zurich, Swiss AI Initiative
build_method: 人工标注, 考试题改编
intro_en: Include is a comprehensive, knowledge- and reasoning-centered benchmark designed to evaluate multilingual large language models across different regions and cultural contexts. It contains 197,243 QA pairs sourced from native exam materials in 44 written languages, addressing the limitations of existing evaluation resources and translation biases. By collecting education, professional, and licensing exams specific to each country, it ensures accurate representation of regional knowledge and cultural nuances, promoting effective deployment of multilingual LLMs in real-world language settings.

name: InfiniteBench
intro: InfiniteBench是首个平均数据长度超过10万标记的大语言模型（LLM）基准。它涵盖了合成与真实世界的任务，涉及多个领域，并同时支持英文和中文。该基准测试中的任务旨在要求模型对上下文中的长距离依赖关系有深入的理解，仅仅从上下文中检索有限的段落不足以完成这些任务。
build_method: 混合, 自动生成, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 代码生成, 数学问题, 文本摘要
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Code Generation, Math Problems, Text Summarization
intro_en: InfiniteBench is the first large language model (LLM) benchmark with an average data length exceeding 100,000 tokens. It covers both synthetic and real-world tasks across multiple domains and supports both English and Chinese. The tasks in this benchmark require models to deeply understand long-range dependencies in the context; retrieving only limited paragraphs from the context is insufficient to complete these tasks.

name: InfoVQA
intro: InfographicVQA是一个用于信息图表视觉问答的新数据集。它包含多样化的信息图表、自然语言问题和答案标注。该数据集旨在评估模型对文档布局、文本内容、图形元素和数据可视化进行联合推理的能力，并侧重于需要基本推理和算术技能的问题。
org: Wadhwani AI, International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad, Indian Institute of Scienc
build_method: 人工标注, 网络爬取
intro_en: InfographicVQA is a new dataset for visual question answering on infographics. It includes diverse infographics, natural language questions, and annotated answers. The dataset aims to evaluate models' ability to jointly reason over document layout, textual content, graphical elements, and data visualization, focusing on questions requiring basic reasoning and arithmetic skills.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start])
    style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        A[Define Search Query] --> B(Search "infographics" on Internet)
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        B --> C[/Downloaded Infographic Images/]
        style C fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C --> D{Image Duplicates?}
        style D fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        D -- Yes --> E(Remove Duplicates)
        style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        D -- No --> F[/Cleaned Infographic Images (5,485)/]
        E --> F
        style F fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

name: Inverse IFEval
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理与训练范式冲突的指令时表现出认知惯性。Inverse IFEval基准旨在评估LLMs克服训练偏见并遵循对抗性指令的能力。该基准包含八种挑战类型，涵盖23个领域，通过人机协作流程构建了1012个高质量的中英文问题，并采用LLM-as-a-Judge框架进行评估。
org: ByteDance Seed, Nanjing University, Peking University, Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunica
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit cognitive inertia when handling instructions that conflict with their training paradigms. The Inverse IFEval benchmark aims to assess LLMs' ability to overcome training biases and follow adversarial instructions. It includes eight challenge types across 23 domains, featuring 1,012 high-quality Chinese and English questions created through a human-AI collaborative process, and is evaluated using the LLM-as-a-Judge framework.

name: JailBench
intro: JailBench是首个针对中文环境设计的LLM深层安全漏洞评测基准，采用细化的分层安全分类体系和创新的自动越狱提示工程框架（AJPE）构建。该基准面向《网络安全技术 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求》的训练数据及生成内容的主要安全风险标准分类设计，是目前公开发布的题库规模最大、越狱攻击手段覆盖最为广泛的中文评测数据集。
build_method: 网络资源搜集, 人工整理编写, 大模型辅助生成
build_method_en: Web Resource Collection, Manual Curation and Writing, Large Model Assisted Generation
intro_en: JailBench is the first LLM deep security vulnerability benchmark designed for the Chinese environment. It is built using a refined hierarchical security classification system and an innovative Automatic Jailbreak Prompt Engineering framework (AJPE). This benchmark is designed based on the main security risk classification standards for training data and generated content outlined in the "Cybersecurity Technology Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services." It is currently the largest publicly released Chinese evaluation dataset in terms of question bank size and the most comprehensive in coverage of jailbreak attack methods.

name: JailJudge
intro: JailJudge是一个用于全面评估大型语言模型（LLM）抵御越狱攻击能力的基准。它包含了合成、对抗性、真实世界和多语言等多种风险场景，并配备了高质量的人工标注数据集。该基准还引入了一个多智能体框架，以提供可解释的细粒度评分，并推出了一个端到端的评判模型JAILJUDGE Guard。
org: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
metric: Accuracy, Attack Success Rate (ASR), F1 Score
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
intro_en: JailJudge is a benchmark for comprehensively evaluating large language models' (LLM) resistance to jailbreak attacks. It includes various risk scenarios such as synthetic, adversarial, real-world, and multilingual, accompanied by a high-quality human-annotated dataset. The benchmark also introduces a multi-agent framework for interpretable fine-grained scoring and launches an end-to-end evaluation model, JAILJUDGE Guard.
metric_en: Accuracy, Attack Success Rate (ASR), F1 Score

name: K-QA
intro: K-QA是一个真实世界的医疗问答基准，旨在解决大型语言模型在临床环境中提供准确回复的关键挑战。该数据集包含1,212个源自K Health（一个AI驱动的临床平台）真实对话的患者问题。通过内部医生团队对问题进行回答和手动分解，并提出了两种基于NLI的评估指标：全面性和幻觉率，用于评估生成答案的准确性。K-QA可用于促进医学NLP应用的研究。
intro_en: K-QA is a real-world medical question answering benchmark designed to address the key challenge of providing accurate responses by large language models in clinical settings. The dataset contains 1,212 patient questions sourced from real conversations on K Health, an AI-driven clinical platform. An internal team of physicians answered and manually decomposed the questions, and two NLI-based evaluation metrics—comprehensiveness and hallucination rate—were proposed to assess the accuracy of generated answers. K-QA can be used to advance research in medical NLP applications.

name: KORBench
intro: KOR-Bench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在知识正交推理任务上表现的基准测试。它通过最小化对领域特定知识的依赖，更准确地评估模型在分布外设置中的推理能力。该基准测试包含操作、逻辑、密码、谜题和反事实五种任务类别，强调模型应用新规则描述来解决新规则驱动问题的有效性。KOR-Bench旨在增强推理评估并支持该领域的进一步研究。
org: Multimodal Art Projection Research Community, ByteDance.Inc, 01.AI, 2077.AI, Tongji University, Écol
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: KOR-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' performance on knowledge-orthogonal reasoning tasks. By minimizing reliance on domain-specific knowledge, it more accurately assesses models' reasoning abilities in out-of-distribution settings. The benchmark includes five task categories: operations, logic, cryptography, puzzles, and counterfactuals, emphasizing the models' effectiveness in applying new rule descriptions to solve rule-driven problems. KOR-Bench aims to enhance reasoning evaluation and support further research in this field.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    %% Style Definitions
    classDef startEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff;
    classDef dataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff;

    classDef evaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff;
    classDef outputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff;

    start([Benchmark Creation Start]):::startEnd

    subgraph Phase_1["Data Sourcing & Initial Design"]
        A[Define Knowledge-Orthogonal Reasoning (KOR) Concept]:::dataCollection
        B(Manually Define 25 Rules per Category)-->|5 Task Categories| C[/Initial Rule Set/]
        C-->D(Modify Rules for Knowledge Orthogonality):::processingFiltering
        D-->E[/Orthogonal Rule Set/]
    end

    subgraph Phase_2["Problem Generation & Dataset Assembly"]
        E-->F(Generate 10 Problem Instances per Rule):::dataCollection
        F-->G[/Raw Problem Instances/]
        G-->H(Categorize Problems into 5 Tasks):::processingFiltering
        H-->I[/Categorized Problems/]
        I-->J(Define Answer Formats: NR, ME, TR, MC, SD):::annotationLabeling
        J-->K[/Initial KOR-Bench Dataset/]
    end

    subgraph Phase_3["Quality Control & Refinement"]
        K-->L{Rules Orthogonal to Pre-training Data?}:::qualityControl
        L--Yes-->M{Problems Valid for Rule-Driven Reasoning?}:::qualityControl
        L--No-->D
        M--Yes-->N(Expert Review & Refinement of Rules/Problems):::annotationLabeling
        M--No-->F
        N-->O[/Refined KOR-Bench Dataset/]
    end

    subgraph Phase_4["Evaluation & Analysis"]
        O-->P(Define Evaluation Strategies)-->|Zero-shot for Chat, Three-shot for Base| Q(Evaluate LLMs on KOR-Bench):::evaluationMetric
        Q-->R[/Model Performance Data/]
        R-->S(Analyze Performance across Tasks & Sub-steps):::evaluationMetric
        S-->T(Conduct Further Analyses: Self-Correction, Complex Tasks, Tricks, Attention):::evaluationMetric
        T-->U[/Detailed Analysis Results/]
    end

    U-->V{Benchmark Requirements Met?}:::qualityControl
    V--No-->N
    V--Yes-->end_node([KOR-Bench Finalized]):::startEnd

    %% Link phases
    start --> A
    E --> F
    K --> L
    O --> P
    U --> V

    start([基准创建开始]):::startEnd

name: L-V-Eval
intro: L-V-Eval是一个具有五个长度等级（16k至256k词）的长上下文基准。包含单跳和多跳问答两大任务，涉及11个双语数据集。通过插入混淆事实和关键词替换等技术，更客观地评估大型语言模型的长上下文处理能力。
org: Infinigence AI, Tsinghua University, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Jiao Tong Univers
build_method: 混合, 人工标注, LLM生成
intro_en: L-V-Eval is a long-context benchmark with five length levels (16k to 256k tokens). It includes single-hop and multi-hop QA tasks across 11 bilingual datasets. Techniques like inserting distracting facts and keyword replacement are used to more objectively evaluate large language models' long-context processing abilities.

    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> InputData[/11 Bilingual Datasets/]

    subgraph Data Collection
        InputData --> DataSourcing(Source Data from Public Datasets)
        DataSourcing --> InitialQA(Extract Question-Answer Pairs)
    end

    subgraph Context Generation
        InitialQA --> ContextLengthLevels(Define 5 Length Levels: 16k, 32k, 64k, 128k, 256k)
        ContextLengthLevels --> MixDocuments(Mix Distracting & Supporting Documents)
        MixDocuments --> ShuffleDocuments(Shuffle Documents & Prepend "Passage i")
        ShuffleDocuments --> ConfusingFactsInsertion(CFI: Insert Confusing Facts by GPT-4)
        ConfusingFactsInsertion --> HumanReviewCFI{Human Review CFI Conflicts?}
        HumanReviewCFI -- Yes --> ReviseCFI(Revise CFI Rules)
        HumanReviewCFI -- No --> KeywordPhraseReplacement(KPR: Replace Keywords & Phrases)
        KeywordPhraseReplacement --> HumanReviewKPR{Human Review KPR Conflicts?}
        HumanReviewKPR -- Yes --> ReviseKPR(Revise KPR Rules)
        HumanReviewKPR -- No --> FinalContext(Form Final Context for Each Length Level)
    end

    subgraph Metric Design & Annotation
        FinalContext --> ManualAnnotation(Manually Annotate Answer Keywords & Blacklist)
        ManualAnnotation --> GoldenAnswers[/Critical Words/]
        ManualAnnotation --> WordBlacklist[/Common Non-informative Words/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation
        FinalContext --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate 15 LLMs on LV-Eval)
        LLMEvaluation --> MetricCalculation(Calculate Keyword-Recall-Based Metric)
        MetricCalculation --> RecallThreshold{Recall > Threshold (0.2 for CN, 0.4 for EN)?}
        RecallThreshold -- Yes --> RemoveBlacklistedWords(Remove Blacklisted Words)
        RemoveBlacklistedWords --> CalculateF1(Calculate F1 Score)
        RecallThreshold -- No --> ZeroScore(Assign Zero Score)
        CalculateF1 --> FinalScore(Obtain Final Score)
        ZeroScore --> FinalScore
        FinalScore --> Results(Summarize Evaluation Results)
    end

    Results --> End([End])

    classDef Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Processing fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class Start Start
    class End End
    class InputData DataCollection
    class DataSourcing DataCollection
    class InitialQA DataCollection

    class ReviseKPR QualityControl
    class FinalContext Processing
    class ManualAnnotation Annotation
    class GoldenAnswers Annotation
    class WordBlacklist Annotation
    class LLMEvaluation Evaluation
    class MetricCalculation Evaluation
    class RecallThreshold QualityControl
    class RemoveBlacklistedWords Evaluation
    class CalculateF1 Evaluation
    class ZeroScore Evaluation
    class FinalScore Evaluation
    class Results Output

flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> InputData[/11 个双语数据集/]

    subgraph 数据收集
        InputData --> DataSourcing(从公共数据集中获取数据)
        DataSourcing --> InitialQA(提取问答对)
    end

    subgraph 上下文生成
        InitialQA --> ContextLengthLevels(定义 5 个长度级别: 16k, 32k, 64k, 128k, 256k)
        ContextLengthLevels --> MixDocuments(混合干扰性与支持性文档)
        MixDocuments --> ShuffleDocuments(打乱文档并添加“Passage i”前缀)
        ShuffleDocuments --> ConfusingFactsInsertion(CFI: 插入 GPT-4 生成的混淆事实)
        ConfusingFactsInsertion --> HumanReviewCFI{人工审查 CFI 冲突?}
        HumanReviewCFI -- 是 --> ReviseCFI(修订 CFI 规则)
        HumanReviewCFI -- 否 --> KeywordPhraseReplacement(KPR: 替换关键词和短语)
        KeywordPhraseReplacement --> HumanReviewKPR{人工审查 KPR 冲突?}
        HumanReviewKPR -- 是 --> ReviseKPR(修订 KPR 规则)
        HumanReviewKPR -- 否 --> FinalContext(为每个长度级别形成最终上下文)
    end

    subgraph 指标设计与标注
        FinalContext --> ManualAnnotation(手动标注答案关键词与黑名单)
        ManualAnnotation --> GoldenAnswers[/关键单词/]
        ManualAnnotation --> WordBlacklist[/常见非信息性词语/]
    end

    subgraph 评估
        FinalContext --> LLMEvaluation(在 LV-Eval 上评估 15 个 LLM)
        LLMEvaluation --> MetricCalculation(计算基于关键词召回的指标)
        MetricCalculation --> RecallThreshold{召回率 > 阈值 (中文 0.2, 英文 0.4)?}
        RecallThreshold -- 是 --> RemoveBlacklistedWords(移除黑名单词语)
        RemoveBlacklistedWords --> CalculateF1(计算 F1 分数)
        RecallThreshold -- 否 --> ZeroScore(分配零分)
        CalculateF1 --> FinalScore(获得最终分数)
        ZeroScore --> FinalScore
        FinalScore --> Results(总结评估结果)
    end

    Results --> End([结束])

name: LAB-Bench
intro: LAB-Bench是一个用于评估AI系统在生物学研究中实际能力的大型基准测试。它包含2400多个多项选择题，涵盖了文献回顾、图表解读、数据库访问和DNA/蛋白质序列操作等任务。该基准旨在评估语言模型在科学研究工作流中的表现，并作为开发自动化研究系统的有用工具。
intro_en: LAB-Bench is a large benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems' practical capabilities in biological research. It includes over 2,400 multiple-choice questions covering tasks such as literature review, chart interpretation, database access, and DNA/protein sequence manipulation. The benchmark aims to assess language models' performance in scientific research workflows and serves as a useful tool for developing automated research systems.

name: LifelongAgentBench
intro: LifelongAgentBench是首个统一基准，系统评估大型语言模型智能体的终身学习能力。涵盖数据库、操作系统和知识图谱三大交互环境，支持自动标签验证、可复现性和模块化扩展。
org: South China University of Technology, MBZUAI, Chinese Academy of Sciences, East China Normal Univers
scale: 22 SQL skills, 29 Bash skills, and SPARQL tasks
intro_en: LifelongAgentBench is the first unified benchmark that systematically evaluates the lifelong learning ability of large language model agents. It covers three interactive environments: databases, operating systems, and knowledge graphs, supporting automatic label verification, reproducibility, and modular extensibility.
scale_en: 22 SQL skills, 29 Bash skills, and SPARQL tasks
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataSourcing fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> A(Define Lifelong Learning Problem)
    A --> B(Identify Key Challenges for LLM Agents)
    B --> C(Propose LifelongAgentBench Concept)

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Design"]
        C --> D(Establish Design Principles)
        D --> D1(Skill-Centric Task Generation)
        D --> D2(Control Skill Distribution & Complexity)
        D --> D3(Manage Noise for Real-World Variability)
        D1 --> E{Select Interactive Environments?}
        E --> E1[/Database (DB)/]
        E --> E2[/Operating System (OS)/]
        E --> E3[/Knowledge Graph (KG)/]
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Data Collection & Generation"]
        E1 --> F(Implement DB Environment: Docker-MySQL)
        F --> F1(Identify 22 SQL Skills)
        F1 --> G(Generate SQL Queries using DeepSeek-R1)
        G --> G1(Execute Queries on Synthetic DB)
        E2 --> H(Implement OS Environment: Docker-Ubuntu)
        H --> H1(Define 29 Bash Command Skills)
        H1 --> I(Generate Command Sequences using DeepSeek-R1)
        I --> I1(Group Tasks by Complexity: 1-12 commands)
        E3 --> J(Implement KG Environment: SPARQL System)
        J --> J1(Curate Tasks from GrailQA Dataset)
        J1 --> K(Map S-expressions to Logical Action Sequences)
        K --> K1(Generate Queries for 2-9 Steps)
        K1 --> K2(Validate Queries on Synthetic KG)
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Filtering & Refinement"]
        G1 --> L{Invalid/Inconsistent DB Task?}
        L -- Yes --> G
        L -- No --> M(Discard Invalid DB Tasks)
        M --> N(Ensure Min 20 Occurrences per Skill for 500 Tasks)
        I1 --> O(Validate OS Command Outputs via Scripts & Checksums)
        O --> O1{Simple OS Tasks?}
        O1 -- Yes --> P(Exclude Simple OS Tasks < 9 Steps)
        O1 -- No --> Q(Focus on Complex OS Tasks: 9-12 Steps)
        K2 --> R{Complex KG Query (7-9 Steps)?}
        R -- Yes --> S(Manual Validation for Semantic Accuracy)
        R -- No --> T(Ensure Uniform Distribution of Task Lengths)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Annotation & Verification"]
        N --> U(Automated DB Label Verification: Result Matching, MD5 Hashing)
        U --> V(Manual DB Review: 10% Random Sample for Syntax/Coherence)
        Q --> W(Automated OS Label Verification: Exit Code Checking)
        W --> X(Manual OS Review: 10% Random Sample for Logical Consistency)
        S --> Y(Automated KG Label Verification: SPARQL Output Verification)
        Y --> Z(Manual KG Review: 10% Random Sample for Practical Relevance)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Quality Control & Final Benchmark Assembly"]
        V --> AA(Balance Skills in DB: Stratified Sampling for 500 Tasks)
        X --> BB(Curate 500 Complex OS Tasks)
        Z --> CC(Extract 396 KG Tasks from GrailQA)
        AA & BB & CC --> DD(Integrate Datasets into Unified Framework)
        DD --> EE(Containerize Environments for Reproducibility)
        EE --> FF(Implement Modular APIs for Extensibility)
        FF --> GG(Final LifelongAgentBench Dataset)
    end

    GG --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> A(定义终身学习问题)
    A --> B(识别LLM代理的关键挑战)
    B --> C(提出LifelongAgentBench概念)

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与设计"]
        C --> D(建立设计原则)
        D --> D1(以技能为中心的任务生成)
        D --> D2(控制技能分布与复杂性)
        D --> D3(管理噪声以模拟真实世界变异性)
        D1 --> E{选择交互环境？}
        E --> E1[/数据库 (DB)/]
        E --> E2[/操作系统 (OS)/]
        E --> E3[/知识图谱 (KG)/]
    end

    subgraph Phase2["数据收集与生成"]
        E1 --> F(实现DB环境：Docker-MySQL)
        F --> F1(识别22个SQL技能)
        F1 --> G(使用DeepSeek-R1生成SQL查询)
        G --> G1(在合成数据库上执行查询)
        E2 --> H(实现OS环境：Docker-Ubuntu)
        H --> H1(定义29个Bash命令技能)
        H1 --> I(使用DeepSeek-R1生成命令序列)
        I --> I1(按复杂性分组任务：1-12个命令)
        E3 --> J(实现KG环境：SPARQL系统)
        J --> J1(从GrailQA数据集中筛选任务)
        J1 --> K(将S-表达式映射到逻辑动作序列)
        K --> K1(生成2-9步的查询)
        K1 --> K2(在合成知识图谱上验证查询)
    end

    subgraph Phase3["过滤与优化"]
        G1 --> L{DB任务无效/不一致？}
        L -- 是 --> G
        L -- 否 --> M(丢弃无效DB任务)
        M --> N(确保500个任务中每个技能至少出现20次)
        I1 --> O(通过脚本和校验和验证OS命令输出)
        O --> O1{OS任务是否简单？}
        O1 -- 是 --> P(排除少于9步的简单OS任务)
        O1 -- 否 --> Q(专注于复杂OS任务：9-12步)
        K2 --> R{KG查询是否复杂 (7-9步)？}
        R -- 是 --> S(手动验证语义准确性)
        R -- 否 --> T(确保任务长度分布均匀)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["标注与验证"]
        N --> U(自动化DB标签验证：结果匹配，MD5哈希)
        U --> V(手动DB审查：10%随机样本的语法/一致性)
        Q --> W(自动化OS标签验证：退出代码检查)
        W --> X(手动OS审查：10%随机样本的逻辑一致性)
        S --> Y(自动化KG标签验证：SPARQL输出验证)
        Y --> Z(手动KG审查：10%随机样本的实际相关性)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["质量控制与最终基准组装"]
        V --> AA(平衡DB中的技能：对500个任务进行分层抽样)
        X --> BB(筛选500个复杂OS任务)
        Z --> CC(从GrailQA中提取396个KG任务)
        AA & BB & CC --> DD(将数据集整合到统一框架中)
        DD --> EE(容器化环境以实现可复现性)
        EE --> FF(实现模块化API以实现可扩展性)
        FF --> GG(最终的LifelongAgentBench数据集)
    end

    GG --> End([结束])

name: LingoQA
intro: LingoQA是一个针对自动驾驶领域视觉问答的新型数据集和基准。该数据集包含2.8万个独特的短视频场景和41.9万个标注。对最先进的视觉语言模型进行评估表明，它们的性能仍低于人类水平。LingoQA引入了一个名为Lingo-Judge的真实性分类器，其与人类评估的Spearman相关系数达到0.95，超越了现有技术。该基准旨在作为自动驾驶视觉语言模型的评估平台。
intro_en: LingoQA is a novel dataset and benchmark for visual question answering in the autonomous driving domain. It contains 28,000 unique short video scenes and 419,000 annotations. Evaluations of state-of-the-art vision-language models show their performance still lags behind human level. LingoQA introduces Lingo-Judge, a fidelity classifier with a Spearman correlation of 0.95 against human evaluations, surpassing existing methods. This benchmark aims to serve as an evaluation platform for autonomous driving vision-language models.

    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) StartEnd

    subgraph Data Acquisition["Data Acquisition Phase"]
        A[/Autonomous Driving Video Scenarios/] DataCollection
        B(Collect 28K Unique Short Video Scenarios) DataCollection

name: LiveBench
intro: LiveBench是一个为大型语言模型设计的基准测试，旨在抵抗测试集污染和評審偏見。它包含来自最新信息源并频繁更新的问题，能够自动评分，涵盖数学、编程、推理、语言理解、指令遵循和数据分析等多种具有挑战性的任务。
org: Abacus.AI, New York University, NVIDIA, University of Maryland, USC, Columbia University, xAI
build_method: 混合, 自动生成, 网络爬取, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 代码生成, 补全
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 零样本
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Code Generation, Completion
build_method_en: Hybrid, Automated Generation, Web Crawling, Expert Curation
intro_en: LiveBench is a benchmark designed for large language models to resist test set contamination and reviewer bias. It includes frequently updated questions from the latest information sources, supports automatic scoring, and covers a range of challenging tasks such as mathematics, programming, reasoning, language understanding, instruction following, and data analysis.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    A([Start: LiveBench Benchmark Construction])
    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["Initialization & Problem Definition"]
        B(Identify LLM Evaluation Challenges) --> C(Define Resistance to Contamination & Bias)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        D[/Recent Math Competitions/] --> E(Collect Questions from Diverse Sources)
        F[/arXiv Papers/] --> E
        G[/News Articles/] --> E
        H[/Datasets/] --> E
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Task Creation & Adaptation"]
        E --> I(Generate New Questions)
        I --> J(Adapt Existing Benchmark Tasks)
        J --> K{Is Task Contamination-Limited?}
        K -- Yes --> L(Create Harder Task Versions)
        K -- No --> I
        L --> M(Categorize Tasks: Math, Coding, Reasoning, Language, Instruction Following, Data Analysis)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Answer Scoring & Ground Truth Generation"]
        M --> N(Develop Automatic Scoring Mechanisms)
        N --> O(Establish Objective Ground-Truth Values)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Quality Control & Contamination Mitigation"]
        O --> P(Implement Contamination Checks)
        P --> Q{Passes Contamination Check?}
        Q -- Yes --> R(Review for Reviewer Bias)
        Q -- No --> I
        R --> S{Bias Detected?}
        S -- Yes --> I
        S -- No --> T(Ensure Wide Variety of Challenging Tasks)
    end

    subgraph Phase6["Benchmark Evaluation & Release"]
        T --> U(Evaluate Closed-Source Models)
        T --> V(Evaluate Open-Source Models: 0.5B to 405B)
        U & V --> W(Analyze Model Performance: e.g., <70% Accuracy for Top Models)
        W --> X(Release All Questions, Code, and Model Answers)
    end

    subgraph Phase7["Maintenance & Expansion"]
        X --> Y(Monthly Question Updates)
        Y --> Z(Release New Tasks & Harder Versions Over Time)
        Z --> AA(Community Engagement & Collaboration)
    end

    AA --> BB([End: LiveBench Benchmark Ready])

flowchart TD
    A([开始：LiveBench基准构建])
    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["初始化与问题定义"]
        B(识别LLM评估挑战) --> C(定义对污染和偏见的抵抗力)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["数据来源与收集"]
        D[/近期数学竞赛/] --> E(从多样化来源收集问题)
        F[/arXiv论文/] --> E
        G[/新闻文章/] --> E
        H[/数据集/] --> E
    end

    subgraph Phase3["任务创建与改编"]
        E --> I(生成新问题)
        I --> J(改编现有基准任务)
        J --> K{任务是否受污染限制？}
        K -- 是 --> L(创建更难的任务版本)
        K -- 否 --> I
        L --> M(任务分类：数学、编程、推理、语言、指令遵循、数据分析)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["答案评分与真值生成"]
        M --> N(开发自动评分机制)
        N --> O(建立客观真值)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["质量控制与污染缓解"]
        O --> P(实施污染检查)
        P --> Q{通过污染检查？}
        Q -- 是 --> R(审查评审员偏见)
        Q -- 否 --> I
        R --> S{检测到偏见？}
        S -- 是 --> I
        S -- 否 --> T(确保任务多样性和挑战性)
    end

    subgraph Phase6["基准评估与发布"]
        T --> U(评估闭源模型)
        T --> V(评估开源模型：0.5B至405B)
        U & V --> W(分析模型性能：例如，顶级模型准确率低于70%)
        W --> X(发布所有问题、代码和模型答案)
    end

    subgraph Phase7["维护与扩展"]
        X --> Y(每月问题更新)
        Y --> Z(随时间发布新任务和更难的版本)
        Z --> AA(社区参与与协作)
    end

    AA --> BB([结束：LiveBench基准准备就绪])

name: LiveCodeBench
intro: LiveCodeBench是一个针对大型语言模型代码相关任务的基准，通过持续收集LeetCode、AtCoder和CodeForces等竞赛平台的新题目，避免训练数据污染。评测范围广泛，涵盖代码生成、自我修复、代码执行和测试输出预测等能力。
build_method: 网络爬取, 专家构建, 混合
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 思维链
intro_en: LiveCodeBench is a benchmark for code-related tasks in large language models. It continuously collects new problems from competitive platforms like LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces to avoid training data contamination. The evaluation covers a wide range of abilities, including code generation, self-repair, code execution, and test output prediction.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([LiveCodeBench Construction])
    style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Data Sourcing
        A[Identify Competitive Programming Platforms]
        B[/LeetCode, AtCoder, CodeForces/]
        A --> B
    end

    subgraph Data Collection
        C(Develop HTML Scrapers)
        D(Collect Problem Statements & Metadata)
        E(Collect Ground Truth Solutions & Test Cases)
        F(Associate Contest Date D)
        G[/Raw Problem Data (P, T, S, D)/]
        B --> C
        C --> D
        D --> E
        E --> F
        F --> G
    end

    subgraph Data Filtering & Preprocessing
        H{Exclude problems with images?}
        I{Exclude problems not suitable for grading?}
        J(Parse Mathematical Formulas)
        K(Filter problems by difficulty rating)
        L[/Filtered Problem Data/]
        G --> H
        H -- Yes --> J
        H -- No --> I
        I -- Yes --> J
        I -- No --> J
        J --> K
        K --> L
    end

    subgraph Test Case Curation & Generation
        M{Tests available on platform?}
        N(Use existing platform tests)
        O(Generate tests using GPT-4-Turbo)
        P(Construct input generators via in-context learning)
        Q(Collect small fraction of failing tests)
        R[/Curated Test Cases/]
        L --> M
        M -- Yes --> N
        M -- No --> O
        O --> P
        P --> Q
        N --> R
        Q --> R
    end

    subgraph Problem Annotation & Categorization
        S(Tag problems with release dates)
        T(Classify problem difficulty: Easy, Medium, Hard)
        U[/Annotated Problem Data/]
        R --> S
        S --> T
        T --> U
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation
        V(Platform user vetting)
        W(Ensure sufficient tests: avg. 17 per problem)
        X(Time-segmented evaluation: post-cutoff date)
        Y(Holistic evaluation across scenarios)
        Z[Evaluation Metric: Pass@1 (Code Gen, Self-Repair)]
        AA[Evaluation Metric: Execution-based correctness (Code Exec)]
        BB[Evaluation Metric: Output prediction accuracy (Test Output Pred)]
        U --> V
        V --> W
        W --> X
        X --> Y
        Y --> Z
        Y --> AA
        Y --> BB
    end

    end_node([LiveCodeBench Final Benchmark])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    BB --> end_node
    AA --> end_node
    Z --> end_node

name: LiveCodeBench Pro
intro: LiveCodeBench Pro 包含来自Codeforces、ICPC和IOI的持续更新题目，减少数据污染风险。由奥林匹克奖牌得主团队对每题进行算法分类和失败提交逐行分析。评测显示前沿模型在细致算法推理和复杂案例分析上仍存在显著不足，距离人类顶尖水平有较大差距。
org: New York University, Princeton University, University of California San Diego, University of Washing
build_method: 专家构建, 网络爬取
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 领域特定
intro_en: LiveCodeBench Pro includes continuously updated problems from Codeforces, ICPC, and IOI, minimizing data contamination risk. Each problem is algorithm-classified and analyzed line-by-line for failed submissions by a team of Olympic medalists. Evaluations show that state-of-the-art models still have significant shortcomings in detailed algorithmic reasoning and complex case analysis, falling far short of top human performance.

        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    end

name: LiveDRBench
intro: LiveDRBench是一个评估深度研究（Deep Research）系统的基准，它不只关注最终报告，更强调搜索过程的广度和推理强度。该基准包含100个科学及公共领域的挑战性任务，并采用关键论点的中间表示来进行客观的性能衡量。
task_type: Agent任务, 事实验证, 生成
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: LiveDRBench is a benchmark for evaluating Deep Research systems, focusing not only on the final report but also on the breadth of the search process and the strength of reasoning. It includes 100 challenging tasks from scientific and public domains and uses intermediate representations of key arguments for objective performance measurement.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph "Benchmark Design and Definition"
        A([Start]) --> B(Formal Characterization of Deep Research Task)
        B --> C{Define DR with Intermediate Output?}
        C -- Yes --> D[/Intermediate Output Representation/]
        D --> E(Encode Key Claims Uncovered During Search)
        E --> F(Separate Reasoning Challenge from Report Generation)
    end

    subgraph "Task Creation and Data Sourcing"
        F --> G(Propose LiveDRBench Benchmark)
        G --> H{Number of Tasks?}
        H -- 100 Challenging Tasks --> I(Select Scientific Topics)
        I --> J(Select Public Interest Events)
        J --> K[/Raw Data from Scientific Topics/]
        K --> L[/Raw Data from Public Interest Events/]
        L --> M(Formulate Challenging Tasks)
    end

    subgraph "Evaluation and Analysis"
        M --> N(Evaluate Performance of DR Systems)
        N --> O[/DR System Outputs/]
        O --> P(Calculate F1 Score for Sub-categories)
        P --> Q{Overall F1 Score > 0.55?}
        Q -- Yes --> R(OpenAI Model Performs Best)
        Q -- No --> S(Analyze Reasoning Traces)
        S --> T(Identify Distribution of Referenced Sources)
        T --> U(Identify Branching Events)
        U --> V(Identify Backtracking Events)
        V --> W(Motivate Future Directions for Search Mechanisms)
        W --> X(Motivate Future Directions for Grounding Capabilities)
    end

    X --> Y([End])

name: LiveMathBench
intro: LiveMathBench是一个由多项竞赛和考试题目组成的双语数学基准，旨在减少数据污染并评估大型语言模型的推理能力。该基准持续更新，并提出G-Pass@k指标，用于衡量模型在复杂推理任务中的性能潜力和稳定性。
org: Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, Monash University
build_method: 考试题, 网络爬取, LLM生成, 混合
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染, 双语
build_method_en: Exam Questions, Web Crawling, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: LiveMathBench is a bilingual math benchmark composed of multiple competition and exam questions, designed to reduce data contamination and evaluate the reasoning ability of large language models. The benchmark is continuously updated and introduces the G-Pass@k metric to measure model performance potential and stability on complex reasoning tasks.

name: LLM Creative Story-Writing Benchmark
intro: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4评估大型语言模型在遵循创意简报的同时创作引人入胜故事的能力。每个故事需包含十个必备元素，并由多个独立评分模型基于18项指标进行评分，确保文学质量和约束满足度可比。
intro_en: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4 evaluates large language models' ability to craft engaging stories while adhering to creative briefs. Each story must include ten required elements and is scored by multiple independent evaluation models based on 18 metrics, ensuring comparable literary quality and constraint satisfaction.

name: LogicGame
intro: LogicGame是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）基于规则的推理能力的基准。它通过提供多样化的游戏场景，要求模型理解并应用预定义的规则来解决问题，从而将其逻辑推理能力与先验知识分离开来。该基准不仅评估最终结果，也关注中间步骤，并涵盖了从简单到复杂的不同难度级别。
build_method: 专家构建, 自动生成
task_type: Agent任务, 规划, 生成
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: LogicGame is a benchmark designed to evaluate the rule-based reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). It presents diverse game scenarios that require models to understand and apply predefined rules to solve problems, thereby separating their logical reasoning from prior knowledge. The benchmark assesses not only the final outcomes but also intermediate steps, covering a range of difficulty levels from simple to complex.

name: LogicVista
intro: LogicVista是一个评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉情境下综合逻辑推理能力的基准测试。它通过5项逻辑推理任务和9种不同能力，使用448道多项选择题来评估MLLM的通用逻辑认知能力。每道题目都附有正确答案和人工编写的推理过程，支持开放式和多项选择评估。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: LogicVista is a benchmark for evaluating the comprehensive logical reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in visual contexts. It assesses the general logical cognition of MLLMs through 5 logical reasoning tasks and 9 different capabilities, using 448 multiple-choice questions. Each question includes the correct answer and a human-written reasoning process, supporting both open-ended and multiple-choice evaluations.

name: LongBench v2
intro: LongBench v2是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在处理长上下文问题时进行深度理解和推理能力的基准。它包含503个具有挑战性的多项选择题，上下文长度从8千到200万词不等，覆盖了单文档问答、多文档问答、长上下文学习等六个任务类别。该基准通过自动化和人工审核流程确保了高质量和高难度，人类专家的准确率也仅为53.7%。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 问答, 分类, 摘要, 代码生成
eval_feature: 长文本, 多轮, 领域特定
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, QA, Classification, Summarization, Code Generation
intro_en: LongBench v2 is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' deep understanding and reasoning abilities when handling long-context problems. It includes 503 challenging multiple-choice questions with context lengths ranging from 8,000 to 2 million words, covering six task categories such as single-document QA, multi-document QA, and long-context learning. The benchmark ensures high quality and difficulty through automated and manual review processes, with human experts achieving an accuracy of only 53.7%.

name: LongDocURL
intro: LongDocURL是一个综合性的多模态长文档基准测试，旨在评估大型视觉语言模型在长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位方面的能力。现有基准测试在处理页数和布局元素定位分析方面存在局限。该基准测试定义了长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位三个主要任务类别，并包含20个子任务。它通过半自动化构建流程收集了2,325个高质量问答对，覆盖超过33,000页文档，显著优于现有基准。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), Institute of Automation Chin
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
intro_en: LongDocURL is a comprehensive multimodal long document benchmark designed to evaluate large vision-language models' abilities in long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization. Existing benchmarks have limitations in handling page counts and layout element localization analysis. This benchmark defines three main task categories: long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization, comprising 20 sub-tasks. It collects 2,325 high-quality QA pairs through a semi-automated construction process, covering over 33,000 pages, significantly surpassing existing benchmarks.
scale_en: 2325 QA pairs, over 33000 pages of documents
flowchart_en:

    start_node([Start])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        A[/Input: Research Goals/] --> B(Define 3 Primary Task Categories)
        B --> C(Long Document Understanding)

        C & D & E --> F(Propose LongDocURL Benchmark)
        F --> G(Integrate 3 Primary Tasks)

        H --> I(Categorize Sub-tasks by Primary Tasks & Answer Evidences)

    subgraph Phase2["Data Sourcing & Collection"]

        L --> M{Quality Check for Q&A Pairs}
        M -- Yes --> N(High-Quality Q&A Pairs)
        M -- No --> O(Refine Q&A Pairs)
        O --> M
        N --> P(Cover > 33,000 Pages of Documents)
        style K fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        style S fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

        style V fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        style W fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    end

name: LongVideoBench
intro: LongVideoBench是一个以长达一小时的视频-语言交错输入为特色的问答基准。它包含3763个不同长度的网络视频及其字幕，旨在全面评估大型多模态模型（LMM）的长期多模态理解能力。该基准测试引入了一种新的视频问答任务，称为“引用推理”，要求模型根据问题中引用的视频上下文来推理相关的视频细节。LongVideoBench包含6678个人工标注的多项选择题，涵盖17个细分领域，为长视频理解提供了一个全面的评估框架。
org: Rhymes AI, Apple, Microsoft Research Asia, Salesforce AI Research
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注
intro_en: LongVideoBench is a QA benchmark featuring video-language inputs up to one hour long. It includes 3,763 web videos of varying lengths with subtitles, designed to comprehensively evaluate the long-term multimodal understanding ability of large multimodal models (LMMs). The benchmark introduces a new video QA task called "reference reasoning," which requires models to infer relevant video details based on referenced video context in the questions. LongVideoBench contains 6,678 human-annotated multiple-choice questions across 17 subdomains, providing a comprehensive evaluation framework for long video understanding.

        S -- (180s, 600s] --> U[Create 2 Questions]
        style U fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        T & U & V --> W[Add 3-4 Distracting Answer Options]

        style X fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        style Y fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Validation
        Y --> Z[Primary Annotator: Initial Annotation & Filtering]
        style Z fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        Z --> AA[Examiner: Category & Requirement Check]
        style AA fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        style BB fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        style CC fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization
        CC --> DD[Formulate Referring Reasoning Task]

        Q --> R[标注员观看带字幕的完整视频]
        style R fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        R --> S{视频时长?}
        style S fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        S -- > 60秒 --> T[创建1个问题]
        style T fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        S -- (180秒, 600秒] --> U[创建2个问题]
        style U fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        S -- (900秒, 3600秒] --> V[创建3个问题]
        style V fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        T & U & V --> W[添加3-4个干扰项]
        style W fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        W --> X[包含并突出引用查询]
        style X fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        X --> Y[标注引用时刻的帧索引]
        style Y fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph 质量控制与验证
        Y --> Z[主要标注员：初步标注与筛选]
        style Z fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        Z --> AA[审查员：类别与要求检查]
        style AA fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        AA -- 有问题 (20%) --> BB[修订员：修订标注]
        style BB fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        AA -- 正常 --> CC[/6,678个人工标注的问答对/]
        style CC fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        BB --> CC
    end

    subgraph 基准最终确定
        CC --> DD[制定引用推理任务]
        style DD fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        DD --> EE[定义交错多模态输入格式]
        style EE fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        EE --> FF([LongVideoBench最终基准])
        style FF fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    start --> A
    P --> Q
    CC --> DD
    DD --> EE
    EE --> FF

name: LoraxBench
intro: LoraxBench是一个综合性的多语言基准测试，专注于印度尼西亚语和19种印度尼西亚本地方言，涵盖了6种不同的自然语言处理任务。该基准测试包含了特定语言的多种语域，强调了正式和非正式语音对模型性能的影响。LoraxBench由母语者进行专业翻译和验证，数据来源于印度尼西亚语的原创内容，因此比以英语为中心的数据更能捕捉到当地的细微差别。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
metric: Accuracy, F1, Exact Match, BLEU, LLM-as-a-Judge
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 自然语言推理, 翻译, 分类
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Natural Language Inference, Translation, Classification
intro_en: LoraxBench is a comprehensive multilingual benchmark focusing on Indonesian and 19 regional Indonesian dialects, covering six different natural language processing tasks. The benchmark includes multiple language domains, emphasizing the impact of formal and informal speech on model performance. LoraxBench is professionally translated and validated by native speakers, with data sourced from original Indonesian content, making it better at capturing local nuances than English-centric datasets.
metric_en: Accuracy, F1, Exact Match, BLEU, LLM-as-a-Judge
