name: LVBench
intro: LVBench是一个旨在评估和提升多模态模型理解长视频能力的基准。它包含来自公共来源的视频，涵盖了长视频理解和信息提取的各种任务。LVBench旨在挑战多模态模型展示长期记忆和扩展理解能力，其广泛评估表明当前多模态模型在这些要求苛刻的长视频理解任务上表现仍然不佳。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shenzhen Institutes of Advanced Technology (CAS), Chinese Association for Ar
eval_feature: 长时记忆, 多样化任务, 人工标注
eval_feature_en: Long-term Memory, Diverse Tasks, Human Annotation
intro_en: LVBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate and enhance the ability of multimodal models to understand long videos. It includes videos from public sources and covers various tasks related to long video understanding and information extraction. LVBench aims to challenge multimodal models to demonstrate long-term memory and extended comprehension capabilities. Its extensive evaluation shows that current multimodal models still perform poorly on these demanding long video understanding tasks.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> A(Define Long Video: >30 min, Rich Visuals)
    A --> B[/YouTube Search & Recommendation Algorithms/]

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Initial Collection"]
        B --> C(Gather Initial Pool of 500 Videos)
        C --> D{Select Keywords for 6 Categories?}
        D -- Yes --> E(Sports, Documentary, Event, Lifestyle, TV Show, Cartoon)
        D -- No --> C
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Quality Filtering"]
        E --> F{Apply 5 Quality Criteria?}
        F -- Yes --> G(Clear Protagonist Presence)
        G --> H(Structural Coherence)
        H --> I(Event Density: >1 event/5 min)
        I --> J(Visual Clarity: >=720p, Stable Camera)
        J --> K(Modality Independence: Visual Info Critical)
        K --> L{All Criteria Met?}
        L -- Yes --> M(Retain 103 High-Quality Videos)
        L -- No --> C
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Task Definition"]
        M --> N(Define 6 Core Skills for Long Video Understanding)
        N --> O(Temporal Grounding - TG)
        N --> P(Summarization - Sum)
        N --> Q(Reasoning - Rea)
        N --> R(Entity Recognition - ER)
        N --> S(Event Understanding - EU)
        N --> T(Key Information Retrieval - KIR)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Question-Answer Pair Generation"]
        T --> U(Systematic Annotation Protocol)
        U --> V(Stage 1: Video Analysis - Mark Events, Transitions, Entities)
        V --> W(Stage 2: Question Generation - 24 Q/hr, All 6 Skills Covered)
        W --> X(Stage 3: Answer Construction - 1 Correct, 3 Distractors)
        X --> Y(Annotate "Clue Duration" for Each Question)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Data Quality Control"]
        Y --> Z{Initial Q-A Pairs Generated?}
        Z -- Yes --> AA(Problem: Annotators Bias Towards TG Questions)
        AA --> BB(Solution: Instruct Annotators to Minimize TG)
        BB --> CC{Problem: LLM Can Answer Without Visuals?}
        CC -- Yes --> DD(Use GLM-4 & GPT-4 to Independently Answer)
        DD --> EE{LLM Answers Match Ground Truth?}
        EE -- Yes --> FF(Remove Data Sample)
        EE -- No --> GG(Keep Data Sample)
        FF --> HH(Refined Set of 1,549 Q-A Pairs)
        GG --> HH
    end

    HH --> End([End])

    classDef StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class Start,End StartEnd
    class B,C,E DataCollection
    class A,D,F,G,H,I,J,K,L,M ProcessingFiltering
    class N,O,P,Q,R,S,T AnnotationLabeling
    class U,V,W,X,Y AnnotationLabeling
    class Z,AA,BB,CC,DD,EE,FF,GG,HH QualityControl
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> A(定义长视频: >30分钟, 丰富的视觉内容)
    A --> B[/YouTube 搜索与推荐算法/]

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与初步收集"]
        B --> C(收集500个视频的初始池)
        C --> D{选择6个类别的关键词？}
        D -- 是 --> E(体育, 纪录片, 事件, 生活方式, 电视剧, 卡通)
        D -- 否 --> C
    end

    subgraph Phase2["质量过滤"]
        E --> F{应用5个质量标准？}
        F -- 是 --> G(清晰的主角存在)
        G --> H(结构连贯性)
        H --> I(事件密度: 平均每5分钟>1个事件)
        I --> J(视觉清晰度: >=720p, 稳定镜头)
        J --> K(模态独立性: 视觉信息至关重要)
        K --> L{所有标准都满足？}
        L -- 是 --> M(保留103个高质量视频)
        L -- 否 --> C
    end

    subgraph Phase3["任务定义"]
        M --> N(定义长视频理解的6项核心技能)
        N --> O(时间定位 - TG)
        N --> P(摘要 - Sum)
        N --> Q(推理 - Rea)
        N --> R(实体识别 - ER)
        N --> S(事件理解 - EU)
        N --> T(关键信息检索 - KIR)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["问答对生成"]
        T --> U(系统注释协议)
        U --> V(阶段1: 视频分析 - 标记事件, 转场, 实体)
        V --> W(阶段2: 问题生成 - 平均每小时24个问题, 涵盖所有6项技能)
        W --> X(阶段3: 答案构建 - 1个正确答案, 3个干扰项)
        X --> Y(标注每个问题的“线索持续时间”)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["数据质量控制"]
        Y --> Z{初始问答对已生成？}
        Z -- 是 --> AA(问题: 注释者偏向TG问题)
        AA --> BB(解决方案: 指示注释者尽量减少TG问题)
        BB --> CC{问题: LLM无需视觉输入即可回答？}
        CC -- 是 --> DD(使用GLM-4和GPT-4独立回答)
        DD --> EE{LLM答案与真实答案匹配？}
        EE -- 是 --> FF(移除数据样本)
        EE -- 否 --> GG(保留数据样本)
        FF --> HH(精炼后的1,549个问答对)
        GG --> HH
    end

    HH --> End([结束])

    classDef StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    classDef ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    classDef EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

    class N,O,P,Q,R,S,T AnnotationLabeling
    class U,V,W,X,Y AnnotationLabeling

name: MARS-Bench
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在真实世界对话应用中得到广泛采用，但其在处理长而复杂对话会话（包括频繁的动机转移、复杂的跨轮依赖）方面的鲁棒性受到批评。MARS-Bench是一个多轮竞技真实世界场景对话基准，旨在弥补这一空白。它通过逐场文字解说构建，旨在评估多轮对话的三个关键方面：超多轮、交互式多轮和跨轮任务。
org: ByteDance Seed, University of Science and Technology of China
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used in real-world conversational applications, but their robustness in handling long and complex dialogue sessions—including frequent shifts in intent and complex cross-turn dependencies—has been criticized. MARS-Bench is a multi-turn competitive real-world scenario dialogue benchmark designed to address this gap. It is constructed through detailed textual annotations per session and aims to evaluate three key aspects of multi-turn dialogue: ultra-long turns, interactive multi-turns, and cross-turn tasks.

15 NBA, 5 NHL) F(Process Chinese Games
10 NBA) G(Standardize Data Format
Time, Play, Score) A --> B B -->|Collect| C C -->|Segment by Game| D D -->|English| E D -->|Chinese| F E --> G F --> G end subgraph "Phase 2: Dialogue & Task Generation" H(Divide Each Game into Periods

name: MATH
intro: MATH数据集包含12500道具有完整步骤解答的竞赛数学题，旨在衡量机器学习模型的数学问题解决能力。完整解答可用于训练模型生成答案推导和解释，促进数学推理相关研究和准确率提升。
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
intro_en: The MATH dataset contains 12,500 competition-level math problems with full step-by-step solutions, designed to evaluate the mathematical problem-solving ability of machine learning models. The complete solutions can be used to train models to generate answer derivations and explanations, promoting research in mathematical reasoning and improving accuracy.

name: Math-VR
intro: 近期大型语言模型和视觉语言模型在数学推理方面取得了显著进展，但在需要视觉辅助的问题上仍面临瓶颈。CodePlot-CoT是一种代码驱动的思维链范式，用于在数学中“通过图像思考”。Math-VR是首个大规模、双语数据集和基准，用于评估数学视觉推理问题，包含17.8万个样本。该工作为多模态数学推理开辟了新方向。
org: The University of Hong Kong, Tsinghua University, Alibaba, Chinese University of Hong Kong
intro_en: Recent large language models and vision-language models have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning but still face bottlenecks in visually assisted problems. CodePlot-CoT is a code-driven chain-of-thought paradigm designed for "thinking through images" in mathematics. Math-VR is the first large-scale, bilingual dataset and benchmark for evaluating mathematical visual reasoning problems, containing 178,000 samples. This work opens a new direction for multimodal mathematical reasoning.

name: MATH500
intro: MATH500是MATH数据集的一个子集，包含500个具有挑战性的竞赛数学问题。这些问题涵盖了代数、几何、数论和微积分等多个方面，每个问题都附有详细的步骤解答。该基准旨在评估模型在复杂数学推理和问题解决方面的能力。
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MATH500 is a subset of the MATH dataset, containing 500 challenging competition-level math problems. These problems cover algebra, geometry, number theory, and calculus, each accompanied by detailed step-by-step solutions. This benchmark aims to evaluate models' abilities in complex mathematical reasoning and problem-solving.

name: MathBench
intro: MathBench是一个用于严格评估大型语言模型数学能力的综合性基准。它覆盖了从基础算术到大学数学的五个难度级别，包含中英文双语问题，旨在全面考察模型的理论知识和实际应用能力。该基准不仅包含应用题，还设有理论题，以检验模型对基本概念的掌握程度。其独特的循环评估（Circular Evaluation）方法能更真实地反映模型的数学推理水平。
task_type: 数学问题, 选择题, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 思维链, 领域特定, Bilingual Gradient Evaluation, Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
task_type_en: Math problems, Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA
eval_feature_en: Chain-of-Thought, Domain-specific, Bilingual Gradient Evaluation, Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
intro_en: MathBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the mathematical abilities of large language models. It covers five difficulty levels ranging from basic arithmetic to university-level mathematics and includes bilingual problems in both Chinese and English. The benchmark aims to thoroughly assess models' theoretical knowledge and practical application skills. It features not only applied problems but also theoretical questions to test models' grasp of fundamental concepts. Its unique Circular Evaluation method provides a more authentic reflection of models' mathematical reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start_node([Start])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["Knowledge Framework Definition"]
        A[Define Knowledge Framework] --> B(Five Main Stages)
        B --> C(Three Knowledge Levels)
        C --> D(Arithmetic Stage: Basic Operations)
        C --> E(Primary, Middle, High, College Stages)
        D --> F{Foundation for other stages?}
        F -- Yes --> E
        E --> G[Two Fine-grained Knowledge Levels: Subject & Topic]
    end
    style Phase1 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase2["Data Collection"]
        H[Collect Questions] --> I(Theoretical Knowledge Questions)

name: MathCanvas-Bench
intro: MathCanvas是一个旨在为大型多模态模型（LMMs）提供内在视觉思维链（VCoT）能力的综合框架，以解决其在几何等数学领域中对视觉辅助的依赖。该框架通过两个阶段训练模型：首先是视觉操作阶段，利用15.2M对语料库进行图表生成和编辑的预训练；其次是战略性视觉辅助推理阶段，通过219K示例数据集进行微调，教授模型何时以及如何利用视觉辅助。为严格评估，引入了MathCanvas-Bench，一个包含3K问题的挑战性基准，要求模型生成交错的视觉-文本解决方案。
intro_en: MathCanvas is a comprehensive framework designed to equip large multimodal models (LMMs) with intrinsic visual chain-of-thought (VCoT) capabilities, addressing their reliance on visual aids in mathematical domains like geometry. The framework trains models in two stages: first, a visual operation stage with pretraining on a 15.2M corpus for chart generation and editing; second, a strategic visual-aided reasoning stage fine-tuned on a 219K example dataset to teach models when and how to use visual assistance. To rigorously evaluate performance, MathCanvas-Bench is introduced, a challenging benchmark with 3K problems requiring models to generate interleaved visual-text solutions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MathCanvas Framework] --> B[Visual Manipulation Stage]
    A --> C[Strategic Visual-Aided Reasoning Stage]

    B --> D[MathCanvas-Imagen Corpus]
    B --> E[MathCanvas-Edit Corpus]

    D --> D1[Data Sources & Collection]
    D1 --> D2[Re-purposing from MathCanvas-Edit (5.4M pairs)]
    D1 --> D3[Augmenting with Code-derived Captions (ImgCode-8.6M)]
    D1 --> D4[Sample Public Datasets (612K pairs)]
    D2 & D3 & D4 --> D[MathCanvas-Imagen (10M caption-to-diagram pairs)]

    E --> E1[Hybrid Pipeline]
    E1 --> E2[Competition-Level Geometry Problems]
    E1 --> E3[Systematically Generated Simple Geometric Figures]
    E3 --> E4[Automated Algorithm: Add Geometric Primitives/Relations]
    E4 --> E5{Quality Filter: Geometric Constraint Checking}
    E5 -- Invalid/Degenerate --> E4
    E5 -- Valid --> E6[Synthetic Generation Process (1M trajectories)]
    E2 & E6 --> E[MathCanvas-Edit (5.2M step-by-step editing trajectories)]

    C --> F[MathCanvas-Instruct Dataset]
    F --> F1[Curate Interleaved Visual-Textual Reasoning Paths]
    F1 --> F2[219K Training Examples]

    C --> G[MathCanvas-Bench Benchmark]
    G --> G1[3K Carefully Curated Problems]
    G1 --> G2[Require Interleaved Reasoning & Visual Outputs]
    G2 --> G3[Benchmark 20 Leading LMMs]

    B -- Pre-train Model --> H[Unified LMMs with Intrinsic VCoT]
    C -- Fine-tune Model --> H
    G -- Evaluate Model --> H

name: MathVision
intro: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) 是一个精心策划的数据集，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）在视觉背景下的数学推理能力。它包含3,040个高质量的数学问题，这些问题来源于真实的数学竞赛，涵盖16个不同的数学学科和5个难度级别。该数据集揭示了当前LMMs与人类在MATH-V上的显著性能差距，并提供了详细的分类以指导未来的研究和开发。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
build_method: 考试题改编, 人工标注
task_type: 图像问答, 数学问题解决
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估, 细致分类
intro_en: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) is a carefully curated dataset designed to evaluate the mathematical reasoning abilities of large multimodal models (LMMs) in visual contexts. It contains 3,040 high-quality math problems sourced from real math competitions, covering 16 different mathematical subjects and 5 difficulty levels. The dataset highlights the significant performance gap between current LMMs and humans on MATH-V and provides detailed categorizations to guide future research and development.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Identify Math Competitions]
    B --> C{Visual Inputs & Categorizable Levels?}
    C -- Yes --> D[Select 19 Competitions]
    C -- No --> B
    D --> E[Filter Online Resources for Image Problems]
    E --> F[Adhere to Copyright & Licensing]
    F --> G[Initial Data Pool (9000 questions, 3500 with images)]
    G --> H[Data Curation (4 Stages, 10 Annotators)]
    H --> I[Stage 1: Verify Text/Image Alignment]
    I --> J{Missing/Incorrect/Offensive Content?}
    J -- Yes --> I
    J -- No --> K[Cross-verify Annotator Results]
    K --> L[3352 Math-VQA Data Remaining]
    L --> M[Stage 2: Identify & Remove Duplicates]
    M --> N[Lexical Overlap & Levenshtein Distance]
    N --> O[3040 Math-VQA Data Remaining]
    O --> P[Stage 3: Categorize Problems]
    P --> Q[16 Subjects & 5 Difficulty Levels]
    Q --> R[Human Verification for Accuracy]
    R --> S[Stage 4: Create Testmini Set]
    S --> T[304 Questions for Quick Evaluation]
    T --> U[Final Dataset (3040 Problems)]
    U --> V[1532 Multiple-Choice, 1508 Free-Form]
    U --> W[Evaluation Methodology]
    W --> X[Extensive Experimentation]
    W --> Y[Performance Gap Analysis (LMMs vs. Humans)]
    W --> Z[Human Performance on Testmini Subset]
    Z --> End

        N --> O{Missing Text, Incorrect Images, Private/Offensive Content?}

        O -- No --> Q(Cross-Verify Results Between Annotators) style fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        Q --> R[/3,352 Math-VQA Data/]
        R --> S(Stage 2: Identify & Remove Duplicates) style fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        S --> T{Lexical Overlap & Levenshtein Distance Threshold Met?}
        T -- Yes --> U(Review & Remove Duplicates) style fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        T -- No --> V(Keep Unique Questions) style fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        U --> W[/Final 3,040 Math-VQA Data/]
        V --> W
        W --> X(Stage 3: Subject Categorization into 16 Disciplines) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        X --> Y(Independent Labeling by 3 Annotator Groups) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        Y --> Z(Utilize GPT-4V & Gemini Pro for Subject Advice) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        Z --> AA(Consolidate via Majority Voting by 3 Expert Annotators) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        AA --> BB(Stage 4: Assign 5 Difficulty Levels) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        BB --> CC(Reference Original Competition Grade Requirements) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        CC --> DD(Human Verification for Accuracy & Reliability) style fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    DD --> EEE([End: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) Benchmark]) style fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    A([开始]) style fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    subgraph 数据来源与收集
        B[/数学竞赛列表/] --> C(收集19个数学竞赛) 
        C --> D{视觉输入和分类标准?}
        D -- 是 --> E(从不同国家选择19个竞赛) style fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        Q --> R[/3,352个数学-VQA数据/]

        T -- 否 --> V(保留独特问题) style fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        U --> W[/最终3,040个数学-VQA数据/]

        W --> X(阶段3: 将问题分类到16个学科) style fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

name: MaXIFE
intro: MaXIFE是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在23种不同语言中的指令遵循能力。它包含1667个可验证的指令任务，并结合了基于规则和基于模型的评估方法，以平衡效率和准确性。该基准旨在推动自然语言处理领域多语言指令遵循评估的研究和发展。
eval_feature: 多语言, 跨语言, 可验证
intro_en: MaXIFE is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess large language models' instruction-following ability across 23 different languages. It includes 1,667 verifiable instruction tasks and combines rule-based and model-based evaluation methods to balance efficiency and accuracy. This benchmark aims to advance research and development in multilingual instruction-following evaluation within natural language processing.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[User Data Collection via Questionnaire] --> B(Basic Questions and Instructions)
    B --> C[Expand Basic Questions using GPT-4o and Claude-3.5 Sonnet]
    C --> D(795 Basic Questions)
    B --> E[Select 47 High-Quality Instructions]
    E --> F(47 Instructions)
    F --> G[Templatize 18 Scalable Instructions]
    G --> H[Organize into 47 Subcategories and 11 Categories]
    D --> I[LLM-based Translation to 22 Languages]
    I --> J{Native Speaker Review and Correction}
    F --> K[Professional Human Translation to 22 Languages]
    J --> L(Parallel Data in 23 Languages)
    K --> L
    L --> M[Combine Basic Questions with 1-3 Instructions]
    M --> N[[]Final Dataset: 18,285 entries]
    N --> O{Language Resource Level Classification}
    O -- High, Medium, Low --> P[Evaluation]
    P --> Q{Evaluation Strategy}
    Q -- Rule-Based --> R[Automated Evaluation]
    Q -- Model-Based --> S[Claude-3.5 Sonnet Evaluation]
    R --> T(Evaluation Results)
    S --> T
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> DataSourcing(Data Sourcing) :::DataCollection

    subgraph Phase 1: Initial Data Collection
        DataSourcing --> Questionnaire[/Questionnaire Method (Appendix A.3)/] :::DataCollection
        Questionnaire --> CollectRawData(Collect Raw User Data) :::DataCollection
        CollectRawData --> BasicQuestions(Basic Questions) :::DataCollection
        CollectRawData --> Instructions(Instructions) :::DataCollection
    end

    subgraph Phase 2: English Data Expansion & Refinement
        BasicQuestions --> ExpandBasicQuestions(Expand Basic Questions with GPT-4o/Claude-3.5 Sonnet) :::ProcessingFiltering
        ExpandBasicQuestions --> ExpandedBasicQuestions[/795 Expanded Basic Questions/] :::OutputResult

        Instructions --> SelectHighQuality(Select 47 High-Quality Instructions) :::ProcessingFiltering
        SelectHighQuality --> TemplatizeInstructions(Templatize 18 Scalable Instructions) :::ProcessingFiltering
        TemplatizeInstructions --> CategorizeInstructions(Categorize into 11 Categories & 47 Subcategories) :::AnnotationLabeling
        CategorizeInstructions --> RefinedInstructions[/47 Refined Instructions/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 3: Multilingual Translation & Quality Control
        ExpandedBasicQuestions --> TranslateBasicQuestions(LLM-based Translation: GPT-4o/Claude-3.5 Sonnet) :::ProcessingFiltering
        RefinedInstructions --> TranslateInstructions(Professional Human Translators) :::ProcessingFiltering

        TranslateBasicQuestions --> ReviewBasicQuestions(Native Speaker Review & Correction) :::QualityControl
        TranslateInstructions --> HumanQualityControl(Human Quality Control: Appendix A.5) :::QualityControl

        ReviewBasicQuestions --> ParallelBasicQuestions[/795 Parallel Basic Questions (23 Languages)/] :::OutputResult
        HumanQualityControl --> ParallelInstructions[/47 Parallel Instructions (23 Languages)/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 4: Final Benchmark Assembly
        ParallelBasicQuestions & ParallelInstructions --> CombineData(Combine 1-3 Instructions per Basic Question) :::ProcessingFiltering
        CombineData --> FinalDataset[/18,285 MaXIFE Evaluation Entries (23 Languages)/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 5: Evaluation Strategy
        FinalDataset --> ChooseEvaluation{Choose Evaluation Method?} :::ProcessingFiltering
        ChooseEvaluation --> |Rule-Based Instructions| RuleBasedEval(Rule-Based Evaluation) :::EvaluationMetric
        ChooseEvaluation --> |Semantic Understanding Instructions| ModelBasedEval(Model-Based Evaluation) :::EvaluationMetric

        RuleBasedEval --> VerifyResponses(Verify Responses with Deterministic Programs) :::EvaluationMetric
        ModelBasedEval --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate with Leading Commercial LLMs) :::EvaluationMetric

        VerifyResponses --> BaselineResults(Establish Baseline Results) :::OutputResult
        LLMEvaluation --> BaselineResults
    end

    BaselineResults --> End([End]) :::End
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> DataSourcing(数据来源) :::DataCollection

    subgraph Phase 1: 阶段1：初始数据收集
        DataSourcing --> Questionnaire[/问卷调查法 (附录 A.3)/] :::DataCollection
        Questionnaire --> CollectRawData(收集原始用户数据) :::DataCollection
        CollectRawData --> BasicQuestions(基本问题) :::DataCollection
        CollectRawData --> Instructions(指令) :::DataCollection
    end

    subgraph Phase 2: 阶段2：英文数据扩展与精炼
        BasicQuestions --> ExpandBasicQuestions(使用GPT-4o/Claude-3.5 Sonnet扩展基本问题) :::ProcessingFiltering
        ExpandBasicQuestions --> ExpandedBasicQuestions[/795个扩展基本问题/] :::OutputResult

        Instructions --> SelectHighQuality(选择47条高质量指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        SelectHighQuality --> TemplatizeInstructions(模板化18条可扩展指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        TemplatizeInstructions --> CategorizeInstructions(分类为11个类别和47个子类别) :::AnnotationLabeling
        CategorizeInstructions --> RefinedInstructions[/47条精炼指令/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 3: 阶段3：多语言翻译与质量控制
        ExpandedBasicQuestions --> TranslateBasicQuestions(基于LLM的翻译：GPT-4o/Claude-3.5 Sonnet) :::ProcessingFiltering
        RefinedInstructions --> TranslateInstructions(专业人工翻译) :::ProcessingFiltering

        TranslateBasicQuestions --> ReviewBasicQuestions(母语者审阅与校正) :::QualityControl
        TranslateInstructions --> HumanQualityControl(人工质量控制：附录 A.5) :::QualityControl

        ReviewBasicQuestions --> ParallelBasicQuestions[/795个平行基本问题 (23种语言)/] :::OutputResult
        HumanQualityControl --> ParallelInstructions[/47条平行指令 (23种语言)/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 4: 阶段4：最终基准组装
        ParallelBasicQuestions & ParallelInstructions --> CombineData(每个基本问题组合1-3条指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        CombineData --> FinalDataset[/18,285个MaXIFE评估条目 (23种语言)/] :::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Phase 5: 阶段5：评估策略
        FinalDataset --> ChooseEvaluation{选择评估方法?} :::ProcessingFiltering
        ChooseEvaluation --> |基于规则的指令| RuleBasedEval(基于规则的评估) :::EvaluationMetric
        ChooseEvaluation --> |语义理解指令| ModelBasedEval(基于模型的评估) :::EvaluationMetric

        RuleBasedEval --> VerifyResponses(使用确定性程序验证响应) :::EvaluationMetric
        ModelBasedEval --> LLMEvaluation(使用领先的商业LLM进行评估) :::EvaluationMetric

        VerifyResponses --> BaselineResults(建立基线结果) :::OutputResult
        LLMEvaluation --> BaselineResults
    end

    BaselineResults --> End([结束]) :::End

name: MCP-Atlas
intro: MCP-Atlas是一个用于评估大型语言模型使用外部工具能力的大规模基准。它包含36个真实的MCP服务器和220个工具，涵盖了1000个需要通过3-6步工具调用来完成的复杂任务。该基准通过基于声明的评分规则来评估模型表现，并已公开发布部分任务集以促进社区研究。
eval_feature: 多轮, 结果导向, 动态, 实时
intro_en: MCP-Atlas is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to use external tools. It includes 36 real MCP servers and 220 tools, covering 1,000 complex tasks that require 3-6 steps of tool calls to complete. The benchmark assesses model performance based on rule-based scoring and has publicly released part of the task set to promote community research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Benchmark Construction
        A[Task Design & Goal Setting] --> B(1000 Tasks, 3-6 Tool Calls, Multi-Server, Conditional Logic)
        B --> C[Environment Setup: 36 Real MCP Servers, 220 Tools]
    end

    subgraph Task Schema Definition
        C --> D[1. Tool Set Configuration: 10-25 Tools/Task, 3-7 Target, 5-10 Distractors]
        D --> E[2. Prompt Creation: Natural Language, Multi-Hop Reasoning, No Explicit Tool Names]
        E --> F[3. Reference Trajectory: Minimal Tool Call Sequence, Diagnostic Use Only]
        F --> G[4. Claims List: Atomic, Verifiable Claims from Tool Outputs]
    end

    subgraph Quality Assurance
        G --> H[Human Review Layer 1: Domain Expert Review (Correctness, Solvability)]
        H --> I[Human Review Layer 2: Prompt Naturalness Validation (No Tool Name Leakage)]
        I --> J[Automated LLM Verification: Claims List Completeness, Trajectory Consistency]
        J --> K[Quality Control Samples: Random Manual Review for Systematic Issues]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Methodology
        K --> L[Claim Verification: Agent Answer vs. Claims List (Fulfilled, Partially, Not)]
        L --> M[Coverage Scoring: Average Claim Scores (1, 0.5, 0)]
        M --> N{Pass/Fail Determination: Coverage Score >= 0.75 Threshold}
    end

    N -- Pass --> O[Benchmark Dataset Release (500-Task Public Subset)]
    N -- Fail --> P[Diagnostic Analysis & Iteration]

name: MCP-Bench
intro: MCP-Bench是一个基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的评测基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实多步任务中的工具使用能力。它连接了28个MCP服务器和250个工具，涵盖金融、旅行、科学计算等领域，测试模型在工具检索、多步规划和跨域协作方面的表现。
metric: Tool-level schema understanding and usage, Trajectory-level planning, Task completion
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: MCP-Bench is an evaluation benchmark based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), designed to assess large language models' ability to use tools in real multi-step tasks. It connects 28 MCP servers and 250 tools across domains such as finance, travel, and scientific computing, testing models on tool retrieval, multi-step planning, and cross-domain collaboration.

    C --> D[Connects to 28 Live MCP Servers]
    D --> E[Servers Span 250 Tools]
    E --> F[Tools Across Diverse Domains (Finance, Travel, Scientific Computing, Academic Search)]
    F --> G[Task Design: Multi-step, Cross-tool Coordination]
    G --> H[Task Design: Fuzzy Instructions, No Explicit Tool Names]
    H --> I[Task Design: Multi-hop Execution Trajectories]
    I --> J[Task Design: Ground Responses in Intermediate Outputs]
    J --> K[Task Design: Orchestrate Cross-domain Workflows]
    K --> L[Evaluation Framework]
    L --> M(Tool-level Schema Understanding & Usage)
    L --> N(Trajectory-level Planning)
    L --> O(Task Completion)
    O --> P[Experiments on 20 Advanced LLMs]
    P --> Q{Persistent Challenges Revealed}
metric_en: Tool-level schema understanding and usage, Trajectory-level planning, Task completion

    E4 -->|准备测试| F1
    F1 -->|执行实验| F2
    F2 -->|收集结果| G1
    G1 -->|处理数据| H1
    H1 -->|审查发现| H2
    H2 -- 是 -->|完善基准测试| D1
    H2 -- 否 -->|发布基准测试| I1
    I1 -->|完成| J1

name: MCP-Universe
intro: 模型上下文协议（MCP）已成为连接大型语言模型到外部数据源和工具的变革性标准。现有基准过于简单，未能捕捉真实应用挑战。MCP-Universe是首个全面基准，旨在通过与真实世界MCP服务器交互，评估LLM在现实和困难任务中的表现。它涵盖6个核心领域，涉及11个不同的MCP服务器，包括位置导航、仓库管理、金融分析、3D设计、浏览器自动化和网页搜索。
eval_feature: 长文本, 零样本, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Long Context, Zero-shot, Process evaluation, Tool invocation
intro_en: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a transformative standard connecting large language models to external data sources and tools. Existing benchmarks are overly simplistic and fail to capture real-world challenges. MCP-Universe is the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate LLM performance on realistic and difficult tasks through interaction with real-world MCP servers. It covers six core domains across 11 different MCP servers, including location navigation, warehouse management, financial analysis, 3D design, browser automation, and web search.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD

    B --> C[Benchmark Design: Realistic & Hard Tasks]
    C --> D(6 Core Domains)
    D --> D1(Location Navigation)
    D --> D2(Repository Management)
    D --> D3(Financial Analysis)
    D --> D4(3D Design)
    D --> D5(Browser Automation)
    D --> D6(Web Searching)
    D --> E[Evaluation Implementation: Execution-based Evaluators]
    E --> E1[Format Evaluators: Agent Compliance]
    E --> E2[Static Evaluators: Time-Invariant Content]
    E --> E3[Dynamic Evaluators: Real-Time Ground Truth]
    E --> F[Evaluation Process: LLM Interaction with MCP Servers]
    F --> G{Evaluation Results: SOTA Model Limitations}
    G --> H[Challenges: Long-Context & Unknown-Tools]
    H --> I[Open-Source Framework Release: UI Support]

name: MCPMark
intro: MCPMark是一个旨在评估大语言模型（LLMs）与外部系统交互能力的基准测试。它由127个高质量任务组成，这些任务由领域专家和AI智能体共同创建，每个任务都包含一个初始状态和自动验证脚本。MCPMark通过模拟真实世界的工作流程，要求LLMs进行更丰富和多样化的环境交互，涉及广泛的创建、读取、更新和删除（CRUD）操作，以全面评估LLMs作为通用智能体的能力。
org: EVAL SYS, NUS TRAIL, LobeHub, University of British Columbia, National University of Singapore, West
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MCPMark is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to interact with external systems. It consists of 127 high-quality tasks co-created by domain experts and AI agents, each featuring an initial state and an automated verification script. By simulating real-world workflows, MCPMark requires LLMs to perform richer and more diverse environment interactions, covering a wide range of create, read, update, and delete (CRUD) operations, to comprehensively assess LLMs' capabilities as general-purpose agents.

flowchart TD
    A[需求分析] --> B[任务设计: Experts与AI协作]
    B --> C[任务数量: 127个高质量任务]
    C --> D[初始状态策展]
    D --> E[编程Validation脚本开发]
    E --> F{任务类型: CRUD操作}
    F -- Create --> G[环境交互: 创建]
    F -- Read --> H[环境交互: 读取]
    F -- Update --> I[环境交互: 更新]
    F -- Delete --> J[环境交互: 删除]
    G --> K[任务Validation]
    H --> K
    I --> K
    J --> K
    K --> L[Evaluation框架: 最小代理框架]

    M --> N[LLMEvaluation: 尖端模型]
    N --> O[性能指标: pass@1, pass^4]
    O --> P[行为指标: 执行回合, 工具调用]
    P --> Q[结果分析]
    Q --> R[基准发布]

    end

name: Med-HALT
intro: Med-HALT是专门用于评估大型语言模型在医疗领域幻觉问题的基准数据集，提供来自不同国家医疗检查的多样化数据，包含多种创新测试模式，涵盖推理和记忆幻觉两大类别。
build_method: 基于医疗检查数据构建
eval_feature: 评估医疗领域大模型幻觉问题，多种创新测试模式
build_method_en: Built based on medical examination data
eval_feature_en: Evaluates hallucination issues of large models in the medical field, multiple innovative testing modes
intro_en: Med-HALT is a benchmark dataset specifically designed to evaluate hallucination issues of large language models in the medical field. It provides diverse data from medical examinations across different countries and includes various innovative testing modes, covering both reasoning and memory hallucination categories.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Examination Data) --> B[Data Collection from Diverse Countries]
    B --> C[Data Preprocessing & Standardization]
    C --> D[Hallucination Test Pattern Generation]
    D --> E[Medical Expert Review]
    E --> F{Data Validation}
    F -->|Pass| G(Med-HALT Dataset)
    F -->|Fail| H[Refine Data]
    H --> E
    G --> I[LLM Hallucination Evaluation]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
    J --> K(Hallucination Reduction Insights)

name: MedAgentBench
intro: MedAgentBench是一个广泛的评估套件，旨在评测大型语言模型在医疗记录环境中的智能体能力。它包含300个由医生编写的临床任务和100名患者的真实数据，在一个符合FHIR标准的交互式环境中进行，以推动模型在复杂医疗任务中的规划和工具利用能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定, 多轮
scale: 300个任务, 100个患者, 70万个数据元素
intro_en: MedAgentBench is a comprehensive evaluation suite designed to assess large language models' agent capabilities in medical record environments. It includes 300 clinician-written clinical tasks and real data from 100 patients, conducted within an interactive environment compliant with FHIR standards, aiming to advance models' planning and tool-use abilities in complex medical tasks.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real Patient Records) --> B[Collect Patient Data]
    C(Human Medical Expertise) --> D[Design Clinical Tasks]
    B --> E[Structure Patient Records]
    D --> F[Formulate & Refine Tasks]
    E --> G{{FHIR Standard Compliance}}
    F --> H{{Human Doctor Annotation}}
    G --> I[Integrate into FHIR Environment]
    H --> I
    I --> J(MedAgentBench Dataset)
    J --> K[LLM Agent Evaluation]
    K --> L[Assess Agent Capabilities]
scale_en: 300 tasks, 100 items patients, 700,000 items data elements

name: MedAlign
intro: MedAlign是由临床医生生成的电子病历指令遵循评测数据集，包含983条临床指令和303条人工参考回复，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实医疗场景中的指令遵循和EHR处理能力。
build_method: 人工标注，临床医生生成
metric: 临床医生评分（准确性, 质量）
task_type: 指令遵循, 文本生成
eval_feature: 评估LLM在医疗领域指令遵循和电子病历处理能力
scale: 983条指令, 303条人工参考回复, 276份电子病历
build_method_en: Manual annotation, generated by clinical doctors
eval_feature_en: Evaluates LLM's instruction following and electronic medical record processing capabilities in the medical field
intro_en: MedAlign is an electronic health record instruction-following evaluation dataset generated by clinicians, containing 983 clinical instructions and 303 human reference responses. It aims to assess large language models' instruction-following and EHR processing capabilities in real medical scenarios.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Knowledge Bases) --> B[Expert Identification of Scenarios]
    B --> C[Instruction Formulation by Experts]
    C --> D[Expected Response Generation]
    D --> E{Expert Review & Validation}
    E -->|Pass| F(MedAlign Benchmark Dataset)
    E -->|Fail| G[Refinement & Correction]
    G --> C
    F --> H[LLM Evaluation]
    H --> I(Evaluation Metrics)
    I --> J[Benchmark Results]
scale_en: 983 entries instructions, 303 entries human reference responses, 276 electronic medical records
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> S1_1(Recruit 15 Clinicians across 7 Specialties) :::DataCollection

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Instruction Collection"]
        S1_1 --> S1_2[/Online Form for Instruction Submission/] :::DataCollection
        S1_2 --> S1_3(Clinicians Submit 1314 Instructions) :::DataCollection
        S1_3 --> S1_4(Provide Metadata: Clinical Characteristics & Context) :::DataCollection
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Instruction & EHR Matching"]
        S1_4 --> S2_1{Is Instruction "Applicable to Patients Generally"?} :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_1 -- Yes --> S2_2(Filter 455 General Instructions) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_1 -- No --> S2_3(Filter 859 Specific Instructions) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_2 --> S2_4{Remove Near-Identical Instructions (ROUGE-L > 0.7)?} :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_3 --> S2_4
        S2_4 -- Yes --> S2_5(Yield 983 Unique Instructions) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_5 --> S2_6(Transform Patient EHRs to XML Markup (OMOP CDM)) :::DataCollection
        S2_6 --> S2_7(Concatenate Instruction + Patient Characteristics + Clinical Context) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_7 --> S2_8(Search Query for Relevant EHRs) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_8 --> S2_9(Retrieve 5 Most Relevant EHRs from 77200 Patient Subsample) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_9 --> S2_10(Manual Review for Binary Relevance of Instruction-EHR Pairs) :::QualityControl
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Response Generation & Annotation"]
        S2_10 --> S3_1(Clinicians Review Instruction & Paired EHR) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_1 --> S3_2{Is Instruction Feasible & EHR Complete?} :::QualityControl
        S3_2 -- Yes --> S3_3(Manually Generate Expert Response) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_2 -- No --> S3_4(Discard Instruction/EHR Pair) :::QualityControl
        S3_3 --> S3_5(Assign Time Anchor from Most Recent EHR Timestamp) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_5 --> S3_6(Collect 303 Clinician-Written Reference Responses) :::AnnotationLabeling
    end

    subgraph Phase4["LLM Evaluation & Analysis"]
        S3_6 --> S4_1(Evaluate 6 General Domain LLMs) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_1 --> S4_2(Clinicians Rank Accuracy & Quality of LLM Responses) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_2 --> S4_3(Analyze Error Rates: 35% GPT-4 to 68% MPT-7B-Instruct) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_3 --> S4_4(Observe 8.3% Accuracy Drop for GPT-4 (32k to 2k Context)) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_4 --> S4_5(Report Correlations: Clinician Rankings vs. Automated NLG Metrics) :::EvaluationMetrics
    end

    S4_5 --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> S1_1(招募15名来自7个专业的临床医生) :::DataCollection

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与指令收集"]
        S1_1 --> S1_2[/在线指令提交表单/] :::DataCollection
        S1_2 --> S1_3(临床医生提交1314条指令) :::DataCollection
        S1_3 --> S1_4(提供元数据：临床特征与背景) :::DataCollection
    end

    subgraph Phase2["指令与电子病历匹配"]
        S1_4 --> S2_1{指令是否“普遍适用于患者”？} :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_1 -- 是 --> S2_2(筛选455条通用指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_1 -- 否 --> S2_3(筛选859条特定指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_2 --> S2_4{移除近似重复指令 (ROUGE-L > 0.7)？} :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_3 --> S2_4
        S2_4 -- 是 --> S2_5(得到983条独特指令) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_5 --> S2_6(将患者电子病历转换为XML标记 (OMOP CDM)) :::DataCollection
        S2_6 --> S2_7(拼接指令 + 患者特征 + 临床背景) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_7 --> S2_8(构建相关电子病历搜索查询) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_8 --> S2_9(从77200名患者子样本中检索5条最相关的电子病历) :::ProcessingFiltering
        S2_9 --> S2_10(人工审查指令-电子病历对的二元相关性) :::QualityControl
    end

    subgraph Phase3["响应生成与标注"]
        S2_10 --> S3_1(临床医生审查指令与配对电子病历) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_1 --> S3_2{指令是否可行且电子病历完整？} :::QualityControl
        S3_2 -- 是 --> S3_3(手动生成专家响应) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_2 -- 否 --> S3_4(丢弃指令/电子病历对) :::QualityControl
        S3_3 --> S3_5(从最新电子病历时间戳指定时间锚点) :::AnnotationLabeling
        S3_5 --> S3_6(收集303条临床医生编写的参考响应) :::AnnotationLabeling
    end

    subgraph Phase4["大型语言模型评估与分析"]
        S3_6 --> S4_1(评估6个通用领域大型语言模型) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_1 --> S4_2(临床医生对大型语言模型响应的准确性和质量进行排名) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_2 --> S4_3(分析错误率：GPT-4为35%至MPT-7B-Instruct为68%) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_3 --> S4_4(观察GPT-4（32k到2k上下文）准确率下降8.3%) :::EvaluationMetrics
        S4_4 --> S4_5(报告临床医生排名与自动化自然语言生成指标的相关性) :::EvaluationMetrics
    end

    S4_5 --> End([结束]))

name: MedBench
intro: MedBench是清华大学发布的全面、标准化的中文医疗大模型评测基准，涵盖43个临床专业，包含30万道题目，采用动态评估机制防止捷径学习，确保医疗大模型在实际部署前的有效性。
build_method: 数据整合与自动化评估
eval_feature: 全面标准化评测，43个临床专业，动态评估防止捷径学习
eval_feature_en: Comprehensive standardized evaluation, 43 clinical specialties, dynamic evaluation to prevent shortcut learning
intro_en: MedBench, released by Tsinghua University, is a comprehensive and standardized Chinese medical large model benchmark covering 43 clinical specialties with 300,000 questions. It employs a dynamic evaluation mechanism to prevent shortcut learning, ensuring the effectiveness of medical large models before deployment.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Diverse Medical Knowledge Bases) --> C[Data Collection & Extraction]
    B(Clinical Guidelines & Literature) --> C
    C --> D[Data Integration & Standardization]
    D --> E[Question Generation/Formulation]
    E --> F{Medical Expert Review}
    F -->|Approved| G[Automated Quality Checks]
    F -->|Rejected| E
    G --> H(MedBench Dataset\n300K Questions, 43 Specialties)
    H --> I{{Automated Evaluation System}}
    I --> J[Medical LLM Evaluation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation_Metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]):::Start_Node

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        DS_1[/Public Datasets (8)/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_2[/Self-Constructed Datasets (12)/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_3[/Medical School Exams, Textbooks/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_4[/Clinical Case Histories/]:::Data_Collection

        Start --> DS_1
        Start --> DS_2
        DS_2 --> DS_3
        DS_2 --> DS_4

        DS_1 -- "Integrate" --> DC_1(Collect Raw Data):::Data_Collection
        DS_3 -- "Collect" --> DC_1
        DS_4 -- "Collect" --> DC_1
    end

    subgraph Data Processing & Refinement
        DC_1 --> DP_1{Screening Criteria?}:::Processing_Filtering
        DP_1 -- "Yes (Integrity, Representativeness, Diversity)" --> DP_2(Filter & Standardize Data):::Processing_Filtering
        DP_1 -- "No" --> DP_1_No(Discard/Re-evaluate):::Quality_Control

        DP_2 --> DP_3(Rewrite Medical Records):::Annotation_Labeling
        DP_3 -- "2023 SCARE Guidelines" --> DP_4(Standardize Language & Ensure Privacy):::Annotation_Labeling

        DP_4 --> QC_1(Expert Verification (2 Senior Physicians)):::Quality_Control
        QC_1 -- "Double-Check Verification" --> QC_2{Quality Approved?}:::Quality_Control
        QC_2 -- "Yes" --> DP_5(Compile Questions (Single/Multi-choice, Open-ended)):::Processing_Filtering
        QC_2 -- "No" --> DP_3
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Platform & Dynamic Evaluation
        DP_5 --> BP_1[/300,901 Chinese Medical Questions/]:::Output_Result
        BP_1 --> BP_2(Cloud-based Platform):::Output_Result
        BP_2 --> DE_1(Random & Balanced Sampling of Questions):::Processing_Filtering
        DE_1 --> DE_2(Local LLM Inference):::Evaluation_Metric
        DE_2 --> DE_3(Upload Answers to Platform):::Output_Result

        DE_3 --> DE_4(Circular Shuffle Choices):::Processing_Filtering
        DE_3 --> DE_5(Random Prompt Matching (K=3)):::Processing_Filtering

        DE_4 --> EV_1(Obtain Evaluation Metrics):::Evaluation_Metric
        DE_5 --> EV_1
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Results
        EV_1 --> EV_2[/Accuracy, BLEU, ROUGE-L, Micro-F1/]:::Evaluation_Metric
        EV_2 --> EV_3(Check Ranking):::Evaluation_Metric
        EV_3 --> BP_3(Update Dataset Every 3 Months):::Processing_Filtering
        BP_3 --> End([End]):::End_Node
    end
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation_Metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]):::Start_Node

    subgraph 数据来源与收集
        DS_1[/公共数据集 (8)/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_2[/自建数据集 (12)/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_3[/医学院考试, 教科书/]:::Data_Collection
        DS_4[/临床病例史/]:::Data_Collection

        Start --> DS_1
        Start --> DS_2
        DS_2 --> DS_3
        DS_2 --> DS_4

        DS_1 -- "整合" --> DC_1(收集原始数据):::Data_Collection
        DS_3 -- "收集" --> DC_1
        DS_4 -- "收集" --> DC_1
    end

    subgraph 数据处理与精炼
        DC_1 --> DP_1{筛选标准?}:::Processing_Filtering
        DP_1 -- "是 (完整性, 代表性, 多样性)" --> DP_2(筛选与标准化数据):::Processing_Filtering
        DP_1 -- "否" --> DP_1_No(丢弃/重新评估):::Quality_Control

        DP_2 --> DP_3(重写医疗记录):::Annotation_Labeling
        DP_3 -- "2023 SCARE 指南" --> DP_4(标准化语言与确保隐私):::Annotation_Labeling

        DP_4 --> QC_1(专家验证 (2名资深医生)):::Quality_Control
        QC_1 -- "双重验证" --> QC_2{质量通过?}:::Quality_Control
        QC_2 -- "是" --> DP_5(编译问题 (单选/多选, 开放式)):::Processing_Filtering
        QC_2 -- "否" --> DP_3
    end

    subgraph 基准平台与动态评估
        DP_5 --> BP_1[/300,901 道中文医学问题/]:::Output_Result
        BP_1 --> BP_2(云端平台):::Output_Result
        BP_2 --> DE_1(问题随机均衡抽样):::Processing_Filtering
        DE_1 --> DE_2(本地LLM推理):::Evaluation_Metric
        DE_2 --> DE_3(上传答案至平台):::Output_Result

        DE_3 --> DE_4(选项循环洗牌):::Processing_Filtering
        DE_3 --> DE_5(随机提示匹配 (K=3)):::Processing_Filtering

        DE_4 --> EV_1(获取评估指标):::Evaluation_Metric
        DE_5 --> EV_1
    end

    subgraph 评估与结果
        EV_1 --> EV_2[/准确率, BLEU, ROUGE-L, Micro-F1/]:::Evaluation_Metric
        EV_2 --> EV_3(检查排名):::Evaluation_Metric
        EV_3 --> BP_3(每3个月更新数据集):::Processing_Filtering
        BP_3 --> End([结束]):::End_Node
    end

name: MedBullets
intro: MedBullets数据集与JAMA临床挑战共同构建，旨在评测大型语言模型对需复杂推理的医学难题的能力，超越标准医学考试的考察范围。MedBullets包含模拟临床多项选择题，配有专家撰写的详尽解析，更好地评估模型在真实临床场景中的推理和决策能力。
intro_en: The MedBullets dataset, developed alongside the JAMA Clinical Challenge, aims to evaluate large language models' ability to tackle complex medical reasoning tasks beyond standard medical exams. MedBullets includes simulated clinical multiple-choice questions with expert-written detailed explanations, better assessing models' reasoning and decision-making in real clinical scenarios.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MedbulletsDataset Construction] --> B(数据源: X平台公开推文)
    B --> C(Data Collection: 2022年4月-2023年12月)
    C --> D{筛选问题类型}
    D -- USMLE Step 2&3风格 --> E(问题选择: 308个问题)
    E --> F(内容排除: 排除图像，只保留文本)
    F --> G(答案和解释生成: Experts撰写)
    G --> H(数据集组成: 病例描述+问题+5个选项+解释)
    H --> I{Quality Control与Validation}
    I -- 经验研究 --> J(鲁棒性与无污染Validation)
    J --> K(数据集版本: Medbullets-5和Medbullets-4)
    K --> L[基准Evaluation: LLM模型Evaluation]
    L --> M(Evaluation方法: X→Y, X→RY, XY*→R提示策略)
    M --> N(Evaluation指标: 自动与人工Evaluation解释质量)
    N --> O(Final Dataset)
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start_node(["Benchmark Construction Start"])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Data Sourcing["Data Sourcing"]
        A[/Online Medical Study Platform/]:::data_collection
        B(Identify Medbullets Step 2/3 Questions):::data_collection
        A --> B
    end

    subgraph Data Collection["Data Collection"]
        C[/Links to Questions on X (Twitter)/]:::data_collection
        D(Collect 308 Examples):::data_collection
        E{Collection Period: Apr 2022 - Dec 2023?}:::quality_control
        C --> D
        D --> E
        E -- Yes --> F(Initial Data: Case, Question, 5 Choices, Explanation):::data_collection
        E -- No --> D
    end

    subgraph Data Processing & Filtering["Data Processing & Filtering"]
        G{Are there Images in Data?}:::quality_control
        F --> G
        G -- Yes --> H(Exclude Images):::processing_filtering
        G -- No --> I(Focus on Text-based Content):::processing_filtering
        H --> I
    end

    subgraph Content Structuring & Annotation["Content Structuring & Annotation"]
        J(Structure as Multiple-Choice QA Task):::annotation_labeling
        K(Pair with Expert-Written Explanations):::annotation_labeling
        L(Ensure USMLE Step 2/3 Style Questions):::annotation_labeling
        I --> J
        J --> K
        K --> L
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation["Quality Control & Validation"]
        M{Does it require Medical Knowledge & Clinical Reasoning?}:::quality_control
        N(Verify Difficulty Level > Step 1 Questions):::quality_control
        O(Final Review of Case, Choices, Explanations):::quality_control
        L --> M
        M -- Yes --> N
        M -- No --> L
        N --> O
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark Assembly["Final Benchmark Assembly"]
        P[/Structured Medbullets Dataset/]:::output_result
        O --> P
    end

    end_node(["Benchmark Construction End"])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    P --> end_node

    classDef data_collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef processing_filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef annotation_labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef quality_control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef evaluation_metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef output_result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    start_node(["基准测试构建开始"])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Data Sourcing["数据来源"]
        A[/在线医学学习平台/]:::data_collection
        B(识别 Medbullets Step 2/3 问题):::data_collection
        A --> B
    end

    subgraph Data Collection["数据收集"]
        C[/X (Twitter) 上的问题链接/]:::data_collection
        D(收集 308 个示例):::data_collection
        E{收集时间：2022年4月 - 2023年12月?}:::quality_control
        C --> D
        D --> E
        E -- 是 --> F(初始数据：病例、问题、5个选项、解释):::data_collection
        E -- 否 --> D
    end

    subgraph Data Processing & Filtering["数据处理与筛选"]
        G{数据中包含图片吗?}:::quality_control
        F --> G
        G -- 是 --> H(排除图片):::processing_filtering
        G -- 否 --> I(专注于文本内容):::processing_filtering
        H --> I
    end

    subgraph Content Structuring & Annotation["内容结构化与标注"]
        J(结构化为多项选择题任务):::annotation_labeling
        K(配以专家编写的解释):::annotation_labeling
        L(确保符合 USMLE Step 2/3 风格的问题):::annotation_labeling
        I --> J
        J --> K
        K --> L

name: MedCalc-Bench
intro: MedCalc-Bench是首个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）医学计算能力的数据集。它包含来自55个不同医学计算任务的1100个人工审核实例，每个实例都包含一份患者记录、一个计算特定医疗数值的问题、一个标准答案以及详细的解题步骤说明。该研究旨在揭示LLM在医疗场景下进行定量知识和推理方面存在的不足，以期推动未来LLM在各种临床计算任务中的改进。
build_method: 混合, LLM生成, 专家构建
task_type: 开放式问答, 数学问题, 抽取
intro_en: MedCalc-Bench is the first dataset designed to evaluate the medical calculation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It includes 1,100 manually reviewed instances from 55 different medical calculation tasks. Each instance contains a patient record, a question requiring the calculation of a specific medical value, a standard answer, and detailed solution steps. This study aims to identify the shortcomings of LLMs in quantitative knowledge and reasoning within medical contexts, with the goal of driving future improvements in LLM performance across various clinical calculation tasks.

    H --> I{数据Validation与丰富}
    I -- 医疗专业人员Validation --> J[Validation与纠正属性值]
    J -- 合成病历 (基于方程) --> K[为21个计算器生成20个合成病历]
    J -- 临床医生合成病历 (基于规则) --> L[为11个计算器生成20个临床病历]
    K --> M[答案与解释生成]
    L --> M
    M -- 使用模板生成 --> N[生成分步解释与最终答案]

    P -- 单样本思维链提示 --> Q
    Q --> R{Evaluation结果}
    R -- 规则计算器 --> S[精确匹配]
    R -- 方程计算器 (实验室/物理/剂量) --> T[5%误差范围内]
    R -- 方程计算器 (日期) --> U[精确匹配]
    S --> V[最终Evaluation报告]
    T --> V
    U --> V

name: MedHallu
intro: MedHallu是首个专门用于检测大型语言模型医疗幻觉的综合基准，包含10000个高质量问答对，评估模型在医疗领域生成看似合理但事实不准确输出的倾向。
eval_feature: 首个专注医疗幻觉检测的基准，10K高质量问答对
eval_feature_en: The first benchmark focusing on medical hallucination detection, 10K high-quality QA pairs
intro_en: MedHallu is the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to detect medical hallucinations in large language models. It contains 10,000 high-quality QA pairs to evaluate models' tendencies to generate plausible but factually incorrect outputs in the medical domain.

name: MedHELM
intro: MedHELM提出了一个可扩展的医学任务评估框架，弥补了现有医学许可考试评测无法充分反映临床实践复杂性的不足。框架基于29名临床专家验证的分类体系，涵盖5大类、22子类和121项任务。包含35个基准套件（17个现有，18个新建），并通过LLM评审机制和成本效益分析系统地比较模型表现。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, LLM生成
metric: LLM-as-Judge, Win Rate, Accuracy, Exact Match
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 分类, 生成, 对话
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Classification, Generation, Dialogue
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, LLM Generation
intro_en: MedHELM proposes a scalable medical task evaluation framework that addresses the limitations of existing medical licensing exam assessments in fully reflecting the complexity of clinical practice. The framework is based on a classification system validated by 29 clinical experts, covering 5 major categories, 22 subcategories, and 121 tasks. It includes 35 benchmark suites (17 existing, 18 newly created) and systematically compares model performance through an LLM review mechanism and cost-effectiveness analysis.

name: MEDIQA-QA
intro: MEDIQA-QA是ACL BioNLP Workshop发布的医疗问答推理基准，旨在推动自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别在医疗问答领域的应用，要求参与者对提供的答案进行正确性判断和重新排序。
task_type: 答案验证, 答案排序
eval_feature: 医疗问答推理，自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别
eval_feature_en: Medical QA reasoning, natural language inference and question entailment recognition
intro_en: MEDIQA-QA is a medical question answering reasoning benchmark released by the ACL BioNLP Workshop. It aims to advance the application of natural language inference and question entailment recognition in the medical QA domain, requiring participants to assess the correctness of provided answers and reorder them accordingly.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR

    D --> E[Clinical Reasoning Contextualization]
    E --> F{{Expert Review}}
    F --> G{Quality Check}
    G -- Approved --> H(MEDIQA-QA Dataset)
    G -- Rejected --> I[Refinement]
    I --> C
    H --> J[Model Evaluation]
    J --> K[Clinical Reasoning Capability]

name: MedMCQA
intro: MedMCQA是一个大规模多项选择题问答数据集，针对真实医学入学考试题目设计。包含来自AIIMS和NEET PG考试的19.4万道高质量题目，涵盖2400个医疗主题和21个医学科目。该数据集测试模型在广泛医学领域的推理能力。
build_method: 从在线资源和书籍中收集，这些资源和书籍汇集了由医学专业人士创建的多个模拟测试和在线测试系列。
build_method_en: Collected from online resources and books, which gather multiple simulated tests and online test series created by medical professionals.
intro_en: MedMCQA is a large-scale multiple-choice question answering dataset designed for real medical entrance exam questions. It contains 194,000 high-quality questions from AIIMS and NEET PG exams, covering 2,400 medical topics and 21 medical subjects. This dataset evaluates models' reasoning abilities across a wide range of medical fields.

AIIMS, NEET PG) --> B[Manual Collection of MCQs]

    E -- Fail --> G[Discard Invalid Data]
    F --> H(MedMCQA Dataset
194K MCQs, 2.4K Topics, 21 Subjects)
    H --> I[Model Evaluation
10+ Reasoning Abilities]

name: MedMT-Bench
intro: MedMT-Bench是一个针对长医疗对话的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在医疗场景中的长上下文记忆、理解、抗干扰性、自我纠正、安全防御、指令澄清以及多指令响应能力。该基准测试涵盖了诊断前、诊断中和诊断后阶段，数据通过场景合成并由专家进行精炼，共包含400个测试用例，平均22轮对话。它采用LLM作为评估协议，通过实例级评估标准和原子测试点来评估LLM在医疗对话场景中的长期记忆、安全性和指令遵循方面的表现。
org: University of California, Los Angeles, Queen Mary University of London, Peking University, Hong Kong
metric: Accuracy, Human-LLM agreement, Consistency Rate, Overall Accuracy
task_type: 长多轮指令遵循, 医疗对话理解, 安全评估
eval_feature: 长上下文记忆, 安全防御, 指令澄清, 多指令响应, 合成数据生成, 专家精炼, 原子测试点
task_type_en: Long multi-turn instruction following, medical dialogue understanding, safety assessment
eval_feature_en: Long context memory, safety defense, instruction clarification, multi-instruction response, synthetic data generation, expert refinement, atomic test points
intro_en: MedMT-Bench is a challenging benchmark for long medical dialogues, designed to evaluate large language models' long-context memory, comprehension, robustness, self-correction, safety defense, instruction clarification, and multi-instruction response capabilities in medical scenarios. The benchmark covers pre-diagnosis, diagnosis, and post-diagnosis stages, with data synthesized from scenarios and refined by experts, comprising 400 test cases with an average of 22 dialogue turns each. It uses LLMs as the evaluation protocol, assessing their long-term memory, safety, and instruction adherence in medical dialogue contexts through instance-level evaluation criteria and atomic test points.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[多智能体合成管道] --> B(场景数据合成)
    B --> C[人工Experts编辑]
    C --> D(400个测试用例)
    D --> E{包含多模态子集?}

name: MedNLI
intro: MedNLI是一个面向临床领域的自然语言推理（NLI）数据集。该数据集由医生基于患者的真实病历进行标注，旨在推动模型在知识密集且数据有限的专业领域（如医疗）中的应用。研究者通过利用开放域数据的迁移学习和医学术语等领域知识，有效提升了模型的性能。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 自然语言推理, 分类
intro_en: MedNLI is a clinical domain natural language inference (NLI) dataset. It is annotated by doctors based on real patient records, aiming to advance model applications in knowledge-intensive and data-scarce specialized fields like medicine. Researchers have effectively improved model performance by leveraging transfer learning from open-domain data and incorporating domain knowledge such as medical terminology.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MIMIC-III v1.3 Database] --> B(临床病历)
    B --> C[规则程序分割病历章节]
    C --> D(病史部分)
    D --> E[Lingpipe句子分割器]
    E --> F(候选前提句池)
    F --> G{随机抽样}
    G -- 抽样前提句 --> H[临床医生标注]
    H --> I{生成假设句}
    I -- 肯定为真 --> J(蕴含)
    I -- 可能为真 --> K(中立)
    I -- 肯定为假 --> L(矛盾)
    H --> M[标注指南]
    M --> N{Quality Control}
    N -- 丢弃无效前提 --> O(有效前提)
    N -- 飞行研究与协议一致性计算 --> P(高一致性标注)
    P --> Q[数据集拆分]
    Q --> R(Training Set)
    Q --> S(开发集)
    Q --> T(Test Set)
    T --> U[Evaluation方法]
    U --> V[基于特征的系统]
    U --> W[神经网络模型]

    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])

    subgraph Data Sourcing
        A[MIMIC-III v1.3 Database]:::DataCollection
        B[/2,078,705 Clinical Notes from 38,597 Patients/]
    end

    subgraph Premise Sampling & Hypothesis Generation
        C(Segment Notes by Section using Rule-Based Program):::ProcessingFiltering
        D{Is section 'Past Medical History'?}:::ProcessingFiltering
        E(Extract 'Past Medical History' Section):::ProcessingFiltering

        S[/14,049 Unique Sentence Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Dataset Splitting & Analysis
        T(Split Dataset into Train, Dev, Test Sets):::ProcessingFiltering
        U{No Premise Overlap?}:::QualityControl
        V[/MedNLI Train (11,232), Dev (1,395), Test (1,422) Sets/]

        X(Map Concepts to UMLS Semantic Types):::ProcessingFiltering

name: MedQA
intro: MedQA是首个自由格式多项选择开放领域医学问答数据集，来源于专业医学执业考试。它涵盖英语、简体中文和繁体中文三种语言，旨在对现有的开放领域问答系统构成挑战，并推动自然语言处理领域更强大模型的发展。
org: Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Huazhong University of Science and Technology
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MedQA is the first free-format multiple-choice open-domain medical question answering dataset, derived from professional medical licensing exams. It covers English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese, aiming to challenge existing open-domain QA systems and promote the development of more powerful models in natural language processing.

    G -->|Fail| H[Refine Data]
    H --> G
    I --> J[Evaluate QA Models]
    J --> K(Medical QA Models)

name: MedS-Bench
intro: MedS-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在临床环境中表现的综合性基准。它涵盖了11个高级临床任务，如临床报告摘要、治疗建议和诊断等，旨在解决现有基准主要关注选择题的局限性。评测结果显示，即便是最先进的模型在处理这些复杂任务时也面临挑战。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 分类, 生成, 抽取, 摘要, 事实验证
task_type_en: Multiple Choice, Open-ended QA, Classification, Generation, Extraction, Summarization, Fact Verification
intro_en: MedS-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating large language models in clinical settings. It covers 11 advanced clinical tasks, such as clinical report summarization, treatment recommendations, and diagnosis, addressing the limitation of existing benchmarks that mainly focus on multiple-choice questions. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models face challenges in handling these complex tasks.

    F -->|Refine| D
    F -->|Approved| G{{Task-Specific Formatting}}
    G --> H(MedS-Bench Final Dataset)
    H --> I[LLM Evaluation Framework]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis & Reporting]

name: MedSafetyBench
intro: MedSafetyBench是首个基于美国医学会医学伦理原则来评估大型语言模型医疗安全性的基准。它包含1800个有害医疗请求和相应的安全回应，旨在系统性地研究和提升大模型在医疗应用中的安全性。通过该基准的评估和微调，可以有效降低大模型在医疗领域应用的潜在风险。
task_type: 安全测试, 分类, 生成
intro_en: MedSafetyBench is the first benchmark for evaluating the medical safety of large language models based on the American Medical Association's medical ethics principles. It includes 1,800 harmful medical prompts and corresponding safe responses, aiming to systematically study and improve the safety of large models in medical applications. Evaluation and fine-tuning using this benchmark can effectively reduce potential risks of large models in the medical field.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Medical Literature & Guidelines) --> B[Initial Data Collection]
    B --> C(Clinical Case Studies & Reports)
    C --> D{{Expert Annotation & Curation}}
    D --> E[Scenario Generation]
    E --> F{Safety Relevance Check}
    F -->|Relevant| G[Harmful Content Filtering]
    F -->|Irrelevant| H[Discard]
    G --> I[Expert Validation]
    I --> J(MedSafetyBench Final Dataset)
    J --> K[LLM Safety Evaluation]
    K --> L[Risk & Bias Assessment]

name: MedXpertQA
intro: MedXpertQA是一个用于评估专家级医学知识和高级推理能力的基准。包含4460个问题，涵盖17个专业和11个身体系统，分为文本子集和多模态子集。多模态部分采用包含多样图像和丰富临床数据（如病历和检查结果）的专家级考试题目。
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MedXpertQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate expert-level medical knowledge and advanced reasoning abilities. It contains 4,460 questions covering 17 specialties and 11 body systems, divided into text and multimodal subsets. The multimodal subset features expert-level exam questions with diverse images and rich clinical data, such as medical records and test results.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[数据源收集] --> B[构建大规模题库]
    B --> C{题库来源: USMLE, COMLEX, 17个专业委员会考试, 3个图像丰富来源}
    C --> D[收集人类回答分布、解释和难度评级]
    D --> E[AIExpertsFiltering]
    E --> F{AIExperts尝试回答问题}
    F -- 全部正确 --> G[移除过简单问题]
    F -- 全部错误 --> H[保留有挑战性问题]
    H --> I[人类ExpertsFiltering]
    I --> J{使用Brier分数Evaluation问题难度}
    J --> K[根据医学Expert Annotation的难度进行分层抽样]
    K --> L[移除缺少标注的问题]
    L --> M[相似性Filtering]
    M --> N{使用MedCPT-Query-Encoder识别高相似度问题对}
    N -- 发现相似问题 --> O[移除较简单问题]
    O --> P[问题和选项增强]
    P --> Q{LLM重写问题 (gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet)}
    Q --> R[选项增强: 移除低质量干扰项, 增加选项数量]
    R --> S[数据合成以缓解数据泄露风险]
    S --> T[医学Experts审查]
    T --> U{医学Expert Review问题质量、事实准确性、选项有效性}
    U --> V[Final Dataset: MedXpertQA Text & MM]
    V --> W[Evaluation方法: 零样本CoT提示, 贪婪解码]
    W --> X[人类表现Evaluation基线]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> P1_Start(Begin Benchmark Construction)

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Initial Collection"]
        P1_Start --> P1_1[/Authoritative Medical Sources/]
        P1_1 --> P1_2(Curate Large-Scale Question Bank)
        P1_2 --> P1_3[/37,543 Questions/]
        P1_3 --> P1_4(Obtain Human Response Distributions)
        P1_4 --> P1_5(Collect Expert Annotations & Difficulty Ratings)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Multi-Dimensional Question Filtering"]
        P1_5 --> P2_Start(Start Filtering Process)

        subgraph AI_Filtering["AI Expert Filtering (Step 1)"]
            P2_Start --> P2_1(Employ 8 AI Models as Experts)
            P2_1 --> P2_2(Basic AI Experts: 4 Sampling Attempts)
            P2_2 --> P2_3{Any Expert Correct in All Attempts?}
            P2_3 -- Yes --> P2_4(Remove: Too Simple)
            P2_3 -- No --> P2_5(Retain: Challenging Questions)
        end

        subgraph Human_Filtering["Human Expert Filtering (Step 2)"]
            P2_5 --> P2_6(Use Prior & Posterior Human Annotations)
            P2_6 --> P2_7(Calculate Brier Score for Difficulty)
            P2_7 --> P2_8(Normalize Difficulty & Categorize into 3 Levels)
            P2_8 --> P2_9{Question Lacks Annotation or <3rd Percentile?}
            P2_9 -- Yes --> P2_10(Skip Human Expert Filtering)
            P2_9 -- No --> P2_11(Apply Adaptive Brier Score Thresholds)
        end

        subgraph Similarity_Filtering["Similarity Filtering (Step 3)"]
            P2_11 --> P2_12(Identify High Semantic/Edit Distance Similarities)
            P2_12 --> P2_13(Use MedCPT-Query-Encoder for Sentence Reps)
            P2_13 --> P2_14(Compute Pairwise Cosine Similarities)
            P2_14 --> P2_15(Use IQR to Identify Outlier Question Pairs)
            P2_15 --> P2_16{Outlier Pair Found?}
            P2_16 -- Yes --> P2_17(Compare Difficulty & Remove Easier Question)
            P2_16 -- No --> P2_18(Retain Question)
        end
        P2_4 --> P2_End(Filtered Questions)
        P2_10 --> P2_End
        P2_17 --> P2_End
        P2_18 --> P2_End
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Question & Option Augmentation"]
        P2_End --> P3_1(Rephrase Questions using LLM (gpt-4o-2024-11-20))
        P3_1 --> P3_2(Ensure Professional Language & Factual Accuracy)
        P3_2 --> P3_3(Remove Low-Quality Distractors)
        P3_3 --> P3_4(Retain Correct Option & At Least 2 Distractors)
        P3_4 --> P3_5(Set Total Options: Text=10, MM=5)
        P3_5 --> P3_6(Ensure Distractors Challenge Experts & Consistent Style)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Data Synthesis & Expert Review"]
        P3_6 --> P4_1(Perform Data Synthesis to Mitigate Leakage Risk)
        P4_1 --> P4_2(Conduct Multiple Rounds of Expert Reviews)
        P4_2 --> P4_3(Correct Errors in Flagged Questions)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Benchmark Evaluation"]
        P4_3 --> P5_1(Evaluate 18 Leading Models on MedXpertQA)
        P5_1 --> P5_2(Develop Reasoning-Oriented Subset)
        P5_2 --> P5_3(Assess o1-like Models)
    end

    P5_3 --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> P1_Start(开始基准构建)

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与初步收集"]
        P1_Start --> P1_1[/权威医学资料/]
        P1_1 --> P1_2(策划大规模题库)
        P1_2 --> P1_3[/37,543 道题目/]
        P1_3 --> P1_4(获取人类回答分布)
        P1_4 --> P1_5(收集专家标注与难度评级)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["多维度问题筛选"]
        P1_5 --> P2_Start(开始筛选过程)

        subgraph AI_Filtering["AI专家筛选 (步骤 1)"]
            P2_Start --> P2_1(聘用8个AI模型作为专家)
            P2_1 --> P2_2(基础AI专家：4次抽样尝试)
            P2_2 --> P2_3{所有尝试中是否有专家回答正确？}
            P2_3 -- 是 --> P2_4(移除：过于简单)
            P2_3 -- 否 --> P2_5(保留：有挑战性的问题)
        end

        subgraph Human_Filtering["人类专家筛选 (步骤 2)"]
            P2_5 --> P2_6(使用前期与后期人类标注)
            P2_6 --> P2_7(计算布里尔分数评估难度)
            P2_7 --> P2_8(难度归一化并分为3个等级)
            P2_8 --> P2_9{问题缺乏标注或低于3%分位数？}
            P2_9 -- 是 --> P2_10(跳过人类专家筛选)
            P2_9 -- 否 --> P2_11(应用自适应布里尔分数阈值)
        end

        subgraph Similarity_Filtering["相似性筛选 (步骤 3)"]
            P2_11 --> P2_12(识别高语义/编辑距离相似性)
            P2_12 --> P2_13(使用MedCPT-Query-Encoder获取句子表示)
            P2_13 --> P2_14(计算成对余弦相似度)
            P2_14 --> P2_15(使用IQR识别异常问题对)
            P2_15 --> P2_16{发现异常问题对？}
            P2_16 -- 是 --> P2_17(比较难度并移除较简单问题)
            P2_16 -- 否 --> P2_18(保留问题)
        end
        P2_4 --> P2_End(筛选后的问题)
        P2_10 --> P2_End
        P2_17 --> P2_End
        P2_18 --> P2_End
    end

    subgraph Phase3["问题与选项增强"]
        P2_End --> P3_1(使用LLM (gpt-4o-2024-11-20) 重述问题)
        P3_1 --> P3_2(确保专业语言与事实准确性)
        P3_2 --> P3_3(移除低质量干扰项)
        P3_3 --> P3_4(保留正确选项与至少2个干扰项)
        P3_4 --> P3_5(设置总选项数：文本=10，多模态=5)
        P3_5 --> P3_6(确保干扰项能挑战专家且风格一致)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["数据合成与专家评审"]
        P3_6 --> P4_1(执行数据合成以降低数据泄露风险)
        P4_1 --> P4_2(进行多轮专家评审)
        P4_2 --> P4_3(纠正标记问题中的错误)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["基准评估"]
        P4_3 --> P5_1(在MedXpertQA上评估18个领先模型)
        P5_1 --> P5_2(开发面向推理的子集)
        P5_2 --> P5_3(评估o1类模型)
    end

    P5_3 --> End([结束])

name: MIA-Bench
intro: MIA-Bench是一个新的基准，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）严格遵循复杂指令的能力。该基准包含400个图像-提示对，每个都旨在挑战模型在生成满足特定请求模式的准确响应时对分层指令的遵循。评估结果显示了最先进的MLLM在性能上存在显著差异，突出了指令遵循方面的改进空间。
org: Apple, NVIDIA, Roblox, New York University, Nanjing University, The Hong Kong University of Science
intro_en: MIA-Bench is a new benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to strictly follow complex instructions. It contains 400 image-prompt pairs, each intended to challenge models in generating accurate responses that meet specific request patterns while adhering to hierarchical instructions. Evaluation results reveal significant performance gaps among state-of-the-art MLLMs, highlighting room for improvement in instruction following.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[启动: MIA-BenchBenchmark Construction] --> B(图像数据源)
    B --> B1(COCO 2017Validation集)
    B --> B2(SBU数据集)
    B --> B3(TextVQA数据集)
    B --> B4(Flickr数据集)
    B1 & B2 & B3 --> C[随机采样图像]
    B4 --> D[Flickr图像主题多样性选择]
    C --> E[图像内容GPT-4v标注]
    D --> E
    E --> F[人工编写复杂指令]
    F --> F1{指令构建原则: 正确性}
    F1 -- 是 --> F2{指令构建原则: 无答案泄露}
    F2 -- 是 --> F3{指令构建原则: 图像依赖}
    F3 -- 是 --> G[指令分类: 描述, 长度限制, 提及, 类型, 语法, 数学, 视角, OCR]
    G --> H[指令复杂性分级: 基础, 中级, 高级, 创意, 复杂]
    H --> I(400个图像-指令对)
    I --> J[MLLM模型响应生成]
    J --> K[GPT-4o作为评判模型]
    K --> L[设计文本提示模板进行评分]
    L --> M[Evaluation每个子指令的依从性]
    M --> N[计算总分: 子指令权重总和为10]
    N --> O(MIA-Bench最终Evaluation结果)
    O --> P[完成: MIA-BenchBenchmark Construction与Evaluation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing and Preparation
        A([Start]) --> B[/Diverse Images from Internet/]
        B --> C(Collect Diverse Images)
        C --> D(Manually Craft Complex Instructions)
        D --> E{Instructions Layered and Constrained?}
        E -- Yes --> F(Create 400 Image-Prompt Pairs)
        E -- No --> D
    end

    subgraph Prompt Generation
        F --> G(Manually Create Prompt Templates)
        G --> H(Use Language Model for Prompt Generation)
        H --> I(Manually Review and Edit Prompts)
        I --> J{Prompts Quality and Diversity Ensured?}
        J -- Yes --> K[/Finalized Image-Prompt Pairs/]
        J -- No --> G
    end

    subgraph Response Generation and Evaluation
        K --> L(Generate Responses with MLLMs)
        L --> M(Manually Evaluate Responses)
        M --> N{Responses Meet Criteria?}
        N -- Yes --> O(Rate Responses with 5-point Likert Scale)
        N -- No --> P(Provide Detailed Feedback)
        O --> Q[/Evaluated Responses/]
        P --> Q
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Analysis
        Q --> R(Conduct Detailed Error Analysis)
        R --> S{Errors Identified and Categorized?}
        S -- Yes --> T(Identify Areas for Improvement)
        S -- No --> R
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization
        T --> U([MIA-Bench Finalized])
    end

name: MixEval
intro: MixEval 提出了一种通过策略性地混合现有基准来建立高效、黄金标准的大型语言模型（LLM）评估的新范式。它通过将从网络中挖掘的真实世界用户查询与现有基准中的相似查询进行匹配，弥合了真实用户查询的全面性与基于标准答案的基准的高效性之间的差距。基于此，MixEval构建了更具挑战性的MixEval-Hard，为模型改进提供了更大空间。
org: National University of Singapore, Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, Carnegie
build_method: 混合现有基准, 网络挖掘
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MixEval proposes a new paradigm for establishing efficient, gold-standard evaluations of large language models (LLMs) by strategically mixing existing benchmarks. It bridges the gap between the comprehensiveness of real-world user queries mined from the web and the efficiency of benchmark queries with standard answers by matching similar queries from existing benchmarks. Based on this, MixEval creates the more challenging MixEval-Hard, offering greater room for model improvement.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Web用户查询检测]
    B --> C{初始检测: Vicuna 33B + Prompt Engineering}
    C --> D[GPT-4精确标注正负样本]
    D --> E[训练Vicuna 33B模型]
    E --> F[从Common Crawl检测2M用户查询]
    F --> G[GPT-4 TurboFiltering分类查询]
    G --> H[提取文本Input-文本Output查询]
    H --> I[基准混合]
    I --> J{创建现有基准池 (B)}
    J --> K[为每个Web查询(q)找到最相似的基准查询(b)]
    K --> L[使用归一化句子嵌入的点积计算相似度]
    L --> M[MixEval基准数据集]
    M --> N{MixEval-Hard构建}
    N --> O[计算每个条目的难度分数(ξ)]
    O --> P[基于难度分数进行拒绝采样]
    P --> Q[MixEval-Hard基准数据集]
    Q --> R{动态基准测试}
    R --> S[批量Web查询更新]
    R --> T[源Web查询更新]
    R --> U[基准池更新]
    U --> V[End]
flowchart_en:

    subgraph Start
        A([Start: MixEval Benchmark Construction])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Wild Query Mining"]
        B[/Common Crawl Splits/]
        C(Train Open-Source LLMs for Query Detection)
        D(Detect Queries in Common Crawl Splits)
        E{Is it a non-query sentence?}
        F(Utilize GPT-4 Turbo for Filtering)
        G(Exclude Non-Query Sentences)
        H(Categorize Queries by Modalities)
        I{Is it Text-in-Text-out?}
        J(Retain Text-in-Text-out Queries)
        B --> C
        C --> D
        D --> E
        E -- Yes --> F
        F --> G
        E -- No --> H
        G --> H
        H --> I
        I -- Yes --> J
        I -- No --> G
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Benchmark Grounding & Refinement"]
        K[/Mined Web User Queries/]
        L[/Existing Benchmark Pool & Ground Truths/]
        M(Match Mined Queries with Similar Benchmark Queries)
        N(Form MixEval Benchmark)
        O{Need more challenging models?}
        P(Derive MixEval-Hard: Challenging Subset)
        Q(Periodically Update Data Points)
        R(Perform Benchmark Mixture with New Wild Queries)
        S{Low Model Score Variance (0.36 Std)?}
        T{Significant Version Difference (85% Unique Queries)?}
        U[/Updated MixEval & MixEval-Hard/]
        J --> K
        K & L --> M
        M --> N
        N --> O
        O -- Yes --> P
        O -- No --> Q
        P --> Q
        Q --> R
        R --> S
        S -- Yes --> T
        S -- No --> Q
        T -- Yes --> U
        T -- No --> Q
    end

    subgraph FinalValidation["Final Validation & Output"]
        V(Achieve 0.96 Model Ranking Correlation with Chatbot Arena)
        W(Achieve 6% Cost & Time of MMLU)
        X([End: MixEval Benchmark Ready])
        style X fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        U --> V
        U --> W
        V & W --> X
    end

    style Phase1 fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style Phase2 fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px
    style FinalValidation fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px

name: MixEval-Hard
intro: MixEval-Hard是MixEval的升级版，设计更具挑战性，旨在为模型改进提供更大空间。该基准通过混合多种现成评测，桥接真实用户查询与标准答案基准的差距。
task_type: 对话, 开放式问答, 排序
eval_feature: 多轮, 动态, 实时
intro_en: MixEval-Hard is an upgraded version of MixEval, designed to be more challenging and provide greater room for model improvement. This benchmark bridges the gap between real user queries and standard answer benchmarks by combining multiple existing evaluations.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    subgraph MixEval Construction
        A[Common Crawl] --> B[Web User Query Detection]
        B --> C{Train Vicuna 33B}
        C --> D[Self-collected Data]
        D --> E[GPT-4 Labeling (Positive/Negative)]
        E --> F[Refined Vicuna 33B Training]
        F --> G[2M User Queries Detected]
        G --> H[GPT-4 Turbo Filtering & Classification]
        H --> I(Text-in-Text-out Queries)
        I --> J[Benchmark Pool Creation]
        J --> K(Existing Ground-Truth LLM Benchmarks)
        I -- Match Similar Queries --> L[Query-Benchmark Matching]
        K --> L
        L --> M{Similarity Scoring (Sentence Embeddings)}
        M --> N{Apply Length Constraint (θ)}
        N --> O[MixEval Dataset]
    end

    subgraph MixEval-Hard Construction
        O --> P[MixEval Dataset (B')]
        P --> Q[Compute Difficulty Score (ξ)]
        Q --> R{Sample with Rejection (Prioritize High ξ)}
        R --> S{Ensure Balanced Query Distribution (α)}
        S --> T[MixEval-Hard Dataset (1000 Samples)]
    end

    subgraph Dynamic Benchmarking
        T --> U[Periodic Update Mechanism]
        U --> V{Batch Web Query Update}
        U --> W{Source Web Query Update (Latest Common Crawl)}
        U --> X{Benchmark Pool Update (New Benchmarks)}
        V --> U
        W --> U
        X --> U
    end

    A[Common Crawl]:::data
    D[Self-collected Data]:::data
    I(Text-in-Text-out Queries):::data
    K(Existing Ground-Truth LLM Benchmarks):::data
    O[MixEval Dataset]:::data
    P[MixEval Dataset (B')]:::data
    T[MixEval-Hard Dataset (1000 Samples)]:::data

    classDef database fill:#ffc,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px,color:#000;
