name: MLE-Bench
intro: MLE-Bench是一个用于评估AI智能体在机器学习工程方面表现的基准。它收集了75个Kaggle机器学习工程竞赛，旨在测试AI智能体在模型训练、数据准备和实验运行等方面的真实世界技能。该基准通过开源智能体脚手架评估了前沿语言模型，并建立了人类基线。
org: OpenAI, University of California Berkeley, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Stanford Universit
intro_en: MLE-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents' performance in machine learning engineering. It compiles 75 Kaggle machine learning engineering competitions to test agents' real-world skills in model training, data preparation, and experiment execution. The benchmark assesses state-of-the-art language models using an open-source agent framework and establishes a human baseline.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing and Initial Filtering
        A([Start]) --> B(Identify 5673 Kaggle Competitions)
        B --> C{Exclude Community Competitions?}
        C -- Yes --> D(Remaining 586 Competitions)
        C -- No --> E([End - Community Competitions Excluded])
    end

    subgraph Manual Screening and Annotation
        D --> F{Screen for ML Engineering Relevance?}
        F -- Yes --> G(Apply Screening Criteria)
        G --> H{Can replicate grading & create splits?}
        H -- No --> I(Exclude Competition)
        H -- Yes --> J(Annotate Problem Type)
        J --> K(Annotate Complexity Level)
        K --> L{Complexity: Low, Medium, High?}
        L -- Low --> M(Low Complexity: <2 hrs)
        L -- Medium --> N(Medium Complexity: 2-10 hrs)
        L -- High --> O(High Complexity: >10 hrs)
    end

    subgraph Competition Selection
        M & N & O --> P(Select 75 Competitions for MLE-bench)
        P --> Q(22 Low, 38 Medium, 15 High Complexity)
        P --> R(Add 7 Competitions for Development Split)
    end

    subgraph Dataset and Grading Code Preparation
        Q & R --> S(For Each Selected Competition)
        S --> T[/Scrape Description from Kaggle/]
        S --> U{Original Dataset Available?}
        U -- No --> V(Create New Train-Test Splits)
        V --> W{New Test Set 10% of Train?}
        W -- Yes --> X(Validate Split Distribution)
        W -- No --> Y(Adjust Test Set Size)
        U -- Yes --> Z(Use Original Dataset)
        X & Y & Z --> AA[/Prepare Grading Code/]
        AA --> BB[/Snapshot Private Leaderboard/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation and Final Benchmark
        BB --> CC(Implement Local Grading Logic)
        CC --> DD{Evaluate Submission against Metric?}
        DD -- Yes --> EE(Award Medals based on Private Leaderboard)
        EE --> FF([MLE-bench Finalized])
    end

name: MLGym
intro: MLGym是首个面向机器学习任务的Gym环境，支持大型语言模型代理的评估与开发。它包含13个多样化且开放式的AI研究任务，涵盖计算机视觉、自然语言处理和强化学习等领域，旨在促进对AI研究型Agent的开发与评估。
metric: Success Rate, Average Normalized Score, Elo Rating
modality: 文本, 图像, 代码, 多模态
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: MLGym is the first Gym environment designed for machine learning tasks, supporting the evaluation and development of large language model agents. It includes 13 diverse and open-ended AI research tasks spanning computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning, aiming to advance the development and assessment of AI research agents.

name: MLVU
intro: MLVU是一个多任务长视频理解基准，旨在全面深入评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长视频理解（LVU）任务中的性能。它通过显著扩展视频长度、包含多样化的视频类型（如电影、监控录像、自我中心视频、卡通、游戏视频等）以及开发多样化的评估任务来解决现有基准的局限性。对23个最新MLLMs的实证研究表明，现有技术在处理长视频时仍有显著提升空间，且在大多数评估任务中表现不佳。MLVU有望通过对MLLMs的全面深入分析，推动长视频理解领域的研究进展。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence, Shan
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: MLVU is a multi-task long video understanding benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the performance of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on long video understanding (LVU) tasks. It addresses the limitations of existing benchmarks by significantly extending video length, including diverse video types (such as movies, surveillance footage, egocentric videos, cartoons, game videos, etc.), and developing a variety of evaluation tasks. An empirical study of 23 state-of-the-art MLLMs shows that current techniques still have substantial room for improvement in handling long videos and perform poorly on most evaluation tasks. MLVU aims to advance research in long video understanding through comprehensive and in-depth analysis of MLLMs.

name: MM-BrowseComp
intro: MM-BrowseComp是一个全面的多模态深度研究基准，旨在评估智能体通过浏览和推理多模态网页内容来解决复杂问题的能力。该基准包含224个具有挑战性的多跳问题，每个问题的解决方案都特意设计为需要理解图像或视频模态中的内容。评估结果显示，即使是OpenAI o3等最强模型也未能超过30%的准确率，凸显了当前模型在多模态理解和推理方面的不足。该基准还提供了经过验证的清单，用于细粒度分析多模态依赖性和推理路径。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University, University of California, B
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
modality: 文本, 图像, 视频, 多模态
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MM-BrowseComp is a comprehensive multimodal deep research benchmark designed to evaluate agents' ability to solve complex problems by browsing and reasoning over multimodal web content. The benchmark includes 224 challenging multi-hop questions, each requiring understanding of content in image or video modalities. Evaluation results show that even top models like OpenAI o3 fail to exceed 30% accuracy, highlighting current limitations in multimodal understanding and reasoning. The benchmark also provides a validated checklist for fine-grained analysis of multimodal dependencies and reasoning paths.

name: MM-MTBench
intro: MM-MT-Bench是一个多轮LLM-as-a-judge评估基准，类似于文本MT-Bench，用于测试多模态指令调优模型。现有基准测试（如MMMU、MathVista、ChartQA等）侧重于封闭式问题和简短回答，无法评估模型在多轮对话中遵循用户指令和零样本回答开放式问题的能力。MM-MT-Bench旨在克服这一限制。
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
intro_en: MM-MT-Bench is a multi-turn LLM-as-a-judge evaluation benchmark, similar to the text-based MT-Bench, designed to test multimodal instruction-tuned models. Existing benchmarks (such as MMMU, MathVista, ChartQA, etc.) focus on closed-ended questions and short answers, and cannot assess a model's ability to follow user instructions and provide zero-shot answers to open-ended questions in multi-turn dialogues. MM-MT-Bench aims to overcome this limitation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[选择实际用例] --> B{图像类别选择}
    B -- 图表 --> C(21个对话)
    B -- 表格 --> D(19个对话)

    B -- 图示 --> F(20个对话)
    B -- 其他 --> G(8个对话)
    C & D & E & F & G --> H[总计92个对话]
    H --> I{对话轮次分类}
    I -- 单轮 --> J(66个对话)
    I -- 2轮 --> K(18个对话)
    I -- 3轮 --> L(4个对话)
    I -- 4轮 --> M(1个对话)
    J & K & L & M --> N[构建对话数据集]
    N --> O[模型并行查询]
    O --> P(提供历史参考答案)
    P --> Q[独立评分每个轮次]
    Q --> R{评判标准}
    R -- 正确性 --> S(信息提取是否正确)
    R -- 完整性 --> T(是否回答所有问题)
    S & T --> U[评判员1-10分评分]
    U --> V[生成MM-MT-Bench数据集]
    V --> W[Evaluation方法学]
    W --> X(与LMSys-Vision ELO排名相关性)
    X --> Y[0.91 Pearson相关系数]

name: MMBench
intro: MMBench是一个旨在全面评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）多模态能力的双语基准测试。它通过精心策划的质量控制方案，提供了大量多样化的评估问题。MMBench引入了CircularEval策略，并利用大型语言模型将自由形式的预测转换为预定义选项，以确保评估结果的准确性。该基准测试包含中英文多项选择题，支持对VLMs性能进行公平比较。
org: OpenCompass Community, Shanghai AI Laboratory, The University of Hong Kong, SenseTime, Shanghai Jiao
eval_feature: 双语, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MMBench is a bilingual benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the multimodal capabilities of visual language models (VLMs). It offers a large and diverse set of evaluation questions through a carefully curated quality control scheme. MMBench introduces the CircularEval strategy and uses large language models to convert free-form predictions into predefined options, ensuring the accuracy of evaluation results. The benchmark includes multiple-choice questions in both Chinese and English, supporting fair comparisons of VLM performance.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义分层能力分类] --> B[L-1: 感知与推理]
    B --> C[L-2: 六个类别] --> D[L-3: 二十个细粒度技能]
    D --> E[问题收集: 手动收集多选视觉语言问答]
    E --> F{Data Sources: 多种来源, 志愿者}
    F --> G[问题集扩展: 志愿者扩展问题集]
    G --> H{Quality Control (初始): 确保样本正确性与有效性}
    H -- 通过 --> I[LLM辅助选择提取: GPT-4转换自由形式预测]
    I --> J{启发式匹配 (步骤1)}
    J -- 失败 --> K[LLM匹配 (步骤2)]
    J -- 成功 --> L[CircularEval策略: 多次Input问题, 循环移位选项]
    K --> L
    L --> M{VLM成功: 所有循环通过}
    M -- 否 --> N[VLM失败: 标记为错误]
    M -- 是 --> O[MMBench-CN转换: GPT-4翻译为中文, 人工Validation]
    O --> P[数据统计: 3217个样本, 20个L-3能力, 每个至少125个样本]
    P --> Q[数据划分: Training Set(40%)与Test Set(60%)]
    Q --> R[Evaluation方法: 零样本设置, 开放式生成, GPT-4-0125作为选择提取器]
    R --> S(最终MMBench基准测试)

name: MMBench-Video
intro: MMBench-Video是一个用于严格评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）视频理解能力的定量基准。该基准包含来自YouTube的长视频和自由形式的问题，更贴近实际应用场景，旨在严谨评估模型的视频理解水平。所有问题均由人工根据精心构建的能力分类法进行标注。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, SenseTime Research, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MMBench-Video is a quantitative benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the video understanding capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). It includes long videos from YouTube and open-ended questions, reflecting real-world scenarios, and aims to provide a thorough assessment of models' video comprehension. All questions are manually annotated based on a carefully constructed taxonomy of abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Initialization["Benchmark Initialization"]
        A([Start Benchmark Construction]) --> B(Define Evaluation Goal: LVLM Video Understanding)
        B --> C(Identify Limitations of Existing Benchmarks)
    end

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        C --> D[/Video Sources: YouTube/]
        D --> E(Collect Long-Form, Multi-Shot Videos)
        E --> F{Video Diversity Check}
        F -- Yes --> G(Filter Irrelevant/Low-Quality Videos)
        F -- No --> E
    end

    subgraph Question Generation & Annotation["Question Generation & Annotation"]
        G --> H(Generate Free-Form Questions)
        H --> I[/Ability Taxonomy for Video Understanding/]
        I --> J(Human Annotation of Questions)
        J --> K{Annotation Quality Check}
        K -- Pass --> L(Refine Questions based on Annotation)
        K -- Fail --> J
    end

    subgraph Automated Assessment & Validation["Automated Assessment & Validation"]
        L --> M(Prepare Data for GPT-4 Assessment)
        M --> N(GPT-4 Automated Assessment)
        N --> O{Assessment Accuracy Check}
        O -- High Accuracy --> P(Validate Benchmark Questions)
        O -- Low Accuracy --> L
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization & Release["Benchmark Finalization & Release"]
        P --> Q(Conduct Comprehensive LVLM Evaluations)
        Q --> R[/Evaluation Results/]
        R --> S(Integrate Evaluation Code into VLMEvalKit)
        S --> T([MMBench-Video Benchmark Released])
    end

    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style T fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style Q fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style R fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    style S fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Initialization["基准初始化"]
        A([开始基准构建]) --> B(定义评估目标：LVLM视频理解)
        B --> C(识别现有基准的局限性)
    end

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection["数据来源与收集"]
        C --> D[/视频来源：YouTube/]
        D --> E(收集长视频、多镜头视频)
        E --> F{视频多样性检查}
        F -- 是 --> G(过滤不相关/低质量视频)
        F -- 否 --> E
    end

    subgraph Question Generation & Annotation["问题生成与标注"]
        G --> H(生成自由形式问题)
        H --> I[/视频理解能力分类法/]
        I --> J(人工标注问题)
        J --> K{标注质量检查}
        K -- 通过 --> L(根据标注完善问题)
        K -- 失败 --> J
    end

    subgraph Automated Assessment & Validation["自动化评估与验证"]
        L --> M(准备数据用于GPT-4评估)
        M --> N(GPT-4自动化评估)
        N --> O{评估准确性检查}
        O -- 高准确性 --> P(验证基准问题)
        O -- 低准确性 --> L
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization & Release["基准最终确定与发布"]
        P --> Q(进行全面的LVLM评估)
        Q --> R[/评估结果/]
        R --> S(将评估代码集成到VLMEvalKit)
        S --> T([MMBench-Video基准发布])
    end

name: MME
intro: MME是一个针对多模态大型语言模型的综合性评估基准。它旨在衡量模型在14个子任务上的感知和认知能力，包括存在、计数、位置、颜色、海报、名人、场景、地标、艺术品、OCR、常识推理、数值计算、文本翻译和代码推理。为避免数据泄漏，所有指令-答案对均由人工设计。
org: Nanjing University, Tencent Youtu Lab, Xiamen University, Chinese Academy of Sciences
task_type: 混合(选择题, 开放式问答)
intro_en: MME is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal large language models. It aims to assess models' perceptual and cognitive abilities across 14 subtasks, including existence, counting, location, color, posters, celebrities, scenes, landmarks, artworks, OCR, commonsense reasoning, numerical calculation, text translation, and code reasoning. To prevent data leakage, all instruction-answer pairs are manually designed.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MLLMEvaluation需求分析] --> B{避免数据泄露}
    B -- 是 --> C[手动设计指令-答案对]
    B -- 否 --> D[使用公共数据集图像]
    C --> E[指令设计: 简洁问答]
    D --> E
    E --> F[Data Collection: 感知任务]
    F --> G[Data Collection: 认知任务]
    F -- 粗粒度识别 --> F1(COCO图像)
    F -- 细粒度识别 --> F2(公开数据集图像)
    F -- OCR --> F3(OCR数据集图像)
    G -- 常识推理 --> G1(手动拍摄/生成图像)
    G -- 数值计算/文本翻译/代码推理 --> G2(手动拍摄图像)
    F1 & F2 & F3 & G1 & G2 --> H[图像数据]
    H & C --> I[指令-答案对数据集]
    I --> J[数据集组成: 14个子任务]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J1[粗粒度识别: 存在,计数,颜色,位置]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J2[细粒度识别: 海报,名人,场景,地标,艺术品]
    J -- 感知子任务 --> J3[OCR]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J4[常识推理]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J5[数值计算]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J6[文本翻译]
    J -- 认知子任务 --> J7[代码推理]
    J1 & J2 & J3 & J4 & J5 & J6 & J7 --> K[最终MME数据集]
    K --> L[模型Evaluation: 30个MLLM]
    L --> M{模型Output: 是/否}
    M --> N[Evaluation指标: 准确率]
    M --> O[Evaluation指标: 准确率+]
    N & O --> P[子任务得分计算]
    P --> Q[MMEEvaluation结果分析]
    Q --> R[总结问题与未来方向]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start Benchmark Construction]) --> InputData[/Raw Image Data/]

    subgraph Data Sourcing and Collection
        InputData --> COCO_Images(Sample COCO Images for Coarse-Grained) 
        InputData --> Public_Datasets(Collect Images from Public Datasets for Fine-Grained)
        InputData --> Manual_Photos(Manually Photograph Images for Cognition Tasks)
        InputData --> Diffusion_Images(Generate Images via Diffusion Models for Commonsense)
        COCO_Images --> CollectedImages[/Collected Images/]
        Public_Datasets --> CollectedImages
        Manual_Photos --> CollectedImages
        Diffusion_Images --> CollectedImages
    end

    subgraph Data Processing and Annotation
        CollectedImages --> ManualInstructionDesign(Manually Design Instruction-Answer Pairs)
        ManualInstructionDesign --> TwoInstructions(Create Two Instructions per Image)
        TwoInstructions --> YesNoGT(Assign 'Yes'/'No' Ground Truth for Each Instruction)
        YesNoGT --> AvoidDataLeakage{Avoid Data Leakage?}
        AvoidDataLeakage -- Yes --> ManualAnnotation(Ensure Manual Annotation for All Pairs)
        ManualAnnotation --> InstructionAnswerPairs[/Instruction-Answer Pairs/]
        InstructionAnswerPairs --> CoarseGrainedAnnotation(Annotate Coarse-Grained: Existence, Count, Color, Position)
        CoarseGrainedAnnotation --> FineGrainedAnnotation(Annotate Fine-Grained: Posters, Celebrities, Scenes, Landmarks, Artworks)
        FineGrainedAnnotation --> OCRAnnotation(Annotate OCR Tasks)
        OCRAnnotation --> CommonsenseAnnotation(Annotate Commonsense Reasoning)
        CommonsenseAnnotation --> NumericalAnnotation(Annotate Numerical Calculation)
        NumericalAnnotation --> TranslationAnnotation(Annotate Text Translation)
        TranslationAnnotation --> CodeAnnotation(Annotate Code Reasoning)
        CodeAnnotation --> AnnotatedData[/Annotated Data (14 Subtasks)/]
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Validation
        AnnotatedData --> ReviewInstructions(Review Instruction Conciseness and Clarity)
        ReviewInstructions --> CheckGroundTruth(Verify 'Yes'/'No' Ground Truth Accuracy)
        CheckGroundTruth --> DataConsistency(Ensure Data Consistency Across Subtasks)
        DataConsistency --> FinalBenchmarkData[/Validated Benchmark Data/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation and Reporting
        FinalBenchmarkData --> MLLMEvaluation(Evaluate 30 Advanced MLLMs)
        MLLMEvaluation --> CalculateAccuracy(Calculate Accuracy per Question)
        CalculateAccuracy --> CalculateAccuracyPlus(Calculate Accuracy+ per Image)
        CalculateAccuracyPlus --> CalculateSubtaskScore(Sum Accuracy and Accuracy+ for Subtask Score)
        CalculateSubtaskScore --> AggregateScores(Aggregate Scores for Perception & Cognition)
        AggregateScores --> GenerateLeaderboards(Generate Leaderboards for 14 Subtasks)
        GenerateLeaderboards --> IdentifyProblems(Identify MLLM Performance Problems)
        IdentifyProblems --> OptimizationDirections(Suggest Model Optimization Directions)
        OptimizationDirections --> End([End Benchmark Construction])
    end

    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始基准构建]) --> InputData[/原始图像数据/]

    subgraph 数据来源与收集
        InputData --> COCO_Images(为粗粒度识别采样COCO图像) 
        InputData --> Public_Datasets(为细粒度识别从公共数据集收集图像)
        InputData --> Manual_Photos(为认知任务手动拍摄图像)
        InputData --> Diffusion_Images(通过扩散模型生成常识推理图像)
        COCO_Images --> CollectedImages[/收集到的图像/]
        Public_Datasets --> CollectedImages
        Manual_Photos --> CollectedImages
        Diffusion_Images --> CollectedImages
    end

    subgraph 数据处理与标注
        CollectedImages --> ManualInstructionDesign(手动设计指令-答案对)
        ManualInstructionDesign --> TwoInstructions(为每张图像创建两个指令)
        TwoInstructions --> YesNoGT(为每个指令分配“是”/“否”真值)
        YesNoGT --> AvoidDataLeakage{避免数据泄露?}
        AvoidDataLeakage -- 是 --> ManualAnnotation(确保所有指令对均手动标注)
        ManualAnnotation --> InstructionAnswerPairs[/指令-答案对/]
        InstructionAnswerPairs --> CoarseGrainedAnnotation(标注粗粒度任务：存在、计数、颜色、位置)
        CoarseGrainedAnnotation --> FineGrainedAnnotation(标注细粒度任务：海报、名人、场景、地标、艺术品)
        FineGrainedAnnotation --> OCRAnnotation(标注OCR任务)
        OCRAnnotation --> CommonsenseAnnotation(标注常识推理任务)
        CommonsenseAnnotation --> NumericalAnnotation(标注数值计算任务)
        NumericalAnnotation --> TranslationAnnotation(标注文本翻译任务)
        TranslationAnnotation --> CodeAnnotation(标注代码推理任务)
        CodeAnnotation --> AnnotatedData[/标注数据（14个子任务）/]
    end

    subgraph 质量控制与验证
        AnnotatedData --> ReviewInstructions(审查指令的简洁性和清晰度)
        ReviewInstructions --> CheckGroundTruth(验证“是”/“否”真值的准确性)
        CheckGroundTruth --> DataConsistency(确保跨子任务的数据一致性)
        DataConsistency --> FinalBenchmarkData[/已验证的基准数据/]
    end

    subgraph 评估与报告
        FinalBenchmarkData --> MLLMEvaluation(评估30个先进的MLLM)
        MLLMEvaluation --> CalculateAccuracy(计算每个问题的准确率)
        CalculateAccuracy --> CalculateAccuracyPlus(计算每张图像的准确率+)
        CalculateAccuracyPlus --> CalculateSubtaskScore(汇总准确率和准确率+以获得子任务分数)
        CalculateSubtaskScore --> AggregateScores(汇总感知与认知分数)
        AggregateScores --> GenerateLeaderboards(生成14个子任务的排行榜)
        GenerateLeaderboards --> IdentifyProblems(识别MLLM性能问题)
        IdentifyProblems --> OptimizationDirections(提出模型优化方向)
        OptimizationDirections --> End([结束基准构建])
    end

    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

name: MMLongBench
intro: MMLongBench是首个涵盖多种长上下文视觉-语言任务的基准，旨在有效且全面地评估长上下文视觉-语言模型（LCVLMs）。它包含13,331个示例，涵盖五种不同类别的下游任务，如视觉RAG和多样本ICL。该基准通过提供广泛的任务覆盖、多样的图像类型和严格的长度控制，为诊断和推进下一代LCVLMs提供了基础。
org: Zhaowei Wang, Wenhao Yu, Xiyu Ren, Jipeng Zhang, Yu Zhao, Rohit Saxena, Liang Cheng, Ginny Wong, Sim
eval_feature: 长上下文, 多模态, 跨模态
intro_en: MMLongBench is the first benchmark covering various long-context vision-language tasks, designed to effectively and comprehensively evaluate long-context vision-language models (LCVLMs). It includes 13,331 examples across five different downstream task categories, such as visual RAG and multi-sample ICL. By offering broad task coverage, diverse image types, and strict length control, this benchmark provides a foundation for diagnosing and advancing the next generation of LCVLMs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start Benchmark Construction] --> B(Identify Long-Context VLM Tasks)
    B --> C{Select Task Categories}
    C --> D[Visual RAG] & E[Many-Shot ICL] & F[NIAH] & G[DocVQA] & H[Summarization]
    D --> D1(Knowledge-based VQA Datasets) & D2(Wikipedia Passages)
    E --> E1(Image Classification Problems) & E2(Four Domains)
    H --> H1(Image-based PDF Documents)
    D1 & D2 --> I[Collect VRAG Examples]
    E1 & E2 --> J[Collect ICL Examples]
    F --> K[Collect NIAH Examples]
    G --> L[Collect DocVQA Examples]
    H1 --> M[Collect Summarization Examples]
    I & J & K & L & M --> N(Combine 13,331 Examples)
    N --> O{Include Diverse Image Types}
    O -- Yes --> P[Natural Images] & Q[Synthetic Images]
    P & Q --> R[Apply Cross-Modal Tokenization]
    R --> S(Unified Token-Count Method: Vision Patches + Text Tokens)
    S --> T[Standardize Input Lengths (8K-128K Tokens)]
    T --> U[Ensure Extendability to Longer Contexts]
    U --> V[Final Dataset Composition]
    V --> W[Benchmark 46 LCVLMs]
    W --> X[Analyze Performance and Findings]
    X --> Y[End Benchmark Construction]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataSourcing fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> DataSourcing(Identify Need for LCVLM Benchmark)

    subgraph Data Acquisition
        DataSourcing --> DataCollection[/Diverse Image Types/]
        DataCollection --> DataCollection_Details(Collect Natural and Synthetic Images)
        DataCollection_Details --> TaskCategories[/Five Downstream Task Categories/]
        TaskCategories --> TaskExamples(Generate 13,331 Examples)
    end

    subgraph Data Processing
        TaskExamples --> Tokenization(Apply Cross-Modal Tokenization Scheme)
        Tokenization --> InputLengths[/Standardized Input Lengths (8K-128K tokens)/]
        InputLengths --> DataFiltering{Filter for Quality and Relevance}
        DataFiltering -->|Pass| ProcessedData[/Processed Benchmark Data/]
        DataFiltering -->|Fail| DataRejection(Reject or Re-process Data)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction
        ProcessedData --> Annotation(Categorize into Visual RAG & Many-Shot ICL)
        Annotation --> QualityControl{Review for Accuracy and Consistency}
        QualityControl -->|Pass| ValidatedData[/Validated Benchmark Data/]
        QualityControl -->|Fail| AnnotationCorrection(Correct Annotations)
        ValidatedData --> FinalBenchmark(Assemble MMLongBench)
    end

    subgraph Model Evaluation
        FinalBenchmark --> ModelSelection(Select 46 Closed/Open-Source LCVLMs)
        ModelSelection --> Evaluation(Benchmark LCVLMs on MMLongBench)
        Evaluation --> PerformanceAnalysis(Analyze Performance Across Tasks and Lengths)
        PerformanceAnalysis --> Insights(Derive Insights on LCVLM Capabilities)
    end

    Insights --> Output[/Comprehensive Analysis Report/]
    Output --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataSourcing fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> DataSourcing(确定LCVLM基准需求)

    subgraph 数据采集
        DataSourcing --> DataCollection[/多样图像类型/]
        DataCollection --> DataCollection_Details(收集自然和合成图像)
        DataCollection_Details --> TaskCategories[/五种下游任务类别/]
        TaskCategories --> TaskExamples(生成13,331个示例)
    end

    subgraph 数据处理
        TaskExamples --> Tokenization(应用跨模态分词方案)
        Tokenization --> InputLengths[/标准化输入长度(8K-128K tokens)/]
        InputLengths --> DataFiltering{筛选质量和相关性}
        DataFiltering -->|通过| ProcessedData[/处理后的基准数据/]
        DataFiltering -->|失败| DataRejection(拒绝或重新处理数据)
    end

    subgraph 基准构建
        ProcessedData --> Annotation(分类为视觉RAG和多样本ICL)
        Annotation --> QualityControl{审查准确性和一致性}
        QualityControl -->|通过| ValidatedData[/验证后的基准数据/]
        QualityControl -->|失败| AnnotationCorrection(修正标注)
        ValidatedData --> FinalBenchmark(组装MMLongBench)
    end

    subgraph 模型评估
        FinalBenchmark --> ModelSelection(选择46个闭源/开源LCVLM)
        ModelSelection --> Evaluation(在MMLongBench上评估LCVLM)
        Evaluation --> PerformanceAnalysis(分析跨任务和长度的性能)
        PerformanceAnalysis --> Insights(得出LCVLM能力的见解)
    end

    Insights --> Output[/综合分析报告/]
    Output --> End([结束])

name: MMLU
intro: MMLU是一个多任务准确率测试，涵盖57个任务，包括基础数学、美国历史、计算机科学和法律等。高准确率要求模型具备广泛的世界知识和问题解决能力。
org: UC Berkeley, Columbia University, UChicago, UIUC
intro_en: MMLU is a multi-task accuracy test covering 57 tasks, including basic math, U.S. history, computer science, and law. High accuracy requires models to have broad world knowledge and problem-solving skills.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[确定测试目标：测量大规模多任务语言理解] --> B[选择多项选择题格式]
    B --> C[收集问题来源：STEM、人文、社会科学等领域的现有测试和教育材料]
    C --> D{问题筛选与去重}
    D -- Filtering --> C
    D -- 通过 --> E[构建57个主题任务]
    E --> F[设计零样本/少样本Evaluation机制]
    F --> G[创建开发集：用于少样本提示]
    F --> H[创建Validation集：用于超参数调优]
    F --> I[创建Test Set：用于最终准确率计算]
    I --> J[模型Evaluation：计算多项选择题准确率]
    J --> K[结果分析：识别模型知识盲点和能力不平衡]
    K --> L(MMLU Benchmark)

    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> DataSourcing(Identify Diverse Knowledge Domains)

    subgraph Data Acquisition["Data Acquisition"]
        DataSourcing --> DataSources[/Freely Available Sources (e.g., USMLE, OUP Books)/]
        DataSources --> ManualCollection(Manually Collect Questions)
        ManualCollection --> TotalQuestions[/15908 Questions Collected/]
        TotalQuestions --> TaskCategorization(Categorize into 57 Tasks)
        TaskCategorization --> DifficultyAssignment(Assign Difficulty Levels: Elementary to Professional)
        DifficultyAssignment --> QuestionFormatting(Format Questions as Multiple Choice)
        QuestionFormatting --> MathExpressionHandling(Encode Math Expressions with LaTeX/Symbols)
    end

    subgraph Data Preparation["Data Preparation"]
        QuestionFormatting --> DataSplit(Split Dataset)
        DataSplit --> FewShotDev[/5 Questions per Subject/]
        DataSplit --> ValidationSet[/1540 Questions for Hyperparameter Tuning/]
        DataSplit --> TestSet[/14079 Questions, Min 100 per Subject/]
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Evaluation["Benchmark Evaluation"]
        TestSet --> ModelEvaluation(Evaluate Models: Zero-shot & Few-shot Settings)
        ModelEvaluation --> AccuracyCalculation(Compute Classification Accuracy)
        AccuracyCalculation --> PerformanceAnalysis(Analyze Model Performance Across Tasks)
        PerformanceAnalysis --> IdentifyShortcomings(Identify Model Blind Spots & Lopsided Performance)
        IdentifyShortcomings --> CalibrationCheck(Check Model Calibration: Confidence vs. Accuracy)
        CalibrationCheck --> HumanPerformanceComparison(Compare to Human Performance: Unspecialized 34.5%, Expert ~89.8%)
    end

    HumanPerformanceComparison --> End([End])

name: MMLU-CF
intro: MMLU-CF是一个无污染且更具挑战性的多项选择题基准，用于评估大型语言模型的常识、理解和解决问题能力。通过广泛领域数据和去污染规则，确保评测结果可靠。包含公开验证集和封闭测试集。
build_method: 网络爬取, 自动生成, 混合
eval_feature: 防污染, 结果导向, 零样本, 少样本
intro_en: MMLU-CF is a clean and more challenging multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' commonsense, comprehension, and problem-solving abilities. It ensures reliable evaluation results through extensive domain data and decontamination rules. It includes both a public validation set and a closed test set.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[起始：现有MCQ基准污染问题] --> B[提出MMLU-CF基准]
    B --> C{避免无意数据泄露}
    C -- 是 --> D[从更广泛领域获取数据(数据源)]
    D --> E[设计三条去污染规则(去污染规则)]
    E --> F{避免恶意数据泄露}
    F -- 是 --> G[划分Validation集和Test Set(数据集划分)]
    G --> H[确保Validation集与Test Set难度和主题分布相似(Quality Control)]
    H --> I[Test Set保持闭源(Test Set管理)]
    H --> J[Validation集公开可用(Validation集管理)]
    I --> K[Final Dataset组成(MMLU-CF数据集)]
    J --> K
    K --> L[LLMEvaluation(Evaluation方法)]
    L --> M[报告5-shot和0-shot分数(Evaluation结果)]
    M --> N[End：提供更严格、无污染的Evaluation标准]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start_node([Start: MMLU-CF Benchmark Construction])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph DataSourcing["Phase 1: Data Sourcing"]
        A[/Initial Data Sources/]
        style A fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        B(Source Data from Broader Domain)
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        A --> B
    end

    subgraph Decontamination["Phase 2: Decontamination Process"]
        C{Apply Decontamination Rules?}
        style C fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        D(Design Three Decontamination Rules)
        style D fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E(Filter Data based on Rules)
        style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        B --> C
        C -- Yes --> D
        D --> E
        C -- No --> F(Proceed without Decontamination)
        style F fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph BenchmarkDivision["Phase 3: Benchmark Division"]
        G(Divide into Validation and Test Sets)
        style G fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        H{Ensure Similar Difficulty & Subject Distribution?}
        style H fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        I(Adjust Sets for Balance)
        style I fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E --> G
        F --> G
        G --> H
        H -- Yes --> J[/Validation Set/]
        style J fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        H -- Yes --> K[/Test Set/]
        style K fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        H -- No --> I
        I --> J
        I --> K
    end

    subgraph QualityControl["Phase 4: Quality Control & Access"]
        L(Keep Test Set Closed-Source)
        style L fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        M(Make Validation Set Publicly Available)
        style M fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        K --> L
        J --> M
    end

    subgraph Evaluation["Phase 5: Evaluation & Reporting"]
        N(Evaluate Mainstream LLMs e.g., GPT-4o)
        style N fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        O[/Evaluation Results/]
        style O fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        P(Report 5-shot Score: 73.4% for GPT-4o)
        style P fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        Q(Report 0-shot Score: 71.9% for GPT-4o)
        style Q fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        L --> N
        M --> N
        N --> O
        O --> P
        O --> Q
    end

    end_node([End: MMLU-CF Benchmark Ready])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    P --> end_node
    Q --> end_node

    start_node --> DataSourcing
    DataSourcing --> Decontamination
    Decontamination --> BenchmarkDivision
    BenchmarkDivision --> QualityControl
    QualityControl --> Evaluation
    Evaluation --> end_node

name: MMLU-Pro
intro: MMLU-Pro是MMLU的增强版，旨在通过整合更具挑战性的、以推理为中心的问题，并将选项从四个扩展到十个，来扩展以知识驱动为主的MMLU基准。该基准包含了超过12,000个来自学术考试和教科书的严谨策划的问题，涵盖14个不同领域。实验结果表明，MMLU-Pro不仅提升了挑战性，还表现出在不同提示下的更高稳定性。
intro_en: MMLU-Pro is an enhanced version of MMLU, designed to expand the knowledge-driven MMLU benchmark by incorporating more challenging, reasoning-focused questions and increasing the number of options from four to ten. The benchmark includes over 12,000 rigorously curated questions from academic exams and textbooks, covering 14 different domains. Experimental results show that MMLU-Pro not only increases difficulty but also demonstrates greater stability across different prompts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Review Original MMLU Dataset]
    B --> C{Merge Subject Categories}
    C --> D[Evaluate Questions with 8 LLMs]
    D --> E{Questions Answered Correctly by >4 Models?}
    E -- Yes --> F[Exclude Too Easy Questions]
    E -- No --> G[Keep Challenging Questions]

    G --> H[Collect Questions from External Sources]
    H --> H1(STEM Website)
    H --> H2(TheoremQA)
    H --> H3(SciBench)

    H1 --> I[Extract Short Answers GPT-4-Turbo]
    H2 --> I
    I --> J[Generate 3 Additional Distractors]
    J --> K{Manually Compare Solutions & Extracted Answers}
    K -- Incomplete/Incorrect --> L[Remove Question]
    K -- Correct --> M[Prepare for Option Augmentation]

    M --> N[Option Augmentation GPT-4-Turbo]
    N --> O[Introduce 6 Additional Distractors]

    O --> P[Expert Review Phase 1]
    P --> P1{Verify Answer Accuracy}
    P1 -- Incorrect --> Q[Remove Question]
    P1 -- Correct --> P2{Remove Unsuitable MCQs}
    P2 -- Unsuitable --> Q
    P2 -- Suitable --> P3{Discard Questions Lacking Info/Non-Textual Elements}
    P3 -- Discard --> Q
    P3 -- Keep --> R[Expert Review Phase 2]

    R --> R1[Gemini-1.5-Pro Re-evaluate Options]
    R1 --> R2{Identify Potential False Negatives}
    R2 -- Yes --> R3[Human Experts Review Identified Options]
    R3 --> R4{Ensure Distractors are Incorrect & Distinct}
    R4 -- Valid --> S[Final Dataset Composition]
    R4 -- Invalid --> Q

    Q --> T[Removed Questions Pool]
    S --> U[Evaluation Methodology]
    U --> V[End]

    subgraph Expert Review - Phase 1

        DD[/Accuracy Metrics/] style fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

name: MMLU-Redux
intro: MMLU-Redux是MMLU的一个经过修正的子集，旨在解决原始数据集中存在的标注错误问题。该数据集包含了对MMLU全部57个学科的5700个问题的手动重新标注，研究发现原始数据集中约有6.49%的题目存在错误。通过提供更准确的基准，MMLU-Redux有助于更可靠地评估和比较大型语言模型的能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a revised subset of MMLU designed to address annotation errors in the original dataset. It contains 5,700 manually re-annotated questions covering all 57 subjects of MMLU. Studies found that about 6.49% of the original questions contained errors. By providing a more accurate benchmark, MMLU-Redux helps to more reliably evaluate and compare the capabilities of large language models.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[原始MMLU数据集] --> B[错误识别框架]
    B --> C{错误标注协议}
    C --> D[分析MMLU问题]
    D -- 发现错误 --> E[手动重新标注]
    D -- 无错误 --> F[保留原始问题]
    E --> G(5700个重新标注问题)
    F --> H(原始问题)
    G & H --> I[MMLU-Redux数据集]
    I --> J[模型性能重新Evaluation]
    J --> K(性能差异分析)
    K --> L[修订MMLU建议]
    B -- 未发现错误 --> M[MMLU-Redux创建]
    M --> I
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Problem Identification
        A([Start]) --> B[/MMLU Benchmark/]
        B --> C(Identify Errors in MMLU)
        C --> D{Are there errors?}
        D -- Yes --> E[Numerous Ground Truth Errors]
        E --> F{e.g., 57% in Virology subset}
        F --> G(Obscure LLM Capabilities)
    end

    subgraph Error Annotation Protocol Development
        G --> H(Develop Hierarchical Annotation Protocol)
        H --> I{Classify Errors}
        I -- Type 1: Question Assessment --> J(Bad Question Clarity)
        J --> J1(Poorly presented question)
        I -- Type 1: Question Assessment --> K(Bad Options Clarity)
        K --> K1(Unclear/irrelevant options, parsing errors)
        I -- Type 2: Ground Truth Verification --> L(No Correct Answer)
        L --> L1(Ground-truth options omitted)
        I -- Type 2: Ground Truth Verification --> M(Multiple Correct Answers)
        M --> M1(Synonym in options)
        I -- Type 2: Ground Truth Verification --> N(Wrong Ground Truth)
        N --> N1(Mistake during manual annotation)
    end

    subgraph Data Re-annotation (MMLU-Redux Creation)
        N1 --> O[/Original MMLU Questions/]
        O --> P(Manual Re-annotation by 14 Human Experts)
        P --> Q{5,700 Questions Re-annotated}
        Q --> R[/MMLU-Redux Dataset/]
        R --> S{Estimated 6.49% MMLU questions erroneous}
    end

    subgraph Impact Analysis & Evaluation
        S --> T(Re-evaluate LLMs on MMLU-Redux)
        T --> U(Performance Metrics Altered)
        U --> V(LLM Rankings Changed)
        V --> W(Analyze Errors Quantitatively & Qualitatively)
        W --> X(Understand Impact on LLM Evaluation)
    end

    subgraph Future Applications
        X --> Y(MMLU-Redux for Automatic Error Detection)
        Y --> Z(Study LLMs for Error Detection)
        Z --> Z1(Prompting Techniques: ICL, CoT, RAG)
        Z --> Z2(Fine-tuning)
        Z1 & Z2 --> Z3([End])
    end

name: MMLU-Redux 2.0
intro: MMLU-Redux是一个经过精心手动重新注释的MMLU（大规模多任务语言理解）数据集子集，旨在纠正原始基准中的错误，提供一个更准确、更可靠的评测标准。该子集包含57个MMLU科目中的5700个问题。研究结果表明，原始MMLU中约有6.49%的问题存在错误，使用MMLU-Redux进行评测可以显著改变模型性能的评估结果。
org: University of Edinburgh, Sapienza University of Rome, Polytechnic University of Bari, University Col
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a carefully manually re-annotated subset of the MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding) dataset, designed to correct errors in the original benchmark and provide a more accurate and reliable evaluation standard. This subset contains 5,700 questions from 57 MMLU subjects. Research shows that about 6.49% of the questions in the original MMLU contain errors, and using MMLU-Redux for evaluation can significantly alter the assessment of model performance.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[原始 MMLU 数据集] --> B{识别 MMLU 错误}
    B --> C[开发分层错误标注协议]
    C --> D{错误类型分类}
    D -- 问题Evaluation错误 --> D1[问题清晰度差]
    D -- 问题Evaluation错误 --> D2[选项清晰度差]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D3[无正确答案]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D4[多重正确答案]
    D -- 真值Validation错误 --> D5[错误真值]
    C --> E[招募 14 名人类Experts]
    E --> F[手动Evaluation和重新标注 5700 个问题]
    F --> G{确认原始来源}
    G -- 来源可用 --> H[Validation原始来源]
    G -- 来源不可用 --> F
    H --> I[创建 MMLU-Redux 子集]
    I --> J[估计 MMLU 错误率 (6.49%)]
    J --> K[分析 MMLU-Redux 错误统计]
    K --> L[使用 MMLU-Redux 重新Evaluation LLM 性能]
    L --> M[发布 MMLU-Redux 2.0]

name: MMMU
intro: MMMU是一个评估多模态模型在需要大学水平知识和推理任务上的基准，包含来自六个学科的11500个问题和多样化图像类型。该基准设计用于测试模型的高级感知与领域知识推理能力。
org: IN.AI Research, University of Waterloo, The Ohio State University, Carnegie Mellon University, Unive
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: MMMU is a benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on tasks requiring university-level knowledge and reasoning. It includes 11,500 questions from six disciplines and diverse image types. The benchmark is designed to test models' advanced perception and domain knowledge reasoning abilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Initial Subject Selection] --> B(Selected Subjects: 30 disciplines)
    B --> C[Annotator Recruitment: 50+ University Students]
    C --> D[Question Collection: Textbooks & Online Resources]
    D --> E{Copyright & License Adherence?}
    E -- Yes --> F{Avoid Data Contamination?}
    E -- No --> G[Reject Question]
    F -- Yes --> H(Initial Dataset: 13K Questions)
    F -- No --> G
    H --> I[Data Quality Control Stage 1: Duplicate Identification]
    I --> J{Duplicates Found?}
    J -- Yes --> K[Review & Eliminate Duplicates]
    J -- No --> L[Data Quality Control Stage 2: Format & Typo Checking]
    K --> L
    L --> M[Data Quality Control Stage 3: Difficulty Categorization]
    M --> N{Problems Very Easy (10%)?}
    N -- Yes --> O[Exclude Problems]
    N -- No --> P(Final Dataset: 11.5K Multimodal Questions)
    O --> P
    P --> Q[Evaluation Methodology: Micro-averaged Accuracy]
    Q --> R[Evaluation Pipelines: Rule-based (Open & MC Questions)]
    R --> S[Answer Extraction: Regex & Response Processing]
    S --> T{Valid Answer Found?}
    T -- Yes --> U(Evaluated Accuracy)
    T -- No (MC) --> V[Random Selection]
    T -- No (Open) --> W[Mark as Incorrect]
    V --> U
    W --> U
    U --> X[Baselines: Random Choice & Frequent Choice]
    X --> Y[Human Experts Evaluation: 90 Students, 900 Questions]

    Start([Start]):::StartEnd

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Initial Collection
        A[Identify College-Level Subjects]:::DataCollection
        B{Visual Inputs Common?}:::ProcessingFiltering
        C(Rule Out Law & Linguistics):::ProcessingFiltering
        D(Select 30 Subjects from 6 Disciplines):::DataCollection
        E(Recruit >50 University Student Annotators):::AnnotationLabeling
        F[Collect Questions from Textbooks & Online Resources]:::DataCollection
        G{New Questions Needed?}:::Decision
        H(Create New Questions based on Expertise):::AnnotationLabeling
        I{Adhere to Copyright & License?}:::Decision
        J{Avoid Immediate Answers?}:::Decision
        K[/Initial 13K Diverse Questions/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Data Quality Control
        L[Stage 1: Duplicate Identification]:::QualityControl
        M{Lexical Overlap & URL Similarity?}:::ProcessingFiltering
        N(Authors Review & Eliminate Duplicates):::QualityControl
        O[Stage 2: Format & Typo Checking]:::QualityControl
        P(Co-authors Check Format & Typos):::QualityControl
        Q(Apply Standardized Format Corrections):::QualityControl
        R[Stage 3: Difficulty Categorization & Exclusion]:::QualityControl
        S(Categorize into 4 Difficulty Levels):::AnnotationLabeling
        T{Exclude ~10% \'Very Easy\' Problems?}:::ProcessingFiltering
        U[/Final 11.5K Curated Questions/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Split & Evaluation Design
        V[Divide into Dev, Validation, Test Sets]:::ProcessingFiltering
        W(Few-shot Dev Set: 5 Qs/Subject):::ProcessingFiltering
        X(Validation Set: ~900 Qs for Hyperparameter Selection):::ProcessingFiltering
        Y(Test Set: 10.5K Qs):::ProcessingFiltering
        Z[Design Evaluation for Perception, Knowledge, Reasoning]:::EvaluationMetrics

        CC(Extract Key Phrases: Numbers, Conclusions):::EvaluationMetrics
        DD{No Valid Answer in MC?}:::Decision
        EE(Random Selection for MC Questions):::EvaluationMetrics
        FF{No Valid Answer in Open Q?}:::Decision
        GG(Mark Open Questions Incorrect):::EvaluationMetrics
        HH[Adopt Micro-Averaged Accuracy Metric]:::EvaluationMetrics
    end

    End([End]):::StartEnd

name: MMMU-Pro
intro: MMMU-Pro是MMMU基准的强化版本，通过剔除文本模型可解答的问题、扩展候选选项，并引入仅视觉输入的设置（问题嵌入图像中），严格评估多模态模型的真实理解与推理能力。结果显示模型在MMMU-Pro上的表现显著下降，提供了更严苛的多模态AI评测工具。
org: The Ohio State University, University of Waterloo, Carnegie Mellon University
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
eval_feature: 对抗性, 思维链, 领域特定
intro_en: MMMU-Pro is an enhanced version of the MMMU benchmark that strictly evaluates multimodal models' true understanding and reasoning abilities by removing questions solvable by text-only models, expanding candidate options, and introducing a vision-only setting (with questions embedded in images). Results show a significant performance drop on MMMU-Pro, providing a more rigorous multimodal AI evaluation tool.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation_Metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])

    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Filtering Questions"]
        A[Original MMMU Benchmark Questions] --> B(Identify Text-Only Solvable Questions)
        B --> C{Use 4 LLMs to Answer Questions (10x Each)?}
        C -- Yes --> D(LLMs Answer MMMU Questions without Images)
        D --> E{Model Answers Correctly > 5 Times?}
        E -- Yes --> F(Mark Question as Text-Only Solvable)
        E -- No --> G(Mark Question as Not Text-Only Solvable)
        F --> H{At Least 3 of 4 LLMs Mark as Solvable?}
        H -- Yes --> I(Exclude Question from MMMU-Pro)
        H -- No --> J(Include Question in Filtered Pool)
        G --> J
        J --> K(Randomly Sample 1800 Questions)
        K --> L(Distribute Across 30 Subjects, 60 Qs/Subject)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Augmenting Candidate Options"]
        L --> M(Increase Options from 4 to 10)
        M --> N(Human Experts + GPT-4o for Augmentation)
        N --> O(GPT-4o Generates Options)
        O --> P(Claude 3.5 Filters Options)
        P --> Q(Two Rounds of Human Review for Refinement)
        Q --> R(Human Experts Review Original Annotated Questions)
        R --> S{Questions Relevant to Images & Coherent?}
        S -- No --> T(Filter Out 70 Questions)
        S -- Yes --> U(Include Augmented Questions)
        T --> U
        U --> V(Obtain 1730 Augmented Questions)
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Vision-Only Input Setting"]
        V --> W(Introduce Vision-Only Input Setting)
        W --> X(Human Annotators Capture Photos/Screenshots)
        X --> Y(Vary Backgrounds, Font Styles, Sizes)
        Y --> Z(Embed Questions in Screenshots/Photos)
        Z --> AA(Obtain 3460 Questions: 1730 Standard, 1730 Vision-Only)
    end

    AA --> End([End])

        A[原始MMMU基准测试问题] --> B(识别仅文本可解决的问题)
        B --> C{使用4个LLM回答问题 (每个10次)?}

        D --> E{模型回答正确 > 5次?}

        F --> H{4个LLM中至少3个标记为可解决?}

        H -- 否 --> J(将问题纳入筛选池)

        J --> K(随机抽取1800个问题)
        K --> L(分配到30个学科，每个学科60个问题)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["阶段 2: 增强候选选项"]
        L --> M(将选项从4个增加到10个)
        M --> N(人类专家 + GPT-4o进行增强)
        N --> O(GPT-4o生成选项)
        O --> P(Claude 3.5筛选选项)
        P --> Q(两轮人工审查以完善)
        Q --> R(人类专家审查原始标注问题)

    end

    subgraph Phase3["阶段 3: 仅视觉输入设置"]
        V --> W(引入仅视觉输入设置)
        W --> X(人工标注者捕获照片/截图)
        X --> Y(改变背景、字体样式、大小)
        Y --> Z(将问题嵌入截图/照片中)
        Z --> AA(获得3460个问题: 1730个标准，1730个仅视觉)
    end

name: MMSIBench
intro: MMSI-Bench是一个专注于多图像空间智能的视觉问答（VQA）基准测试。它旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在复杂物理世界中进行多图像空间推理的能力。该基准包含1,000个具有挑战性的多项选择题，由六位3D视觉研究人员精心制作，并配有详细的推理过程和精心设计的干扰项。通过对34个MLLM的广泛实验，MMSI-Bench揭示了模型与人类表现之间的巨大差距，为未来的研究提供了广阔空间。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Zhejiang University, Tsinghua Universit
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 多图像, 高质量, 真实世界场景对齐, 综合性与挑战性, 思维链
eval_feature_en: Multiple Images, High Quality, Real-world Scene Alignment, Comprehensive and Challenging, Chain-of-Thought
intro_en: MMSI-Bench is a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark focused on multi-image spatial intelligence. It aims to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perform multi-image spatial reasoning in complex physical environments. The benchmark includes 1,000 challenging multiple-choice questions, carefully crafted by six 3D vision researchers, with detailed reasoning processes and well-designed distractors. Extensive experiments on 34 MLLMs reveal a significant gap between model and human performance, highlighting ample opportunities for future research.

name: MMStar
intro: MMStar是一个精英级的视觉不可或缺的多模态基准测试，包含1500个经过人工精心挑选的样本。它旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的多模态能力，涵盖6个核心能力和18个详细维度。该基准测试通过自动化流程初步筛选样本，并进行严格的人工审查，以确保样本具有视觉依赖性、最小数据泄露，并需要高级多模态能力。此外，还开发了两种指标来衡量数据泄露和多模态训练中的实际性能增益。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Artific
intro_en: MMStar is an elite, vision-essential multimodal benchmark consisting of 1,500 carefully curated samples. It aims to evaluate the multimodal capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), covering 6 core abilities and 18 detailed dimensions. The benchmark uses an automated process for initial sample screening followed by rigorous manual review to ensure visual dependency, minimal data leakage, and the need for advanced multimodal skills. Additionally, two metrics were developed to measure data leakage and actual performance gains in multimodal training.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Identify Issues in Existing Benchmarks] --> B{Current Benchmarks have Visual Unnecessary Samples & Data Leakage}
    B -- Yes --> C[Goal: Create Vision-Indispensable Benchmark]
    C --> D[Initial Sample Pool (from Current Benchmarks)]
    D --> E[Automated Pipeline for Rough Selection]
    E --> F(Roughly Selected Samples)
    F --> G[Human Review for Quality Control]
    G -- Check 1: Visual Dependency --> H{Is Visual Content Indispensable?}
    H -- No --> G
    H -- Yes --> I{Check 2: Minimal Data Leakage?}
    I -- No --> G
    I -- Yes --> J{Check 3: Advanced Multi-modal Capabilities Required?}
    J -- No --> G
    J -- Yes --> K(Curated Samples)
    K --> L[Final Dataset: MMStar (1,500 Samples)]
    L --> M[Define 6 Core Capabilities & 18 Detailed Axes]
    M --> N[Develop 2 Metrics: Data Leakage & Actual Performance Gain]
    N --> O[Evaluate 16 Leading LVLMs on MMStar]
    O --> P[Evaluate LVLMs on 7 Other Benchmarks using New Metrics]
    P --> Q[Analyze Results & Insights]
    Q --> R(MMStar Benchmark Report)

name: MMVP
intro: MMVP基准测试旨在揭示多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在视觉理解方面的系统性缺陷。该基准通过构建“CLIP盲点对”——即CLIP认为相似但视觉上明显不同的图像——来评估模型。MMVP包含九种基本视觉模式的直接问题，即使是GPT-4V等最先进系统也难以正确回答，并常提供错误的解释。研究表明，视觉表征学习仍是一个开放挑战，准确的视觉接地对未来成功的多模态系统至关重要。
org: New York University, University of California, Berkeley, Princeton University, Meta AI Research (FAI
intro_en: The MMVP benchmark aims to reveal systematic flaws in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) regarding visual understanding. It evaluates models by constructing "CLIP blind spot pairs"—images that CLIP deems similar but are visually distinct. MMVP includes direct questions covering nine fundamental visual patterns, which even state-of-the-art systems like GPT-4V struggle to answer correctly and often provide incorrect explanations for. The study highlights that visual representation learning remains an open challenge, and accurate visual grounding is crucial for the future success of multimodal systems.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[数据源: ImageNet-1K & LAION-Aesthetics] --> B[计算 CLIP 嵌入 (CLIP-ViT-L-14)]
    A --> C[计算 DINOv2 嵌入 (DINOv2-ViT-L-14)]
    B --> D{CLIP 相似度 > 0.95?}
    C --> E{DINOv2 相似度 < 0.6?}
    D -- 是 --> F{CLIP-blind Pair 候选}
    E -- 是 --> F
    F -- 满足条件 --> G[识别 CLIP-blind Pairs]
    G --> H[人工检查 CLIP-blind Pairs]
    H --> I[识别 CLIP 忽略的视觉细节]
    I --> J[设计问题 (150 对, 300 个问题)]
    J --> K[构建 MMVP 基准测试]
    K --> L[Evaluation多模态 LLM (GPT-4V, LLaVA-1.5等)]
    K --> M[进行用户研究 (300 个问题)]
    L --> N{LLM 对 CLIP-blind Pair 的两个问题都回答正确?}
    M --> O[人类表现基线]
    N -- 是 --> P[LLM 评分]
    N -- 否 --> Q[识别 LLM 视觉缺陷]
    P --> R[分析 LLM 性能]
    Q --> R
    R --> S[MMVP 结果]
    O --> S

name: MMVU
intro: MMVU是一个全面的专家级、多学科视频理解基准，用于评估基础模型在视频理解方面的能力。它包含3,000个由专家标注的问题，涵盖科学、医疗健康、人文社会科学和工程四大核心学科的27个主题。MMVU旨在挑战模型应用领域特定知识并进行专家级推理，以分析专业领域的视频，超越了当前视频基准中通常评估的基本视觉感知。每个示例都由人类专家从头开始标注，并辅以专家标注的推理依据和相关领域知识，以促进深入分析。
org: Yilun Zhao, Lujing Xie, Haowei Zhang, Guo Gan, Yitao Long, Zhiyuan Hu, Tongyan Hu, Weiyuan Chen, Chu
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MMVU is a comprehensive expert-level, multidisciplinary video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate foundational models' capabilities in video comprehension. It includes 3,000 expert-annotated questions covering 27 topics across four core disciplines: science, medical health, humanities and social sciences, and engineering. MMVU aims to challenge models to apply domain-specific knowledge and perform expert-level reasoning to analyze videos in specialized fields, going beyond the basic visual perception typically assessed in current video benchmarks. Each example is annotated from scratch by human experts, accompanied by expert-provided reasoning and relevant domain knowledge to support in-depth analysis.

        VideoCriteria -- 是 --> CreateQuestions(创建2-3个问答示例)
        VideoCriteria -- 否 --> SearchVideos
        CreateQuestions --> QuestionType{问题类型?}
        QuestionType -- 选择题 --> CraftDistractors(设计4个干扰选项)
        CraftDistractors --> ShuffleOptions(随机打乱选项)
        QuestionType -- 开放式 --> AnnotateTimestamps(标注视频时间戳)
        ShuffleOptions --> AnnotateTimestamps
        AnnotateTimestamps --> AnnotateDomainKnowledge(标注相关领域知识)
        AnnotateDomainKnowledge --> AnnotateReasoning(标注分步推理理由)
        AnnotateReasoning --> AnnotatedExample[/已标注的问答示例/]
    end

    subgraph Data Quality Control["数据质量控制"]
        AnnotatedExample --> Compensation(基于时间的标注员报酬)
        Compensation --> ExpertValidation(人类专家验证)
        ExpertValidation --> VideoRequired{需要视频理解吗?}
        VideoRequired -- 否或有错误 --> AttemptRevision(尝试修改示例)
        AttemptRevision --> RevisionFeasible{修改可行吗?}
        RevisionFeasible -- 否 --> FeedbackOriginal(向原始标注员提供反馈)
        FeedbackOriginal --> AnnotatorTraining
        RevisionFeasible -- 是 --> RevisedExample[/修改后的问答示例/]
        VideoRequired -- 是 --> FinalExample[/已验证的问答示例/]
        RevisedExample --> FinalExample
        FinalExample --> ExcludeExamples{排除72个示例吗?}
        ExcludeExamples -- 是 --> ExcludedCount[/72个被排除的示例/]
        ExcludeExamples -- 否 --> FinalBenchmark(最终MMVU基准)
    end

    FinalBenchmark --> End([结束])

name: MORSE-500
intro: MORSE-500是一个视频基准测试，旨在解决现有基准在多模态推理方面的不足。它包含500个完全脚本化的视频片段和嵌入式问题，涵盖六种互补的推理类别。该基准测试通过程序化生成，支持对视觉复杂性、干扰密度和时间动态的精细控制，并能系统地调整难度。MORSE-500旨在通过其可控的生成管道，支持创建任意具有挑战性的新实例，以压力测试下一代模型。
org: University of Maryland, Google, Cornell University
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MORSE-500 is a video benchmark designed to address the limitations of existing benchmarks in multimodal reasoning. It contains 500 fully scripted video clips with embedded questions, covering six complementary reasoning categories. The benchmark is programmatically generated, allowing fine-grained control over visual complexity, interference density, and temporal dynamics, as well as systematic difficulty adjustment. MORSE-500 aims to support the creation of arbitrarily challenging new instances through its controllable generation pipeline to stress-test next-generation models.

name: MotionBench
intro: MotionBench是一个全面的评估基准，旨在评估视频理解模型对细粒度运动的理解能力。它通过六种主要类型的运动导向问题来评估模型的运动级感知，并包含从不同来源收集的数据，确保了对真实世界视频内容的广泛代表性。实验结果表明，现有视觉语言模型在理解细粒度运动方面表现不佳，该基准旨在指导和激励开发更强大的视频理解模型。
build_method: 网络爬取, 自动生成, 人工标注, 混合
metric: Accuracy, MR, LM, CM, MO, AO, RC
eval_feature: 细粒度评估, 多样化数据, 高质量标注
build_method_en: Web Crawling, Automated Generation, Human Annotation, Hybrid
eval_feature_en: Fine-grained Evaluation, Diverse Data, High-quality Annotation
intro_en: MotionBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate video understanding models' ability to comprehend fine-grained motion. It assesses models' motion-level perception through six main types of motion-oriented questions and includes data collected from various sources to ensure broad representation of real-world video content. Experimental results show that existing vision-language models perform poorly in understanding fine-grained motion, and this benchmark aims to guide and inspire the development of more robust video understanding models.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[MotionBench Benchmark Goal] --> B(Evaluate Fine-grained Motion Comprehension)

    B --> C[Data Collection]
    C --> C1(Web Videos: Panda-70M, Pexels)
    C --> C2(Public Datasets: MedVid, SportsSloMo, Ha-ViD)
    C --> C3(Self-synthetic Videos: Unity)

    C --> D[Video Curation & Filtering]
    D --> D1{Video Type: Intricate Interactions?}
    D1 -- Yes --> E[Manual Caption Annotation]
    E --> F[GPT-4o QA Generation (6 pairs/video)]
    F --> G{Filter Common Knowledge/Single Frame Qs}
    G -- Discard --> F
    G -- Keep --> H[Manual QA Filtering & Categorization]
    H --> I(4922 QA Pairs Retained)

    D1 -- No, Specific Fields --> J[Direct QA Annotation]
    J --> K(2530 QA Pairs Selected)

    D1 -- No, Virtual Videos --> L[Automatic QA Construction]
    L --> M(600 QA Pairs Generated)

    I & K & M --> N[Combine QA Pairs]
    N --> O[Define 6 Motion-Oriented Task Categories]
    O --> O1(Motion Recognition)
    O --> O2(Location-related Motion)
    O --> O3(Action Order)
    O --> O4(Repetition Count)
    O --> O5(Motion-related Objects)
    O --> O6(Camera Motion)

    N --> P[Quality Control: Final Review]
    P --> Q(Final Dataset: 5385 Videos, 8052 QAs)
    Q --> R[Evaluation Methodology]
    R --> S(Annotation Density: 68.4)
    R --> T(Model Performance Evaluation)
    T --> U[MotionBench Results]
metric_en: Accuracy, MR, LM, CM, MO, AO, RC

name: MRCR
intro: OpenAI MRCR（多轮共指消解）是一个长上下文数据集，用于评估大型语言模型在上下文中区分多个“针”的能力。该评估的灵感来自Gemini首次引入的MRCR评估。OpenAI MRCR扩展了任务难度，并提供了开源数据以重现结果。该任务具有挑战性，因为“针”与干扰项来自相同的分布，模型必须区分“针”的顺序，并且上下文越长，任务越困难。
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 长上下文
intro_en: OpenAI MRCR (Multi-turn Coreference Resolution) is a long-context dataset designed to evaluate large language models' ability to distinguish multiple "needles" within context. This benchmark is inspired by the MRCR evaluation first introduced by Gemini. OpenAI MRCR increases task difficulty and provides open-source data for result reproduction. The task is challenging because the "needles" and distractors come from the same distribution, models must differentiate the order of the "needles," and the longer the context, the harder the task.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义基准目标] --> B[设计任务: 多轮对话与隐藏“针”]
    B --> C[确定“针”的数量: 2, 4, 8] 
    C --> D[选择写作主题与格式: 438实体, 10格式]
    D --> E[使用GPT-4o生成对话内容] 
    E --> F{“针”与干扰项分布一致性检查}
    F -- 是 --> G[生成多轮对话样本]
    F -- 否 --> E
    G --> H[嵌入“针”到对话中]
    H --> I[生成模型指令: 返回第i个“针”]
    I --> J[数据集初步生成]
    J --> K{Quality Control: 检查“针”数量与真实性}
    K -- 发现错误 --> L[错误数据点修正与更新]
    L --> J
    K -- 无错误 --> M[根据Token数量分桶: 8个区间]
    M --> N[每桶100个样本]
    N --> O[Final Dataset组成]
    O --> P[Evaluation方法: 模型预置字母数字哈希]
    P --> Q[Evaluation方法: SequenceMatcher相似度计算]
    Q --> R[Evaluation方法: 哈希不匹配则相似度为0]
    R --> S[发布数据集]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start]) --> S1[/Initial Concept: Multi-turn Coreference Resolution/]
    S1 --> S2(Inspired by Gemini MRCR Evaluation)
    S2 --> S3(Define Benchmark Task: Distinguish 'Needles' in Context)
    S3 --> S4(Generate Synthetic Multi-turn Conversations)
    S4 --> S5(Insert 2, 4, or 8 Identical 'Needles' into Conversations)
    S5 --> S6(Generate Distractor Responses using GPT-4o)
    S6 --> S7(Determine Context Length Bins by Tokens)
    S7 --> S8(Generate 100 Samples per Context Length Bin)
    S8 --> S9(Create Ground Truth Answers with Prepended Hash)
    S9 --> S10(Assemble Dataset: Prompt, Answer, Random String)
    S10 --> S11(Initial Data Review and Validation)
    S11 --> S12{Generation Bug Found?}
    S12 -- Yes --> S13(Correct Data Points and Ground Truth)
    S13 --> S14(Publish Dataset to Hugging Face)
    S12 -- No --> S14
    S14 --> S15[/Model Evaluation Input: Prompt and Answer/]
    S15 --> S16(Model Generates Response)
    S16 --> S17(Check for Prepended Hash in Response)
    S17 -- No --> S18(Set Match Ratio to 0)
    S17 -- Yes --> S19(Strip Hash and Compare Response to Ground Truth)
    S19 --> S20(Calculate SequenceMatcher Ratio)
    S18 --> S21(Record Evaluation Results)
    S20 --> S21
    S21 --> S22([End])

    style S22 fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    start([开始]) --> S1[/初始概念: 多轮共指消解/]
    S1 --> S2(受Gemini MRCR评估启发)
    S2 --> S3(定义基准任务: 在上下文中区分“针”)
    S3 --> S4(生成合成多轮对话)
    S4 --> S5(在对话中插入2、4或8个相同的“针”)
    S5 --> S6(使用GPT-4o生成干扰项回复)
    S6 --> S7(根据令牌确定上下文长度分箱)
    S7 --> S8(每个上下文长度分箱生成100个样本)
    S8 --> S9(创建带有前置哈希的真实答案)
    S9 --> S10(组装数据集: 提示、答案、随机字符串)
    S10 --> S11(初始数据审查和验证)
    S11 --> S12{发现生成错误?}
    S12 -- 是 --> S13(修正数据点和真实值)
    S13 --> S14(将数据集发布到Hugging Face)
    S12 -- 否 --> S14
    S14 --> S15[/模型评估输入: 提示和答案/]
    S15 --> S16(模型生成响应)
    S16 --> S17(检查响应是否包含前置哈希)
    S17 -- 否 --> S18(匹配比率设为0)
    S17 -- 是 --> S19(剥离哈希并比较响应与真实值)
    S19 --> S20(计算SequenceMatcher比率)
    S18 --> S21(记录评估结果)
    S20 --> S21
    S21 --> S22([结束])

name: MT-Bench
intro: MT-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）多轮对话能力的基准。它通过一系列具有挑战性的开放式问题，测试模型在对话和指令遵循方面的表现。
org: UC Berkeley, Carnegie Mellon University, Stanford University, MBZUAI, UC San Diego, LMSYS
metric: 使用强LLM（如GPT-4）作为裁判进行打分，并与人类偏好进行比较
task_type: 对话, 开放式问答, 指令遵循
intro_en: MT-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating the multi-turn dialogue capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It tests models' performance in conversation and instruction following through a series of challenging open-ended questions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义基准目标] --> B[确定问题类别]
    B --> C(8个常见用户提示类别)
    C --> D[为每个类别手动设计问题]
    D --> E(80个高质量多轮问题)
    E --> F[人类Evaluation员招募]
    F --> G{人类Evaluation员同意协议}
    G -- 同意 --> H[人类Evaluation]
    H --> I(MT-Bench问题和匿名助手回答)
    I --> J{人类Evaluation员投票}
    J -- 投票 --> K[收集人类偏好数据]
    K --> L{人类投票与GPT-4判断不一致?}
    L -- 是 --> M[展示GPT-4判断并请求合理性Evaluation]
    L -- 否 --> K
    K --> N[Quality Control: 允许跳过不确定问题]
    N --> O(3KExperts投票)
    O --> P(30K人类偏好对话)
    P --> Q[LLM作为评判者Evaluation方法]
    Q --> R{选择Evaluation类型}
    R -- 配对比较 --> S[LLM评判者比较两个助手回答]
    R -- 单一回答评分 --> T[LLM评判者给单个回答评分]
    R -- 参考指导评分 --> U[LLM评判者对比参考答案Evaluation]
    S --> V[ValidationLLM评判者与人类偏好一致性]
    T --> V
    U --> V
    V --> W[MT-BenchFinal Dataset]
metric_en: Using strong LLMs (such as GPT-4) as judges for scoring, and comparing with human preferences
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]):::StartEnd

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        A[/Existing LLM Benchmarks/]:::DataCollection
        B[/Human Preferences (Gold Standard)/]:::DataCollection
        C(Identify limitations of existing benchmarks)-->D{Are current benchmarks adequate?}
        D-- No -->E(Need for robust & scalable evaluation)
        E-->F(Propose LLM-as-a-Judge approach)
    end

    subgraph MT-Bench Question Set Creation
        G(Develop 80 High-Quality Multi-Turn Questions):::DataCollection
        G-->H{Questions cover diverse capabilities?}
        H-- Yes -->I(Categorize Questions: Writing, Math, Knowledge, etc.):::ProcessingFiltering
        I-->J[/MT-Bench Question Set (80 questions)/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Model Response Generation
        K[/LLMs to be evaluated/]:::DataCollection
        J-->L(Generate answers for 80 questions with 6 models):::ProcessingFiltering
        L-->M[/Model Responses (GPT-4, GPT-3.5, Claude-V1, Vicuna-13B, Alpaca-13B, LLaMA-13B)/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Human Evaluation (Expert Labelers)
        N[/58 Expert Human Labelers (Graduate Students)/]:::DataCollection
        M-->O(Present 1st Turn Conversation to Human Labelers):::AnnotationLabeling
        O-->P{Human votes for better assistant?}
        P-- Yes -->Q(Record 1st Turn Human Vote):::AnnotationLabeling
        Q-->R(Present 2nd Turn Conversation to Human Labelers):::AnnotationLabeling
        R-->S{Human votes for better assistant?}
        S-- Yes -->T(Record 2nd Turn Human Vote):::AnnotationLabeling
        P-- Skip (max 5) -->U(Allow skipping questions)
        S-- Skip (max 5) -->U
        O-->V{Reference solution available?}
        V-- Yes -->W(Display Reference Solution for Math/Reasoning)
        W-->P
        T-->X[/3K Expert Human Votes/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
        Y[/GPT-4 LLM Judge/]:::DataCollection
        M-->Z(LLM Judge evaluates all model pairs):::EvaluationMetric
        Z-->AA[/LLM Judge Votes/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Bias Mitigation
        X & AA-->BB{Human vote differs from GPT-4?}
        BB-- Yes -->CC(Display GPT-4 Judgment to Human):::QualityControl
        CC-->DD{Is GPT-4 judgment reasonable?}
        DD-- Yes (75%) -->EE(Human confirms GPT-4 judgment)
        DD-- Change vote (34%) -->T
        BB-- No -->FF(Human & GPT-4 agree)
        EE & FF-->GG(Aggregate 3K Controlled Expert Votes):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    subgraph Agreement Analysis & Final Benchmark
        GG & X & AA-->HH(Compute Agreement between LLM Judges & Humans):::EvaluationMetric
        HH-->II(Compute Agreement among Humans):::EvaluationMetric
        II-->JJ(Compute Average Win Rate for Models):::EvaluationMetric
        JJ-->KK{Agreement > 80%?}
        KK-- Yes -->LL(Verify GPT-4 matches human preferences)
        LL-->MM[/MT-Bench Final Benchmark (80 questions, 3K expert votes, 30K conversations)/]:::OutputResult
        MM-->End([End]):::StartEnd
    end

    style A fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style C fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    Start([开始]):::StartEnd

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection["数据来源与收集"]
        A[/现有LLM基准/]:::DataCollection
        B[/人类偏好 (黄金标准)/]:::DataCollection
        C(识别现有基准的局限性)-->D{现有基准是否足够？}
        D-- 否 -->E(需要稳健且可扩展的评估)
        E-->F(提出LLM-as-a-Judge方法)
    end

    subgraph MT-Bench Question Set Creation["MT-Bench问题集创建"]
        G(开发80个高质量多轮问题):::DataCollection
        G-->H{问题是否涵盖多样能力？}
        H-- 是 -->I(问题分类：写作、数学、知识等):::ProcessingFiltering
        I-->J[/MT-Bench问题集 (80个问题)/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Model Response Generation["模型响应生成"]
        K[/待评估的LLM/]:::DataCollection
        J-->L(用6个模型生成80个问题的答案):::ProcessingFiltering
        L-->M[/模型响应 (GPT-4, GPT-3.5, Claude-V1, Vicuna-13B, Alpaca-13B, LLaMA-13B)/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Human Evaluation (Expert Labelers)["人工评估 (专家标注员)"]
        N[/58位专家人工标注员 (研究生)/]:::DataCollection
        M-->O(向人工标注员展示第一轮对话):::AnnotationLabeling
        O-->P{人类投票选择更好的助手？}
        P-- 是 -->Q(记录第一轮人类投票):::AnnotationLabeling
        Q-->R(向人工标注员展示第二轮对话):::AnnotationLabeling
        R-->S{人类投票选择更好的助手？}
        S-- 是 -->T(记录第二轮人类投票):::AnnotationLabeling
        P-- 跳过 (最多5次) -->U(允许跳过问题)
        S-- 跳过 (最多5次) -->U
        O-->V{是否有参考答案？}
        V-- 是 -->W(显示数学/推理的参考答案)
        W-->P
        T-->X[/3K专家人类投票/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation["LLM-as-a-Judge评估"]
        Y[/GPT-4 LLM评判员/]:::DataCollection
        M-->Z(LLM评判员评估所有模型对):::EvaluationMetric
        Z-->AA[/LLM评判员投票/]:::OutputResult
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Bias Mitigation["质量控制与偏差缓解"]
        X & AA-->BB{人类投票与GPT-4不同？}

        CC-->DD{GPT-4的判断是否合理？}
        DD-- 是 (75%) -->EE(人类确认GPT-4的判断)
        DD-- 改变投票 (34%) -->T
        BB-- 否 -->FF(人类与GPT-4一致)
        EE & FF-->GG(汇总3K受控专家投票):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    subgraph Agreement Analysis & Final Benchmark["一致性分析与最终基准"]
        GG & X & AA-->HH(计算LLM评判员与人类之间的一致性):::EvaluationMetric
        HH-->II(计算人类之间的一致性):::EvaluationMetric
        II-->JJ(计算模型的平均胜率):::EvaluationMetric
        JJ-->KK{一致性 > 80%？}
        KK-- 是 -->LL(验证GPT-4与人类偏好一致)
        LL-->MM[/MT-Bench最终基准 (80个问题, 3K专家投票, 30K对话)/]:::OutputResult
        MM-->End([结束]):::StartEnd
    end

name: MT-Bench-101
intro: MT-Bench-101是一个专门为评估大型语言模型（LLM）在多轮对话中细粒度能力而设计的基准。它通过分析真实的多轮对话数据，构建了一个包含13个不同任务中1388个多轮对话的4208个轮次的三层分层能力分类法。该基准对21个流行的LLM进行了评估，从能力和任务的角度进行了全面分析。研究发现，常见对齐技术或聊天特定设计并未显著提升LLM的多轮对话能力。
org: Alibaba Group, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MT-Bench-101 is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the fine-grained capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in multi-turn conversations. By analyzing real multi-turn dialogue data, it constructs a three-layer hierarchical taxonomy of abilities, covering 4,208 turns across 1,388 multi-turn dialogues in 13 different tasks. The benchmark evaluates 21 popular LLMs, providing a comprehensive analysis from both capability and task perspectives. The study finds that common alignment techniques or chat-specific designs do not significantly improve LLMs' multi-turn conversational abilities.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[分析真实对话数据] --> B[构建三层分层能力分类法]
    B --> C[为每个任务定制数据生成提示]
    C --> D(GPT-4生成数据)
    D --> E[数据生成规则和示例指导]
    E --> F{数据质量检查}
    F -- 符合标准 --> G[人类注释者审查样本]
    F -- 不符合标准 --> D
    G --> H{五名注释者独立审查}
    H -- 全部通过 --> I[形成Final Dataset]
    H -- 未全部通过 --> G
    I --> J[Filtering和Validation数据集]
    J --> K[Final Dataset组成: 13任务, 1388对话, 4208轮]
    K --> L[涵盖30个不同主题]
    L --> M[采用GPT-4进行Evaluation]
    M --> N[制定详细Evaluation指南]
    N --> O[GPT-4响应评分(1-10分)]
    O --> P[最终得分: 对话最低分]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing
        start([Start]) --> RealWorldDialogueData[/Real-world Multi-turn Dialogue Data/]
        RealWorldDialogueData --> TeachingTaxonomy[/Teaching Taxonomy from Educational Psychology/]
    end

    subgraph Data Collection
        TeachingTaxonomy --> AbilityTaxonomyAnalysis(Systematic Analysis of Data & Taxonomy)
        AbilityTaxonomyAnalysis --> PromptDesign(Design Task-Specific Prompts for 13 Tasks)
        PromptDesign --> GPT4Generation{GPT-4 Data Generation (1000+ samples per task)}
        GPT4Generation --> RawData[/Raw Generated Data/]
    end

    subgraph Data Curation & Quality Control
        RawData --> HumanAnnotatorScreening(Screening by Five Human Annotators)
        HumanAnnotatorScreening --> QualityCheck{All Annotators Deem High Quality?}
        QualityCheck -- Yes --> CuratedData[/Curated High-Quality Data/]
        QualityCheck -- No --> Rejection(Reject Data Sample)
        CuratedData --> FinalDataset[/Final MT-Bench-101 Dataset (1388 dialogues, 4208 turns)/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Setup
        FinalDataset --> GoldenContext(Utilize Golden Context as Dialogue History)
        GoldenContext --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate 21 Popular LLMs)
    end

    subgraph Scoring & Analysis
        LLMEvaluation --> GPT4Scoring(GPT-4 as Human Rater Stand-in)
        GPT4Scoring --> ScoringGuidelines(Apply Task-Specific Scoring Guidelines)
        ScoringGuidelines --> TurnScores(Score Each Turn 1-10 with Justifications)
        TurnScores --> FinalDialogueScore{Lowest Turn Score as Final Dialogue Score}
        FinalDialogueScore --> ComprehensiveAnalysis(Comprehensive Analysis: Ability & Task Perspectives)
        ComprehensiveAnalysis --> CaseStudies(Extensive Case Studies)
        CaseStudies --> Findings(Key Findings on LLM Performance)
        Findings --> end([End])

    end

name: MTVQA
intro: MTVQA是一个多语言文本中心视觉问答基准，旨在评估AI模型在文本中心场景理解方面的能力。该基准首次通过高质量的人工专家标注，涵盖9种不同语言，包含6,778个问答对和2,116张图像。它揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在多语言文本中心视觉问答任务上与人类表现之间存在显著差距，并提供了多语言训练数据以促进模型性能提升。
org: ByteDance Inc., Huazhong University of Science and Technology
intro_en: MTVQA is a multilingual text-centered visual question answering benchmark designed to evaluate AI models' ability in text-centered scene understanding. This benchmark, for the first time, features high-quality expert annotations across 9 different languages, containing 6,778 QA pairs and 2,116 images. It reveals a significant gap between current multimodal large language models and human performance on multilingual text-centered visual QA tasks, and provides multilingual training data to facilitate model improvement.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B(公共数据集)
    A --> C(互联网数据)
    A --> D(手动收集)
    B --> E[多语言OCR文本提取]
    C --> E
    D --> E
    E --> F{图像选择}
    F -- 语言类型和文本量 --> G(原始图像数据)
    G --> H[标准化Data Cleaning]
    H --> I[算法驱动审查]
    I --> J{移除不适用内容}
    J -- 是 --> K(清洗后的图像数据)
    J -- 否 --> I
    K --> L[图像信息提取]
    L --> M[Question Generation]
    M --> N[Answer Generation]
    N --> O(初轮QA对)
    O --> P[标注Evaluation]
    P --> Q[标注修正]
    Q --> R[质量审计]
    R --> S{质量检查通过?}
    S -- 是 --> T(高质量QA对)
    S -- 否 --> P
    T --> U[数据集划分]
    U --> V(Training Set)
    U --> W(Test Set)
    W --> X[模型Evaluation]
    X --> Y[失败案例分析]
    Y --> Z[End]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> DataSourcing[/Text-rich Images/]

    subgraph Data Collection Phase
        DataSourcing --> ImageSourcing(Gather Images from Datasets & Web)
        ImageSourcing --> InitialProcessing(Extract Multilingual Text via OCR API)
        InitialProcessing --> ImageSelection{Select Images by Language & Text Amount}
        ImageSelection -- Yes --> DataDistribution(Distribute Data: 30% Public, 20% Web, 50% Manual)
        ImageSelection -- No --> DiscardImages(Discard Images without Text)
        DataDistribution --> ManualCollection(Manual Collection in Native Language Regions)
        ManualCollection --> TestSetComposition(Compose Test Set: 1220 Doc, 876 Natural Images)
        TestSetComposition --> DataCleaning(Standardized Data Cleaning Process)
        DataCleaning --> AlgoReview(Algorithm-driven Review for Unusable Images)
        AlgoReview --> DetectRemove(Detect & Remove Unethical Content)
        DetectRemove --> OCRTextExtraction(OCR Extracts Text from Remaining Images)
        OCRTextExtraction --> DiscardNoText(Discard Images Devoid of Textual Info)
        DiscardNoText --> CategorizeImages(Categorize Images by Language)
    end

    CategorizeImages --> AnnotatorTraining(Train Annotators: Guidelines & Pilot Task)

    subgraph Human Expert Annotation Phase
        AnnotatorTraining --> FirstRoundQA(First Round Q&A: 3 Annotators/Language)
        FirstRoundQA --> ExamineElements(Examine Textual & Visual Elements)
        FormulateQuestions(Formulate 5 Distinct Questions)
        ExamineElements --> FormulateQuestions
        FormulateQuestions --> ProvideAnswers(Provide Corresponding Answers)
        ProvideAnswers --> CheckCriteria{Meet Question Criteria?}
        CheckCriteria -- Yes --> SecondRoundEval(Second Round Evaluation & Correction)
        CheckCriteria -- No --> ReAnnotation(Return for Re-annotation)
        SecondRoundEval --> RecruitAnnotators(Recruit Specialized Native Annotators)
        RecruitAnnotators --> DivideTeams(Divide into Q&A Generation & Evaluation Teams)
        DivideTeams --> QualityControl(10% Sampling Inspection by Quality Inspector)
        QualityControl -- Fail --> ReAnnotation
        QualityControl -- Pass --> EvalCorrectionProtocol(Apply Evaluation & Correction Protocol)
        EvalCorrectionProtocol --> AssessRelevance(Assess Question Relevance to Image Text)
        AssessRelevance -- Irrelevant --> DiscardQAPairs(Discard Irrelevant QA Pairs)
        AssessRelevance -- Relevant --> VerifyCorrectness(Verify Answer Correctness & Modify)
        VerifyCorrectness --> CheckRedundancy(Check for Answer Redundancy & Remove)
        CheckRedundancy --> EthicalAssessment(Ethical Assessment of Content)
        EthicalAssessment -- Unethical --> RemoveContent(Remove Unethical Content)
        EthicalAssessment -- Ethical --> FinalQAPairs[/High-Quality QA Pairs/]
    end

    FinalQAPairs --> EvaluationMetric(Evaluate MLLMs on MTVQA Benchmark)

    subgraph Evaluation & Metric Steps
        EvaluationMetric --> MetricSelection(Select Accuracy as Primary Metric)
        MetricSelection --> HumanPerformance(Establish Human Performance Baseline: ~80% Accuracy)
        HumanPerformance --> ZeroShotEvaluation(Perform Zero-shot Evaluation of MLLMs)
        ZeroShotEvaluation --> AnalyzeResults(Analyze MLLM Performance: Qwen2-VL 72B at 30.9%)
    end

    AnalyzeResults --> End([End])

    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
