    Start([开始]) --> DataSourcing[/富文本图像/]

    subgraph Data Collection Phase
        DataSourcing --> ImageSourcing(从数据集和网络收集图像)
        ImageSourcing --> InitialProcessing(通过OCR API提取多语言文本)
        InitialProcessing --> ImageSelection{按语言和文本量选择图像}
        ImageSelection -- Yes --> DataDistribution(数据分布：30%公共，20%网络，50%手动)
        ImageSelection -- No --> DiscardImages(丢弃无文本图像)
        DataDistribution --> ManualCollection(在母语地区手动收集)
        ManualCollection --> TestSetComposition(组成测试集：1220文档，876自然图像)
        TestSetComposition --> DataCleaning(标准化数据清洗过程)
        DataCleaning --> AlgoReview(算法驱动审查不可用图像)
        AlgoReview --> DetectRemove(检测并移除不道德内容)
        DetectRemove --> OCRTextExtraction(OCR从剩余图像中提取文本)
        OCRTextExtraction --> DiscardNoText(丢弃无文本信息的图像)
        DiscardNoText --> CategorizeImages(按语言分类图像)
    end

    CategorizeImages --> AnnotatorTraining(培训标注员：指南和试点任务)

    subgraph Human Expert Annotation Phase
        AnnotatorTraining --> FirstRoundQA(第一轮问答：每种语言3名标注员)
        FirstRoundQA --> ExamineElements(检查文本和视觉元素)
        FormulateQuestions(制定5个不同的问题)
        ExamineElements --> FormulateQuestions
        FormulateQuestions --> ProvideAnswers(提供相应的答案)
        ProvideAnswers --> CheckCriteria{符合问题标准吗？}
        CheckCriteria -- Yes --> SecondRoundEval(第二轮评估和修正)
        CheckCriteria -- No --> ReAnnotation(返回重新标注)
        SecondRoundEval --> RecruitAnnotators(招募专业的母语标注员)
        RecruitAnnotators --> DivideTeams(分为问答生成和评估团队)
        DivideTeams --> QualityControl(质量检查员进行10%抽样检查)
        QualityControl -- Fail --> ReAnnotation
        QualityControl -- Pass --> EvalCorrectionProtocol(应用评估和修正协议)
        EvalCorrectionProtocol --> AssessRelevance(评估问题与图像文本的相关性)
        AssessRelevance -- Irrelevant --> DiscardQAPairs(丢弃不相关的问答对)
        AssessRelevance -- Relevant --> VerifyCorrectness(验证答案正确性并修改)
        VerifyCorrectness --> CheckRedundancy(检查答案冗余并移除)
        CheckRedundancy --> EthicalAssessment(内容伦理评估)
        EthicalAssessment -- Unethical --> RemoveContent(移除不道德内容)
        EthicalAssessment -- Ethical --> FinalQAPairs[/高质量问答对/]
    end

    FinalQAPairs --> EvaluationMetric(在MTVQA基准上评估MLLM)

    subgraph Evaluation & Metric Steps
        EvaluationMetric --> MetricSelection(选择准确率作为主要指标)
        MetricSelection --> HumanPerformance(建立人类表现基线：约80%准确率)
        HumanPerformance --> ZeroShotEvaluation(对MLLM进行零样本评估)
        ZeroShotEvaluation --> AnalyzeResults(分析MLLM性能：Qwen2-VL 72B为30.9%)
    end

    AnalyzeResults --> End([结束])

name: MUIRBENCH
intro: MuirBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（LLMs）的鲁棒多图像理解能力。它包含12个不同的多图像任务和10个多图像关系类别，由11,264张图像和2,600个多项选择题组成。该基准通过将每个标准实例与语义差异最小的无法回答的变体配对，以实现可靠评估，并揭示了现有模型在此任务上的不足。
org: USC, UPenn, UMN, UC Davis, UW-Madison, UCLA, OSU, Microsoft Research
task_type: 多项选择题, 图像问答
intro_en: MuirBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the robust multi-image understanding capabilities of multimodal large language models (LLMs). It includes 12 different multi-image tasks and 10 categories of multi-image relationships, comprising 11,264 images and 2,600 multiple-choice questions. The benchmark ensures reliable evaluation by pairing each standard instance with an unanswerable variant that has minimal semantic differences, revealing the shortcomings of existing models on this task.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[Data Collection: 可回答数据]
    B --> B1(现有数据集: GeneCIS, SeedBench, IconQA)
    B --> B2(派生数据: NLVR2, HallusionBench, ISVQA, MMBench)
    B --> B3(新收集数据: 地质图数据库, University-1652, PubMed, SciDuet)
    B1 --> C{数据格式化为MCQA}
    B2 --> C
    B3 --> C
    C --> D[Data Collection: 不可回答数据]
    D --> D1(图像替换/重排序)
    D --> D2(问题修改)
    D --> D3(选项修改)
    D1 --> E{配对可回答实例}

name: MulDimIF
intro: 该基准旨在评估大型语言模型遵循用户定义指令的能力。现有基准通常依赖模板化约束提示，缺乏真实世界使用的多样性，限制了细粒度的性能评估。为解决此问题，我们提出了一个多维约束框架，包含三种约束模式、四种约束类别和四个难度级别。在此框架基础上，我们开发了一个自动化指令生成流程，包括约束扩展、冲突检测和指令重写，生成了1200个可代码验证的指令遵循测试样本。
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 多维约束, 自动化指令生成, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Multi-dimensional Constraints, Automated Instruction Generation, Process Evaluation
intro_en: This benchmark aims to evaluate large language models' ability to follow user-defined instructions. Existing benchmarks often rely on templated constraint prompts, lacking the diversity of real-world usage and limiting fine-grained performance assessment. To address this, we propose a multidimensional constraint framework featuring three constraint modes, four constraint categories, and four difficulty levels. Based on this framework, we developed an automated instruction generation process, including constraint expansion, conflict detection, and instruction rewriting, producing 1,200 code-verifiable instruction-following test samples.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Multi-Dimensional Constraint Framework] --> B[Automated Instruction Generation Pipeline]
    B --> C[Constraint Expansion]
    C --> D{Conflict Detection}
    D -- No Conflict --> E[Instruction Rewriting]
    D -- Conflict --> C
    E --> F[Instruction-Following Test Samples]
    F --> G[Manually Write Validation Code]
    G --> H[1,200 Code-Verifiable Test Samples]
    H --> I[Evaluation of 19 LLMs]
    I --> J[Performance Analysis]
    J --> K[Reinforcement Learning Data Generation]
    K --> L[Improvement in Instruction Following]
    A -- Framework Components --> A1(Constraint Patterns)
    A -- Framework Components --> A2(Constraint Categories)
    A -- Framework Components --> A3(Difficulty Levels)
    A1 --> A1_1(Example)
    A1 --> A1_2(Listing)
    A1 --> A1_3(Incorporation)
    A2 --> A2_1(Content)
    A2 --> A2_2(Format)
    A2 --> A2_3(Language)
    A2 --> A2_4(Length)
    A3 --> A3_1(Level I)
    A3 --> A3_2(Level II)
    A3 --> A3_3(Level III)
    A3 --> A3_4(Level IV)
scale_en: 1200 items test samples, 7906 items training samples

    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    end

    A --> E(Automated Instruction Generation Pipeline)

    subgraph Application and Analysis["Application and Analysis"]

name: Multi-IF
intro: Multi-IF是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在多轮和多语言指令遵循能力方面的新基准。该基准通过结合LLM和人工标注者，扩展了IFEval，纳入了多轮对话序列，并将英文提示翻译成其他7种语言。它包含4,501个多语言对话，每个对话有三轮，旨在反映真实世界应用中处理多轮和多语言交互的复杂性。
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
intro_en: Multi-IF is a new benchmark designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) on multi-turn and multilingual instruction-following capabilities. By combining LLMs and human annotators, it extends IFEval by incorporating multi-turn dialogue sequences and translating English prompts into seven other languages. It contains 4,501 multilingual dialogues, each with three turns, aiming to reflect the complexity of handling multi-turn and multilingual interactions in real-world applications.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[IFEval English Single-Turn Prompts] --> B[Multi-turn Expansion]
    B --> C{Instruction Type Sampling (30 types)}
    C --> D[LLM Prompt Generation (Llama 3.1 405B)]
    D --> E[Multi-turn Prompts (English)]
    E --> F{LLM Conflict Identification (Llama 3.1 405B)}
    F -- Conflicting --> G[Human Auditing (Conflict Resolution)]
    F -- No Conflict --> H[Clean English Multi-turn Prompts]
    G --> H
    H --> I[Multilingual Translation (Llama 3.1 405B)]
    I --> J{Multilingual Human Auditing & Revision}
    J -- Needs Revision --> I
    J -- Approved --> K[Translated Multilingual Prompts]
    K --> L{LLM Sensitive Content Flagging}
    L -- Sensitive --> M[Human Review & Elimination]
    L -- Not Sensitive --> N[Final Multilingual Conversations]
    M --> N
    N --> O[Dataset: 4,501 Multilingual Conversations (8 languages, 3 turns)]
    O --> P[Evaluation of SOTA LLMs (e.g., Llama 3.1, GPT-4o)]
    P --> Q(Performance Analysis: Multi-turn Accuracy, Multilingual Capabilities)
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start_node([Start: Multi-IF Benchmark Construction])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph DataSourcing["Data Sourcing"]
        input_ifeval[/IFEval Dataset (English Single-Turn Prompts)/]
        style input_ifeval fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph MultiTurnExpansion["Multi-Turn Expansion"]
        input_ifeval -->|Based on IFEval| sample_instructions(Randomly Sample 1 of 30 Instruction Types)
        style sample_instructions fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        sample_instructions -->|For each following turn (2 turns)| llm_generate_prompts(LLM (Llama 3.1 405B) Generates NL Prompts)
        style llm_generate_prompts fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        llm_generate_prompts --> multi_turn_prompts[/Multi-Turn English Prompts (3 Turns)/]
        style multi_turn_prompts fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph ConflictResolution["Conflict Instruction Resolution"]
        multi_turn_prompts --> llm_scan_conflicts(LLM (Llama 3.1 405B) Scans for Conflicting Instructions)
        style llm_scan_conflicts fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        llm_scan_conflicts --> human_verify_conflicts(Human Verification of Conflicts)
        style human_verify_conflicts fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        human_verify_conflicts --> decision_conflict{Conflicts Found?}
        style decision_conflict fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_conflict -- Yes --> remove_conflicts(Remove Conflicting Prompts)
        style remove_conflicts fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_conflict -- No --> clean_english_prompts[/Clean English Multi-Turn Prompts/]
        style clean_english_prompts fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        remove_conflicts --> clean_english_prompts
    end

    subgraph MultilingualTranslation["Multilingual Translation"]
        clean_english_prompts --> llm_translate(LLM (Llama 3.1 405B) Translates to 7 Languages)
        style llm_translate fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        llm_translate --> decision_applicable{Instructions Applicable to Non-Western Languages?}
        style decision_applicable fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_applicable -- No --> refrain_translation(Refrain from Translating Certain Instructions)
        style refrain_translation fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_applicable -- Yes --> multilingual_prompts_raw[/Raw Multilingual Prompts/]
        style multilingual_prompts_raw fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        refrain_translation --> multilingual_prompts_raw
        multilingual_prompts_raw --> annotator_evaluate(Multilingual Annotators Evaluate Translations)
        style annotator_evaluate fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        annotator_evaluate --> annotator_revise(Annotators Revise Translations (15% Rewritten))
        style annotator_revise fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        annotator_revise --> final_multilingual_prompts[/Final Multilingual Prompts/]
        style final_multilingual_prompts fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph SensitiveContentRemoval["Sensitive Content Removal"]
        final_multilingual_prompts --> llm_flag_sensitive(LLM Flags Potentially Sensitive Prompts)
        style llm_flag_sensitive fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        llm_flag_sensitive --> human_review_sensitive(Human Annotators Review Flagged Prompts)
        style human_review_sensitive fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        human_review_sensitive --> decision_sensitive{Sensitive Content Found?}
        style decision_sensitive fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_sensitive -- Yes --> eliminate_sensitive(Eliminate Sensitive Content)
        style eliminate_sensitive fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_sensitive -- No --> final_dataset[/Final Dataset (4,501 Multi-Turn Prompts in 8 Languages)/]
        style final_dataset fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        eliminate_sensitive --> final_dataset
    end

    subgraph BenchmarkEvaluation["Benchmark Evaluation"]
        final_dataset --> evaluate_llms(Evaluate 14 SOTA LLMs on Multi-IF)
        style evaluate_llms fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        evaluate_llms --> evaluation_results[/Evaluation Results/]
        style evaluation_results fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    final_dataset --> end_node([End: Multi-IF Benchmark Released])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    evaluation_results --> end_node

    start_node --> input_ifeval
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    start_node([开始: Multi-IF 基准构建])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph DataSourcing["数据来源"]
        input_ifeval[/IFEval 数据集 (英文单轮指令)/]
        style input_ifeval fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph MultiTurnExpansion["多轮扩展"]
        input_ifeval -->|基于 IFEval| sample_instructions(随机抽取 30 种指令类型之一)
        style sample_instructions fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        style llm_generate_prompts fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        style decision_applicable fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_applicable -- 否 --> refrain_translation(避免翻译某些指令)
        style refrain_translation fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_applicable -- 是 --> multilingual_prompts_raw[/原始多语言指令/]
        style multilingual_prompts_raw fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        refrain_translation --> multilingual_prompts_raw
        multilingual_prompts_raw --> annotator_evaluate(多语言标注员评估翻译)
        style annotator_evaluate fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        annotator_evaluate --> annotator_revise(标注员修订翻译 (平均 15% 被重写))
        style annotator_revise fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        annotator_revise --> final_multilingual_prompts[/最终多语言指令/]
        style final_multilingual_prompts fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph SensitiveContentRemoval["敏感内容移除"]
        final_multilingual_prompts --> llm_flag_sensitive(LLM 标记潜在敏感指令)
        style llm_flag_sensitive fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        llm_flag_sensitive --> human_review_sensitive(人工标注员审查标记指令)
        style human_review_sensitive fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        human_review_sensitive --> decision_sensitive{发现敏感内容?}
        style decision_sensitive fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_sensitive -- 是 --> eliminate_sensitive(消除敏感内容)
        style eliminate_sensitive fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        decision_sensitive -- 否 --> final_dataset[/最终数据集 (8 种语言的 4,501 条多轮指令)/]
        style final_dataset fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        eliminate_sensitive --> final_dataset
    end

    subgraph BenchmarkEvaluation["基准评估"]
        final_dataset --> evaluate_llms(评估 14 个 SOTA LLM 在 Multi-IF 上的表现)
        style evaluate_llms fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        evaluate_llms --> evaluation_results[/评估结果/]
        style evaluation_results fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    final_dataset --> end_node([结束: Multi-IF 基准发布])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    evaluation_results --> end_node

    start_node --> input_ifeval

name: Multi-LogiEval
intro: Multi-LogiEval是一个综合性的评测基准，专注于评估大型语言模型的多步逻辑推理能力。该数据集涵盖了命题逻辑、一阶逻辑和非单调逻辑，包含了超过30种推理规则及其60多种组合，并具有不同的推理深度。该基准旨在推动对大型语言模型逻辑推理能力的研究和改进。
org: Arizona State University, Google, Intel, UCSF
intro_en: Multi-LogiEval is a comprehensive benchmark focused on evaluating the multi-step logical reasoning abilities of large language models. The dataset covers propositional logic, first-order logic, and non-monotonic logic, featuring over 30 reasoning rules and more than 60 combinations, with varying reasoning depths. This benchmark aims to advance research and improvement in the logical reasoning capabilities of large language models.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[研究现有逻辑推理基准] --> B{识别现有基准局限性}
    B -- 局限性包括 --> C[单一逻辑类型]
    B -- 局限性包括 --> D[有限推理规则]
    B -- 局限性包括 --> E[缺乏非单调推理数据集]
    F[定义Multi-LogiEval目标] --> G[设计两阶段数据生成流程]
    G --> H[阶段1: 规则组合生成]
    H --> I(推理规则库)
    I --> J[创建推理规则的组合]
    J --> K[生成不同推理深度的实例]
    K --> L(规则组合数据集)
    G --> M[阶段2: 数据实例生成]
    M --> N(LLM提示模板)
    N --> O[提示LLM生成<上下文,问题,答案>三元组]
    O --> P(原始数据实例)
    P --> Q{人工Validation}
    Q -- 通过 --> R[高质量数据实例]
    Q -- 失败 --> O
    R --> S[Final Dataset组成]
    S --> T(Multi-LogiEval数据集)
    T --> U[Evaluation方法: 零样本思维链]
    U --> V[在多种LLM上进行Evaluation]
    V --> W(LLM性能结果)
    W --> X[分析推理链]
    X --> Y[发现重要研究结果]
    Y --> Z[促进未来研究]

    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Data Sourcing & Design"]
        A[Identify Limitations of Existing Benchmarks] --> B[Define Scope: Multi-step Logical Reasoning]
        B --> C{Determine Logic Types?}
        C --> C1[/Propositional Logic (PL)/]
        C --> C2[/First-Order Logic (FOL)/]
        C --> C3[/Non-Monotonic (NM)/]
        C1 & C2 & C3 --> D[Select Inference Rules: >30 rules, >60 combinations]
        D --> E[Define Reasoning Depths: 1-5 steps]
        style A fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style C fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    start --> Phase1

name: Multi-SWE-bench
intro: Multi-SWE-bench是一个多语言基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在解决真实世界软件开发问题上的能力。该基准涵盖了Python、Java、TypeScript、JavaScript、Go、Rust、C和C++等多种编程语言，包含了2132个从实际软件项目中筛选并由专家精心标注的高质量实例。它通过模拟真实开发场景中的问题修复任务，为评估和提升大模型在软件工程领域的应用提供了可靠的平台。
intro_en: Multi-SWE-bench is a multilingual benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' ability to solve real-world software development problems. It covers multiple programming languages, including Python, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C, and C++, and contains 2,132 high-quality instances carefully curated and annotated by experts from real software projects. By simulating bug-fixing tasks in real development scenarios, it provides a reliable platform for assessing and improving large models' applications in software engineering.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Issue Candidates Collection] --> B(2,456 Candidate Issues)
    B --> C[Expert Annotation Process]
    C -- 68 Expert Annotators --> D(Annotated Instances)
    D --> E{Quality Control & Filtering}
    E -- Problematic Issues Filtered --> F(1,632 High-Quality Instances)
    F --> G[Multi-SWE-bench Dataset]
    G --> H[Evaluation Methodology]
    H -- Agentless, SWE-agent, OpenHands --> I[Model Evaluation Results]
    J[Multi-SWE-RL Community Launch] --> K(4,723 RL Training Instances)
    K --> L[Open-source Data Production Pipeline]
    L --> M[Continuous Contribution & Expansion]
    G -- Covers --> N(Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C, C++ Languages)

    style Evaluation_Metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])
    Start --> Data_Sourcing[/Existing Codebases/]

    subgraph Data_Collection_Phase["Data Collection"]
        Data_Sourcing --> Candidate_Identification(Identify potential issue-resolving instances)
        Candidate_Identification --> Initial_Candidates[/2,456 Candidate Instances/]
    end

    subgraph Filtering_Phase["Filtering and Pre-processing"]
        Initial_Candidates --> Filter_Criteria{Apply filtering criteria?}
        Filter_Criteria -- Yes --> Automated_Filtering(Automated filtering for quality and relevance)
        Automated_Filtering --> Filtered_Candidates[/Pre-processed Candidate Instances/]
        Filter_Criteria -- No --> Manual_Review(Manual review of all candidates)
        Manual_Review --> Filtered_Candidates
    end

    subgraph Annotation_Phase["Human Annotation"]
        Filtered_Candidates --> Annotator_Selection(Select 68 expert annotators)
        Annotator_Selection --> Annotation_Process(Annotate 2,456 candidates)
        Annotation_Process --> Annotated_Instances[/1,632 High-Quality Annotated Instances/]
    end

    subgraph Quality_Control_Phase["Quality Control and Validation"]
        Annotated_Instances --> Quality_Check{Meet quality standards?}
        Quality_Check -- Yes --> Validated_Instances(Validate instances for accuracy and reliability)
        Quality_Check -- No --> Re_Annotation(Re-annotate problematic instances)
        Re_Annotation --> Annotation_Process
        Validated_Instances --> Final_Benchmark_Data[/Multi-SWE-bench Dataset/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation_Phase["Benchmark Evaluation"]
        Final_Benchmark_Data --> Model_Selection(Select state-of-the-art models)
        Model_Selection --> Evaluation_Methods(Apply Agentless, SWE-agent, OpenHands methods)
        Evaluation_Methods --> Performance_Analysis(Analyze model performance and empirical insights)
        Performance_Analysis --> Evaluation_Metrics[/Evaluation Metrics/]
    end

    subgraph Open_Source_Community["Multi-SWE-RL Community"]

        RL_Dataset_Creation --> Data_Production_Pipeline(Open-source data production pipeline & tutorials)
        Data_Production_Pipeline --> Community_Contribution(Encourage community contribution and expansion)
    end

    Evaluation_Metrics --> End([End])
    Community_Contribution --> End

name: MultiChallenge
intro: MultiChallenge是一个开创性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在与人类用户进行多轮对话方面的能力。该基准测试识别了多轮对话中常见的四类挑战，这些挑战对当前的前沿LLMs来说都极具难度。MultiChallenge要求LLMs同时具备准确的指令遵循、上下文分配和上下文推理能力。尽管在现有基准测试中表现出色，所有前沿模型在MultiChallenge上的准确率均低于50%。
org: Scale AI, Labelbox, Technical University of Denmark
intro_en: MultiChallenge is a pioneering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to engage in multi-turn conversations with human users. It identifies four common challenges in multi-turn dialogue that are difficult for state-of-the-art LLMs. MultiChallenge requires LLMs to demonstrate accurate instruction following, context allocation, and context reasoning simultaneously. Despite strong performance on existing benchmarks, all leading models achieve less than 50% accuracy on MultiChallenge.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[多阶段多智能体系统 (MMSE) 生成合成数据]
    B --> C{MMSE Input}
    C -- 包含 --> C1(分层主题种子)
    C -- 包含 --> C2(角色种子)
    C -- 包含 --> C3(Evaluation配置)
    C --> D[智能体角色分配]
    D --> D1[规划智能体]
    D --> D2[用户智能体]
    D --> D3[响应智能体 (6个前沿LLM)]
    D1 -- 生成并更新 --> E(对话蓝图)
    D2 -- 根据蓝图与 --> D3
    D3 -- 响应 --> D2
    E -- 持续更新基于 --> F(对话历史)
    F --> G{规划智能体检测到模型失败?}
    G -- 是 --> H[对话终止并保存]
    G -- 否 --> I{达到最大轮次限制?}
    I -- 是 --> J[对话丢弃]
    I -- 否 --> E
    H --> K[人工审查和编辑]
    K --> K1[招募并培训Human Annotation者]
    K1 --> K2{审查标准}
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2a(符合挑战定义)
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2b(对话自然真实)
    K2 -- 包含 --> K2c(至少3个LLM合理失败)
    K2 --> L{质量不满意?}
    L -- 是 --> L1[编辑或丢弃合成示例]
    L -- 否 --> M[通过第一层审查]
    M --> N[第二层审查 (不同审查员池)]
    N --> O[第三层审查 (不同审查员池)]
    O --> P[通过所有审查层]
    P --> Q[自动Evaluation (LLM作为评判者)]
    Q --> Q1(实例级Evaluation标准)
    Q1 -- 93.91%对齐 --> R(人工评判)
    R --> S[最终基准数据集]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style StartEnd fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]):::StartEnd

    subgraph Synthetic Data Generation (MMSE)
        MMSE_Input[/Hierarchical Topic Seeds, Persona Seed, Eval Config/]
        A[Initialize Planner Agent, User Agent, Responder Agents]:::ProcessingFiltering

name: MultiMedQA
intro: MultiMedQA是Google发布的综合性医疗领域AI评测套件，整合了六个现有开放式医疗问答数据集，涵盖专业医学考试、研究和消费者查询，并新增HealthSearchQA数据集，全面评估大型语言模型的临床知识和推理能力。
build_method: 整合现有数据集，部分人工生成
metric: Accuracy, 人工评估（事实性, 精确性, 潜在危害, 偏见）
eval_feature: 整合多数据集，含人工评估事实性, 精确性, 潜在危害和偏见
scale: 整合多个医疗问答数据集，共约数万题
build_method_en: Integrate existing datasets, partially manually generated
eval_feature_en: Integrate multiple datasets, including manual evaluation of factuality, accuracy, potential harm, and bias
intro_en: MultiMedQA is a comprehensive medical AI benchmark released by Google, integrating six existing open-domain medical QA datasets covering professional medical exams, research, and consumer queries, and adding the HealthSearchQA dataset to thoroughly evaluate large language models' clinical knowledge and reasoning abilities.

metric_en: Accuracy, Human Evaluation (Factuality, Precision, Potential Harm, Bias)

name: MultiPL-E
intro: MultiPL-E是一个用于将单元测试驱动的代码生成基准测试翻译成新语言的系统。它通过将两个流行的Python代码生成基准测试扩展到18种额外的编程语言，创建了第一个大规模多语言代码生成基准测试。该基准测试用于评估Codex、CodeGen和InCoder等最先进代码生成模型的多语言性能，并探讨语言频率和语言特性对模型性能的影响。
intro_en: MultiPL-E is a system that translates unit test-driven code generation benchmarks into new languages. By extending two popular Python code generation benchmarks to 18 additional programming languages, it creates the first large-scale multilingual code generation benchmark. This benchmark evaluates the multilingual performance of state-of-the-art code generation models such as Codex, CodeGen, and InCoder, and explores the impact of language frequency and language features on model performance.

name: MultiPriv
intro: MultiPriv是系统评估视觉语言模型个体级别隐私推理能力的基准，通过隐私感知与推理框架和双语多模态数据集，涵盖属性检测、跨图像重识别和链式推理等九项挑战性任务。
build_method: 合成个体档案的双语多模态数据集
task_type: 属性检测, 重识别, 链式推理
eval_feature: 评估VLM个体级别隐私推理能力，双语多模态
build_method_en: Synthetic bilingual multimodal dataset of individual profiles
eval_feature_en: Evaluate VLM individual-level privacy reasoning ability, bilingual multimodal
intro_en: MultiPriv is a benchmark for systematically evaluating the individual-level privacy inference capabilities of vision-language models. It features a privacy-aware inference framework and a bilingual multimodal dataset, covering nine challenging tasks including attribute detection, cross-image re-identification, and chain reasoning.

name: MuSR
intro: MuSR（多步软推理）是一个用于评估语言模型多步软推理能力的数据集，任务以自然语言叙述形式呈现。数据集通过新颖的神经符号合成到自然语言生成算法构建，包含复杂推理实例，挑战先进语言模型。实例为自由文本叙述，贴近真实推理场景，兼具挑战性和现实性。
org: New York University, University of Texas at Austin, Princeton University, University of Alberta, AWS
build_method: 神经符号合成到自然语言生成算法
build_method_en: Neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm
intro_en: MuSR (Multi-step Soft Reasoning) is a dataset designed to evaluate language models' multi-step soft reasoning abilities, with tasks presented in natural language narrative form. The dataset is constructed using a novel neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm and contains complex reasoning instances that challenge advanced language models. The examples are free-text narratives, closely reflecting real-world reasoning scenarios, combining both challenge and realism.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[定义领域和问题]
    B --> C[构建初始事实集F]
    C --> D[生成多样性事实G]
    D --> E(领域特定事实)
    E --> F[递归采样LLM (GPT-4)]
    F --> G(LLMOutput)
    G --> H[应用树Validation器V]
    H --> I{是否有效?}
    I -- 否 --> F
    I -- 是 --> J[生成推理树T]
    J --> K{达到目标深度?}
    K -- 否 --> F
    K -- 是 --> L(场景特定事实S(T))
    L --> M(常识事实C(T))
    L --> N[将S(T)分块]
    N --> O[LLM生成章节]
    O --> P[连接章节生成叙述x]
    P --> Q{事实一致性?}
    Q -- 否 --> O
    Q -- 是 --> R[数据集Validation]
    R --> S[人工Evaluation]
    S --> T[Final Dataset组成]
    T --> U(MuSR数据集)
    U --> V[End]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start])
    start --> A[/Task Definition & Narrative Design/]

    subgraph DataGeneration["Neurosymbolic Synthetic-to-Natural Generation Algorithm"]
        A --> B(Define Symbolic Rules & Constraints)
        B --> C(Generate Core Reasoning Instances)
        C --> D{Is Instance Complex Enough?}
        D -- Yes --> E(Neuro-model Guided Narrative Expansion)
        D -- No --> C
        E --> F(Create Complex Narratives e.g., Murder Mysteries)
        F --> G{Narrative Length ~1000 words?}
        G -- Yes --> H(Scale Instances for LLM Capabilities)
        G -- No --> E
    end

    H --> I[/Free Text Narratives/]
    I --> J(Human Annotator Task Solving)
    J --> K{High Accuracy Achieved?}
    K -- Yes --> L(Quality Control & Filtering)
    K -- No --> J
    L --> M{Instances Realistic & Challenging?}
    M -- Yes --> N(Benchmark Validation with LLMs)
    M -- No --> J
    N --> O(Characterize LLM Reasoning Gaps)
    O --> P[/MuSR Benchmark Dataset/]
    P --> end([End])

name: MVBench
intro: MVBench是一个全面的多模态视频理解基准，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在动态视频任务中的时序理解能力。它涵盖了20项具有挑战性的视频任务，这些任务无法通过单帧有效解决。该基准通过新颖的“静态到动态”方法定义时序相关任务，并自动将公共视频标注转换为多项选择题进行评估。
org: OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shenzhen Institutes of Advanced Technology, Chinese Academy of Sc
intro_en: MVBench is a comprehensive multimodal video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the temporal reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on dynamic video tasks. It covers 20 challenging video tasks that cannot be effectively solved using single frames. The benchmark defines temporal reasoning tasks through a novel "static-to-dynamic" approach and automatically converts public video annotations into multiple-choice questions for evaluation.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B[定义20个时间相关任务]
    B --> C{静态到动态方法}
    C --> D[参考现有图像任务定义]
    D --> E[增强问题以包含视频时间上下文]
    E --> F[自动标注范式]
    F --> G[收集11个公共视频基准数据集]
    G --> H[使用LLM将开放式QA转换为多项选择QA]
    H --> I[处理答案选项：随机采样、打乱顺序、LLM确保长度相似]
    I --> J[确保Evaluation公平性和准确性]
    J --> K[设计Evaluation提示]
    K --> L[强调时间敏感性]
    L --> M[使用特定提示确保100%选项提取率]
    M --> N[开发VideoChat2基线]
    N --> O[收集多模态指令微调数据]
    O --> P[VideoChat2渐进式多模态训练]
    P --> Q[阶段1：视觉-语言对齐]
    Q --> R[阶段2：视觉-语言连接]
    R --> S[阶段3：指令微调]
    S --> T[完成]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase 1: Temporal Task Definition
        A[Existing MLLM Benchmarks] --> B(Adapt Static Tasks to Dynamic Goals)
        B --> C(Augment Static Questions with Temporal Context)
        C --> D(Define 20 Challenging Temporal Tasks)
        D --> E[/20 Temporal Tasks Defined/]
    end

    subgraph Phase 2: Data Collection & Filtration
        E --> F[/11 Public Video Datasets/]
        F --> G{Apply Filtration Criteria?}
        G -- Yes --> H(Eliminate Short Clips)
        G -- Yes --> I(Eliminate Extremely Long Videos)
        G -- Yes --> J(Select Videos: 5s-35s Duration)
        G -- Yes --> K(Balance Question Difficulty)
        K -- STAR --> L(Randomly Shift Video Clip Start/End)
        K -- CLEVRER --> M(Exclude Qs needing >10 Conditions)
        H & I & J & L & M --> N[/Filtered Video Datasets/]
    end

    subgraph Phase 3: Automatic QA Generation
        N & E --> O(Generate Initial Questions via ChatGPT)
        O --> P{Answer Option Construction Method?}
        P -- Template-Based --> Q(Construct Options from Ground Truth)
        P -- LLM-Based --> R(ChatGPT Converts Open-Ended QAs)
        Q & R --> S(Randomly Sample 3-5 Options)
        S --> T(Shuffle Option Order)
        T --> U(LLM Ensures Similar Option Lengths)
        U --> V[/200 Multiple-Choice QA Pairs per Task/]
    end

    subgraph Phase 4: Evaluation Setup
        V --> W(Craft Detailed System Prompt)
        W --> X(Design Specific Answer Prompt)
        X --> Y(Enclose Options in Parentheses)
        Y --> Z([MVBench Ready for MLLM Evaluation])
    end

    style A fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        B --> C(用时间上下文增强静态问题)
        C --> D(定义20个具有挑战性的时间任务)
        D --> E[/已定义20个时间任务/]

    subgraph Phase 2["阶段 2: 数据收集与筛选"]

name: NeedleBench V2
intro: NeedleBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在不同信息密度下检索与推理能力的合成框架。它通过在长文本中不同深度嵌入关键信息（“针”），来测试模型在信息稀疏和信息密集场景下的表现。该基准包含信息检索和复杂的祖先关系追溯等任务，旨在揭示模型处理长上下文的瓶颈。
build_method: 人工构建, 合成生成
task_type: 单, 多针检索, 多针推理, 祖先追溯
eval_feature: 长文本, 双语, 思维链
task_type_en: Single, multi-shot retrieval, multi-shot reasoning, ancestor tracing
intro_en: NeedleBench is a synthetic framework designed to evaluate large language models' retrieval and reasoning abilities under varying information densities. It tests models by embedding key information ("needles") at different depths within long texts, assessing performance in both sparse and dense information scenarios. The benchmark includes tasks such as information retrieval and complex ancestor tracing, aiming to reveal models' bottlenecks in handling long contexts.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing
        A([Start]) -->|Input: LLM Long-Context Problem| B[/Real-world long texts/]
        B --> C{Difficult to exclude inherent knowledge?}
        C -- Yes --> D[/Irrelevant filler content/]
        C -- No --> E[/Real-world long texts/]
    end

    subgraph Data Collection & Generation
        F([Synthetic Framework: NeedleBench])
        D --> F
        E --> F
        F --> G[Systematically embed key data points]
        G --> H{Varying information densities?}
        H -- Yes --> I[Adaptive context lengths]
        H -- No --> J[Fixed context lengths]
    end

    subgraph Task Categorization
        I --> K{Scenario Type?}
        J --> K
        K -- Information-Sparse --> L[Minimal relevant details in extensive irrelevant text]
        L --> M(Simulate simple retrieval tasks)
        K -- Information-Dense --> N[Relevant information continuously distributed]
        N --> O(Simulate complex reasoning tasks: Ancestral Trace Challenge)
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Analysis
        M --> P(Assess retrieval performance)
        O --> Q(Assess reasoning performance)
        P --> R[/LLM Performance Data/]
        Q --> R
        R --> S{Identify 'under-thinking' phenomenon?}
        S -- Yes --> T(Models prematurely conclude reasoning)
        S -- No --> U(Models perform as expected)
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark
        T --> V([NeedleBench V2 Benchmark])
        U --> V
        V --> W[/Critical insights and targeted tools/]
        W --> X([End])
    end

name: NL2Repo-Bench
intro: NL2Repo-Bench是一个旨在评估编码智能体长周期代码仓库生成能力的基准测试。它要求智能体根据自然语言需求文档，自主设计架构、管理依赖、实现多模块逻辑并生成可安装的Python库。实验表明，现有模型在长周期仓库生成方面表现不佳，平均测试通过率低于40%。该基准测试揭示了长周期推理是下一代自主编码智能体的关键瓶颈。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of Technology, Peking University, Renmin University of China,
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, 自动生成
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, Automated Generation
intro_en: NL2Repo-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the long-term code repository generation capabilities of coding agents. It requires agents to autonomously design architecture, manage dependencies, implement multi-module logic, and generate installable Python libraries based on natural language requirement documents. Experiments show that existing models perform poorly in long-term repository generation, with an average test pass rate below 40%. This benchmark reveals that long-term reasoning is a key bottleneck for the next generation of autonomous coding agents.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[选择真实世界开源项目] --> B[逆向工程与需求提取]
    B --> C[生成自然语言需求文档]
    C --> D(空工作区)
    D --> E[编码代理接收任务]
    E --> F[代理：架构设计]
    F --> G[代理：依赖管理]
    G --> H[代理：多模块逻辑实现]
    H --> I[代理：生成Python库]
    I --> J(生成的Python库)
    J --> K[受控环境执行]
    K --> L[上游Pytest套件Validation]
    L --> M{测试结果?}
    M -- 通过 --> N[任务成功]
    M -- 失败 --> O[任务失败]
    N --> P(NL2Repo-Bench数据集)
    O --> P
    P --> Q[数据集：104个多样化任务]
    Q --> R[Evaluation：执行通过率]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        start_node([Start])
        A1(Identify relevant code repositories)
        A2[/Public Code Platforms (e.g., GitHub)/]
        A3(Collect repository metadata)
        A4(Download repository code)
        A5{Is repository active and substantial?}
        A6(Filter inactive/empty repositories)
        start_node --> A1
        A1 --> A2
        A2 --> A3
        A3 --> A4
        A4 --> A5
        A5 -- Yes --> A6
        A5 -- No --> A_end_phase1([End Phase 1])
        A6 --> A_end_phase1
        style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style A_end_phase1 fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style A1 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style A3 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style A4 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style A6 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Data Preprocessing & Filtering"]
        B1(Parse code files)
        B2(Extract functions/classes/modules)
        B3{Has sufficient complexity and length?}
        B4(Filter simple/boilerplate code)
        B5(Normalize code format and style)
        B6[/Cleaned Code Snippets/]
        A_end_phase1 --> B1
        B1 --> B2
        B2 --> B3
        B3 -- Yes --> B5
        B3 -- No --> B_end_phase2([End Phase 2])
        B5 --> B6
        B6 --> B_end_phase2
        style B_end_phase2 fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style B1 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style B2 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style B4 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style B5 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Task Definition & Annotation"]
        C1(Define benchmark tasks: e.g., bug fixing, feature addition)
        C2(Generate task descriptions and requirements)
        C3(Human expert annotation for ground truth)
        C4{Are annotations consistent and accurate?}
        C5(Review and resolve annotation conflicts)
        C6[/Annotated Task Instances/]
        B_end_phase2 --> C1
        C1 --> C2
        C2 --> C3
        C3 --> C4
        C4 -- Yes --> C6
        C4 -- No --> C5
        C5 --> C6
        style C1 fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        style C2 fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        style C3 fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        style C5 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Quality Control & Validation"]
        D1(Automated sanity checks on task instances)
        D2(Expert review of a subset of tasks)
        D3{Does benchmark meet quality criteria?}
        D4(Iterative refinement of tasks/annotations)
        D5[/Final Benchmark Dataset/]
        C_end_phase3([End Phase 3])
        C6 --> C_end_phase3
        C_end_phase3 --> D1
        D1 --> D2
        D2 --> D3
        D3 -- Yes --> D5
        D3 -- No --> D4
        D4 --> D1
        style C_end_phase3 fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style D1 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        style D2 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        style D4 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Evaluation & Metrics"]
        E1(Define evaluation metrics: e.g., functional correctness, code quality)
        E2(Develop evaluation harness)
        E3(Run baseline models on benchmark)
        E4(Analyze model performance)
        E5[/Benchmark Report & Leaderboard/]
        D_end_phase4([End Phase 4])
        D5 --> D_end_phase4
        D_end_phase4 --> E1
        E1 --> E2
        E2 --> E3
        E3 --> E4
        E4 --> E5
        E5 --> end_node([End])
        style D_end_phase4 fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        style E1 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        style E2 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        style E3 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        style E4 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

name: NOVA-63
intro: NOVA-63是一个大规模、学科平衡、原生多语言基准测试，包含14种语言和63个学科的89,107个问题。该基准测试通过LLM辅助格式化、专家质量验证和多级别难度筛选，确保了学科平衡、难度标准一致和语言元素的真实性。对现有LLM的广泛实验揭示了跨语言一致性和模型在不同学科能力上的显著差异。这项工作为多语言模型的未来发展提供了宝贵的基准数据。
org: Peking University, Alibaba Group, Zhejiang University
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
build_method_en: Expert Curation, Human Annotation, Automated Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: NOVA-63 is a large-scale, discipline-balanced, native multilingual benchmark comprising 89,107 questions across 63 disciplines and 14 languages. The benchmark ensures discipline balance, consistent difficulty standards, and linguistic authenticity through LLM-assisted formatting, expert quality validation, and multi-level difficulty screening. Extensive experiments on existing LLMs reveal cross-lingual consistency and significant variations in model capabilities across different disciplines. This work provides valuable benchmark data for the future development of multilingual models.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph S1[Benchmark Construction Process]
        A([Start: NOVA-63 Benchmark Construction])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

            B[/Identify Diverse Data Sources/]

        end

        subgraph Phase2["Data Filtering & Preprocessing"]
            D(Remove Noise & Irrelevant Data)
            style D fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

            style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
            F(Normalize Text & Deduplicate)
            style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        subgraph Phase3["Question Generation & Annotation"]
            G(Human Annotators Generate Questions)
            style G fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

            N(Format into Standardized Structure)
            style N fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        end

        O([End: NOVA-63 Benchmark Released])
        style O fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E --> F
    F --> G
    G --> H
    H --> I
    I --> J
    J --> K

name: NYU CTF Bench
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在网络安全领域的夺旗（CTF）挑战解决能力尚未得到充分评估。为解决此问题，本研究开发了一种新颖的方法，通过创建一个可扩展的开源基准数据集来评估LLMs在CTF挑战中的表现。该基准数据集包含来自流行竞赛的各种CTF挑战，并支持LLM测试和自适应学习的元数据。通过提供专门的基准，该项目为开发、测试和完善基于LLM的漏洞检测和解决方案提供了理想平台。
eval_feature: 可扩展, 开源, 动态更新, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Scalable, open source, Dynamic Update, process evaluation, tool invocation
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) have not been fully evaluated in their ability to solve cybersecurity capture-the-flag (CTF) challenges. To address this, this study developed a novel approach by creating a scalable open-source benchmark dataset to assess LLM performance on CTF challenges. The benchmark dataset includes various CTF challenges from popular competitions and supports metadata for LLM testing and adaptive learning. By providing a dedicated benchmark, this project offers an ideal platform for developing, testing, and refining LLM-based vulnerability detection and solutions.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[CSAW CTF Competition Challenges] --> B(Initial Database of 568 Challenges)
    B --> C[Manual Validation & Curation]
    C --> D(200 Validated Challenges)
    D --> E{Challenge Type}
    E -- Server-side --> F[Manual Verification: Docker Connectivity]
    E -- Non-server --> G[Check Config Files & Source Code]
    F --> H{Missing Files?}
    G --> H
    H -- Yes --> I[Identify & Resolve Missing Files]
    H -- No --> J[Docker Image Validation]
    I --> J
    J --> K[Adjustments for External Connectivity]
    K --> L(Docker Containers with Environments)
    L --> M[JSON File Creation for Each Challenge]
    M --> N(Directory Structure: Year/Competition/Event/Category/Challenge Name)
    M --> O{Server Connection Required?}
    O -- Yes --> P[docker-compose.yml Inclusion]
    O -- No --> Q(Final Dataset: 200 CTF Challenges)
    P --> Q
    Q --> R(Categories: Crypto, Forensics, Pwn, Rev, Web, Misc)
    Q --> S(Years: 2017-2023)

name: OCNLI
intro: OCNLI（Original Chinese Natural Language Inference）是首个为中文设计的大规模自然语言推理数据集。该数据集包含约56,000个由语言学专家人工标注的句子对，遵循MNLI的标注协议，旨在为中文自然语言理解的研究提供一个具有挑战性的新基准。
org: Indiana University, Allen Institute for Artificial Intelligence
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: OCNLI (Original Chinese Natural Language Inference) is the first large-scale natural language inference dataset designed for Chinese. It contains approximately 56,000 sentence pairs manually annotated by linguistics experts, following the MNLI annotation protocol, aiming to provide a challenging new benchmark for Chinese natural language understanding research.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[研究目标: 构建大规模中文NLI数据集] --> B(Data Sources: 原始中文文本)
    B --> C{选择文本体裁}
    C --> D[文本体裁: 电视、政府、文学、新闻、电话] --> E[前提句收集]
    E --> F[假设生成: 语言学Experts生成多样化假设]
    F --> G{假设生成策略}
    G -- 单一假设 --> H[SINGLE数据集]
    G -- 多假设 --> I[MULTI数据集]
    I -- 鼓励多样性 --> J[MULTI ENCOURAGE]
    I -- 约束条件 --> K[MULTI CONSTRAINT]
    H & J & K --> L(原始P-H对)
    L --> M[标注: 4名独立标注员+1名原始作者标注]
    M --> N{标签一致性检查}
    N -- 3票以上一致 --> O[多数投票确定黄金标签]
    N -- 不一致 --> P[标记为'-'，可排除]
    O --> Q[Quality Control: 避免词汇重叠 (>70%)]
    Q --> R[数据集划分: Training Set、开发集、Test Set]
    R -- 6000对重标注数据 --> S[开发集 & Test Set (各3000对)]
    R -- 剩余约50000对 --> T[Training Set]
    S & T --> U(最终OCNLI数据集)
    U --> V[基线模型Evaluation: BERT, RoBERTa等预训练模型]
    U --> W[人类表现Evaluation: 5名Expert Annotation300例Test Set]
    V & W --> X[结果分析与挑战性Validation]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        direction LR
        A[Input: BenchmarkName|||PaperURL|||ShortDescription] --> B(Parse Input)
        B --> C[/OCNLI Name, URL, Description/]
        C --> D(Access Paper PDF)
        D --> E[/OCNLI Paper Content/]
        E --> F(Identify Data Sources)
        F --> F1[/Government Reports/]
        F --> F2[/News Corpus/]
        F --> F3[/Chinese Novels/]
        F --> F4[/TV Talk Show Transcripts/]
        F --> F5[/Telephone Callhome Transcripts/]
        F1 & F2 & F3 & F4 & F5 --> G(Collect Raw Chinese Texts)
        G --> H(Pre-process Callhome Transcripts)
        H --> I(Filter Premises: 8-50 chars)
        I --> J[/Filtered Premises (approx. 56,000)/]
    end

    subgraph Hypothesis Generation & Annotation
        J --> K{Select Hypothesis Elicitation Strategy?}
        K --> |MNLI-style| L(Single Hypothesis Elicitation)
        L --> L1(1 Entailment, 1 Neutral, 1 Contradiction per Premise)
        K --> |Multi-Hypothesis| M(Multi-Hypothesis Elicitation)
        M --> M1(3 Entailments, 3 Neutrals, 3 Contradictions per Premise)
        M1 --> M2{Bias Control Strategy?}
        M2 --> |Encourage Diversity| M3(MULTI ENCOURAGE)
        M3 --> M4(Annotators use fewer negators, more diverse hypotheses)
        M2 --> |Add Constraints| M5(MULTI CONSTRAINT)
        M5 --> M6(Constraints on negators in contradictions)
        L1 & M4 & M6 --> N(Expert Annotators)
        N --> O(Annotate Premise-Hypothesis Pairs)
        O --> P[/Annotated Sentence Pairs (approx. 56,000)/]
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation
        P --> Q(Monitor Annotator Performance)
        Q --> R{Inter-Annotator Agreement > 98% (3-vote consensus)?}
        R --> |Yes| S(Final Benchmark Dataset)
        R --> |No| T(Review & Re-annotate)
        T --> O
    end

    subgraph Baseline Models & Evaluation
        S --> U(Establish Baseline Models)
        U --> U1[/State-of-the-art Pre-trained Chinese Models/]
        U1 --> V(Evaluate Models on OCNLI)
        V --> W[/Model Performance (e.g., RoBERTa: ~78% accuracy)/]
        W --> X(Compare with Human Performance: ~90% accuracy)
        X --> Y{Performance Gap (~12%)?}
        Y --> |Yes| Z(OCNLI: Challenging Resource)
    end

    Z --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始])

    subgraph 数据来源与收集
        direction LR
        A[输入: BenchmarkName|||PaperURL|||ShortDescription] --> B(解析输入)
        B --> C[/OCNLI名称、URL、描述/]
        C --> D(访问论文PDF)
        D --> E[/OCNLI论文内容/]
        E --> F(识别数据来源)
        F --> F1[/政府报告/]
        F --> F2[/新闻语料库/]
        F --> F3[/中国小说/]
        F --> F4[/电视脱口秀转录/]
        F --> F5[/电话呼叫记录转录/]
        F1 & F2 & F3 & F4 & F5 --> G(收集原始中文文本)
        G --> H(预处理呼叫记录转录)
        H --> I(筛选前提句: 8-50字符)
        I --> J[/筛选后的前提句 (约56,000)/]
    end

    subgraph 假设生成与标注
        J --> K{选择假设启发策略?}
        K --> |MNLI风格| L(单一假设启发)
        L --> L1(每个前提句1个蕴含、1个中性、1个矛盾)
        K --> |多假设| M(多假设启发)
        M --> M1(每个前提句3个蕴含、3个中性、3个矛盾)
        M1 --> M2{偏见控制策略?}
        M2 --> |鼓励多样性| M3(多假设鼓励)
        M3 --> M4(标注者少用否定词，多用多样化假设)
        M2 --> |添加约束| M5(多假设约束)
        M5 --> M6(矛盾句中否定词的约束)
        L1 & M4 & M6 --> N(专家标注者)
        N --> O(标注前提-假设对)
        O --> P[/标注后的句子对 (约56,000)/]
    end

    subgraph 质量控制与验证
        P --> Q(监控标注者表现)
        Q --> R{标注者间一致性 > 98% (3票共识)?}
        R --> |是| S(最终基准数据集)
        R --> |否| T(审查与重新标注)
        T --> O
    end

    subgraph 基线模型与评估
        S --> U(建立基线模型)
        U --> U1[/最先进的预训练中文模型/]
        U1 --> V(在OCNLI上评估模型)
        V --> W[/模型表现 (例如, RoBERTa: 约78%准确率)/]
        W --> X(与人类表现比较: 约90%准确率)
        X --> Y{表现差距 (约12%)?}
        Y --> |是| Z(OCNLI: 具有挑战性的资源)
    end

    Z --> End([结束])

name: OCRBench
intro: OCRBench是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型多模态模型的光学字符识别（OCR）能力。它包含29个数据集，涵盖文本识别、场景文本视觉问答、文档视觉问答、关键信息提取和手写数学表达式识别等任务。该基准包含1000个经过人工验证和校正的问题-答案对，以确保评估的准确性。研究揭示了模型在处理多语言文本、手写文本、非语义文本和数学表达式识别方面的优势和劣势。
org: Huazhong University of Science and Technology, Microsoft Research, University of Science and Technol
task_type: 视觉问答, 文本识别, 关键信息提取
task_type_en: Visual QA, text recognition, key information extraction
intro_en: OCRBench is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess the optical character recognition (OCR) capabilities of large multimodal models. It includes 29 datasets covering tasks such as text recognition, scene text visual question answering, document visual question answering, key information extraction, and handwritten mathematical expression recognition. The benchmark contains 1,000 manually verified and corrected question-answer pairs to ensure evaluation accuracy. Studies reveal the models' strengths and weaknesses in handling multilingual text, handwritten text, non-semantic text, and mathematical expression recognition.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start Benchmark Construction]):::Start

    subgraph Phase1["Initial Problem Identification & Scope Definition"]
        A[Identify Limitations of Existing LMM OCR Evaluation]:::DataCollection
        B[Define Need for Comprehensive OCR Benchmark]:::DataCollection
    end

    Start --> A
    A --> B

    subgraph Phase2["Benchmark Component Design"]
        C[Design 5 Core Tasks for OCRBench]:::DataCollection
        C1(Text Recognition) --> C
        C2(Scene Text-Centric VQA) --> C
        C3(Document-Oriented VQA) --> C
        C4(Key Information Extraction (KIE)) --> C
        C5(Handwritten Mathematical Expression Recognition (HMER)) --> C
    end

    B --> C

    subgraph Phase3["Data Sourcing & Initial Collection"]
        D[/Existing Datasets & IIIT5k Dictionary/]:::DataCollection
        E(Collect 1000 Question-Answer Pairs):::DataCollection
        F(Create Semantic Text (ST) & Non-Semantic Text (NST) Datasets):::DataCollection
    end

    C --> D
    D --> E
    D --> F

    subgraph Phase4["Annotation & Quality Control"]
        G{Are Annotations Accurate?}:::QualityControl
        H(Manually Verify & Correct Incorrect Answers):::AnnotationLabeling
        I(Provide Alternative Correct Answer Candidates):::AnnotationLabeling
        J{Are Answers < 4 Symbols?}:::QualityControl
        K(Filter Out Questions with < 4 Symbols):::ProcessingFiltering
        L(Select 3000 Question Instances for Large Datasets):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    E --> G
    G -- No --> H
    H --> I
    I --> G
    G -- Yes --> J
    J -- Yes --> K
    K --> L
    J -- No --> L

    subgraph Phase5["Prompt Engineering & Evaluation Metric Definition"]
        M(Design Task-Specific Prompts for KIE):::AnnotationLabeling
        N(Design Prompts for SROIE: Company, Date, Address, Total):::AnnotationLabeling
        O(Design Prompts for FUNSD/POIE: 'What is the value for {key}?'):::AnnotationLabeling
        P(Design Prompt for HMER: LaTeX Format):::AnnotationLabeling
        Q(Define Unified Evaluation Criterion: GT Presence in LMM Output):::EvaluationMetric
    end

    L --> M
    M --> N
    N --> O
    O --> P
    P --> Q

    subgraph Phase6["Final Benchmark Assembly"]
        R[/OCRBench: 1000 Manually Curated QA Pairs/]:::OutputResult
    end

    Q --> R
    R --> End([End Benchmark Construction]):::End

name: OctoBench
intro: OctoBench评估大型语言模型在代码脚手架中遵循指令的能力，特别是在基于代码库的智能体编码场景。包含34个环境和217个任务，配备自动化工具用于细粒度分析任务完成度及规则遵守情况。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: OctoBench evaluates large language models' ability to follow instructions in code scaffolding, especially in codebase-based agent coding scenarios. It includes 34 environments and 217 tasks, equipped with automated tools for fine-grained analysis of task completion and rule compliance.

name: OJBench
intro: OJBench是一个新颖且具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在竞争级代码推理方面的能力。它包含232个来自NOI和ICPC的编程竞赛问题，为模型提供了更严格的推理技能测试。研究表明，即使是最先进的推理导向模型，也难以应对这些高挑战性的问题。这突显了模型在竞争级代码推理方面面临的重大挑战。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University
intro_en: OJBench is a novel and challenging benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' abilities in competitive-level code reasoning. It includes 232 programming contest problems from NOI and ICPC, providing a more rigorous test of models' reasoning skills. Studies show that even state-of-the-art reasoning-oriented models struggle with these highly challenging problems, highlighting significant challenges in competitive-level code reasoning.
mermaid_flowchart:

    R -- 成功 --> S[Final Dataset (232个问题)]
    S --> T[Evaluation方法 (基于测试用例)]
    T --> U(支持Python和CPP双语Evaluation)

    subgraph Data Sourcing

    end

    subgraph Data Collection

        F --> G{Validate Test Cases with Correct Submissions}

        V --> W

    subgraph Evaluation

        X --> Y{Correctness Verified by Test Cases}
        Y --> Z(Performance Decreases with More Test Cases)
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark

    end

flowchart TD
    subgraph 数据来源
        A([开始]) --> B[/NOI 问题/]
        A --> C[/ICPC 问题/]
    end

    subgraph 数据收集
        B --> D(从 Logu 收集 NOI 问题)
        C --> E(从官方网站收集 ICPC 问题)
        D --> F{问题描述 (Markdown) & 测试用例}
        E --> F
    end

    subgraph 数据过滤
        F --> G{使用正确提交验证测试用例}
        G -- 判题失败 --> H(过滤掉错误测试用例)
        G -- 判题通过 --> I{需要特殊判题？}
        H --> J(过滤后的数据)
        I -- 是 --> K(过滤掉特殊判题问题)
        I -- 否 --> J
    end

    subgraph 翻译与验证
        J --> L(使用 GPT-4o 将 NOI 描述翻译成英文)
        L --> M(人工验证翻译)
        M --> N[/翻译并验证后的问题描述/]
    end

    subgraph 难度分类
        N --> O{NOI 问题？}
        O -- 是 --> P(分类 NOI 难度: 2-3 简单, 4-5 中等, 6-7 困难)
        O -- 否 --> Q(计算 ICPC 难度分数)
        Q --> R{分数 >= 0.4?}
        R -- 是 --> S(分类为简单)
        R -- 否 --> T{分数 <= 0.1?}
        T -- 是 --> U(分类为困难)
        T -- 否 --> V(分类为中等)
        P --> W[/带有难度标签的问题/]
        S --> W
        U --> W
        V --> W
    end

    subgraph 评估
        W --> X(在 232 个问题上评估模型)
        X --> Y{测试用例验证正确性}
        Y --> Z(性能随测试用例数量增加而下降)
    end

    subgraph 最终基准
        Z --> AA([OJBench 最终基准])
    end

name: olmOCR-bench
intro: olmOCR-Bench是一个用于评估文档提取工具的综合基准，包含1400个PDF文件，涵盖公式、表格、小字体及旧扫描件等多种复杂内容。该基准与开源PDF处理工具olmOCR一同发布，旨在测试OCR系统的多样化能力。
intro_en: olmOCR-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating document extraction tools, consisting of 1,400 PDF files featuring complex content such as formulas, tables, small fonts, and old scans. Released alongside the open-source PDF processing tool olmOCR, it aims to test the diverse capabilities of OCR systems.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart TD
    A[定义7种文档类型] --> B{文档获取策略}
    B --> C1[arXiv数学: 下载TeX源文件PDF] 
    B --> C2[旧扫描数学: 爬取Internet Archive旧教科书] 
    B --> C3[表格: 从内部PDF库采样并Filtering] 
    B --> C4[旧扫描: 从国会图书馆采样历史信件] 
    B --> C5[页眉页脚: 从内部PDF库采样] 
    B --> C6[多列: 从内部PDF库视觉采样] 
    B --> C7[长小文本: 爬取Internet Archive密集小字文档]

    C1 --> D1[olmOCR识别TeX页面] --> E1[匹配原始TeX源] --> F1[ValidationKaTeX渲染兼容性] --> G1[手动Validation测试用例]
    C2 --> D2[olmOCR查找公式页面] --> E2[手动标注公式作为测试用例]
    C3 --> D3[Gemini-Flash-2.0提示表格关系] --> E3[手动审查准确性]
    C4 --> D4[脚本生成自然阅读顺序用例] --> E4[手动添加页眉页脚排除用例] --> F4[人工二次审查准确性]
    C5 --> D5[DocLayout-YOLO识别页眉页脚区域] --> E5[视觉遮罩后Gemini-Flash-2.0提取内容] --> F5[手动审查和设置条件]
    C6 --> D6[Claude-Sonnet-3.7渲染为HTML] --> E6[从HTML提取文本段] --> F6[手动审查准确性]
    C7 --> D7[Gemini-Flash-2.0生成测试用例] --> E7[手动Validation]

    G1 & E2 & E3 & F4 & F5 & F6 & E7 --> H[合并测试用例]
    H --> I{Quality Control: 移除PII/非公开文档}
    I --> J{去污: URL级别去重}
    J --> K[定义5种单元测试类别]
    K --> L1[文本存在: Validation文本段识别]
    K --> L2[文本缺失: Validation外围内容排除]
    K --> L3[自然阅读顺序: Validation文本段顺序]
    K --> L4[表格准确性: 检查表格内容和单元格属性]
    K --> L5[数学公式准确性: 检查数学方程存在]
    K --> L6[基线: 默认文本Output检查]
    L1 & L2 & L3 & L4 & L5 & L6 --> M[应用字符串归一化]
    M --> N(Final Dataset: 1400个PDF, 7000+单元测试)
    N --> O[Evaluation: 运行工具生成文本]
    O --> P[评分: Pass/Fail测试, 按文档类型宏平均]
    P --> Q(最终分数: 各测试源百分比平均值)
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing and Collection["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        A([Start]) --> B[/100,000+ Crawled PDFs/]
        B --> C{Diverse PDF Properties?}

        C -- No --> E[Discard Low Quality PDFs]
        D --> F[/olmOCR-mix-0225 Dataset/]

    subgraph Evaluation & Validation["Evaluation & Validation"]

        S -- Yes --> T[Validate Benchmark Effectiveness]

        T --> V[/Evaluation Metrics & Results/]
    end

    subgraph Release & Output["Release & Output"]
        V --> W[Release Fine-tuned VLM Model]

        X --> Y[Release Efficient Inference Pipeline]
        Y --> Z[Release olmOCR-Bench]
        Z --> AA([End])
    end

name: OlympiadBench
intro: OlympiadBench是一个奥林匹克级别的双语多模态科学基准，包含8476道数学和物理竞赛题目，其中包括中国高考题。该基准配备专家级逐步推理注释，旨在评估大型语言模型和多模态模型的高级能力，以应对传统基准日益严峻的挑战。
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
task_type: 数学问题, 开放式问答, 定理证明
eval_feature: 双语, 思维链, 领域特定
task_type_en: Math Problems, Open-ended QA, Theorem Proving
intro_en: OlympiadBench is an Olympiad-level bilingual multimodal science benchmark containing 8,476 math and physics competition problems, including Chinese Gaokao questions. It features expert-level step-by-step reasoning annotations and aims to evaluate the advanced capabilities of large language models and multimodal models in addressing the increasing challenges of traditional benchmarks.

        A --> C[/Chinese Math Competitions/]
        A --> D[/Gaokao Mock Questions/]

        D --> E
    end

    subgraph Format Conversion & Deduplication
        E --> F(OCR Recognition with Mathpix)
        F --> G(Convert PDFs to Markdown)
        G --> H{Manual Verification of Markdown}
        H -- Yes --> I(Structure Markdown: Problem-Solution-Answer)
        H -- No --> G
        I --> J(Vectorize Data with Specialized LM)
        J --> K(Deduplication based on Cosine Similarity)
    end

    subgraph Annotation & Labeling
        K --> L(Manually Annotate Topic & Problem Type)
        L --> M{Question Type?}
        M -- Open-ended --> N(Open-ended Problems)
        M -- Theorem Proving --> O(Theorem Proving Problems)
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Enhancement
        N --> P(Incorporate Visuals for Multimodal Reasoning)
        O --> P
        P --> Q(Provide Detailed Expert Solutions)
        Q --> R(Minimize Data Leakage Risks)
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark
        R --> S([OlympiadBench Final Benchmark])
    end

name: OmniDocBench
intro: OmniDocBench是一个针对多样化PDF文档解析的基准测试，旨在解决现有基准测试中文档类型覆盖范围窄、评估程序简化和不切实际的问题。它提供了高质量的标注，涵盖了学术论文、教科书、手写笔记和密集排版报纸等九种文档来源。该基准支持灵活的多级别评估，从端到端评估到基于任务和属性的分析，使用19种布局类别和15个属性标签。OmniDocBench为文档解析领域公平、多样化和细粒度的评估树立了新标准。
org: OpenDataLab, Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, University of Hong Kong, Rutgers Business
metric: Normalized Edit Distance, BLEU, METEOR, TEDS, COCODet (mAP, mAR, etc.)
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
eval_feature: 多级评估, 细粒度评估
scale: 1355个PDF页面, 包含9种文档类型, 20k+块级元素, 80k+跨度级元素
intro_en: OmniDocBench is a benchmark for diverse PDF document parsing, designed to address the narrow document type coverage, simplified evaluation procedures, and impracticality of existing benchmarks. It provides high-quality annotations covering nine document sources, including academic papers, textbooks, handwritten notes, and densely formatted newspapers. The benchmark supports flexible multi-level evaluation, from end-to-end assessment to task- and attribute-based analysis, using 19 layout categories and 15 attribute labels. OmniDocBench sets a new standard for fair, diverse, and fine-grained evaluation in document parsing.
scale_en: 1355 items PDF pages, including 9 document types, 20k+ block-level elements, 80k+ span-level elements
metric_en: Normalized Edit Distance, BLEU, METEOR, TEDS, COCODet (mAP, mAR, etc.)
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Start["Start"]
        A([Begin Benchmark Construction])
    end

    subgraph Data Acquisition["Data Acquisition"]
        B[/200k PDFs from Web & Internal Data/]
        C(Extract Visual Features using ResNet-50)
        D(Perform Clustering using Faiss)
        E{Sample 6k Visually Diverse Pages from 10 Cluster Centers}
        F(Manual Balance & Select 981 Samples)
        G(Annotate Page-Level Attributes)
    end

    subgraph Data Annotation["Data Annotation"]
        subgraph Intelligent Pre-annotation["Intelligent Pre-annotation"]
            H(Layout Detection Pre-annotation with LayoutLMv3)
            I(Content Recognition Pre-annotation with PaddleOCR, UniMERNet, GPT-4o)
        end
        subgraph Annotator Correction["Annotator Correction"]

name: OmniMedVQA
intro: OmniMedVQA是一个针对医学领域的大规模综合视觉问答（VQA）基准。它从73个不同的医学数据集中收集，涵盖12种不同的模态和20多个解剖区域。该基准旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在医学领域的表现，并发现现有LVLMs在处理医学VQA问题上的局限性。所有图像均来源于真实的医疗场景，确保了与医疗领域需求的对齐。
org: University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Southeast University
intro_en: OmniMedVQA is a large-scale comprehensive visual question answering (VQA) benchmark for the medical field. It is collected from 73 different medical datasets, covering 12 modalities and over 20 anatomical regions. The benchmark aims to evaluate the performance of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in the medical domain and identify the limitations of existing LVLMs in handling medical VQA tasks. All images are sourced from real medical scenarios, ensuring alignment with healthcare needs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(73 Medical Datasets) --> D[Dataset Integration]
    B(12 Imaging Modalities) --> D
    C(20+ Anatomical Regions) --> D
    D --> E[Data Standardization]
    E --> F[Annotation & Labeling]
    F --> G{Quality Assurance}
    G -- Pass --> H[Expert Validation]
    G -- Fail --> Z[Discard Invalid Data]
    H --> I(OmniMedVQA Benchmark)
    I --> J[LVLM Evaluation]
    J --> K[Real-world Medical VQA]

flowchart TD

        A([Start]) --> B[/73 Medical Datasets/]
        B --> C(Collect Medical Classification Datasets)
        C --> D{12 Modalities & >20 Anatomical Regions?}

        D -- No --> F(Acquire More Diverse Data)
        F --> C
    end

    subgraph Data Transformation & QA Generation
        E --> G(Collect QA Templates from Datasets)
        G --> H(Calculate Potential Images per Template)
        H --> I(Apply Inverse Proportional Sampling)
        I --> J{Balanced Distribution Achieved?}
        J -- No --> I
        J -- Yes --> K(Reformulate Questions using ChatGPT-3.5 API)
        K --> L(Generate Incorrect Options using ChatGPT-3.5 API)
        L --> M(Construct Multi-Choice QA Pairs: 2-4 Options)
    end

    subgraph Quality Control
        M --> N(Human Double Check for Data Quality)
        N --> O{Data Valid and High Quality?}
        O -- No --> K
        O -- Yes --> P[/118,010 Images, 127,995 QA-Items/]
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark & Evaluation
        P --> Q([OmniMedVQA Benchmark])
        Q --> R(Evaluate LVLMs)
        R --> S{LVLM Performance on Multi-Choice QA?}
        S -- Poor Instruction Following --> T(Use Question-answering Score)
        S -- Good Instruction Following --> U(Use Prefix-based Score)
        T --> V(Construct Prompt with Image, Question, Options)
        U --> V
        V --> W(Deliver Prompt to LVLM)
        W --> X(Generate LVLM Response)
        X --> Y(Calculate Similarity with Candidate Options)
        Y --> Z(Select Option with Largest Similarity)
        Z --> AA(Compare Prediction with Ground-Truth Answer)
        AA --> BB([Evaluation Results])
    end

name: Oolong
intro: Oolong是一个长文本推理基准，包含两个任务集：Oolong-synth和Oolong-real。它要求模型分析单个文本块并聚合这些分析以回答分布问题。即使是前沿模型在128K上下文长度下也难以在此基准上取得高分。
task_type: 分类, 计数, 关系推理, 时间推理
task_type_en: Classification, Counting, Relational Reasoning, Temporal Reasoning
intro_en: Oolong is a long-text reasoning benchmark consisting of two task sets: Oolong-synth and Oolong-real. It requires models to analyze individual text chunks and aggregate these analyses to answer distributional questions. Even state-of-the-art models struggle to achieve high scores on this benchmark with a 128K context length.

        A[收集10个文本分类数据集] --> B{标签数量 > 2?}

        B -- 否 --> D[数据Filtering/Quality Control]
        C --> D
        D --> E[使用GPT-4.1 nano和Llama 4 Maverick进行零样本ICL]
        E --> F{模型预测是否一致且正确?}
        F -- 否 --> G[排除错误/困难示例]
        F -- 是 --> H[构建上下文窗口]
        G --> H
        H --> I[Oolong-synth数据集]
    end

    subgraph Oolong-real
        J[收集Dungeons & Dragons节目转录本] --> K[Human Annotation黄金答案]
        K --> L[Oolong-real数据集]
    end

    I --> M[Oolong基准]
    L --> M
    M --> N[Evaluation模型: 多步长上下文推理]
    N --> O[分析信息聚合能力]
    O --> P[结果分析]
    P --> Q[发布数据和Evaluation工具]

name: OpenAI-Proof Q&A
intro: OpenAI-Proof Q&A 评估 AI 模型在 OpenAI 遇到的 20 个内部研究和工程瓶颈上的表现。这些瓶颈每个都代表着一个主要项目至少一天的延迟，在某些情况下还会影响大型训练运行和发布的结果。“OpenAI-Proof”指的是 OpenAI 团队解决每个问题都需要一天以上的时间。任务要求模型诊断和解释复杂问题，例如意外的性能退化、异常的训练指标或细微的实现错误。
intro_en: OpenAI-Proof Q&A evaluates AI models on 20 internal research and engineering bottlenecks encountered at OpenAI. Each bottleneck represents at least a one-day delay in a major project and, in some cases, impacts large-scale training runs and releases. "OpenAI-Proof" refers to the fact that OpenAI teams require more than a day to resolve each issue. The tasks require models to diagnose and explain complex problems, such as unexpected performance degradation, abnormal training metrics, or subtle implementation errors.
mermaid_flowchart:

    E -- 未通过 --> D

    F -- 不满足条件 --> D
    G --> H[Evaluation模型]
    H --> I(Experts准确率)
    H --> J(非Experts准确率)
    H --> K(AI系统准确率)

        C
        E
        F
    end

        B -- 奖金 --> B_incentive(撰写者奖金)
        C -- 奖金 --> C_incentive(ExpertsValidation者奖金)
        F -- 奖金 --> F_incentive(非ExpertsValidation者奖金)
    end
    style A fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px

flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing and Collection
        start([Start]) --> A1(Identify research and engineering bottlenecks)
        A1 --> A2[/OpenAI internal data/]
        A2 --> A3(Collect raw data related to bottlenecks)
        A3 --> A4{Is data sufficient and relevant?}
        A4 -- No --> A1
        A4 -- Yes --> A5(Initial data review and cleaning)
    end

    subgraph Data Processing and Filtering
        A5 --> B1(Define filtering criteria based on bottleneck)
        B1 --> B2(Apply automated filtering scripts)
        B2 --> B3{Are filtered data points high quality?}
        B3 -- No --> B1
        B3 -- Yes --> B4(Remove duplicates and irrelevant entries)
        B4 --> B5(Normalize data formats and structures)
    end

    subgraph Annotation and Labeling
        B5 --> C1(Develop annotation guidelines)
        C1 --> C2(Train human annotators)
        C2 --> C3(Annotate data for specific tasks/metrics)
        C3 --> C4{Annotation consistency check?}
        C4 -- No --> C2
        C4 -- Yes --> C5(Expert review of annotated samples)
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Validation
        C5 --> D1(Implement automated quality checks)
        D1 --> D2{Does data meet quality thresholds?}
        D2 -- No --> C5
        D2 -- Yes --> D3(Cross-validation with independent datasets)
        D3 --> D4(Perform statistical analysis of data distribution)
        D4 --> D5(Identify and correct biases)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction and Evaluation
        D5 --> E1(Define benchmark tasks and metrics)
        E1 --> E2(Assemble final benchmark dataset)
        E2 --> E3(Develop evaluation protocols)
        E3 --> E4(Run AI models against benchmark)
        E4 --> E5(Analyze model performance and identify weaknesses)
        E5 --> E6([End])
    end

name: OpenAudioBench
intro: OpenAudioBench是一个用于评估多模态及音频专用语言模型能力的音频理解评测基准。它包含五个子任务，涵盖逻辑推理、常识问答和开放式问答等多个领域，旨在全面衡量模型的音频理解和“智能”水平。该基准由四个公开数据集和一个由百川智能团队构建的语音逻辑推理数据集组成，共计2701条数据。
build_method: 混合构建（部分源于现有公开数据集，部分由人工构建）
task_type: 开放式问答, 逻辑推理, 常识问答
task_type_en: Open-ended QA, Logical Reasoning, Commonsense QA
build_method_en: Hybrid Construction (partly from existing public datasets, partly manually constructed)
intro_en: OpenAudioBench is an audio understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the capabilities of multimodal and audio-specific language models. It includes five sub-tasks covering areas such as logical reasoning, commonsense QA, and open-ended QA, aiming to comprehensively assess models' audio understanding and "intelligence" levels. The benchmark consists of four public datasets and one speech logical reasoning dataset created by the Baichuan Intelligence team, totaling 2,701 samples.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Initialization["Benchmark Initialization"]
        A([Start]) --> B(Define Benchmark Goal: Audio Understanding)
        B --> C(Identify Target Models: Multimodal & Audio-focused LLMs)
    end

    subgraph DataSourcing["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        C --> D[/Source Diverse Audio Datasets/]
        D --> E(Collect Raw Audio Data)
    end

    subgraph Preprocessing["Audio Preprocessing & Filtering"]
        E --> F(Transcribe Audio to Text)
        F --> G(Segment Audio & Text Pairs)
        G --> H{Filter Low-Quality/Irrelevant Data?}
        H -- Yes --> I(Remove Noisy/Short/Redundant Samples)
        H -- No --> J(Proceed with Clean Data)
        I --> J
    end

    subgraph TaskFormulation["Task Formulation & Annotation"]
        J --> K(Define 5 Core Sub-tasks)
        K --> K1[Reasoning QA (202 instances)]
        K --> K2[Llama Questions (300 instances)]
        K --> K3[Web Questions (1000 instances)]
        K --> K4[TriviaQA (1000 instances)]
        K --> K5[AlpacaEval (199 instances)]
        K1 --> L(Annotate for Logical Reasoning)
        K2 --> L(Annotate for General Knowledge)
        K3 --> L(Annotate for General Knowledge)
        K4 --> L(Annotate for General Knowledge)
        K5 --> L(Annotate for Open-ended QA)
        L --> M(Verify Annotations & Consistency)
    end

    subgraph QualityControl["Quality Control & Validation"]
        M --> N(Define Evaluation Metrics: Score/Accuracy)
        N --> O(Perform Pilot Evaluation on Sub-tasks)
        O --> P{Benchmark Performance Satisfactory?}
        P -- No --> Q(Refine Data, Annotations, or Task Definitions)
        Q --> K
        P -- Yes --> R(Final Benchmark Assembly)
    end

    subgraph Finalization["Final Benchmark Release"]
        R --> S([OpenAudioBench Release])
        S --> T([End])
    end

name: OpenBookQA
intro: OpenBookQA是一个模拟开卷考试的问答数据集，旨在评估对一个学科的理解能力。该数据集提供一本包含1329个基础科学事实的“开卷”，并提出约6000个问题，这些问题需要结合开卷中的事实和广泛的常识来回答。
intro_en: OpenBookQA is an open-book exam-style QA dataset designed to assess understanding of a subject. It provides an "open book" containing 1,329 basic science facts and poses about 6,000 questions that require combining these facts with broad commonsense knowledge to answer.

name: OpenRCA
intro: OpenRCA是一个基准数据集和评估框架，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）识别软件故障根本原因的能力。该基准包含来自三个企业软件系统的335个故障案例，以及超过68GB的遥测数据（日志、指标和跟踪）。给定一个故障案例及其相关的遥测数据，LLM的任务是识别触发故障的根本原因，这需要理解软件依赖关系并对异构、长上下文遥测数据进行推理。当前模型只能处理最简单的情况，即使是专门设计的RCA-agent，表现最好的模型Claude 3.5也只解决了11.34%的故障案例。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Microsoft, Tsinghua University
intro_en: OpenRCA is a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework designed to assess large language models' (LLMs) ability to identify the root causes of software failures. The benchmark includes 335 failure cases from three enterprise software systems, along with over 68GB of telemetry data (logs, metrics, and traces). Given a failure case and its related telemetry data, the LLM's task is to identify the root cause of the failure, which requires understanding software dependencies and reasoning over heterogeneous, long-context telemetry data. Current models can only handle the simplest cases; even the best-performing RCA-agent, Claude 3.5, solves just 11.34% of the failure cases.

name: OR-Bench
intro: OR-Bench是一个大规模评测LLM过度拒绝现象的基准，包含8万个可能被模型拒绝但无害的提示，以及少量难题和有毒提示。该基准帮助研究者理解并缓解模型过度谨慎拒答无害查询的问题。
intro_en: OR-Bench is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating LLM over-rejection, containing 80,000 prompts that models may reject but are harmless, along with a small number of challenging and toxic prompts. This benchmark helps researchers understand and mitigate the issue of models being overly cautious in refusing harmless queries.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> ToxicSeedGeneration

    subgraph Data Sourcing and Initial Generation
        ToxicSeedGeneration(Generate Toxic Seeds) --> DataCollection
        DataCollection[/Existing Toxic Datasets or LLM Generation/] --> Mixtral8x7B_ToxicGen(Use Mixtral 8*7B for Toxic Seed Generation)
        Mixtral8x7B_ToxicGen --> ToxicSeeds{20 Hateful Prompts per Category}
        ToxicSeeds --> ToxicSeedRewrite
    end

    subgraph Prompt Transformation
        ToxicSeedRewrite(Rewrite Toxic Seeds) --> Mixtral8x7B_Rewrite(Use Mixtral 8*7B for Rewriting)
        Mixtral8x7B_Rewrite --> RewriteInstructions[Instructions: Generate 5 Safe Prompts, Avoid Fictional Style, Use Few-Shot Examples]
        RewriteInstructions --> RewrittenPrompts{Safe Prompts Triggering Rejection}
        RewrittenPrompts --> PromptModeration
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Filtering
        PromptModeration(Moderate Prompts) --> LLMEnsemble(LLM Ensemble: GPT-4-turbo, Llama-3-70b, Gemini-1.5-pro)
        LLMEnsemble --> MajorityVote{Majority Vote for Safety?}
        MajorityVote -- Yes --> SafePrompts(Safe Prompts)
        MajorityVote -- No --> RejectedPrompts(Rejected Prompts)
        SafePrompts --> OverSensitivityCheck(Check for Over-Sensitivity with Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3)
        OverSensitivityCheck --> FinalSafePrompts{Final Safe Prompts}
        FinalSafePrompts --> ORBenchConstruction
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction
        ORBenchConstruction(Construct OR-Bench) --> Categories[10 Common Rejection Categories]
        ORBenchConstruction --> TotalPrompts[80,000 Over-Refusal Prompts]
        ORBenchConstruction --> HardPrompts[~1,000 Hard Prompts]
        ORBenchConstruction --> ToxicPrompts[600 Toxic Prompts]
        Categories & TotalPrompts & HardPrompts & ToxicPrompts --> ORBenchDataset[/OR-Bench Dataset/]
    end

    ORBenchDataset --> End([End])

    classDef Start,End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class ToxicSeedGeneration,Mixtral8x7B_ToxicGen DataCollection
    class ToxicSeeds OutputResult
    class ToxicSeedRewrite,Mixtral8x7B_Rewrite,RewriteInstructions ProcessingFiltering
    class RewrittenPrompts OutputResult
    class PromptModeration,LLMEnsemble QualityControl
    class MajorityVote QualityControl
    class SafePrompts,RejectedPrompts OutputResult
    class OverSensitivityCheck QualityControl
    class FinalSafePrompts OutputResult
    class ORBenchConstruction ProcessingFiltering
    class Categories,TotalPrompts,HardPrompts,ToxicPrompts AnnotationLabeling
    class ORBenchDataset OutputResult
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> ToxicSeedGeneration

    subgraph Data Sourcing and Initial Generation["数据来源与初始生成"]
        ToxicSeedGeneration(生成有害种子) --> DataCollection
        DataCollection[/现有有害数据集或LLM生成/] --> Mixtral8x7B_ToxicGen(使用Mixtral 8*7B生成有害种子)
        Mixtral8x7B_ToxicGen --> ToxicSeeds{每类别20个仇恨提示}
        ToxicSeeds --> ToxicSeedRewrite
    end

    subgraph Prompt Transformation["提示转换"]
        ToxicSeedRewrite(重写有害种子) --> Mixtral8x7B_Rewrite(使用Mixtral 8*7B进行重写)
        Mixtral8x7B_Rewrite --> RewriteInstructions[指令：生成5个安全提示，避免虚构风格，使用少量示例]
        RewriteInstructions --> RewrittenPrompts{触发拒绝的安全提示}
        RewrittenPrompts --> PromptModeration
    end

    subgraph Quality Control and Filtering["质量控制与筛选"]
        PromptModeration(审核提示) --> LLMEnsemble(LLM集成：GPT-4-turbo, Llama-3-70b, Gemini-1.5-pro)
        LLMEnsemble --> MajorityVote{多数投票决定安全性？}
        MajorityVote -- 是 --> SafePrompts(安全提示)
        MajorityVote -- 否 --> RejectedPrompts(被拒绝的提示)
        SafePrompts --> OverSensitivityCheck(使用Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3检查过度敏感性)
        OverSensitivityCheck --> FinalSafePrompts{最终安全提示}
        FinalSafePrompts --> ORBenchConstruction
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction["基准构建"]
        ORBenchConstruction(构建OR-Bench) --> Categories[10个常见拒绝类别]
        ORBenchConstruction --> TotalPrompts[80,000个过度拒绝提示]
        ORBenchConstruction --> HardPrompts[约1,000个困难提示]
        ORBenchConstruction --> ToxicPrompts[600个有害提示]
        Categories & TotalPrompts & HardPrompts & ToxicPrompts --> ORBenchDataset[/OR-Bench数据集/]
    end

    ORBenchDataset --> End([结束])
