name: OSWorld
intro: OSWorld是一个为多模态智能体设计的可扩展、真实的计算机环境，支持在Ubuntu、Windows和macOS等操作系统上进行任务设置、基于执行的评估和交互式学习。它提供了一个统一的平台，用于评估涉及任意应用程序的开放式计算机任务。该基准包含369个计算机任务，涵盖真实网络和桌面应用、操作系统文件I/O以及跨多个应用程序的工作流。对现有LLM/VLM智能体的评估显示，它们在作为计算机助手方面存在显著不足，人类完成率为72.36%，而最佳模型仅为12.24%。
intro_en: OSWorld is a scalable, realistic computer environment designed for multimodal agents, supporting task setup, execution-based evaluation, and interactive learning on operating systems such as Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS. It provides a unified platform for evaluating open-ended computer tasks involving arbitrary applications. The benchmark includes 369 computer tasks covering real web and desktop applications, OS file I/O, and workflows across multiple applications. Evaluations of existing LLM/VLM agents reveal significant shortcomings as computer assistants, with a human success rate of 72.36% compared to only 12.24% for the best model.

name: OVBench
intro: OVBench是一个综合性的问答基准测试，旨在评估模型在在线视频上下文中感知、记忆和推理的能力。它包含六种核心任务类型，涵盖过去、当前和未来的三种时间上下文，形成来自不同数据集的16个子任务。
org: Nanjing University, China Mobile Research Institute, OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory
intro_en: OVBench is a comprehensive question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate models' abilities in perception, memory, and reasoning within online video contexts. It includes six core task types covering past, present, and future temporal contexts, comprising 16 subtasks from various datasets.

name: PaperBench
intro: PaperBench是一个旨在评测AI代理复现顶尖人工智能研究能力的基准。它要求代理从零开始，完整复现20篇ICML 2024的重点论文，涵盖了从理解论文贡献、开发代码到执行实验的全过程。该基准采用一个包含8316个可评分子任务的分层评分体系进行客观评估，并配备了一个基于大型语言模型的自动评分机制以实现规模化评测。
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成, 混合
eval_feature: 过程导向, 领域特定
intro_en: PaperBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' ability to replicate cutting-edge AI research. It requires agents to fully reproduce 20 key ICML 2024 papers from scratch, covering the entire process from understanding the paper's contributions, developing code, to executing experiments. The benchmark uses a hierarchical scoring system with 8,316 scorable subtasks for objective evaluation and features an LLM-based automatic scoring mechanism for scalable assessment.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Benchmark Design
        A([Start]) --> B(Define PaperBench Goal)
        B --> C{Select Papers?}
        C --> D(Select 20 ICML 2024 Spotlight/Oral Papers)
        D --> E(Design Replication Task)
        E --> F(Task: Understand Paper Contributions)
        E --> G(Task: Develop Codebase)
        E --> H(Task: Execute Experiments)
    end

    subgraph Rubric Development
        F & G & H --> I(Create Hierarchical Rubrics)
        I --> J(Decompose Tasks into 8,316 Gradable Sub-tasks)
        J --> K(Co-develop Rubrics with Paper Authors)
        K --> L{Rubrics Accurate and Realistic?}
        L -- No --> I
        L -- Yes --> M(Finalized Rubrics)
    end

    subgraph Automated Evaluation System
        M --> N(Develop LLM-based Judge)
        N --> O(Train LLM Judge for Auto-grading)
        O --> P(Create Separate Benchmark for Judge Performance)
        P --> Q(Assess LLM Judge Performance)
        Q --> R{LLM Judge Performance Acceptable?}
        R -- No --> O
        R -- Yes --> S(Validated LLM Judge)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Evaluation
        S --> T(Evaluate Frontier Models on PaperBench)
        T --> U(Run Claude 3.5 Sonnet and other models)
        U --> V(Analyze Model Replication Scores)
        V --> W(Recruit Top ML PhDs)
        W --> X(ML PhDs Attempt Subset of PaperBench)
        X --> Y(Collect Human Baseline Scores)
        Y --> Z(Compare Model Performance vs. Human Baseline)
    end

    subgraph Dissemination
        Z --> AA(Open-source PaperBench Code)
        AA --> BB([End])
    end

    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

name: PathVQA
intro: PathVQA是基于病理图像的视觉问答基准，包含32799个开放式问题和4998张病理图像，通过半自动化流程从病理学教科书和数字图书馆提取，促进医学VQA领域研究。
build_method: 半自动化流水线提取，人工检查
eval_feature: 基于病理图像的视觉问答，开放式和封闭式问题
eval_feature_en: Visual question answering based on pathological images, open-ended and closed-ended questions
intro_en: PathVQA is a pathology image-based visual question answering benchmark, containing 32,799 open-ended questions and 4,998 pathology images. It is extracted through a semi-automated process from pathology textbooks and digital libraries to advance research in medical VQA.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Pathology Textbooks) --> C{{Semi-automated Process}}
    B(Online Digital Libraries) --> C

name: PHYBench
intro: PHYBench是一个旨在全面评估大型语言模型在物理感知和鲁棒推理能力方面的基准测试。它包含500个原创物理问题，难度从高中到物理奥林匹克竞赛不等。PHYBench通过原创内容解决数据污染问题，并采用系统化的筛选流程来消除有缺陷的评估项。评估结果表明，PHYBench能够激活更多的token，并能更好地区分不同推理模型。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shan
build_method: 专家构建, 自动生成
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: PHYBench is a benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate large language models' physical perception and robust reasoning abilities. It contains 500 original physics problems, ranging in difficulty from high school to Physics Olympiad level. PHYBench addresses data contamination by using original content and employs a systematic screening process to eliminate flawed evaluation items. Results show that PHYBench activates more tokens and better differentiates between reasoning models.

name: PhyX
intro: PhyX是一个大规模基准测试，旨在评估模型在视觉场景中基于物理的推理能力。它包含3000个精心策划的多模态问题，涵盖6种推理类型、25个子领域和6个核心物理领域。评估结果显示，即使是最先进的模型也难以应对，与人类专家相比存在显著差距。该基准测试揭示了当前模型在物理理解方面的局限性，并提供了细致的分析和评估范式。
org: The University of Hong Kong, University of Michigan, Independent, University of Toronto, University
task_type: 多模态问答, 物理推理
eval_feature: 物理推理, 视觉理解, 多模态, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Physical reasoning, visual understanding, Multimodal, process evaluation
intro_en: PhyX is a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate models' physics-based reasoning abilities in visual scenes. It contains 3,000 carefully curated multimodal questions covering 6 reasoning types, 25 subdomains, and 6 core physics areas. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models struggle significantly, with a notable gap compared to human experts. This benchmark reveals current models' limitations in physical understanding and provides detailed analysis and evaluation paradigms.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing & Initial Collection
        A([Start]) --> B[/Online Resources, Textbooks/]
        B --> C(Collect diverse physics problems)
        C --> D(Use GPT-4o for image caption generation)
        D --> E[/3,300 Raw Multimodal Questions/]
    end

    subgraph Data Curation & Filtering
        E --> F{Detect duplicate questions?}
        F -- Yes --> G(Analyze lexical overlap)
        G --> H(Manual review by Physics Ph.D. students)
        H --> I(Remove confirmed duplicates)
        F -- No --> J(Filter shortest 10% questions by text length)
        I --> J
        J --> K[/3,000 Curated Multimodal Questions/]
    end

    subgraph Annotation & Validation
        K --> L(Identify 6 Reasoning Types)
        L --> L1(Physical Model Grounding)
        L --> L2(Spatial Relation)
        L --> L3(Multi-Formula)
        L --> L4(Implicit Condition)
        L --> L5(Numerical Reasoning)
        L --> L6(Predictive Reasoning)
        K --> M(Rigorous validation by Physics Ph.D. students)
        M --> N{Ensure scientific accuracy & eliminate bias?}
        N -- No --> K
        N -- Yes --> O[/Validated Questions with Reasoning Types/]
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization
        O --> P(Create 18,000 Test Instances)
        P --> Q(Proportional random sampling for 'testmini' subset)
        Q --> R[/PhyX Benchmark (3,000 problems, 18,000 instances)/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Protocol
        R --> S(Implement Universal Evaluation Pipeline)
        S --> T(Step 1: Prediction Generation)
        T --> U(Models generate predictions via CoT prompting)
        U --> V(Step 2: Answer Extraction)
        V --> W{Question Type?}
        W -- MC --> X(Direct option matching)
        W -- OE --> Y(Rule-based answer extraction)
        X -- Match Fails --> Z(LLM Judge (DeepSeek-V3))
        Y --> Z
        Z --> AA(Step 3: LLM Judge for correctness)
        AA --> BB[/Evaluation Results/]
    end

    BB --> C1([End])

name: PIQA
intro: PIQA是一个物理常识推理基准，包含多项选择题，测试模型对日常物品使用的理解。旨在评估模型的物理知识水平，推动具备物理世界推理能力的语言理解系统发展。
org: Carnegie Mellon University, Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington, Microsoft Research
intro_en: PIQA is a physical commonsense reasoning benchmark consisting of multiple-choice questions that test a model's understanding of everyday object usage. It aims to evaluate models' physical knowledge and promote the development of language understanding systems with physical world reasoning abilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation_Metrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start])
    Start --> Data_Source[/Instructables.com/]

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Initial Collection
        Data_Source --> A(Identify physical commonsense tasks)
        A --> B(Prompt annotators with Instructables links)
        B --> C(Annotators construct two component tasks per Instructable)
        C --> D(Articulate physical goal)
        D --> E(Generate valid solution)
        E --> F{Is solution atypical?}
        F -- Yes --> G(Valid Solution: Atypical)
        F -- No --> H(Valid Solution: Prototypical)
        G --> I(Generate 'trick' solution by permutation)
        H --> I
        I --> J[/Goal-Solution-Trick Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Bias Reduction & Pre-processing
        J --> K(Initial experimentation with unconstrained prompts)
        K --> L{Reporting bias detected?}
        L -- Yes --> M(Adjust prompting to use Instructables links)
        L -- No --> N(Continue with current prompting)
        M --> O(Flatten distribution of referenced objects)
        N --> O
        O --> P(Apply AFLite algorithm for artifact cleaning)
        P --> Q[/Cleaned Goal-Solution-Trick Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Human Annotation & Validation
        Q --> R(Human annotators evaluate pairs)
        R --> S{Human agreement low?}
        S -- Yes --> T(Remove examples requiring expert knowledge)
        S -- No --> U(Qualify annotators with >=90% on HIT)
        U --> V(Calculate human performance by majority vote)
        V --> W[/Validated Goal-Solution-Trick Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Model Evaluation
        W --> X(Adapt SOTA NLP models for two-way classification)
        X --> Y(Provide goal, solution, [CLS] token to model)
        Y --> Z(Extract hidden states from final transformer layer)
        Z --> AA(Apply linear transformation & softmax for probability)
        AA --> BB(Finetune model with cross-entropy loss)
        BB --> CC{Is model GPT?}
        CC -- Yes --> DD(Add language modeling loss for stability)
        CC -- No --> EE(Continue finetuning)
        DD --> FF(Perform grid search for hyperparameters)
        EE --> FF
        FF --> GG(Report best-scoring configuration on validation set)
        GG --> HH(Truncate examples at 150 tokens)
        HH --> II[/Model Predictions/]
    end

    subgraph Analysis & Final Benchmark
        II --> JJ(Calculate model accuracy)
        JJ --> KK(Compare model accuracy vs. human performance)
        KK --> LL(Manual inspection of development errors)
        LL --> MM(Identify knowledge dimensions models lack)
        MM --> NN[/PIQA Benchmark Dataset/]
        NN --> End([End])
    end

    classDef Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef Evaluation_Metrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class Start Start_Node
    class End End_Node
    class A,B,C,D,E Data_Collection

    class K,M,N,O,P Quality_Control
    class R,T,U,V Quality_Control
    class X,Y,Z,AA,BB,CC,DD,EE,FF,GG,HH Evaluation_Metrics
    class JJ,KK,LL,MM Evaluation_Metrics
    class Data_Source,J,Q,W,II,NN Output_Result
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style Evaluation_Metrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始])
    Start --> Data_Source[/Instructables.com/]

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Initial Collection["数据来源与初步收集"]
        Data_Source --> A(识别物理常识任务)
        A --> B(提示标注者提供Instructables链接)
        B --> C(标注者为每个Instructable构建两个组件任务)
        C --> D(阐明物理目标)
        D --> E(生成有效解决方案)
        E --> F{解决方案是否非典型？}
        F -- 是 --> G(有效解决方案：非典型)
        F -- 否 --> H(有效解决方案：典型)
        G --> I(通过置换生成“欺骗性”解决方案)
        H --> I
        I --> J[/目标-解决方案-欺骗对/]
    end

    subgraph Bias Reduction & Pre-processing["偏差消除与预处理"]
        J --> K(初步尝试无约束提示)
        K --> L{检测到报告偏差？}
        L -- 是 --> M(调整提示以使用Instructables链接)
        L -- 否 --> N(继续当前提示)
        M --> O(平坦化引用对象分布)
        N --> O
        O --> P(应用AFLite算法进行伪影清理)
        P --> Q[/清理后的目标-解决方案-欺骗对/]
    end

    subgraph Human Annotation & Validation["人工标注与验证"]
        Q --> R(人工标注者评估对)
        R --> S{人工一致性低？}
        S -- 是 --> T(移除需要专家知识的示例)
        S -- 否 --> U(合格标注者在HIT上达到≥90%)
        U --> V(通过多数投票计算人工表现)
        V --> W[/已验证的目标-解决方案-欺骗对/]
    end

    subgraph Model Evaluation["模型评估"]
        W --> X(调整SOTA NLP模型进行双向分类)
        X --> Y(向模型提供目标、解决方案、[CLS]标记)
        Y --> Z(从最终Transformer层提取隐藏状态)
        Z --> AA(应用线性变换和Softmax计算概率)
        AA --> BB(使用交叉熵损失微调模型)
        BB --> CC{模型是GPT吗？}
        CC -- 是 --> DD(添加语言建模损失以提高稳定性)
        CC -- 否 --> EE(继续微调)
        DD --> FF(对超参数进行网格搜索)
        EE --> FF
        FF --> GG(报告验证集上的最佳配置)
        GG --> HH(将示例截断为150个标记)
        HH --> II[/模型预测/]
    end

    subgraph Analysis & Final Benchmark["分析与最终基准"]
        II --> JJ(计算模型准确率)
        JJ --> KK(比较模型准确率与人工表现)
        KK --> LL(手动检查开发错误)
        LL --> MM(识别模型缺乏的知识维度)
        MM --> NN[/PIQA基准数据集/]
        NN --> End([结束])

    end

    classDef Start_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef End_Node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef Evaluation_Metrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

name: PolyMATH
intro: PolyMath是一个多语言数学推理基准，涵盖18种语言和4个难度级别。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型在多语言环境下的数学推理能力，并揭示了LLM在多语言推理中的关键挑战。它通过确保难度全面性、语言多样性和高质量翻译，成为一个具有高度区分度的多语言数学基准。研究发现，即使是先进的LLM也仅能达到约50%的准确率。
eval_feature: 多语言, 难度全面, 高质量翻译
intro_en: PolyMath is a multilingual mathematical reasoning benchmark covering 18 languages and 4 difficulty levels. It aims to evaluate large language models' mathematical reasoning abilities in a multilingual context and highlights key challenges LLMs face in multilingual reasoning. By ensuring comprehensive difficulty, language diversity, and high-quality translations, it serves as a highly discriminative multilingual math benchmark. Studies show that even advanced LLMs achieve only about 50% accuracy.

name: PreScience
intro: PreScience是一个科学预测基准，它将科研过程分解为四个相互依赖的生成式任务：合作者预测、前期工作选择、贡献生成和影响预测。该基准包含一个精心策划的9.8万篇近期AI相关研究论文的数据集，具有消歧的作者身份、时间对齐的学术元数据，以及一个跨越50.2万篇论文的作者出版历史和引用的结构化图谱。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Chicago, University of Washington, Google DeepMind
build_method: 网络爬取, 专家构建
metric: nDCG, R-Precision, LACERScore, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, MAE, Pearson, Spearman
task_type: 生成, 排序, 预测
intro_en: PreScience is a scientific prediction benchmark that breaks down the research process into four interdependent generative tasks: collaborator prediction, prior work selection, contribution generation, and impact prediction. The benchmark includes a carefully curated dataset of 98,000 recent AI-related research papers, featuring disambiguated author identities, time-aligned academic metadata, and a structured graph of author publication histories and citations spanning 502,000 papers.
metric_en: nDCG, R-Precision, LACERScore, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, MAE, Pearson, Spearman

name: ProcBench
intro: ProcBench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）多步推理能力的基准测试。它通过消除路径探索和隐式知识利用，专注于直接评估多步推理。该数据集包含明确的指令和相应问题对，模型通过遵循提供的指令来解决问题。
org: Ippei Fujisawa, Sensho Nobe, Hiroki Seto, Rina Onda, Yoshiaki Uchida, Hiroki Ikoma, Pei-Chun Chien,
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
intro_en: ProcBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the multi-step reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). By eliminating path exploration and implicit knowledge use, it focuses on directly assessing multi-step reasoning. The dataset contains explicit instructions paired with corresponding questions, and models solve problems by following the given instructions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Benchmark Construction Start]) --> ProblemDesign(Focus on Multi-Step Inference)

    subgraph Problem_Design_Phase["Problem Design"]
        ProblemDesign --> EliminatePath(Eliminate Path Exploration)
        EliminatePath --> EliminateImplicit(Eliminate Implicit Knowledge Use)
        EliminateImplicit --> DesignTask(Design Special Reasoning Task)
    end

    DesignTask --> DatasetCreation(Generate Explicit Instructions)

    subgraph Dataset_Creation_Phase["Dataset Creation"]
        DatasetCreation --> GenerateQuestions(Generate Corresponding Questions)
        GenerateQuestions --> DetailProcedures(Detail Procedures within Instructions)
        DetailProcedures --> VaryingSteps(Construct Problems with Varying Steps)
    end

    VaryingSteps --> EvaluationSetup(Include Multiple Distinct Tasks)

    subgraph Evaluation_Setup_Phase["Evaluation Setup"]
        EvaluationSetup --> EvaluateResponses(Evaluate Responses at Each Step)
        EvaluateResponses --> DefineMetrics(Define Step-Aware Metrics)
        DefineMetrics --> ApplyComplexity(Apply Separately Defined Complexity Measures)
    end

    ApplyComplexity --> ConductExperiments(Conduct Experiments)

    subgraph Experimentation_Analysis_Phase["Experimentation & Analysis"]
        ConductExperiments --> CompareAccuracy(Compare Accuracy Across Tasks)
        CompareAccuracy --> AnalyzeCapabilities(Analyze LLM Capabilities)
        AnalyzeCapabilities --> AnalyzeLimitations(Analyze LLM Limitations)
    end

    AnalyzeLimitations --> End([ProcBench Benchmark Finalized])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([基准构建开始]) --> ProblemDesign(聚焦多步推理)

    subgraph Problem_Design_Phase["问题设计阶段"]
        ProblemDesign --> EliminatePath(消除路径探索)
        EliminatePath --> EliminateImplicit(消除隐式知识使用)
        EliminateImplicit --> DesignTask(设计特殊推理任务)
    end

    DesignTask --> DatasetCreation(生成明确指令)

    subgraph Dataset_Creation_Phase["数据集创建阶段"]
        DatasetCreation --> GenerateQuestions(生成相应问题)
        GenerateQuestions --> DetailProcedures(指令中详细说明步骤)
        DetailProcedures --> VaryingSteps(构建不同步骤的问题)
    end

    VaryingSteps --> EvaluationSetup(包含多个不同任务)

    subgraph Evaluation_Setup_Phase["评估设置阶段"]
        EvaluationSetup --> EvaluateResponses(评估每一步的响应)
        EvaluateResponses --> DefineMetrics(定义步骤感知指标)
        DefineMetrics --> ApplyComplexity(应用单独定义的复杂性度量)
    end

    ApplyComplexity --> ConductExperiments(进行实验)

    subgraph Experimentation_Analysis_Phase["实验与分析阶段"]
        ConductExperiments --> CompareAccuracy(比较跨任务准确性)
        CompareAccuracy --> AnalyzeCapabilities(分析大型语言模型能力)
        AnalyzeCapabilities --> AnalyzeLimitations(分析大型语言模型局限性)
    end

    AnalyzeLimitations --> End([ProcBench 基准最终确定])

name: PromptCBLUE
intro: PromptCBLUE是基于CBLUE重建的中文医疗领域大模型评测基准，评估中文大模型在医疗实体识别、文本分类、自然语言推理、对话理解及内容生成等多任务上的能力，提供在线评测平台。
build_method: 基于CBLUE基准重建，转换为prompt格式
task_type: 多任务（实体识别, 分类, 推理, 对话, 生成）
eval_feature: 评估中文LLM在医疗多任务上的能力，提供在线评测平台
scale: 大规模，覆盖16个医疗NLP任务
task_type_en: Multi-task (entity recognition, Classification, Reasoning, Dialogue, Generation)
build_method_en: Reconstructed based on CBLUE benchmark, converted to prompt format
eval_feature_en: Evaluate Chinese LLM capabilities on medical multi-tasks, provide online evaluation platform
intro_en: PromptCBLUE is a Chinese medical large model evaluation benchmark reconstructed from CBLUE. It assesses the capabilities of Chinese large models across multiple tasks, including medical entity recognition, text classification, natural language inference, dialogue understanding, and content generation, and provides an online evaluation platform.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Raw Chinese Medical Data) --> B[Data Collection]
    B --> C[Initial Data Preprocessing]
    C --> D[Expert Annotation]
    D --> E[Quality Control & Review]
    E --> F{Data Validity Check}
    F -- Valid --> G[Dataset Formatting]
    F -- Invalid --> H[Re-annotation/Correction]
    H --> D
    G --> I(PromptCBLUE Final Dataset)
    I --> J[LLM Evaluation]
    J --> K(Evaluation Results)
scale_en: Large-scale, covering 16 items medical NLP tasks

name: ProntoQA
intro: ProntoQA是一个合成的问答基准，旨在通过基于一阶逻辑的测试用例和思维链来评估大型语言模型的多跳推理能力。该数据集能够将生成的思维链解析为符号证明，以进行形式化分析，从而系统地探究语言模型的推理能力。研究发现，虽然模型在单个演绎步骤上表现良好，但在需要系统探索多个有效选项的证明规划方面存在困难。
intro_en: ProntoQA is a synthetic question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' multi-hop reasoning abilities through first-order logic-based test cases and chains of thought. The dataset allows generated chains of thought to be parsed into symbolic proofs for formal analysis, enabling a systematic investigation of the models' reasoning capabilities. Studies show that while models perform well on individual deductive steps, they struggle with proof planning that requires systematically exploring multiple valid options.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> InputParameters[/Benchmark Parameters/]

    subgraph Data Generation
        InputParameters --> SelectOntologyType{Select Ontology Type?}
        SelectOntologyType -- Fictional --> GenerateFictionalOntology(Generate Fictional Ontology)
        SelectOntologyType -- True --> GenerateTrueOntology(Generate True Ontology)
        SelectOntologyType -- False --> GenerateFalseOntology(Generate False Ontology)

        GenerateFictionalOntology --> Ontology(Ontology Tree)
        GenerateTrueOntology --> Ontology
        GenerateFalseOntology --> Ontology

        Ontology --> SelectHops{Select Number of Hops (1, 3, 5)?}
        SelectHops --> SelectTraversal{Select Traversal Direction?}
        SelectTraversal -- Top-Down/Preorder --> GenerateProofTopDown(Generate Proof Steps (Top-Down))
        SelectTraversal -- Bottom-Up/Postorder --> GenerateProofBottomUp(Generate Proof Steps (Bottom-Up))

        GenerateProofTopDown --> Proof(Symbolic Proof)
        GenerateProofBottomUp --> Proof

        Proof --> ConvertOntologyToNL(Convert Ontology to Natural Language Context)
        ConvertOntologyToNL --> NLContext[/Natural Language Context/]

        Proof --> ConvertProofToNL(Convert Proof to NL Query, CoT, Label)
        ConvertProofToNL --> NLQAExample[/Natural Language QA Example/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation and Analysis
        NLQAExample --> LLMEvaluation(Evaluate LLM on QA Example)
        LLMEvaluation --> PredictedCoT(Predicted Chain-of-Thought)
        LLMEvaluation --> PredictedLabel(Predicted Answer Label)

        PredictedCoT --> ParseCoT(Parse CoT into Symbolic Proof)
        ParseCoT --> ReconstructedProof(Reconstructed Proof)

        ReconstructedProof --> CompareToGoldProof(Compare Reconstructed Proof to Gold Proof)
        CompareToGoldProof --> ProofAccuracy(Calculate Proof Accuracy)

        PredictedLabel --> CompareToGoldLabel(Compare Predicted Label to Gold Label)
        CompareToGoldLabel --> LabelAccuracy(Calculate Label Accuracy)

        ProofAccuracy --> AnalyzeReasoningAbility(Analyze LLM Reasoning Ability)
        LabelAccuracy --> AnalyzeReasoningAbility

        AnalyzeReasoningAbility --> Results(Evaluation Results)
    end

    Results --> End([End])

    classDef Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Processing fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class GenerateFictionalOntology,GenerateTrueOntology,GenerateFalseOntology DataCollection
    class GenerateProofTopDown,GenerateProofBottomUp Processing
    class ConvertOntologyToNL,ConvertProofToNL Processing
    class LLMEvaluation Evaluation
    class ParseCoT Processing
    class CompareToGoldProof QualityControl
    class ProofAccuracy Evaluation
    class CompareToGoldLabel QualityControl
    class LabelAccuracy Evaluation
    class AnalyzeReasoningAbility Evaluation
    class NLContext,NLQAExample Output
    class Results Output
    class Ontology,Proof DataCollection
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> InputParameters[/基准参数/]

    subgraph Data Generation["数据生成"]
        InputParameters --> SelectOntologyType{选择本体类型?}
        SelectOntologyType -- 虚构 --> GenerateFictionalOntology(生成虚构本体)
        SelectOntologyType -- 真实 --> GenerateTrueOntology(生成真实本体)
        SelectOntologyType -- 错误 --> GenerateFalseOntology(生成错误本体)

        GenerateFictionalOntology --> Ontology(本体树)
        GenerateTrueOntology --> Ontology
        GenerateFalseOntology --> Ontology

        Ontology --> SelectHops{选择跳数 (1, 3, 5)?}
        SelectHops --> SelectTraversal{选择遍历方向?}
        SelectTraversal -- 自顶向下/前序 --> GenerateProofTopDown(生成证明步骤 (自顶向下))
        SelectTraversal -- 自底向上/后序 --> GenerateProofBottomUp(生成证明步骤 (自底向上))

        GenerateProofTopDown --> Proof(符号证明)
        GenerateProofBottomUp --> Proof

        Proof --> ConvertOntologyToNL(将本体转换为自然语言上下文)
        ConvertOntologyToNL --> NLContext[/自然语言上下文/]

        Proof --> ConvertProofToNL(将证明转换为自然语言查询、思维链、标签)
        ConvertProofToNL --> NLQAExample[/自然语言问答示例/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation and Analysis["评估与分析"]
        NLQAExample --> LLMEvaluation(评估大型语言模型在问答示例上的表现)
        LLMEvaluation --> PredictedCoT(预测的思维链)
        LLMEvaluation --> PredictedLabel(预测的答案标签)

        PredictedCoT --> ParseCoT(将思维链解析为符号证明)
        ParseCoT --> ReconstructedProof(重构的证明)

        ReconstructedProof --> CompareToGoldProof(将重构证明与黄金证明进行比较)
        CompareToGoldProof --> ProofAccuracy(计算证明准确性)

        PredictedLabel --> CompareToGoldLabel(将预测标签与黄金标签进行比较)
        CompareToGoldLabel --> LabelAccuracy(计算标签准确性)

        ProofAccuracy --> AnalyzeReasoningAbility(分析大型语言模型的推理能力)
        LabelAccuracy --> AnalyzeReasoningAbility

        AnalyzeReasoningAbility --> Results(评估结果)
    end

    Results --> End([结束])

    classDef Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef Processing fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef Annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef Evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef Output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    class GenerateFictionalOntology,GenerateTrueOntology,GenerateFalseOntology DataCollection
    class GenerateProofTopDown,GenerateProofBottomUp Processing
    class ConvertOntologyToNL,ConvertProofToNL Processing
    class LLMEvaluation Evaluation
    class ParseCoT Processing
    class CompareToGoldProof QualityControl
    class ProofAccuracy Evaluation
    class CompareToGoldLabel QualityControl
    class LabelAccuracy Evaluation
    class AnalyzeReasoningAbility Evaluation
    class NLContext,NLQAExample Output
    class Results Output
    class Ontology,Proof DataCollection

name: ProtocolQA
intro: ProtocolQA是一个多项选择基准测试，旨在评估模型在解决常见生物实验室方案中失败的实验结果方面的能力。它评估了与生物武器开发相关的两用生物学知识。
org: FutureHouse Inc., University of Washington, Stanford University, Massachusetts Institute of Technolo
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题改编
intro_en: ProtocolQA is a multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate models' ability to address failed experimental outcomes in common biological laboratory protocols. It assesses dual-use biological knowledge related to bioweapons development.

name: ProverBench
intro: ProverBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在形式化定理证明方面能力的基准。它包含325个形式化问题，其中15个问题来自近期的AIME竞赛，旨在全面评估模型在解决高中竞赛级和本科水平数学问题上的能力。该基准由DeepSeek-Prover-V2论文引入，用于测试模型将复杂问题分解为子目标并使用Lean 4等证明器进行验证的能力。
intro_en: ProverBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' abilities in formal theorem proving. It contains 325 formal problems, including 15 from the recent AIME competition, designed to comprehensively assess models' capabilities in solving high school competition-level and undergraduate mathematics problems. Introduced by the DeepSeek-Prover-V2 paper, the benchmark tests models' ability to decompose complex problems into subgoals and verify them using provers like Lean 4.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> DataSourcing

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
        DataSourcing[/Formalized Problems from Various Sources/]:::DataCollection
        DataSourcing --> ProblemCollection(Collect 325 Formalized Problems):::DataCollection
        ProblemCollection --> AIMEProblems(Include 15 AIME Problems (24-25)):::DataCollection
    end

    DataSourcing --> ColdStartProcedure

    subgraph Cold-Start Training Procedure
        ColdStartProcedure(Initiate Cold-Start Training) --> Decompose(DeepSeek-V3 Decomposes Complex Problems into Subgoals):::ProcessingFiltering
        Decompose --> ProofSynthesis(Synthesize Proofs of Resolved Subgoals):::ProcessingFiltering
        ProofSynthesis --> ChainOfThought(Form Chain-of-Thought Process):::ProcessingFiltering
        ChainOfThought --> ReasoningCombination(Combine with DeepSeek-V3 Step-by-Step Reasoning):::ProcessingFiltering
        ReasoningCombination --> InitialColdStart(Create Initial Cold Start for Reinforcement Learning):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    InitialColdStart --> ModelTraining

    subgraph Model Training
        ModelTraining(Train DeepSeek-Prover-V2 Model):::ProcessingFiltering
        ModelTraining --> Lean4(Formal Theorem Proving in Lean 4):::ProcessingFiltering
        Lean4 --> InitData(Initialize with Data from Recursive Pipeline):::ProcessingFiltering
        InitData --> DeepSeekV3Power(Powered by DeepSeek-V3):::ProcessingFiltering
        DeepSeekV3Power --> IntegrateReasoning(Integrate Informal & Formal Reasoning):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    IntegrateReasoning --> Evaluation

    subgraph Evaluation
        Evaluation(Evaluate Model Performance) --> MiniF2F(MiniF2F-test):::EvaluationMetric
        MiniF2F --> MiniF2FResult{88.9% Pass Ratio?}
        MiniF2FResult -- Yes --> PutnamBench(PutnamBench):::EvaluationMetric
        MiniF2FResult -- No --> RefineModel(Refine Model):::QualityControl
        PutnamBench --> PutnamResult{Solves 49/658 Problems?}
        PutnamResult -- Yes --> ProverBenchEval(ProverBench Evaluation):::EvaluationMetric
        PutnamResult -- No --> RefineModel
        ProverBenchEval --> AIMEProblemsEval(Evaluate on 15 AIME Problems):::EvaluationMetric
        AIMEProblemsEval --> AIMEModelResult{DeepSeek-Prover-V2 Solves 6?}
        AIMEModelResult -- Yes --> DeepSeekV3Compare(Compare with DeepSeek-V3):::EvaluationMetric
        AIMEModelResult -- No --> RefineModel
        DeepSeekV3Compare --> DeepSeekV3Result{DeepSeek-V3 Solves 8 with Majority Voting?}
        DeepSeekV3Result -- Yes --> FinalBenchmark(Final ProverBench Benchmark):::OutputResult
        DeepSeekV3Result -- No --> RefineModel
        RefineModel --> ModelTraining
    end

    FinalBenchmark --> End([End])

    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> DataSourcing

    subgraph 数据来源与收集
        DataSourcing[/来自各种来源的规范化问题/]:::DataCollection
        DataSourcing --> ProblemCollection(收集 325 个规范化问题):::DataCollection
        ProblemCollection --> AIMEProblems(包含 15 个 AIME 问题 (24-25)):::DataCollection
    end

    DataSourcing --> ColdStartProcedure

    subgraph 冷启动训练过程
        ColdStartProcedure(启动冷启动训练) --> Decompose(DeepSeek-V3 将复杂问题分解为子目标):::ProcessingFiltering
        Decompose --> ProofSynthesis(合成已解决子目标的证明):::ProcessingFiltering
        ProofSynthesis --> ChainOfThought(形成思维链过程):::ProcessingFiltering
        ChainOfThought --> ReasoningCombination(结合 DeepSeek-V3 的逐步推理):::ProcessingFiltering
        ReasoningCombination --> InitialColdStart(为强化学习创建初始冷启动):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    InitialColdStart --> ModelTraining

    subgraph 模型训练
        ModelTraining(训练 DeepSeek-Prover-V2 模型):::ProcessingFiltering
        ModelTraining --> Lean4(Lean 4 中的形式化定理证明):::ProcessingFiltering
        Lean4 --> InitData(使用递归定理证明管道的数据进行初始化):::ProcessingFiltering
        InitData --> DeepSeekV3Power(由 DeepSeek-V3 提供支持):::ProcessingFiltering
        DeepSeekV3Power --> IntegrateReasoning(整合非形式化与形式化推理):::ProcessingFiltering
    end

    IntegrateReasoning --> Evaluation

    subgraph 评估
        Evaluation(评估模型性能) --> MiniF2F(MiniF2F-测试):::EvaluationMetric
        MiniF2F --> MiniF2FResult{88.9% 通过率?}
        MiniF2FResult -- 是 --> PutnamBench(PutnamBench):::EvaluationMetric
        MiniF2FResult -- 否 --> RefineModel(优化模型):::QualityControl
        PutnamBench --> PutnamResult{解决 49/658 个问题?}
        PutnamResult -- 是 --> ProverBenchEval(ProverBench 评估):::EvaluationMetric
        PutnamResult -- 否 --> RefineModel
        ProverBenchEval --> AIMEProblemsEval(评估 15 个 AIME 问题):::EvaluationMetric
        AIMEProblemsEval --> AIMEModelResult{DeepSeek-Prover-V2 解决 6 个?}
        AIMEModelResult -- 是 --> DeepSeekV3Compare(与 DeepSeek-V3 比较):::EvaluationMetric
        AIMEModelResult -- 否 --> RefineModel
        DeepSeekV3Compare --> DeepSeekV3Result{DeepSeek-V3 通过多数投票解决 8 个?}
        DeepSeekV3Result -- 是 --> FinalBenchmark(最终 ProverBench 基准):::OutputResult
        DeepSeekV3Result -- 否 --> RefineModel
        RefineModel --> ModelTraining
    end

    FinalBenchmark --> End([结束])

    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

name: PubMedQA
intro: PubMedQA是一个基于PubMed摘要的生物医学问答数据集，任务是用“是”、“否”或“可能”回答研究问题。包含1000个专家标注、61200个未标注及211300个人工生成问答，是首个需对生物医学研究文本进行推理的数据集。
org: University of Pittsburgh, Carnegie Mellon University
build_method: 专家构建, LLM生成, 网络爬取, 混合
build_method_en: Expert Curation, LLM Generation, Web Crawling, Hybrid
intro_en: PubMedQA is a biomedical question answering dataset based on PubMed abstracts, where the task is to answer research questions with "yes," "no," or "maybe." It includes 1,000 expert-annotated, 61,200 unlabeled, and 211,300 artificially generated QA pairs, making it the first dataset requiring reasoning over biomedical research texts.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(PubMed Abstracts) --> B[Extract Abstracts]
    B --> C[Generate Initial QA Instances]
    C --> D{QA Instance Type}
    D -->|Expert Annotation| E[Expert Annotation]
    D -->|Automatic Generation| F[Automatic Generation]
    D -->|Unlabeled| G(Unlabeled QA Instances)
    E --> H(Expert Annotated QA)
    F --> I(Automatically Generated QA)
    H & I & G --> J[Integrate & Validate Instances]
    J --> K(PubMedQA Dataset)
    K --> L[Evaluate Biomedical QA Models]

name: RareBench
intro: RareBench是首个系统性评估大语言模型在罕见病领域能力的基准。它包含了多个罕见病患者数据集，并提出了一种动态少样本提示方法来提升诊断性能。该基准还对GPT-4与专业医生的诊断能力进行了比较。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 分类, 抽取, 开放式问答
intro_en: RareBench is the first benchmark to systematically evaluate large language models' capabilities in the rare disease domain. It includes multiple rare disease patient datasets and introduces a dynamic few-shot prompting method to enhance diagnostic performance. The benchmark also compares the diagnostic abilities of GPT-4 with those of expert physicians.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    Start([Start: RareBench Construction])
    
    subgraph Phase1["Phase 1: Knowledge Base Integration"]
        KB1[/Collect Knowledge Bases/]
        KB2(Integrate HPO Human Phenotype Ontology)
        KB3(Integrate OMIM Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man)
        KB4(Integrate Orphanet Database)
        KB5(Integrate CCRD Compendium of China's Rare Diseases)
        KB6(Build Comprehensive Rare Disease Knowledge Graph)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase2["Phase 2: Data Collection"]
        DC1[/Collect Patient Data from Multiple Sources/]
        DC2(Gather PUMCH Dataset - 1,360 cases, 205 diseases)
        DC3(Gather RAMEDIS Dataset - 273 cases, 144 diseases)
        DC4(Gather MME Dataset - 552 cases, 72 diseases)
        DC5(Total: 2,185 patients, 421 distinct rare diseases)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase3["Phase 3: Data Processing and Annotation"]
        DP1(Extract Clinical Information from EHRs)
        DP2{Quality Check: Complete Information?}
        DP3(Remove Personally Identifiable Information PII)
        DP4(Standardize Phenotype Terminology using HPO)
        DP5(Map Clinical Texts to Standardized Phenotypes)
        DP6(Extract 17,000+ Human Phenotypes)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase4["Phase 4: Knowledge Graph Enhancement"]
        KG1(Build Disease-Phenotype Graph)
        KG2(Apply IC Information Content Values)
        KG3(Develop Random Walk Algorithm)
        KG4(Generate Phenotype Embeddings)
        KG5(Create Dynamic Few-Shot Prompts)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase5["Phase 5: Benchmark Task Design"]
        Task1(Task 1: Phenotype Extraction from EHRs)
        Task2(Task 2: Phenotype-to-Disease Retrieval)
        Task3(Task 3: Diagnosis among Grouped Diseases)
        Task4(Task 4: Differential Diagnosis Universal Rare Diseases)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase6["Phase 6: Human Expert Validation"]
        HV1(Select 75 High-Quality Cases)
        HV2(Recruit 50 Physicians from 23 Hospitals)
        HV3(5 Departments: Cardiology, Hematology, Nephrology, Neurology, Pediatrics)
        HV4(Each Case Diagnosed by 4 Physicians)
        HV5(Physicians Use Knowledge and External Tools)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase7["Phase 7: Evaluation Metrics"]
        EM1(Define Top-k Recall Metrics)
        EM2(Define Median Rank MR)
        EM3(Define Precision and F1 Score)
        EM4(Compare LLMs vs Human Physicians)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase8["Phase 8: Quality Control"]
        QC1{Verify Data Integrity}
        QC2(Remove Cases with Incomplete Information)
        QC3{Check Annotation Accuracy}
        QC4(Validate Phenotype Mappings)
        QC5(Ensure Ethical Compliance)
    end
    
    Final[/Final Benchmark: RareBench with 4 Tasks, 2,185 Patients, 421 Diseases/]
    End([End: Benchmark Ready for LLM Evaluation])
    
    Start --> KB1
    KB1 --> KB2
    KB2 --> KB3
    KB3 --> KB4
    KB4 --> KB5
    KB5 --> KB6
    
    KB6 --> DC1
    DC1 --> DC2
    DC2 --> DC3
    DC3 --> DC4
    DC4 --> DC5
    
    DC5 --> DP1
    DP1 --> DP2
    DP2 -->|Yes| DP3
    DP2 -->|No| QC2
    DP3 --> DP4
    DP4 --> DP5
    DP5 --> DP6
    
    DP6 --> KG1
    KG1 --> KG2

flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    Start([开始：RareBench构建])
    
    subgraph Phase1["阶段1：知识库整合"]
        KB1[/收集知识库/]
        KB2(整合HPO人类表型本体)
        KB3(整合OMIM在线人类孟德尔遗传数据库)
        KB4(整合Orphanet数据库)
        KB5(整合CCRD中国罕见病概要)
        KB6(构建综合罕见病知识图谱)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase2["阶段2：数据收集"]
        DC1[/从多个来源收集患者数据/]
        DC2(收集PUMCH数据集 - 1,360例，205种疾病)
        DC3(收集RAMEDIS数据集 - 273例，144种疾病)
        DC4(收集MME数据集 - 552例，72种疾病)
        DC5(总计：2,185名患者，421种不同罕见病)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase3["阶段3：数据处理与标注"]
        DP1(从电子病历中提取临床信息)
        DP2{质量检查：信息完整？}
        DP3(删除个人身份信息PII)
        DP4(使用HPO标准化表型术语)
        DP5(将临床文本映射到标准化表型)
        DP6(提取17,000+人类表型)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase4["阶段4：知识图谱增强"]
        KG1(构建疾病-表型图谱)
        KG2(应用IC信息内容值)
        KG3(开发随机游走算法)
        KG4(生成表型嵌入)
        KG5(创建动态少样本提示)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase5["阶段5：基准任务设计"]
        Task1(任务1：从电子病历中提取表型)
        Task2(任务2：表型到疾病检索)
        Task3(任务3：分组疾病诊断)
        Task4(任务4：通用罕见病鉴别诊断)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase6["阶段6：人类专家验证"]
        HV1(选择75例高质量病例)
        HV2(从23家医院招募50名医生)
        HV3(5个科室：心脏病学、血液学、肾脏病学、神经学、儿科)
        HV4(每例由4名医生诊断)
        HV5(医生使用知识和外部工具)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase7["阶段7：评估指标"]
        EM1(定义Top-k召回率指标)
        EM2(定义中位数排名MR)
        EM3(定义精确率和F1分数)
        EM4(比较大语言模型与人类医生)
    end
    
    subgraph Phase8["阶段8：质量控制"]
        QC1{验证数据完整性}
        QC2(删除信息不完整的病例)
        QC3{检查标注准确性}
        QC4(验证表型映射)
        QC5(确保伦理合规)
    end
    
    Final[/最终基准：RareBench包含4个任务，2,185名患者，421种疾病/]
    End([结束：基准准备就绪用于大语言模型评估])

name: RealWorldQA
intro: RealWorldQA是一个旨在评估多模态AI模型真实世界空间理解能力的基准测试。它通过700多张真实世界场景（包括车载图像）的图片，配以问题和可验证的答案，来评估模型对物理环境的理解能力。该基准测试要求模型能够识别高分辨率图像中的细节，并基于识别结果进行推理，可能需要常识性知识。
eval_feature: 思维链, 高分辨率图像理解
intro_en: RealWorldQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate the real-world spatial understanding capabilities of multimodal AI models. It uses over 700 images of real-world scenes, including in-car images, paired with questions and verifiable answers to assess models' understanding of physical environments. The benchmark requires models to identify details in high-resolution images and perform reasoning based on these observations, potentially involving commonsense knowledge.

name: RefSpatial-Bench
intro: RefSpatial-Bench是一个具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估视觉语言模型在多步空间指代推理方面的能力。它基于真实世界中的杂乱场景，并包含大规模的问答对，涵盖了丰富的空间关系和复杂的推理过程。该基准测试填补了现有评估方法在多步空间推理方面的空白，并能有效区分不同模型的性能。
org: Beihang University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence
build_method: 混合 (人工标注, 自动生成)
intro_en: RefSpatial-Bench is a challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of vision-language models in multi-step spatial coreference reasoning. It is based on cluttered real-world scenes and includes a large-scale set of question-answer pairs covering rich spatial relationships and complex reasoning processes. This benchmark fills the gap in existing evaluation methods for multi-step spatial reasoning and effectively differentiates the performance of various models.

name: RepoQA
intro: RepoQA是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）长上下文代码理解能力的基准测试。它通过“搜索针函数”（SNF）任务来挑战LLMs，要求模型根据自然语言描述搜索代码函数，这需要模型深入理解代码和描述。RepoQA是多语言且全面的，包含从50个流行代码库中收集的500个代码搜索任务，涵盖5种现代编程语言。
org: University of Washington, Google, ETH Zurich
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注
intro_en: RepoQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) long-context code understanding ability. It challenges LLMs with the "Search Needle Function" (SNF) task, requiring models to search for code functions based on natural language descriptions, demanding deep comprehension of both code and descriptions. RepoQA is multilingual and comprehensive, containing 500 code search tasks collected from 50 popular code repositories, covering 5 modern programming languages.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        A([Start]) --> B[/Popular Repositories (50)/]
        B --> C[/Modern Programming Languages (5)/]
        C --> D(Extract Codebases from Repositories)
    end

    subgraph Task Generation["Task Generation (Searching Needle Function - SNF)"]
        D --> E(Identify Functions within Codebases)
        E --> F(Generate Natural Language Descriptions for Functions)
        F --> G(Formulate Code Search Tasks)
    end

    subgraph Data Filtering & Refinement["Data Filtering & Refinement"]
        G --> H{Is Task Trivial or Ambiguous?}
        H -- Yes --> I(Discard Task)
        H -- No --> J(Ensure Diversity across Languages/Repos)
        J --> K(Verify Task Correctness)
    end

    subgraph Quality Control & Validation["Quality Control & Validation"]
        K --> L{Human Review/Expert Validation?}
        L -- Yes --> M(Perform Expert Review)
        L -- No --> N(Automated Consistency Checks)
        N --> O(Pilot Testing with LLMs)
    end

    subgraph Final Benchmark Assembly["Final Benchmark Assembly"]
        O --> P(Compile 500 Validated Code Search Tasks)
        P --> Q(Package Benchmark with Instructions & Scripts)
    end

    subgraph Evaluation["Evaluation"]
        Q --> R(Select LLMs (26 Models))
        R --> S(Run LLMs on RepoQA Benchmark)
        S --> T(Analyze Results & Draw Conclusions)
        T --> U([End])
    end

name: ReportBench
intro: ReportBench是一个系统性基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的学术研究报告的内容质量。该基准关注两个关键维度：引用文献的质量和相关性，以及报告中陈述的忠实性和真实性。它利用arXiv上的高质量已发表综述论文作为黄金标准，通过逆向提示工程构建领域特定提示和评估语料库。
org: ByteDance, Beihang University, The University of Sydney
metric: 内容质量, 引用文献质量和相关性, 陈述忠实性和真实性
intro_en: ReportBench is a systematic benchmark designed to evaluate the content quality of academic research reports generated by large language models (LLMs). It focuses on two key dimensions: the quality and relevance of cited references, and the faithfulness and veracity of statements in the reports. It uses high-quality published survey papers from arXiv as the gold standard and employs reverse prompt engineering to construct domain-specific prompts and evaluation corpora.
metric_en: Content Quality, Citation Quality and Relevance, Statement Faithfulness and Truthfulness
flowchart_en:

    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

        E --> F[Apply Reverse Prompt Engineering]:::ProcessingFiltering

    subgraph "评估与完善"

name: ResearchRubrics
intro: ResearchRubrics是一个用于评估深度研究（Deep Research）能力的标准化基准。它利用大型语言模型处理开放式研究问题，并通过超过2500条由专家撰写的细粒度评分标准来评估模型的表现。该基准基于超过2800小时的人工劳动构建，包含跨领域的真实研究任务，旨在全面评估模型在事实依据、推理和表达清晰度等方面的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 生成, 开放式问答, Agent任务
eval_feature: 结果导向, 思维链, 领域特定
intro_en: ResearchRubrics is a standardized benchmark for evaluating Deep Research capabilities. It leverages large language models to tackle open-ended research questions and assesses model performance using over 2,500 fine-grained scoring criteria authored by experts. Built on more than 2,800 hours of human labor, the benchmark includes cross-domain real research tasks designed to comprehensively evaluate models on factual accuracy, reasoning, and clarity of expression.

name: RewardBench 2
intro: RewardBench 2是一个全新的多技能奖励建模基准，旨在通过提供更具挑战性的数据来推进奖励模型的评估。与第一代相比，模型在RewardBench 2上的得分平均低20分，但与下游任务性能高度相关。该基准使用新的人类提示，而非现有评估中的提示，从而实现了更严格的评估。
org: Allen Institute for AI, Princeton University, University of Washington, ETH AI Center, University of
build_method: 人工标注, 众包, LLM生成, 混合
task_type: 选择题, 排序, 对话
eval_feature: 多轮, 对抗性, 结果导向
build_method_en: Human Annotation, Crowdsourcing, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: RewardBench 2 is a new multi-skill reward modeling benchmark designed to advance reward model evaluation by providing more challenging data. Compared to the first generation, model scores on RewardBench 2 are on average 20 points lower but show a high correlation with downstream task performance. The benchmark uses new human prompts instead of those from existing evaluations, enabling a more rigorous assessment.

name: Role-play Benchmark
intro: Role-play Benchmark旨在通过情景重现来评估角色扮演代理提供沉浸式体验的能力。它不寻求“正确”答案，而是专注于检测与角色设定不符的“错位”之处，例如逻辑矛盾或脱离角色的行为。
metric: Basics, Logic, Knowledge, Diversity, Content Logic, Interaction
intro_en: The Role-play Benchmark aims to evaluate the ability of role-playing agents to provide immersive experiences through scenario reenactment. It does not seek "correct" answers but focuses on detecting "discrepancies" inconsistent with the character setting, such as logical contradictions or out-of-character behavior.
metric_en: Basics, Logic, Knowledge, Diversity, Content Logic, Interaction
flowchart_en:

        style D fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

name: RULER
intro: RULER基准扩展了传统的needle-in-a-haystack测试，旨在全面评估长上下文语言模型。它支持灵活配置序列长度和任务复杂度，涵盖多种“针”（信息）的类型和数量，并引入了多跳追踪与聚合等新任务，用以测试模型超越简单信息检索的行为能力。
task_type: 开放式问答, 分类, 补全
intro_en: The RULER benchmark extends the traditional needle-in-a-haystack test to comprehensively evaluate long-context language models. It supports flexible configuration of sequence length and task complexity, covers various types and quantities of "needles" (information), and introduces new tasks like multi-hop tracking and aggregation to assess models' abilities beyond simple information retrieval.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase1["Initial Problem Identification & Goal Setting"]
        A([Start])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        B(Identify need for comprehensive long-context LM evaluation)
        C(Set goal: Develop RULER benchmark)
        A --> B
        B --> C
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Data Sourcing & Synthetic Data Generation"]
        D[/Existing NIAH test principles/]
        style D fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        E(Define flexible configurations for sequence length)
        style E fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        F(Define flexible configurations for task complexity)
        style F fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        G(Generate synthetic data for vanilla NIAH variations)
        style G fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        H(Generate synthetic data for diverse needle types and quantities)
        style H fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        I(Generate synthetic data for multi-hop tracing tasks)
        style I fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        J(Generate synthetic data for aggregation tasks)
        style J fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C --> D
        D --> E
        E --> F
        F --> G
        G --> H
        H --> I
        I --> J
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Benchmark Construction & Refinement"]
        K(Integrate generated synthetic data)
        style K fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        L{Are tasks representative and diverse?}
        style L fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        M(Refine task generation parameters)
        style M fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        N(Select 13 representative tasks)
        style N fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        O(Select 17 long-context LMs for evaluation)
        style O fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        J --> K
        K --> L
        L -->|No| M
        M --> K
        L -->|Yes| N
        N --> O
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Evaluation & Analysis"]
        P(Evaluate LMs on RULER benchmark)
        style P fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        Q(Analyze performance across context lengths)
        style Q fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        R{Performance drop with increased context length?}
        style R fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        S(Re-evaluate benchmark design)
        style S fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        T(Analyze Yi-34B performance at 200K context)
        style T fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        U[/Performance data and insights/]
        style U fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        O --> P
        P --> Q
        Q --> R
        R -->|No| S
        S --> K
        R -->|Yes| T
        T --> U
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Finalization & Release"]
        V(Document benchmark design and findings)
        style V fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        W(Open-source RULER benchmark)
        style W fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        X([End])
        style X fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        U --> V
        V --> W
        W --> X
    end

    subgraph Phase4["评估与分析"]
        P(在 RULER 基准上评估语言模型)
        style P fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        Q(分析不同上下文长度下的性能)
        style Q fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        R{性能是否随上下文长度增加而下降？}

name: SafeArena
intro: SafeArena针对基于LLM的网络代理滥用风险提出首个专注于恶意使用的评测基准。包含250个安全任务和250个有害任务，覆盖四个网站，评估代理在网络环境中的滥用可能性。
metric: Task Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score
eval_feature: 对抗性, 多轮, 领域特定
intro_en: SafeArena is the first benchmark focused on malicious use risks for LLM-based web agents. It includes 250 safety tasks and 250 harmful tasks across four websites, evaluating the potential for agent misuse in web environments.
metric_en: Task Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]) --> InputData[/Benchmark Requirements & Existing Jailbreak Benchmarks/]

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Preparation"]
        InputData --> DefineHarmCategories(Define 5 Harm Categories)
        DefineHarmCategories --> HarmCategories[/Bias, Cybercrime, Illegal Activity, Harassment, Social Bias/]
        HarmCategories --> SelectWebEnvironments(Select 4 Web Environments)
        SelectWebEnvironments --> WebEnvironments[/Reddit, E-commerce, GitLab, Retail Systems/]
        WebEnvironments --> AugmentEnvironments(Augment Environments for Harmful Tasks)
        AugmentEnvironments --> BrowserGym(Integrate BrowserGym Platform)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Task Generation & Curation"]
        BrowserGym --> HumanHarmfulTasks(Manually Design 150 Harmful Tasks)
        HumanHarmfulTasks --> AnnotateHarmful(Annotate Reference Objects for Harmful Tasks)
        AnnotateHarmful --> HumanSafeTasks(Design 250 Human-Designed Safe Tasks)
        HumanSafeTasks --> LLMAssistedTasks(LLM-Assisted Design of 200 Additional Tasks)
        LLMAssistedTasks --> PromptLLM(Prompt GPT-4o-Mini with Few-Shot Demos)
        PromptLLM --> GeneratedTasks[/200 Harmful/Safe Task Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Quality Control & Verification"]
        GeneratedTasks --> HumanReview(Rigorous Human Review Process)
        HumanReview --> VerifyIntent{Verify Task Intent (Harmful/Safe)?}
        VerifyIntent -- Yes --> CreateArtifacts(Create Web Environment Artifacts)
        VerifyIntent -- No --> ReviseTasks(Revise Task Design)
        CreateArtifacts --> CheckReference(Ensure Reference Answer Correctness)
        CheckReference --> ManualHTMLReview(Manually Review HTML & Validate Content)
        ManualHTMLReview --> ExpertReview(Expert Review by 3 Authors)
        ExpertReview --> InitialReview(Initial Review: Assess Task & Flag Ambiguous Cases)
        InitialReview --> DiscussionPhase(Discussion Phase: Resolve Flagged Tasks)
        DiscussionPhase --> FinalTasks[/500 Verified Tasks (250 Harmful, 250 Safe)/]
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Evaluation"]
        FinalTasks --> ApplyARIA(Apply Agent Risk Assessment Framework)
        ApplyARIA --> CategorizeBehavior(Categorize Agent Behavior into 4 Risk Levels)
        CategorizeBehavior --> EvaluateMetrics(Evaluate Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score)
        EvaluateMetrics --> EvaluationResults[/Agent Susceptibility to Harmful Tasks/]
    end

    EvaluationResults --> End([End])
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResult fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([开始]) --> InputData[/基准测试要求与现有越狱基准/]

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与准备"]
        InputData --> DefineHarmCategories(定义5种危害类别)
        DefineHarmCategories --> HarmCategories[/偏见, 网络犯罪, 非法活动, 骚扰, 社会偏见/]
        HarmCategories --> SelectWebEnvironments(选择4种网络环境)
        SelectWebEnvironments --> WebEnvironments[/Reddit, 电子商务, GitLab, 零售系统/]
        WebEnvironments --> AugmentEnvironments(为有害任务增强环境)
        AugmentEnvironments --> BrowserGym(集成BrowserGym平台)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["任务生成与策划"]
        BrowserGym --> HumanHarmfulTasks(手动设计150个有害任务)
        HumanHarmfulTasks --> AnnotateHarmful(标注有害任务的参考对象)
        AnnotateHarmful --> HumanSafeTasks(设计250个由人工设计的安全任务)
        HumanSafeTasks --> LLMAssistedTasks(LLM辅助设计200个额外任务)
        LLMAssistedTasks --> PromptLLM(使用少量示例提示GPT-4o-Mini)
        PromptLLM --> GeneratedTasks[/200个有害/安全任务对/]
    end

    subgraph Phase3["质量控制与验证"]
        GeneratedTasks --> HumanReview(严格的人工审查流程)
        HumanReview --> VerifyIntent{验证任务意图(有害/安全)?}
        VerifyIntent -- 是 --> CreateArtifacts(创建网络环境工件)
        VerifyIntent -- 否 --> ReviseTasks(修改任务设计)
        CreateArtifacts --> CheckReference(确保参考答案的正确性)
        CheckReference --> ManualHTMLReview(手动审查HTML并验证内容)
        ManualHTMLReview --> ExpertReview(3位专家审查)
        ExpertReview --> InitialReview(初步审查: 评估任务并标记模糊案例)
        InitialReview --> DiscussionPhase(讨论阶段: 解决标记的任务)
        DiscussionPhase --> FinalTasks[/500个已验证任务(250个有害, 250个安全)/]
    end

    subgraph Phase4["评估"]
        FinalTasks --> ApplyARIA(应用代理风险评估框架)
        ApplyARIA --> CategorizeBehavior(将代理行为分为4个风险级别)
        CategorizeBehavior --> EvaluateMetrics(评估完成率, 拒绝率, 归一化安全分数)
        EvaluateMetrics --> EvaluationResults[/代理对有害任务的敏感性/]
    end

    EvaluationResults --> End([结束]))

name: SafetyBench
intro: SafetyBench是一个综合性的基准测试，用于评估大型语言模型的安全性。它包含11,435个多项选择题，涵盖7个不同的安全问题类别。该基准测试同时包含中文和英文数据，支持两种语言的评估。
eval_feature: 双语, 零样本, 少样本
intro_en: SafetyBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the safety of large language models. It includes 11,435 multiple-choice questions covering seven different categories of safety issues. The benchmark contains both Chinese and English data, supporting evaluation in both languages.

name: SaladBench
intro: SaladBench是一个针对LLM及其攻击防御方法的安全评测基准，规模大、类别丰富、层级复杂且功能多样。它引入了基于LLM的多维评审器MD-Judge，专注于攻击增强查询的问答对，以确保评测的高效与可靠。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建, LLM生成, 混合
metric: Attack Success Rate, Safety Score, LLM-as-Judge
task_type: 开放式问答, 安全测试
build_method_en: Human Annotation, Expert Curation, LLM Generation, Hybrid
intro_en: SaladBench is a security evaluation benchmark for LLMs and their attack-defense methods, featuring large scale, diverse categories, complex hierarchy, and versatile functions. It introduces the LLM-based multidimensional evaluator MD-Judge, focusing on attack-enhanced query QA pairs to ensure efficient and reliable assessment.
metric_en: Attack Success Rate, Safety Score, LLM-as-Judge
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start_End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Data_Collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style Processing_Filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style Annotation_Labeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style Quality_Control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style Evaluation_Metric fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style Output_Result fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start]):::Start_End

    subgraph Phase_1["Base Question Set Construction"]
        DC1[/Self-instructed Generation/]:::Data_Collection
        DC2[/Open-Sourced Datasets/]:::Data_Collection
        P1[Generate Questions with Fine-tuned GPT-3.5 (15,433)]:::Processing_Filtering
        P2[Collect Questions from 8 Open Datasets (6,000+)]:::Processing_Filtering
        P1 --> P3{Harmfulness Score > Threshold?}:::Processing_Filtering
        P2 --> P3
        P3 -- Yes --> P4[Classify as Harmful Questions]:::Processing_Filtering
        P3 -- No --> P5[Discard/Review]:::Processing_Filtering
        P4 --> QC1[Human Verification: 4 Annotators, 458 Questions]:::Quality_Control
        QC1 --> QC2{Consistency Rate > 94.3%?}:::Quality_Control
        QC2 -- Yes --> P6[Final Base Question Set (approx. 21,000)]:::Output_Result
        QC2 -- No --> P7[Re-evaluate/Discuss Discrepancies]:::Quality_Control
        P7 --> QC1
    end

    subgraph Phase_2["Attack-Enhanced Subset Construction"]
        P6 --> AE1[Select 20 High-Score Jailbreak Prompts]:::Processing_Filtering
        P6 --> AE2[Apply Red Teaming LLMs: TAP, GPTFuzzer, AutoDAN]:::Processing_Filtering
        P6 --> AE3[Search Adversarial Suffixes with GCG]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE1 --> AE4[Combine Base Questions with Jailbreak Prompts]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE2 --> AE5[Generate Attack-Enhanced Questions with Red Team LLMs]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE3 --> AE6[Append GCG Suffixes to Questions]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE4 --> AE7[Collect Successful Attacks]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE5 --> AE7
        AE6 --> AE7
        AE7 --> AE8[Deduplicate and Filter for Most Effective Attacks]:::Processing_Filtering
        AE8 --> AE9[Attack-Enhanced Question Subset (approx. 240,000)]:::Output_Result
    end

    subgraph Phase_3["Defense-Enhanced Subset Construction"]
        P6 --> DE1[Response Generation on Candidate Models]:::Processing_Filtering
        DE1 --> DE2[Keyword Filtering: Keep High Rejection Rate Questions (approx. 2,000)]:::Processing_Filtering
        DE2 --> DE3[Attack Filtering: Keep Questions where Attack Fails]:::Processing_Filtering

        DE4 --> DE5[Defense-Enhanced Question Subset]:::Output_Result
    end

    subgraph Phase_4["Multiple-Choice Question Subset Construction"]

        MCQ1 --> MCQ2[Include Safe and Unsafe Options]:::Processing_Filtering
        MCQ2 --> MCQ3[Multiple-Choice Question Subset]:::Output_Result
    end

    subgraph Phase_5["Evaluator Construction"]
        P6 --> EV1[MD-Judge: LLM-based Evaluator for QA Pairs]:::Evaluation_Metric
        EV1 --> EV2[Fine-tune MD-Judge on Standard & Attack-Enhanced Data]:::Evaluation_Metric
        EV2 --> EV3[MD-Judge: Precision Classification with Taxonomy]:::Evaluation_Metric
        MCQ3 --> EV4[MCQ-Judge: Regex Parsing for Multiple-Choice Answers]:::Evaluation_Metric
        EV4 --> EV5[MCQ-Judge: Close to Human Evaluation, 0.43s Latency]:::Evaluation_Metric
    end

    subgraph Phase_6["Final SALAD-Bench Benchmark"]
        P6 --> FB1[Integrate Base Question Set]:::Output_Result
        AE9 --> FB1
        DE5 --> FB1
        MCQ3 --> FB1
        FB1 --> FB2[Hierarchical Taxonomy: 6 Domains, 16 Tasks, 66 Categories]:::Output_Result
        FB2 --> FB3[SALAD-Bench: Evaluate LLM Safety, Attack, Defense]:::Output_Result
    end

    Start --> Phase_1
    Phase_1 --> Phase_2
    Phase_1 --> Phase_3
    Phase_1 --> Phase_4
    Phase_2 --> Phase_6
    Phase_3 --> Phase_6
    Phase_4 --> Phase_6
    Phase_5 --> Phase_6

name: ScanBench
intro: ScanBench是一个用于评估医疗增强型大型语言模型（LLM）的基准测试。它旨在从被动问答转向主动的临床级决策支持，通过模拟医生的系统工作流程来解决现有系统在开放式咨询中的局限性。该基准测试评估LLM在主动信息获取、长程推理和自适应幻觉抑制方面的能力。
metric: Overall Accuracy, Clinical Inquiry, Advisory, Safety
eval_feature: 主动信息获取, 长程推理, 幻觉抑制
eval_feature_en: Active Information Acquisition, Long-range Reasoning, Hallucination Suppression
intro_en: ScanBench is a benchmark for evaluating medical-enhanced large language models (LLMs). It aims to shift from passive Q&A to proactive clinical-grade decision support by simulating doctors' systematic workflows, addressing limitations of existing systems in open-ended consultations. The benchmark assesses LLMs' abilities in active information retrieval, long-range reasoning, and adaptive hallucination suppression.
metric_en: Overall Accuracy, Clinical Inquiry, Advisory, Safety

name: SciCode
intro: SciCode是一个由科学家策划的编码基准，旨在评估语言模型解决真实科学研究问题的能力。该基准包含从80个主要问题分解出的338个子问题，涵盖数学、物理、化学、生物学和材料科学等16个不同的自然科学子领域。它提供了可选的科学背景信息以及科学家标注的黄金标准解决方案和测试用例。在最真实的设置下，目前最先进的模型Claude3.5-Sonnet只能解决4.6%的问题，表明该基准具有挑战性，并为未来科学AI的发展提供了方向。
org: Argonne National Laboratory, Carnegie Mellon University, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Prin
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: SciCode is a coding benchmark curated by scientists to evaluate language models' ability to solve real scientific research problems. It consists of 338 subproblems derived from 80 main problems, covering 16 natural science subfields including mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and materials science. The benchmark provides optional scientific background information along with scientist-annotated gold standard solutions and test cases. Under the most realistic settings, the state-of-the-art model Claude3.5-Sonnet can only solve 4.6% of the problems, highlighting the benchmark's challenge and guiding future development in scientific AI.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Problem Identification"]
        A([Start]) --> B(Identify Research Problems)
        B --> C{Source from Scientists/Papers?}
        C -- Yes --> D[/Scientific Research Tasks/]
        C -- No --> E[/Influential Papers/]
        D --> F(Curate Problems from 16 Sub-fields)
        E --> F
        F --> G{Check for Public Dataset Overlap?}
        G -- Yes --> H(Discard Problem) style H fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        G -- No --> I(Select Unique Problems)
        I --> J(Focus on Numerical Methods, Simulation, Calculation)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Problem Decomposition & Definition"]
        J --> K(Define Main Problem)
        K --> L(Decompose into Subproblems)
        L --> M(Each Subproblem: Knowledge, Reasoning, Code Synthesis)
        M --> N(Specify Inputs/Outputs with Docstrings)
        N --> O[/80 Main Problems, 338 Subproblems/]
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Annotation & Solution Generation"]
        O --> P(Scientist Annotation)
        P --> Q(Generate Gold-Standard Solutions)
        Q --> R(Generate Test Cases: Numerical & Domain-Specific)
        R --> S(Provide Optional Scientific Background)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Quality Control & Validation"]
        S --> T{Perform 3 Rounds of Revisions?}
        T -- Yes --> U(Enhance Question Design)
        T -- No --> V(Problem Validation Failed) style V fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        U --> W(Verify Gold Solutions & Test Cases)
        W --> X{Quality Threshold Met?}
        X -- No --> U
        X -- Yes --> Y(Validated Benchmark Problems)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Benchmark Finalization & Evaluation"]
        Y --> Z(Final SciCode Benchmark)
        Z --> AA(Evaluate LM Performance)
        AA --> BB{Evaluation Setup?}
        BB -- "Without Background" --> CC(Test Inherent Scientific Knowledge)
        BB -- "With Background" --> DD(Test Coding & Instruction Following)
        BB -- "Gold Solutions" --> EE(Assess Inherent Capabilities)
        BB -- "Generated Solutions" --> FF(Realistic Evaluation, Error Accumulation)
        BB -- "Main Problem Level" --> GG(All Subproblems Correct & Integrated)
        BB -- "Subproblem Level" --> HH(Evaluate Subproblem Independently)
        CC & DD & EE & FF & GG & HH --> II[/Evaluation Results/]
        II --> JJ([End])
    end

    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style Q fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style R fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style S fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style T fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与问题识别"]

        G -- 否 --> I(选择独特问题)
        I --> J(专注于数值方法、模拟、计算)
    end

    subgraph Phase2["问题分解与定义"]
        J --> K(定义主要问题)
        K --> L(分解为子问题)
        L --> M(每个子问题：知识、推理、代码合成)
        M --> N(使用文档字符串指定输入/输出)
        N --> O[/80个主要问题，338个子问题/]
    end

    subgraph Phase3["标注与解决方案生成"]
        O --> P(科学家标注)
        P --> Q(生成黄金标准解决方案)
        Q --> R(生成测试用例：数值与领域特定)
        R --> S(提供可选的科学背景)
    end

    subgraph Phase4["质量控制与验证"]
        S --> T{执行3轮修订？}
        T -- 是 --> U(改进问题设计)
        T -- 否 --> V(问题验证失败) style V fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        U --> W(验证黄金解决方案与测试用例)
        W --> X{达到质量阈值？}
        X -- 否 --> U
        X -- 是 --> Y(已验证的基准问题)
    end

    subgraph Phase5["基准最终确定与评估"]
        Y --> Z(最终SciCode基准)
        Z --> AA(评估语言模型性能)
        AA --> BB{评估设置？}
        BB -- "无背景" --> CC(测试固有科学知识)
        BB -- "有背景" --> DD(测试编码与指令遵循)
        BB -- "黄金解决方案" --> EE(评估固有能力)
        BB -- "生成解决方案" --> FF(真实评估，错误累积)
        BB -- "主要问题级别" --> GG(所有子问题正确且集成)
        BB -- "子问题级别" --> HH(独立评估子问题)
        CC & DD & EE & FF & GG & HH --> II[/评估结果/]
        II --> JJ([结束])
    end

name: Scientists' First Exam
intro: Scientists' First Exam (SFE)基准旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的科学认知能力。它通过科学信号感知、科学属性理解和科学比较推理三个相互关联的层面进行评估。SFE包含830个经过专家验证的VQA对，涵盖五大学科的66个多模态任务，旨在弥补现有科学基准在感知和推理能力评估方面的不足。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: The Scientists' First Exam (SFE) benchmark aims to evaluate the scientific cognition abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It assesses three interconnected aspects: scientific signal perception, scientific attribute understanding, and scientific comparative reasoning. SFE includes 830 expert-verified VQA pairs covering 66 multimodal tasks across five major disciplines, designed to address the shortcomings of existing scientific benchmarks in evaluating perception and reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start]) --> A(Parse Input: Benchmark Name, URL, Description)
    A --> B{Is Paper URL an arXiv Link?}
    B -- Yes --> C(Access arXiv Paper)
    C --> D(Download PDF Paper)
    D --> E(Convert PDF to Text)
    E --> F(Extract Abstract & Methodology)
    F --> G(Identify Benchmark Construction Process)

    subgraph Data Sourcing & Structure Construction
        G --> H(Identify 5 Core Disciplines: Astro, Chem, Earth, Life, Mat)
        H --> I(Consult Domain Experts)
        I --> J(Define Scientific Directions & High-Value Challenges)
        J --> K(Formalize Task Definition Rules)
        K --> L(Map Scientific Direction to Cognitive Level & Question Type)
    end

    subgraph Task Construction
        L --> M(Experts Define Concrete Tasks)
        M --> N{Task Meets Core Criteria?}
        N -- Yes --> O(Provide Raw Data Collection Instructions)
        O --> P[/Raw Data Sources: Public Datasets, Benchmarks, Databases/]
        P --> Q(Identify Suitable Data Entries: e.g., RNA, Protein Files)
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Construction & Validation
        Q --> R(Render Data Formats into Image Form)
        R --> S(Experts Compose VQA Pairs: Input, Question, Expert Answer)
        S --> T(Translate VQA Pairs to English & Chinese)
        T --> U(Format VQA Pairs in JSON)
        U --> V{Cross-Review by Domain Experts?}
        V -- Yes --> W{Rule-Based Format Checking?}
        W -- Yes --> X([Final Benchmark: 830 Expert-Verified VQA Pairs])
        N -- No --> M
        V -- No --> S
        W -- No --> U
    end

name: ScreenSpot
intro: ScreenSpot-Pro是一个新的基准测试，旨在严格评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在专业高分辨率环境中的GUI（图形用户界面）接地能力。该基准包含来自多个专业领域的真实高分辨率图像，并附有专家标注。它涵盖了五大行业和三个操作系统中的23个应用程序。现有GUI接地模型在该数据集上的表现不佳，最佳模型仅达到18.9%。
org: National University of Singapore, ByteDance, University of California Berkeley, University of Illino
eval_feature: 高分辨率, 小目标, 复杂环境
eval_feature_en: High resolution, Small targets, Complex environment
intro_en: ScreenSpot-Pro is a new benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the GUI grounding capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in professional high-resolution environments. It includes real high-resolution images from multiple specialized fields, annotated by experts. The benchmark covers 23 applications across five major industries and three operating systems. Existing GUI grounding models perform poorly on this dataset, with the best model achieving only 18.9%.

name: SealQA
intro: SealQA是一个新的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估搜索增强型语言模型在事实查询问题上的推理能力。该基准测试的特点是网络搜索结果可能存在冲突、噪音或无用信息。它包含Seal-0、Seal-Hard和LongSeal三种类型，分别侧重于事实准确性、推理能力以及长上下文、多文档推理。
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
intro_en: SealQA is a new challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning ability of search-augmented language models on factual query tasks. It features web search results that may contain conflicts, noise, or irrelevant information. The benchmark includes three types: Seal-0, Seal-Hard, and LongSeal, focusing respectively on factual accuracy, reasoning ability, and long-context, multi-document reasoning.

name: Sequential-NIAH
intro: Sequential-NIAH是一个专门用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）从长上下文中提取有序信息项（即“针”）能力的基准测试。该基准测试包含三种“针”的生成方式，上下文长度从8K到128K不等，共计14000个样本。为了评估模型表现，研究者训练了一个评估模型，通过比较答案的完整性和顺序一致性来打分，提供了比GPT-4或Claude更可靠的评估指标。
org: Zhejiang University, Ant Group, Tencent Youtu Lab, Beihang University, Cornell University
task_type: 抽取式问答, 开放式问答
intro_en: Sequential-NIAH is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) ability to extract ordered information items ("needles") from long contexts. It includes three types of "needle" generation methods, with context lengths ranging from 8K to 128K tokens, totaling 14,000 samples. To assess model performance, researchers trained an evaluation model that scores based on answer completeness and order consistency, providing a more reliable metric than GPT-4 or Claude.

name: SHADE-Arena
intro: SHADE-Arena是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）代理在复杂和长期任务中执行隐蔽破坏和监控能力的基准测试。它包含复杂的良性主任务和有害的次要目标对，代理需要在不引起LLM监控器怀疑的情况下完成次要任务。该基准测试旨在衡量LLM代理规避监控和实现有害隐藏目标的能力，并评估监控模型检测此类行为的能力。
intro_en: SHADE-Arena is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language model (LLM) agents' ability to perform covert sabotage and surveillance in complex, long-term tasks. It includes intricate benign primary tasks paired with harmful secondary objectives, where agents must complete the secondary tasks without raising suspicion from LLM monitors. The benchmark aims to measure LLM agents' capability to evade monitoring and achieve harmful hidden goals, as well as to assess monitoring models' effectiveness in detecting such behaviors.
