name: VibeEval
intro: Vibe-Eval是一个用于评估多模态聊天模型的新型开放基准测试框架。它包含269个视觉理解提示，其中100个难度较高，并附有专家编写的黄金标准答案。该基准旨在通过日常任务对多模态聊天模型进行“氛围检查”，并严格测试和探究当前前沿模型的能力。其挑战性在于，即使是前沿模型，在难度较高的测试集中也有超过50%的问题回答错误。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: Vibe-Eval is a novel open benchmark framework for evaluating multimodal chat models. It includes 269 visual understanding prompts, with 100 being more challenging, accompanied by expert-crafted gold standard answers. The benchmark aims to perform an "atmosphere check" on multimodal chat models through everyday tasks, rigorously testing and probing the capabilities of current state-of-the-art models. Its challenge lies in the fact that even leading models answer over 50% of the questions incorrectly in the more difficult test set.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Benchmark Construction Process
        start_node([Start]):::start_end

        subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection
            start_node --> A[Identify need for hard evaluation suite]:::data_collection
            A --> B[Define scope: Multimodal chat models]:::data_collection
            B --> C[Gather diverse visual understanding prompts (269 total)]:::data_collection
            C --> D{Categorize prompts by difficulty?}:::decision
            D -->|Yes| E[Classify 100 prompts as 'hard']:::data_collection
            D -->|No| F[Proceed with initial prompt set]:::data_collection
            E --> G[Collect initial responses from models]:::data_collection
            F --> G
        end

        subgraph Annotation & Quality Control
            G --> H[Experts author gold-standard responses]:::annotation
            H --> I{Review gold-standard responses?}:::decision
            I -->|Yes| J[Perform quality check on expert annotations]:::quality_control
            I -->|No| K[Assume expert responses are final]:::quality_control
            J --> L[Refine gold-standard responses based on feedback]:::annotation
            K --> L
            L --> M[Integrate gold-standard responses with prompts]:::annotation
        end

        subgraph Evaluation & Validation
            M --> N[Define benchmark objectives]:::evaluation
            N --> O[Objective 1: Vibe check for day-to-day tasks]:::evaluation
            N --> P[Objective 2: Rigorous testing of frontier models]:::evaluation
            O --> Q[Test models against Vibe-Eval benchmark]:::evaluation
            P --> Q
            Q --> R{Analyze hard set performance?}:::decision
            R -->|Yes| S[Observe >50% incorrect answers from frontier models]:::evaluation
            R -->|No| T[Re-evaluate prompt difficulty]:::evaluation
            S --> U[Explore nuances of designing challenging prompts]:::evaluation
            T --> U
            U --> V[Discuss trade-offs: human vs. automatic evaluation]:::evaluation
            V --> W[Correlate Reka Core automatic evaluation with human judgment]:::evaluation
        end

        subgraph Release & Access
            W --> X[Offer free API access for lightweight evaluation]:::output
            X --> Y[Plan formal human evaluations for high-performing models]:::output
            Y --> Z[Release evaluation code and data]:::output
            Z --> end_node([End]):::start_end
    end

    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef data_collection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    classDef processing_filtering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    classDef annotation fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    classDef quality_control fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    classDef evaluation fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    classDef output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    classDef decision fill:#ffffff,stroke:#000000,color:#000000
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Benchmark Construction Process["基准测试构建过程"]
        start_node([开始]):::start_end

        subgraph Data Sourcing & Collection["数据来源与收集"]
            start_node --> A[确定对硬性评估套件的需求]:::data_collection
            A --> B[定义范围：多模态聊天模型]:::data_collection
            B --> C[收集多样化的视觉理解提示（共269个）]:::data_collection
            C --> D{按难度对提示进行分类？}:::decision
            D -->|是| E[将100个提示归类为“硬性”]:::data_collection
            D -->|否| F[继续使用初始提示集]:::data_collection
            E --> G[收集模型的初始响应]:::data_collection
            F --> G
        end

        subgraph Annotation & Quality Control["标注与质量控制"]
            G --> H[专家编写黄金标准响应]:::annotation
            H --> I{审查黄金标准响应？}:::decision
            I -->|是| J[对专家标注进行质量检查]:::quality_control
            I -->|否| K[假定专家响应为最终结果]:::quality_control
            J --> L[根据反馈完善黄金标准响应]:::annotation
            K --> L
            L --> M[将黄金标准响应与提示集成]:::annotation
        end

        subgraph Evaluation & Validation["评估与验证"]
            M --> N[定义基准目标]:::evaluation
            N --> O[目标1：日常任务的情绪检查]:::evaluation
            N --> P[目标2：对前沿模型进行严格测试]:::evaluation
            O --> Q[针对Vibe-Eval基准测试模型]:::evaluation
            P --> Q
            Q --> R{分析硬性集合性能？}:::decision
            R -->|是| S[观察到前沿模型超过50%的错误答案]:::evaluation
            R -->|否| T[重新评估提示难度]:::evaluation
            S --> U[探索设计挑战性提示的细微之处]:::evaluation
            T --> U
            U --> V[讨论权衡：人工与自动评估]:::evaluation
            V --> W[将Reka Core自动评估与人工判断相关联]:::evaluation
        end

        subgraph Release & Access["发布与访问"]
            W --> X[提供免费API访问以进行轻量级评估]:::output
            X --> Y[计划对高性能模型进行正式人工评估]:::output
            Y --> Z[发布评估代码和数据]:::output
            Z --> end_node([结束]):::start_end
    end

    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    classDef output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    classDef decision fill:#ffffff,stroke:#000000,color:#000000

name: Video SimpleQA
intro: Video SimpleQA是一个旨在评估大型视频语言模型（LVLMs）事实性基础的综合基准。它通过多跳事实追溯问题、短形式确定性答案和时间定位要求，专注于视频上下文中的事实性评估。该基准要求模型整合视频显式叙述之外的外部知识，并对模型进行细粒度、逐步评估。研究发现，当前LVLMs在事实遵守方面存在显著缺陷，且模型普遍过度自信。
intro_en: Video SimpleQA is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the factual grounding of large video language models (LVLMs). It focuses on factual assessment within video contexts through multi-hop fact-tracing questions, short-form definitive answers, and temporal localization requirements. The benchmark requires models to integrate external knowledge beyond explicit video narration and provides fine-grained, step-by-step evaluation. Studies show that current LVLMs have significant deficiencies in factual compliance and tend to be overly confident.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing
        A([Start]) --> B[/Video Datasets/]
        B --> C{External Knowledge Required?}
        C -- Yes --> D[/External Knowledge Bases/]
        C -- No --> E[Proceed with Video Data]
    end

    subgraph Data Collection & Preprocessing
        E --> F[Select Video Segments]
        F --> G[Extract Key Frames/Events]
        G --> H{Multi-hop Fact-seeking Question Generation?}
        H -- Yes --> I[Generate Multi-hop Questions]
        H -- No --> J[Generate Single-hop Questions]
        I --> K[Generate Per-hop Sub-QAs]
        J --> L[Formulate Definitive Answers]
        K --> L
    end

    subgraph Annotation & Quality Control
        L --> M{Temporal Grounding Required?}
        M -- Yes --> N[Annotate Temporal Segments]
        M -- No --> O[Verify Answer Grounding]
        N --> O
        O --> P[Review for Factual Grounding]
        P --> Q{Factual Adherence Check (Threshold)?}
        Q -- Fail --> R[Revise Questions/Answers]
        R --> P
        Q -- Pass --> S[Evaluate Answer Unambiguity]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation & Final Benchmark
        S --> T[Evaluate LVLMs (33 models)]
        T --> U[Calculate F-score (e.g., 66.3%)]
        U --> V{Overconfidence Check?}
        V -- Yes --> W[Analyze Confidence vs. Accuracy]
        V -- No --> X[Benchmark Finalization]
        W --> X
        X --> Y([End])

name: Video-Holmes
intro: Video-Holmes是一个受福尔摩斯推理过程启发的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的复杂视频推理能力。它包含1,837个问题，这些问题来源于270部人工标注的悬疑短片，涵盖七个精心设计的任务。每个任务都要求模型主动定位并连接分散在不同视频片段中的多个相关视觉线索。对现有最先进MLLM的评估显示，它们在整合信息和发现关键线索方面存在显著困难。
org: ARC Lab, Tencent PCG, City University of Hong Kong
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
metric: Accuracy, SR, IMC, TCI, TA, MHR, PAR, CTI
intro_en: Video-Holmes is a benchmark inspired by Sherlock Holmes' reasoning process, designed to evaluate the complex video reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 1,837 questions derived from 270 manually annotated suspense short videos, covering seven carefully designed tasks. Each task requires the model to actively locate and connect multiple relevant visual clues scattered across different video segments. Evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals significant challenges in information integration and key clue discovery.
metric_en: Accuracy, SR, IMC, TCI, TA, MHR, PAR, CTI
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    style Start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style End fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style DataCollection fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style ProcessingFiltering fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style AnnotationLabeling fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style QualityControl fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style EvaluationMetrics fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style OutputResults fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    Start([Start Benchmark Construction]) --> DataSourcing[/Suspense Short Films/]

    subgraph Data Acquisition and Preparation
        DataSourcing --> DataCollection(Collect 270 Suspense Short Films)
        DataCollection --> FilmAnalysis(Analyze Films for Key Events & Causal Relationships)
        FilmAnalysis --> EventIdentification(Identify Key Events)
        FilmAnalysis --> CausalRelationshipMapping(Map Causal Relationships)
    end

    subgraph Task Design and Question Generation
        EventIdentification & CausalRelationshipMapping --> TaskDesign(Design Seven Carefully Crafted Tasks)
        TaskDesign --> QuestionGeneration(Generate 1,837 Questions)
        QuestionGeneration --> ClueLocation(Require Models to Locate Multiple Visual Clues)
        QuestionGeneration --> ClueConnection(Require Models to Connect Clues Across Segments)
    end

    subgraph Annotation and Quality Control
        ClueConnection --> ManualAnnotation(Manually Annotate Films for Questions)
        ManualAnnotation --> AnnotationReview{Review Annotation Quality?}
        AnnotationReview -- Yes --> AnnotationRefinement(Refine Annotations)
        AnnotationReview -- No --> QualityCheck(Perform Quality Control on Questions)
        AnnotationRefinement --> QualityCheck
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Validation and Evaluation
        QualityCheck --> BenchmarkAssembly(Assemble Video-Holmes Benchmark)
        BenchmarkAssembly --> ModelEvaluation(Evaluate State-of-the-Art MLLMs)
        ModelEvaluation --> PerformanceAnalysis(Analyze Model Performance: e.g., Gemini-2.5-Pro 45% Accuracy)
        PerformanceAnalysis --> ChallengeIdentification(Identify Challenges: Information Integration, Missing Clues)
    end

    ChallengeIdentification --> End([End Benchmark Construction])

    end

name: Video-MME
intro: Video-MME是一个全面的多模态大语言模型视频分析评测基准。它涵盖了从短视频到长达一小时的视频，包含6个视觉领域和30个子领域的900个视频，共计2700个问答对。该基准不仅评估视频内容，还结合了字幕和音频，旨在全面评估模型在处理时序视觉数据时的多模态理解能力。
org: Nanjing University, Tencent Youtu Lab, ByteDance, MME-Benchmarks
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
modality: 视频, 音频, 文本
intro_en: Video-MME is a comprehensive multimodal large language model video analysis benchmark. It covers videos ranging from short clips to one-hour-long footage, including 900 videos across 6 visual domains and 30 subdomains, with a total of 2700 QA pairs. The benchmark evaluates not only video content but also integrates subtitles and audio, aiming to thoroughly assess models' multimodal understanding of temporal visual data.

name: VideoMMMU
intro: Video-MMMU是一个多模态、多学科的视频基准测试，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）从教育视频中获取和利用知识的能力。它包含300个专家级视频和900个人工标注的问题，涵盖感知、理解和适应三个认知阶段，通过阶段对齐的问答对进行知识获取评估。该基准测试揭示了LMMs在认知需求增加时性能显著下降，并突显了模型与人类知识获取之间的巨大差距。
org: Kairui Hu, Penghao Wu, Fanyi Pu, Wang Xiao, Yuanhan Zhang, Xiang Yue, Bo Li, Ziwei Liu
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: Video-MMMU is a multimodal, multidisciplinary video benchmark designed to evaluate large multimodal models' (LMMs) ability to acquire and utilize knowledge from educational videos. It includes 300 expert-level videos and 900 manually annotated questions, covering three cognitive stages: perception, understanding, and adaptation. Knowledge acquisition is assessed through stage-aligned question-answer pairs. The benchmark reveals a significant performance drop in LMMs as cognitive demands increase and highlights the substantial gap between model and human knowledge acquisition.

    end

    subgraph QA Annotation
        FVC --> IA(Initial Annotation)
        IA --> QAD(Annotate 3 Qs per video, 10 options per MCQ)
        QAD --> QAC1(Annotators Cross-Check Questions)
        QAC1 --> QAF4{Inconsistent/Unclear Questions?}

    end

    subgraph Question Sourcing

    end

    subgraph Evaluation

    end
    end

name: VideoReasonBench
intro: VideoReasonBench是一个旨在评估以视觉为中心、复杂视频推理能力的基准。它通过包含一系列精细操作的视频来确保视觉丰富性和高推理复杂性，这些操作作用于视频中部分可见的潜在状态。该基准评估了回忆观察到的视觉信息、推断潜在状态内容以及预测视频之外信息这三个递进的视频推理技能级别。研究发现，大多数多模态大语言模型在此基准上表现不佳，且扩展思维预算对于提升性能至关重要。
org: Peking University, Moonshot AI, Nanjing University
intro_en: VideoReasonBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate visually-centered, complex video reasoning capabilities. It ensures visual richness and high reasoning complexity by including videos with a series of fine-grained operations acting on partially visible latent states. The benchmark assesses three progressive levels of video reasoning skills: recalling observed visual information, inferring latent state content, and predicting information beyond the video. Studies show that most multimodal large language models perform poorly on this benchmark, and scaling the reasoning budget is crucial for improving performance.

    end

name: VisFactor
intro: VisFactor是一个新颖的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）的基本视觉认知能力。它将Factor-Referenced Cognitive Test（FRCT）中20个以视觉为中心的子测试数字化，涵盖人类视觉认知的四个领域。该基准测试设计了算法，可以自动构建和验证具有可控难度的无限测试用例。通过VisFactor，研究人员评估了23个前沿MLLMs，发现模型在心理旋转、空间关系推理和图形-背景区分等任务上表现不佳，表明现有通用基准测试的改进可能未能真正掌握类人视觉认知。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Tencent AI Lab, Nanyang Technological U
build_method: 考试题改编, 自动生成
modality: 图像, 文本, 多模态
task_type: 视觉推理, 图像问答
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: VisFactor is a novel benchmark designed to evaluate the fundamental visual cognition abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It digitizes 20 visually-centered subtests from the Factor-Referenced Cognitive Test (FRCT), covering four domains of human visual cognition. The benchmark includes algorithms that automatically generate and validate unlimited test cases with controllable difficulty. Using VisFactor, researchers assessed 23 state-of-the-art MLLMs and found that models performed poorly on tasks such as mental rotation, spatial relation reasoning, and figure-ground discrimination, indicating that improvements in existing general benchmarks may not truly capture human-like visual cognition.

        style P fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        P --> Q[/真实答案/]
        style Q fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Reducing Chance-Level Accuracy["降低偶然准确率"]
        J & Q --> R{平均随机猜测准确率 > 2.89%?}
        style R fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        R -- 是 --> S(修改测试格式)
        style S fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        S --> T(分解多项选择) --> U[/降低偶然准确率 (3.13%)/]
        style T fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style U fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        S --> V(分组一致性项目) --> W[/降低偶然准确率 (0.23%-3.13%)/]
        style V fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style W fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        S --> X(对称变体) --> Y[/降低偶然准确率 (6.25%)/]
        style X fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style Y fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        S --> Z(SS3和VZ3的特殊重写) --> AA[/降低偶然准确率 (1%-3.65%)/]
        style Z fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        style AA fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        R -- 否 --> AB(沿用原始格式)
        style AB fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Synthetic Augmentation["合成增强"]
        N & J --> AC(识别用于参数化生成的子测试)
        style AC fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        AC --> AD(设计有效问答对的算法)
        style AD fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        AD --> AE(实现S2立方体比较算法)
        style AE fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        AD --> AF(实现VZ2纸张折叠算法)
        style AF fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        AE & AF --> AG(调整参数以控制难度)
        style AG fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        AG --> AH[/无限的难度可控测试实例/]
        style AH fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Evaluation["评估"]
        AH --> AI(选择23个前沿MLLM)
        style AI fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AI --> AJ(配置超参数和提示)
        style AJ fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AJ --> AK(执行零样本评估，3次重试)
        style AK fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AK --> AL[/模型输出/]
        style AL fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        AL --> AM(应用统一评估协议)
        style AM fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AM --> AN(标准化是/否输出)
        style AN fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AM --> AO(匹配多项选择选项)
        style AO fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AM --> AP(填空题的精确数字匹配)
        style AP fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AM --> AQ(CS1, CS3, CS2的特殊处理)
        style AQ fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AN & AO & AP & AQ --> AR[/单独测试分数/]
        style AR fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        AR --> AS(计算总分：20个测试的平均值)
        style AS fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        AS --> AT[/VisFactor基准测试结果/]
        style AT fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    AT --> end_node([结束])
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

name: Visual Puzzles
intro: VisualPuzzles是一个多模态基准测试，旨在评估大型模型的推理能力，同时尽量减少对领域特定知识的依赖。它包含1168个多样化的谜题，涵盖算法、类比、演绎、归纳和空间推理五种类别。该基准测试的问题主要来源于人工翻译的中国公务员考试逻辑推理题，旨在更清晰地评估模型在视觉推理方面的能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 考试题改编
intro_en: VisualPuzzles is a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate large models' reasoning abilities while minimizing reliance on domain-specific knowledge. It includes 1,168 diverse puzzles across five categories: algorithmic, analogy, deductive, inductive, and spatial reasoning. The questions are primarily sourced from manually translated Chinese civil service exam logic reasoning problems, aiming to more clearly assess models' visual reasoning capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start_node([Start])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Initial Collection"]
        A[Identify diverse sources] -->|Online resources, textbooks| B(Collect logical, visual, spatial puzzles)
        A -->|Large-scale vision datasets| C(Synthesize items with images & text prompts)
        A -->|Existing benchmarks| D(Repurpose multimodal reasoning items)
        A -->|Chinese Civil Service Exam| E(Manually translate logical reasoning questions)
        B --> F{Initial Question Pool}
        C --> F
        D --> F
        E --> F
    end
    style Phase1 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase2["Format Adaptation & Standardization"]
        F --> G(Adapt to consistent multiple-choice format)
        G --> H(Ensure 4 options per question)
        H --> I(Balance text-based vs. image-based options)
        I --> J[/Formatted Question Set/]
    end
    style Phase2 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase3["Data Validation & Filtering"]
        J --> K{Apply strict filtering criteria}
        K -->|Requires advanced math?| L(Eliminate questions with advanced math)
        K -->|Requires specialized domain knowledge?| M(Eliminate questions with specialized domain knowledge)
        K -->|Requires external facts?| N(Eliminate questions with external facts)
        L --> O{Retain if solvable with image, prompt, common sense}
        M --> O
        N --> O
        O --> P(Multi-round human annotator validation)
        P --> Q(Focus on clarity, solvability, reasoning type)
        Q --> R[/Validated Question Set/]
    end
    style Phase3 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase4["Attribute Annotation"]
        R --> S(Annotate Reasoning Category)
        S --> S1(Algorithmic Reasoning)
        S --> S2(Analogical Reasoning)
        S --> S3(Deductive Reasoning)
        S --> S4(Inductive Reasoning)
        S --> S5(Spatial Reasoning)
        S1 & S2 & S3 & S4 & S5 --> T(Annotate Difficulty Level)
        T --> T1(Easy: 46%)
        T --> T2(Medium: 39%)
        T --> T3(Hard: 15%)
        T1 & T2 & T3 --> U[/Annotated Benchmark Data/]
    end
    style Phase4 fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase5["Final Benchmark & Evaluation"]
        U --> V(Compile 1168 multimodal reasoning puzzles)
        V --> W(Ensure balanced distribution across categories)
        W --> X(Ensure balanced distribution across difficulty)
        X --> Y(Ensure balanced option types: 57% Image, 43% Text)
        Y --> Z(Minimize domain-specific knowledge)
        Z --> AA(Maintain high reasoning complexity: 82.1% logical steps)
        AA --> end_node([End: VisualPuzzles Benchmark])
    end
    style Phase5 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    start_node([开始])
    style start_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["数据来源与初步收集"]
        A[识别多样化来源] -->|在线资源, 教科书| B(收集逻辑、视觉、空间谜题)
        A -->|大规模视觉数据集| C(使用图像和文本提示合成项目)
        A -->|现有基准| D(重新利用多模态推理项目)
        A -->|中国公务员考试| E(人工翻译逻辑推理题)
        B --> F{初始问题池}
        C --> F
        D --> F
        E --> F
    end
    style Phase1 fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase2["格式调整与标准化"]
        F --> G(调整为统一的多项选择格式)
        G --> H(确保每个问题有4个选项)
        H --> I(平衡基于文本和基于图像的选项)
        I --> J[/格式化问题集/]
    end
    style Phase2 fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase3["数据验证与筛选"]
        J --> K{应用严格的筛选标准}
        K -->|需要高级数学知识?| L(淘汰需要高级数学的问题)
        K -->|需要专业领域知识?| M(淘汰需要专业领域知识的问题)
        K -->|需要外部事实?| N(淘汰需要外部事实的问题)
        L --> O{如果能用图像、提示和常识解决则保留}
        M --> O
        N --> O
        O --> P(多轮人工标注者验证)
        P --> Q(关注清晰度、可解性、推理类型)
        Q --> R[/已验证问题集/]
    end
    style Phase3 fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase4["属性标注"]
        R --> S(标注推理类别)
        S --> S1(算法推理)
        S --> S2(类比推理)
        S --> S3(演绎推理)
        S --> S4(归纳推理)
        S --> S5(空间推理)
        S1 & S2 & S3 & S4 & S5 --> T(标注难度级别)
        T --> T1(简单: 46%)
        T --> T2(中等: 39%)
        T --> T3(困难: 15%)
        T1 & T2 & T3 --> U[/已标注基准数据/]
    end
    style Phase4 fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase5["最终基准与评估"]
        U --> V(编译1168个多模态推理谜题)
        V --> W(确保类别分布均衡)
        W --> X(确保难度分布均衡)
        X --> Y(确保选项类型均衡: 57%图像, 43%文本)
        Y --> Z(最小化领域特定知识)
        Z --> AA(保持高推理复杂性: 82.1%逻辑步骤)
        AA --> end_node([结束: VisualPuzzles基准])
    end
    style Phase5 fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    style end_node fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

name: VisuLogic
intro: VisuLogic是一个旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）视觉推理能力的新基准。它包含1000个经过人工验证的问题，涵盖六个类别，旨在避免基于语言的推理捷径，从而更严格地评估视觉推理能力。该基准测试揭示了当前MLLMs在视觉推理方面存在的显著差距，大多数模型准确率低于30%。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Xi'an Jiaotong University, Zhejiang University, Shang
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
eval_feature: 防污染, 视觉中心逻辑
intro_en: VisuLogic is a new benchmark designed to evaluate the visual reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 1,000 manually verified questions across six categories, aiming to avoid language-based reasoning shortcuts for a more rigorous assessment of visual reasoning. The benchmark reveals significant gaps in current MLLMs' visual reasoning, with most models scoring below 30% accuracy.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start]):::start_end

    subgraph Data Sourcing and Initial Design
        A[Define Visual Reasoning Scope]:::data_collection
        B[Identify 6 Core Reasoning Categories]:::data_collection
        C[Design Problem Templates for Each Category]:::data_collection
    end

    subgraph Problem Generation and Curation
        D[/Initial Problem Pool Generation/]:::data_input_output
        E{Is Problem Visually Ambiguous?}:::decision
        F[Refine Problem for Clarity]:::processing
        G[Generate Diverse Visual Scenarios]:::data_collection
        H[Create Multiple-Choice Options]:::data_collection
        I{Are Options Linguistically Biased?}:::decision
        J[Adjust Options to Prevent Shortcuts]:::processing
    end

    subgraph Human Verification and Quality Control
        K[/Human Annotator Review/]:::data_input_output
        L{Is Problem Human-Verified?}:::decision
        M[Correct or Discard Problem]:::quality_control
        N[Categorize into 24 Subcategories]:::processing
        O[Ensure 1,000 Meticulously Curated Questions]:::quality_control
    end

    subgraph Benchmark Finalization and Evaluation
        P[Format Data to OpenAI JSONL]:::processing
        Q[/VisuLogic Benchmark (1,000 Problems)/]:::data_input_output
        R[Evaluate Leading MLLMs]:::evaluation
        S[Analyze MLLM Performance (<30% Accuracy)]:::evaluation
        T[Identify Common Failure Modes]:::evaluation
        U[Develop Supplementary Training Dataset]:::data_collection
        V[Implement RL Baseline for Improvement]:::processing
        W[Open-Source Code, Data, Baselines]:::output
    end

    start --> A
    A --> B
    B --> C
    C --> D
    D --> E
    E -- Yes --> F
    F --> D
    E -- No --> G
    G --> H
    H --> I

    J --> G
    I -- No --> K
    K --> L

    M --> K
    L -- Yes --> N

    O --> P
    P --> Q
    Q --> R
    R --> S
    S --> T
    T --> U
    U --> V
    V --> W
    W --> end([End]):::start_end

name: VitaBench
intro: VitaBench是一个旨在评估LLM代理在真实世界交互任务中表现的基准测试。它通过模拟外卖、店内消费和在线旅游服务等日常应用场景，构建了一个包含66种工具的复杂仿真环境。该基准测试包含100个跨场景任务和300个单场景任务，旨在评估代理处理复杂信息、利用多样资源和管理动态用户交互的能力。
scale: 100个跨场景任务, 300个单场景任务
intro_en: VitaBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate LLM agents' performance in real-world interactive tasks. It simulates everyday application scenarios such as food delivery, in-store dining, and online travel services, creating a complex simulation environment with 66 tools. The benchmark includes 100 cross-scenario tasks and 300 single-scenario tasks, aiming to assess agents' abilities to handle complex information, utilize diverse resources, and manage dynamic user interactions.

        D --> E

name: VivaBench
intro: VivaBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在多轮对话中表现的基准测试，特别关注模型在长期交互中保持一致性和质量的能力。
metric: 准确率, 精确率/召回率, 置信度分数
intro_en: VivaBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' performance in multi-turn conversations, with a focus on the models' ability to maintain consistency and quality over long interactions.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph "1. Data Sourcing & Collection"
        A([Start Benchmark Construction])
        A -->|Initiate| B[/Identify Public Dialogue Datasets/]
        B -->|Source Data| C[/Collect Multi-turn Conversation Data/]
        C -->|Integrate| D[/Gather LLM Interaction Logs/]
    end

    subgraph "2. Data Preprocessing & Filtering"
        D -->|Process| E(Clean Raw Text Data)
        E -->|Sanitize| F(Remove PII and Sensitive Information)
        F -->|Filter| G(Filter Irrelevant Conversations)
        G -->|Check Length| H{Is conversation length > 5 turns?}
        H -->|Yes| I(Normalize Dialogue Format)
        H -->|No| J(Discard Short Conversations)
        J --> K(Log Discarded Data)
    end

    subgraph "3. Conversation Generation & Annotation"
        I -->|Prepare| L(Generate Diverse Conversation Prompts)
        L -->|Simulate| M(Simulate LLM Responses for Initial Turns)
        M -->|Human Review| N(Human Annotation: Evaluate Response Quality)
        N -->|Expert Input| O(Human Annotation: Identify Challenging Scenarios)
        O -->|Automate| P(Automated Annotation: Extract Key Entities)
    end

    subgraph "4. Quality Control & Validation"
        P -->|Review| Q(Review Annotated Data for Consistency)
        Q -->|Check Threshold| R{Annotation Agreement > 80%?}
        R -->|Yes| S(Validate Conversation Flow)
        R -->|No| T(Re-annotate Discrepancies)
        T --> N
        S -->|Expert Validation| U(Expert Review of Challenging Cases)
    end

    subgraph "5. Benchmark Finalization & Evaluation"
        U -->|Compile| V(Compile Final Benchmark Dataset)
        V -->|Define Metrics| W(Define Evaluation Metrics: Fluency, Coherence, Engagement)
        W -->|Test LLMs| X(Run LLMs Against Benchmark)
        X -->|Calculate Scores| Y(Calculate Performance Scores)
        Y -->|Generate Report| Z[/Generate Benchmark Report/]
        Z --> AA([End Benchmark Construction])
    end

    style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        Z --> AA([结束基准构建])
    end

name: VQA-RAD
intro: VQA-RAD是首个由临床医生手工构建的放射学视觉问答数据集，包含315张放射学图像和3515个临床医生自然提问，涵盖头部、胸部、腹部等多个解剖区域，旨在推动医学VQA技术发展。
build_method: 人工标注，临床医生手工构建
eval_feature: 首个临床医生手工构建的放射学VQA数据集
eval_feature_en: The first radiology VQA dataset manually constructed by clinicians
intro_en: VQA-RAD is the first radiology visual question answering dataset manually constructed by clinicians, containing 315 radiology images and 3,515 natural questions from clinicians. It covers multiple anatomical regions including the head, chest, and abdomen, aiming to advance medical VQA technology.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Radiology Image Sources) --> B[Image Collection]
    B --> C[Image Selection & Anonymization]
    C --> D[Doctor-posed Q&A Generation]
    D --> E{Annotation Quality Check}
    E -- Pass --> F[Expert Review & Validation]
    E -- Fail --> G[Annotation Refinement]
    G --> D
    F --> H(VQA-RAD Dataset)
    H --> I[VQA Model Evaluation]
    I --> J(Improved Patient Care)

name: VSI-Bench
intro: VSI-Bench是一个新颖的、基于视频的视觉空间智能基准，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在从序列视觉观察中记忆空间方面的能力。该基准包含超过5,000个问答对，发现MLLMs表现出有竞争力但低于人类的视觉空间智能。研究表明，空间推理能力是MLLMs性能提升的主要瓶颈，而显式生成认知地图可以增强其空间距离能力。
intro_en: VSI-Bench is a novel video-based visual spatial intelligence benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to remember spatial information from sequential visual observations. The benchmark includes over 5,000 QA pairs and finds that MLLMs demonstrate competitive but subhuman visual spatial intelligence. The study shows that spatial reasoning is the main bottleneck for MLLM performance, while explicitly generating cognitive maps can enhance their spatial distance capabilities.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Data Sourcing and Unification["Data Sourcing and Unification"]
        A([Start]) --> B[/Raw 3D Indoor Scene Datasets/]
        B --> C(Collect ScanNet, ScanNet++, ARKitScenes)
        C --> D{Are datasets unified?}
        D -- Yes --> E(Standardize to Unified Meta-Information Structure)
        D -- No --> F(Parse Dataset Meta-Information: Object Categories, Bounding Boxes, Video Specs)
        F --> E
        E --> G[/Unified Meta-Information Data/]
    end

    subgraph QA Generation["QA Generation"]
        G --> H{Task Type?}
        H -- Route Plan --> I(Human Annotation for Route Plan Task)
        H -- Other Tasks --> J(Auto-Annotate based on Meta-Information and Question Templates)
        I --> K(Design and Refine Question Templates)
        J --> K
        K --> L(Provide Guidelines for Human Annotators)
        L --> M[/Preliminary QA Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Quality Control["Quality Control"]
        M --> N{Are QA pairs ambiguous or erroneous?}
        N -- Yes --> O(Human Evaluators Flag Issues)
        O --> P(Trace Error Source)
        P --> Q{Error Type?}
        Q -- Data Sample Issue --> R(Remove Problematic Data Sample)
        Q -- Meta-info/Template/Rule Issue --> S(Modify Meta-Information, Question Template, or QA Rule)
        R --> N
        S --> N
        N -- No --> T(Iteratively Update Benchmark)
        T --> U[/High-Quality QA Pairs/]
    end

    subgraph Evaluation Setup["Evaluation Setup"]
        U --> V(Select 15 Video-Supporting MLLMs)
        V --> W(Evaluate Proprietary Models: Gemini-1.5, GPT-4o)
        V --> X(Evaluate Open-Source Models: InternVL2, ViLA, LongViLA, LongVA, LLaVA-OneVision, LLaVA-NeXT-Video)
        W --> Y(Conduct Zero-Shot Evaluation with Default Prompts)
        X --> Y
        Y --> Z(Use Greedy Decoding for Reproducibility)
        Z --> AA{Ground-Truth Answer Type?}
        AA -- Verbal --> BB(Apply Accuracy for Multiple-Choice Answer Tasks)
        AA -- Numerical --> CC(Apply Mean Relative Accuracy for Numerical Answer Tasks)
        BB --> DD(Evaluate against Chance Level Baselines: Random, Frequency)
        CC --> DD
        DD --> EE(Evaluate Human Level Performance on VSI-Bench (tiny) - 400 questions)
        EE --> FF[/Evaluation Results/]
    end

    FF --> GG([End])

name: We-Math
intro: We-Math是一个旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）视觉数学推理能力的基准。它超越了传统的端到端性能评估，深入探究模型在知识获取和泛化方面的潜在原理。该基准包含6.5K个视觉数学问题，涵盖67个分层知识概念和五层知识粒度。We-Math引入了四维指标（IK、IG、CM、RM），以分层评估LMMs推理过程中的固有问题。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications
metric: Insufficient Knowledge (IK), Inadequate Generalization (IG), Complete Mastery (CM), Rote Memorizatio
intro_en: We-Math is a benchmark designed to evaluate the visual mathematical reasoning abilities of large multimodal models (LMMs). It goes beyond traditional end-to-end performance assessment to explore the underlying principles of models' knowledge acquisition and generalization. The benchmark includes 6.5K visual math problems covering 67 hierarchical knowledge concepts across five levels of knowledge granularity. We-Math introduces four-dimensional metrics (IK, IG, CM, RM) to hierarchically assess inherent issues in LMMs' reasoning processes.
metric_en: Insufficient Knowledge (IK), Inadequate Generalization (IG), Complete Mastery (CM), Rote Memorizatio
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    subgraph A[Benchmark Initialization]
        start([Start])
        start --> input_desc[/We-Math: Evaluate LMMs' mathematical reasoning beyond end-to-end performance/]
        input_desc --> problem_statement{Focus on problem-solving principles?}
        problem_statement -- Yes --> design_benchmark(Design benchmark for human-like reasoning)
        problem_statement -- No --> end_init([End Initialization])
    end

    subgraph B[Data Collection & Categorization]
        design_benchmark --> data_source[/6.5K Visual Math Problems/]
        data_source -- Collect --> collect_problems(Meticulously Collect Problems)
        collect_problems --> categorize_problems(Categorize Problems)
        categorize_problems -- 67 Concepts, 5 Layers --> concept_hierarchy{Establish Knowledge Hierarchy}
        concept_hierarchy --> decompose_problems(Decompose Composite Problems into Sub-problems)
        decompose_problems --> problem_set[/Structured Problem Set/]
    end

    subgraph C[Metric Definition & Assessment]
        problem_set --> define_metrics(Define 4D Metric: IK, IG, CM, RM)
        define_metrics --> assess_issues(Hierarchically Assess LMMs' Reasoning Issues)
        assess_issues --> metric_output[/Assessment Results/]
    end

    subgraph D[LMM Evaluation & Analysis]
        metric_output --> evaluate_lmms(Thoroughly Evaluate Existing LMMs)
        evaluate_lmms --> analyze_correlation{Negative correlation between solving steps and performance?}
        analyze_correlation -- Yes --> confirm_ik(Confirm IK improved by knowledge augmentation)
        analyze_correlation -- No --> re_evaluate(Re-evaluate LMMs)
        confirm_ik --> gpt4o_transition(GPT-4o: IK to IG, Knowledge Generalization)
        confirm_ik --> other_lmms(Other LMMs: Rote Memorization, Fail Sub-problems)
        gpt4o_transition --> insights[/Key Insights on LMMs/]
        other_lmms --> insights
    end

    subgraph E[Benchmark Finalization]
        insights --> open_pathways(Open New Pathways for Advancements)
        open_pathways --> data_code_release(Release WE-MATH Data and Evaluation Code)
        data_code_release --> end_benchmark([End Benchmark Construction])
    end

    style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_init fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_benchmark fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style data_source fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style collect_problems fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style categorize_problems fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style decompose_problems fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    style define_metrics fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style assess_issues fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

    style evaluate_lmms fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

    style problem_set fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    style metric_output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    style insights fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    subgraph A[基准初始化]
        start([开始])
        start --> input_desc[/We-Math: 评估大型多模态模型超越端到端性能的数学推理能力/]
        input_desc --> problem_statement{关注解决问题的原则？}
        problem_statement -- 是 --> design_benchmark(设计类人推理基准)
        problem_statement -- 否 --> end_init([结束初始化])
    end

    subgraph B[数据收集与分类]
        design_benchmark --> data_source[/6.5K 视觉数学问题/]
        data_source -- 收集 --> collect_problems(精心收集问题)
        collect_problems --> categorize_problems(分类问题)
        categorize_problems -- 67 概念, 5 层 --> concept_hierarchy{建立知识层次结构}
        concept_hierarchy --> decompose_problems(将复合问题分解为子问题)
        decompose_problems --> problem_set[/结构化问题集/]
    end

    subgraph C[指标定义与评估]
        problem_set --> define_metrics(定义四维指标: IK, IG, CM, RM)
        define_metrics --> assess_issues(分层评估大型多模态模型推理中的固有问题)
        assess_issues --> metric_output[/评估结果/]
    end

    subgraph D[大型多模态模型评估与分析]
        metric_output --> evaluate_lmms(彻底评估现有大型多模态模型)
        evaluate_lmms --> analyze_correlation{解决步骤与性能之间存在负相关？}
        analyze_correlation -- 是 --> confirm_ik(确认 IK 可通过知识增强策略有效改进)
        analyze_correlation -- 否 --> re_evaluate(重新评估大型多模态模型)
        confirm_ik --> gpt4o_transition(GPT-4o: 从 IK 到 IG，知识泛化)
        confirm_ik --> other_lmms(其他大型多模态模型: 死记硬背，无法回答子问题)
        gpt4o_transition --> insights[/大型多模态模型的关键见解/]
        other_lmms --> insights
    end

    subgraph E[基准最终确定]
        insights --> open_pathways(开辟视觉数学推理新途径)
        open_pathways --> data_code_release(发布 We-Math 数据和评估代码)
        data_code_release --> end_benchmark([结束基准构建])
    end

    style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_init fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style end_benchmark fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style data_source fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    style collect_problems fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    style categorize_problems fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    style decompose_problems fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

    style define_metrics fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
    style assess_issues fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

    style evaluate_lmms fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

    style problem_set fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    style metric_output fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    style insights fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

name: WebArena
intro: WebArena是一个为构建自主智能体而设计的真实网络环境。它提供了来自电子商务、社交论坛、协作软件开发和内容管理等四个常见领域的全功能网站。该基准测试包含多样化、长周期的任务，旨在模拟人类在互联网上日常执行的任务，并评估任务完成的功能正确性。
intro_en: WebArena is a real-world web environment designed for building autonomous agents. It provides fully functional websites from four common domains: e-commerce, social forums, collaborative software development, and content management. This benchmark includes diverse, long-duration tasks aimed at simulating everyday human activities on the internet and evaluating the functional correctness of task completion.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Real-world Web Domains] --> B(Initial Task Scoping)
    B --> C{{Expert Task Design}}
    C --> D[Task Specification & Scripting]
    D --> E(Raw WebArena Tasks)
    E --> F{{Self-hosted Web Environment}}
    F --> G{Manual Task Verification}
    G -->|Pass| H(Verified WebArena Tasks)
    G -->|Fail| I[Task Refinement]
    I --> D
    H --> J[Agent Capability Evaluation]
    J --> K(Agent Performance Logs)
    K --> L[Performance Analysis & Reporting]

        A([Start])
        style A fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

        B[/Input: Real-world Web Scenarios/]
        style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        style H fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        style I fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

name: WebTailBench
intro: WebTailBench是一个全面的评估基准，旨在评估计算机代理（CUA）模型在各种真实世界网页任务中的表现。它特别关注现有基准中代表性不足的任务类型，包括11个类别的609个手工验证任务，例如房地产、求职和多步骤工作流程。此外，它还包含111个有害任务，以评估代理拒绝不安全请求的能力。
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: WebTailBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the performance of computer agent (CUA) models on a variety of real-world web tasks. It focuses on task types underrepresented in existing benchmarks, featuring 609 manually verified tasks across 11 categories such as real estate, job hunting, and multi-step workflows. Additionally, it includes 111 harmful tasks to assess agents' ability to refuse unsafe requests.
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD
    start([Start Benchmark Construction]) style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["Data Sourcing & Collection"]
        A[Identify Potential Data Sources] --> B[Collect Raw Data] style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        B --> C{Data Volume Sufficient?} style C fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C -- No --> A
        C -- Yes --> D[Perform Initial Data Cleaning] style D fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase2["Data Processing & Preparation"]
        D --> E[Data Normalization & Transformation] style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E --> F[Feature Engineering & Extraction] style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        F --> G{Data Quality Check Passed?} style G fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        G -- No --> D
        G -- Yes --> H[Split Dataset (Train/Validation/Test)] style H fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase3["Agent Integration & Evaluation"]
        H --> I[Integrate Computer Agents] style I fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        I --> J[Define Evaluation Metrics] style J fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        J --> K[Execute Agent Performance Tests] style K fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        K --> L[Collect Performance Data] style L fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase4["Quality Control & Validation"]
        L --> M[Analyze Performance Results] style M fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        M --> N{Results Meet Criteria?} style N fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        N -- No --> I[Refine Agents/Metrics] style I fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        N -- Yes --> O[Cross-Validation & Benchmarking] style O fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase5["Benchmark Finalization"]
        O --> P[Document Benchmark Specifications] style P fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
        P --> Q[Publish Benchmark & Resources] style Q fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff
    end

    start --> A
    Q --> end([End Benchmark Construction]) style end fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD
    start([开始基准构建]) style start fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

    subgraph Phase1["数据源与收集"]
        A[识别潜在数据源] --> B[收集原始数据] style B fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        B --> C{数据量是否充足?} style C fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
        C -- 否 --> A
        C -- 是 --> D[执行初步数据清洗] style D fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase2["数据处理与准备"]
        D --> E[数据标准化与转换] style E fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        E --> F[特征工程与提取] style F fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        F --> G{数据质量检查通过?} style G fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
        G -- 否 --> D
        G -- 是 --> H[数据集划分 (训练/验证/测试)] style H fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase3["智能体集成与评估"]
        H --> I[集成计算机智能体] style I fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        I --> J[定义评估指标] style J fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        J --> K[执行智能体性能测试] style K fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
        K --> L[收集性能数据] style L fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph Phase4["质量控制与验证"]
        L --> M[分析性能结果] style M fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        M --> N{结果符合标准?} style N fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
        N -- 否 --> I[优化智能体/指标] style I fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff
        N -- 是 --> O[交叉验证与基准测试] style O fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

        O --> P[编写基准规范文档] style P fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

    end

    start --> A
    Q --> end([结束基准构建]) style end fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

name: WideSearch
intro: WideSearch评测大型语言模型驱动代理在广泛信息检索任务中的能力。包含200个手工筛选的问题（100英文、100中文），涵盖15个以上领域，基于真实用户查询。任务要求代理收集大量可逐条验证的原子信息，并组织成结构化输出。
org: Institute of Automation, CAS, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, ByteDance Seed, TikTok, UC
task_type: Agent任务, 开放式问答, 生成
intro_en: WideSearch evaluates the ability of large language model-driven agents in extensive information retrieval tasks. It includes 200 manually curated questions (100 in English, 100 in Chinese) across more than 15 domains, based on real user queries. The task requires agents to gather a large amount of verifiable atomic information and organize it into structured outputs.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Real User Queries) --> B[Initial Query Collection]
    B --> C{Query Relevance Filtering}
    C -- Irrelevant --> D[Discard]
    C -- Relevant --> E[Manual Curation by Experts]
    E --> F[Domain Categorization]
    F --> G[Language Separation]
    G --> H[Question Refinement]
    H --> I{Quality Check}
    I -- Fail --> E
    I -- Pass --> J(Final Curated Questions)
    J --> K(WideSearch Dataset)
    K --> L[Agent Information Retrieval Task]
    L --> M[Performance Evaluation]
    M --> N[Agent Capability Assessment]
flowchart_en:
flowchart TD

    subgraph "1. Initial Data Sourcing & Refinement"
        start_sourcing([Start])
        style start_sourcing fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        data_queries[/Real User Queries/]
        style data_queries fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        human_screen(Human Screening & Selection)
        style human_screen fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        meets_principles{Meets WideSearch Principles?}
        style meets_principles fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        refine_questions(Refine Candidate Questions)
        style refine_questions fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        start_sourcing --> data_queries
        data_queries --> human_screen
        human_screen --> meets_principles
        meets_principles -- Yes --> refine_questions
        meets_principles -- No --> discard_sourcing([Discard Task])
        style discard_sourcing fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "2. Gold Standard Creation"
        assign_annotator(Assign to Human Annotator)
        style assign_annotator fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        web_search(Exhaustive Web Search)
        style web_search fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        compile_answer(Compile Gold-Standard Answer)
        style compile_answer fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        record_kpis(Record KPIs: Time, Queries, Keywords, Pages)
        style record_kpis fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        refine_questions --> assign_annotator
        assign_annotator --> web_search
        web_search --> compile_answer
        compile_answer --> record_kpis
    end

    subgraph "3. Filtering & Pruning"
        parametric_test(Parametric Knowledge Test (LLMs))
        style parametric_test fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        llm_solves{LLM Solves?}
        style llm_solves fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        discard_llm([Discard Task])
        style discard_llm fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        difficulty_assessment(Difficulty Assessment)
        style difficulty_assessment fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        meets_threshold{Meets Complexity Threshold?}
        style meets_threshold fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        discard_difficulty([Discard Task])
        style discard_difficulty fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        record_kpis --> parametric_test
        parametric_test --> llm_solves
        llm_solves -- Yes --> discard_llm
        llm_solves -- No --> difficulty_assessment
        difficulty_assessment --> meets_threshold
        meets_threshold -- No --> discard_difficulty
    end

    subgraph "4. Final Validation"
        provisional_benchmark[/Provisional Benchmark/]
        style provisional_benchmark fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

        agentic_response(Agentic System Response Generation)
        style agentic_response fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        automated_eval(Automated Evaluation)
        style automated_eval fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

        human_eval(Human Expert Evaluation)
        style human_eval fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

        compare_results{Automated vs. Human Similarity >= 95%?}
        style compare_results fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        flag_revision(Flag for Revision)
        style flag_revision fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        end_validation([End])
        style end_validation fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        meets_threshold -- Yes --> provisional_benchmark
        provisional_benchmark --> agentic_response
        agentic_response --> automated_eval
        agentic_response --> human_eval
        automated_eval & human_eval --> compare_results
        compare_results -- No --> flag_revision
        flag_revision --> assign_annotator
        compare_results -- Yes --> end_validation
    end
flowchart_zh:
flowchart TD

    subgraph "1. 初始数据来源与精炼"
        start_sourcing([开始])
        style start_sourcing fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        data_queries[/真实用户查询/]
        style data_queries fill:#0d3b66,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        human_screen(人工筛选与选择)
        style human_screen fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        meets_principles{符合WideSearch原则?}
        style meets_principles fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        refine_questions(精炼候选问题)
        style refine_questions fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        start_sourcing --> data_queries
        data_queries --> human_screen
        human_screen --> meets_principles
        meets_principles -- 是 --> refine_questions
        meets_principles -- 否 --> discard_sourcing([丢弃任务])
        style discard_sourcing fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    end

    subgraph "2. 金标准创建"
        assign_annotator(分配给人工标注员)
        style assign_annotator fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        web_search(详尽的网页搜索)
        style web_search fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        compile_answer(编译金标准答案)
        style compile_answer fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        record_kpis(记录关键绩效指标: 时间, 查询, 关键词, 页面)
        style record_kpis fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        refine_questions --> assign_annotator
        assign_annotator --> web_search
        web_search --> compile_answer
        compile_answer --> record_kpis
    end

    subgraph "3. 过滤与修剪"
        parametric_test(参数知识测试 (LLMs))
        style parametric_test fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        llm_solves{LLM解决?}
        style llm_solves fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        discard_llm([丢弃任务])
        style discard_llm fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        difficulty_assessment(难度评估)
        style difficulty_assessment fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        meets_threshold{符合复杂性阈值?}
        style meets_threshold fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        discard_difficulty([丢弃任务])
        style discard_difficulty fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        record_kpis --> parametric_test
        parametric_test --> llm_solves
        llm_solves -- 是 --> discard_llm
        llm_solves -- 否 --> difficulty_assessment
        difficulty_assessment --> meets_threshold
        meets_threshold -- 否 --> discard_difficulty
    end

    subgraph "4. 最终验证"
        provisional_benchmark[/临时基准/]
        style provisional_benchmark fill:#1a3a4a,stroke:#3498db,color:#fff

        agentic_response(代理系统响应生成)
        style agentic_response fill:#1b4332,stroke:#52b788,color:#fff

        automated_eval(自动化评估)
        style automated_eval fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

        human_eval(人工专家评估)
        style human_eval fill:#2d4a22,stroke:#27ae60,color:#fff

        compare_results{自动化与人工相似度 >= 95%?}
        style compare_results fill:#3d1a78,stroke:#9b59b6,color:#fff

        flag_revision(标记修订)
        style flag_revision fill:#7d2a2a,stroke:#e74c3c,color:#fff

        end_validation([结束])
        style end_validation fill:#1a1a2e,stroke:#4a90d9,color:#fff

        meets_threshold -- 是 --> provisional_benchmark
        provisional_benchmark --> agentic_response
        agentic_response --> automated_eval
        agentic_response --> human_eval
        automated_eval & human_eval --> compare_results
        compare_results -- 否 --> flag_revision
        flag_revision --> assign_annotator
        compare_results -- 是 --> end_validation
    end

name: Wiki Live Challenge
intro: Wiki Live Challenge是一个实时基准，旨在评估深度研究代理（DRA）生成专家级维基百科文章的能力。该基准利用最新的维基百科优良条目（Good Articles）作为专家级参考，并提出了包含39个写作质量标准和事实可验证性指标的Wiki Eval评估框架。实验表明，现有DRA与人类专家水平存在显著差距，验证了WLC在推动智能体研究方面的有效性。
org: University of Science and Technology of China
eval_feature: 动态, 实时, 防污染
intro_en: Wiki Live Challenge is a real-time benchmark designed to evaluate Deep Research Agents' (DRA) ability to generate expert-level Wikipedia articles. It uses the latest Wikipedia Good Articles as expert references and introduces the Wiki Eval evaluation framework, which includes 39 writing quality criteria and factual verifiability metrics. Experiments show a significant gap between current DRAs and human experts, validating WLC's effectiveness in advancing agent research.

name: WildBench
intro: WildBench是一个自动化评测框架，利用真实用户查询中的1024个任务评估大型语言模型。通过任务专用检查表和两项指标（WB-Reward和WB-Score）实现系统化和可解释的自动评估。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
build_method: 网络爬取, 专家构建
task_type: 对话, 生成, 排序
intro_en: WildBench is an automated evaluation framework that assesses large language models using 1024 tasks derived from real user queries. It enables systematic and interpretable automatic evaluation through task-specific checklists and two metrics: WB-Reward and WB-Score.

name: WildToolBench
intro: WildToolBench（也称为WildBench）是一个用于评估大型语言模型在真实世界场景中工具使用能力的基准测试。该基准由艾伦人工智能研究所开发，包含多样化的工具使用任务。
intro_en: WildToolBench (also known as WildBench) is a benchmark developed by the Allen Institute for AI to evaluate large language models' tool usage capabilities in real-world scenarios. It includes a diverse set of tool usage tasks.

name: Winogrande
intro: WinoGrande是一个包含4.4万个问题的大规模数据集，其灵感源于原始的Winograd Schema Challenge（WSC），但在规模和难度上都进行了显著提升。该数据集通过精心设计的众包流程构建，并利用新颖的AfLite算法系统性地减少了数据偏差。此基准专注于常识推理能力，任务形式为填空选择题，旨在评估模型为给定句子选择正确选项的能力。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
intro_en: WinoGrande is a large-scale dataset containing 44,000 questions, inspired by the original Winograd Schema Challenge (WSC) but significantly expanded in scale and difficulty. The dataset was constructed through a carefully designed crowdsourcing process and systematically reduces data bias using the novel AfLite algorithm. This benchmark focuses on commonsense reasoning ability, presented as fill-in-the-blank multiple-choice questions, aiming to evaluate a model’s capability to select the correct option for a given sentence.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A((WSC Principles)) --> B{{Crowdsourcing}}
    B --> C[Initial Question Generation]
    C --> D{{Algorithm Generation}}
    D --> E[Scale & Difficulty Expansion]
    E --> F[Bias Reduction Process]
    F --> G{Quality Check & Refinement}
    G -->|Pass| H((WinoGrande Dataset\n44,000 Questions))

name: WorldTravel
intro: WorldTravel是一个真实的、多模态的旅行规划基准，包含150个跨5个城市的真实旅行场景，每个场景涉及平均15个以上相互依赖的时间和逻辑约束。为了在真实部署中评估智能体，该基准开发了WorldTravel-Webscape，一个多模态环境，包含2000多个渲染网页，智能体必须直接从视觉布局中感知约束参数以进行规划。对10个前沿模型的评估显示，即使是GPT-5.2在文本环境中也仅达到32.67%的可行性，在多模态环境中更是降至19.33%。
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
intro_en: WorldTravel is a realistic, multimodal travel planning benchmark featuring 150 real travel scenarios across 5 cities, each involving an average of over 15 interdependent temporal and logical constraints. To evaluate agents in real-world deployment, the benchmark developed WorldTravel-Webscape, a multimodal environment containing over 2,000 rendered web pages where agents must perceive constraint parameters directly from visual layouts for planning. Evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art models shows that even GPT-5.2 achieves only 32.67% feasibility in the text environment, dropping to 19.33% in the multimodal environment.

name: WritingBench
intro: WritingBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成式写作方面的表现。它涵盖了6个核心写作领域和100个子领域，并提出了一个查询依赖的评估框架，使LLMs能够动态生成实例特定的评估标准。该框架通过一个微调的评论模型进行标准感知评分，能够评估写作的风格、格式和长度。该基准测试及其评估工具和模块化框架组件均已开源，以促进LLMs在写作领域的发展。
org: Alibaba Group, Renmin University of China, Zhejiang University, University of California, Berkeley
build_method: 混合 (查询依赖评估框架, 数据策展)
metric: Style, Format, Length (通过评论模型评分)
eval_feature: 动态更新, 过程评估
scale: 1000个真实世界查询, 6个主要领域, 100个子领域
intro_en: WritingBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) in generative writing. It covers 6 core writing domains and 100 subdomains, introducing a query-dependent evaluation framework that enables LLMs to dynamically generate instance-specific evaluation criteria. This framework uses a fine-tuned critique model for standard-aware scoring, assessing style, format, and length. The benchmark, along with its evaluation tools and modular framework components, is open-sourced to promote the development of LLMs in writing.

name: WSC(Winograd Schema Challenge)
intro: WSC（Winograd Schema Challenge）是一个常识推理基准，使用特定的Winograd语义结构题。题目包含一个歧义代词，需根据句中某个词正确指代先行词，考验模型的世界知识和推理能力。
org: University of Toronto, New York University, SAIC
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建
intro_en: WSC (Winograd Schema Challenge) is a common-sense reasoning benchmark that uses specific Winograd semantic structure questions. Each question contains an ambiguous pronoun that must be correctly resolved to its antecedent based on a word in the sentence, testing the model's world knowledge and reasoning ability.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Linguistic Principles & Common-Sense Knowledge) --> B[Expert Question Design]
    B --> C{{Manual Annotation}}
    C --> D[Ambiguity Resolution & Antecedent Identification]
    D --> E[Expert Review & Validation]
    E --> F{Consistency Check}
    F -- Pass --> G(Winograd Schema Questions Dataset)
    F -- Fail --> B
    G --> H(Ambiguous Pronouns & Antecedents)
    G --> I[Model Common-Sense Reasoning Test]
    I --> J[Pronoun Resolution Task]

name: xbench
intro: xbench是一个动态的、与职业对齐的评估套件，旨在弥合AI代理能力与现实世界生产力之间的差距。它通过行业专业人士定义的评估任务，针对具有商业意义的领域，创建与生产力价值强相关的指标。该框架能够预测技术-市场契合度（TMF），并随着时间的推移跟踪产品能力。初步实施包括招聘和营销两个基准，分别评估代理在真实业务场景中的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 动态更新, 过程评估
scale: 招聘50个任务, 营销50个需求
intro_en: xbench is a dynamic, career-aligned evaluation suite designed to bridge the gap between AI agent capabilities and real-world productivity. It creates metrics highly correlated with productivity value through evaluation tasks defined by industry professionals, targeting commercially significant domains. The framework can predict Technology-Market Fit (TMF) and track product capabilities over time. Initial implementations include two benchmarks, recruiting and marketing, which assess agent performance in real business scenarios.

name: XLRS-Bench
intro: XLRS-Bench是一个综合性基准，用于评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在超高分辨率遥感场景中的感知和推理能力。该基准拥有迄今为止最大的平均图像尺寸（8500x8500），所有评估样本都经过人工精心标注，并辅以新颖的半自动标注器。XLRS-Bench定义了16个子任务，旨在评估MLLMs的10种感知能力和6种推理能力，重点关注促进实际决策和捕捉时空变化的先进认知过程。
org: National University of Defense Technology, Tsinghua University, Wuhan University, Beijing University
task_type: 多模态问答, 感知与推理
eval_feature: 超高分辨率, 人工标注, 复杂推理
task_type_en: Multimodal Question Answering, Perception and Reasoning
eval_feature_en: Ultra-high Resolution, Human Annotation, Complex Reasoning
intro_en: XLRS-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the perception and reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in ultra-high-resolution remote sensing scenarios. It features the largest average image size to date (8500x8500), with all evaluation samples meticulously annotated by humans and supplemented by a novel semi-automatic annotator. XLRS-Bench defines 16 subtasks aimed at assessing 10 perception capabilities and 6 reasoning abilities of MLLMs, focusing on advanced cognitive processes that facilitate practical decision-making and capture spatiotemporal changes.

name: XSTest
intro: XSTest是用于识别LLM过度安全行为的测试套件，包含250个模型不应拒绝的安全提示和200个应拒绝的不安全提示。基准帮助评估模型在保持有用性与无害性之间的平衡，避免因安全策略过严拒答安全请求。
org: Bocconi University, Centre for the Governance of AI, Sapienza University of Rome, University of Oxfo
task_type: 安全测试, 分类, 开放式问答
intro_en: XSTest is a test suite designed to identify excessive safety behaviors in LLMs, containing 250 safe prompts that models should not reject and 200 unsafe prompts that should be rejected. The benchmark helps evaluate models' balance between usefulness and harmlessness, preventing overly strict safety policies from rejecting safe requests.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A[Human Expertise] --> B[Prompt Brainstorming]
    B --> C{{Expert Drafting}}
    C --> D[Prompt Categorization]
    D -->|Safe Prompts| E(Draft Safe Prompts)
    D -->|Unsafe Prompts| F(Draft Unsafe Prompts)
    E & F --> G[Expert Review & Refinement]
    G --> H{Prompt Criteria Check}
    H -->|Pass| I(Validated Prompts)
    H -->|Fail| J[Iterative Revision]
    J --> G
    I --> K(XSTest Dataset\n250 Safe, 200 Unsafe)
    K --> L[LLM Safety Evaluation]
    L --> M[Balance Analysis]

name: ZeroBench
intro: ZeroBench是一个轻量级的视觉推理基准，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）的视觉理解能力。该基准由100个精心策划的问题和334个较简单的子问题组成，旨在挑战现有LMMs的极限。通过对20个LMMs进行评估，所有模型得分均为0.0%，揭示了它们在视觉解释方面的不足。ZeroBench的发布旨在推动视觉理解领域的进步。
org: University of Cambridge, University of Alberta, Independent Researcher, The University of Hong Kong,
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 轻量级, 多样性, 高质量, 手动策划, 零样本
eval_feature_en: Lightweight, Diversity, High Quality, Manually Curated, Zero-shot
intro_en: ZeroBench is a lightweight visual reasoning benchmark designed to evaluate the visual understanding capabilities of large multimodal models (LMMs). It consists of 100 carefully curated questions and 334 simpler sub-questions, aimed at pushing the limits of existing LMMs. Evaluations of 20 LMMs all resulted in scores of 0.0%, revealing their shortcomings in visual interpretation. The release of ZeroBench aims to advance the field of visual understanding.
mermaid_flowchart:
flowchart LR
    A(Existing Visual Data) --> B[Expert Selection & Formulation]
    B --> C[Question & Sub-question Generation]
    C --> D[Manual Annotation]
    D --> E{Annotation Quality Check}
    E -- Pass --> F[Expert Review & Curation]
    E -- Fail --> D
    F --> G(ZeroBench Dataset
100 Qs, 334 Sub-Qs)
    G --> H[LMM Evaluation]
    H --> I(Model Performance Metrics)
